author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: ZIPHEKWE ngebhodwe elincane izikhulu zoMnyango weMfundo eyisiSekelo ePhalamende ngamalungu efuna ukwazi ngezinhlelo zokubhekana nenkinga yabafundi bakwamanye amazwe, nabakuleli abangenabo omazisi. Lokhu kulandela umbiko othulelwe la malungu, oveza ukuthi bangu-610 322 abafundi abasezikoleni zakuleli, abangenabo omazisi. Kulesi sibalo, abangu-362 571 abakuleli kuthi abangu-247 755 abokufika. Uphenyo ngabafundi abangenabo omazisi lwenziwe ngumkhandlu okubhungwa kuwona izindaba zothisha, i-Education Labour Relations Council (ELRC). USihlalo wekomiti lemfundo eyisiSekelo ePhalamende, uNksz Joy Maimela, ufune ukwazi ukuthi ikuphi okwenziwayo ukuqinisekisa ukuthi abafundi bakuleli bathola omazisi? Ubuze nokuthi kusizani ukufundisa abafundi abangokufika kuleli, abagcina bengakwazi ukuveza izitifiketi zabo abazitholile ngenxa yokuthi abanabo omazisi? "Iluphi uhlelo uMnyango onalo ukuze abafundi bakuleli, bagcine bethole omazisi? Kumele kube nokusebenzisana phakathi koMnyango wezaseKhaya, ukuze laba bafundi bathole omazisi," usho kanje. Namanye amalungu asho ngazwi linye ukuthi laba bafundi bagcina bengasakwazi ukuthola izibonelelo zikahulumeni ngoba bengenabo omazisi. UMnuz Siphetho Mkhize weqembu iMKP, ukhale ngokuthi siphezulu kakhulu isibalo sabafundi abangenabo omazisi. "UMnyango wezaseKhaya kumele ungenelele enkingeni yabafundi abangenabo omazisi. Sifuna ukwazi izinhlelo zoMnyango mayelana nokuxazulula inkinga yabafundi abangenabo omazisi." UNksz Lerato Ngobeni we-ActionSA ubabaze ibhadi wathi lolu daba kumele lusukunyelwe ngokushesha. "Idingeka ilungiswe eyalaba bafundi abangenabo omazisi. Akukwazi ukuthula kube sengathi akwenzekanga lutho. UMnyango kumele usebenzisane noMnyango wezaseKhaya ukuze laba bafundi bathole omazisi." Umbiko uveze ukuthi iGauteng yisona sifundazwe esinabafundi abaningi abangenabo omazisi. Bangu-228 000 kulesiya sifundazwe. Abangu-102 100 abakuleli kanti abakwamanye amazwe bangu-125 900. KwaZulu-Natal bangu-109 000 abafundi abangenabo omazisi. Abangu-86 4780 abakuleli kanti abangu-23 300 abokufika. UMqondisi Jikelele eMnyangweni, uMnuz Mathanzima Mweli, uthe kunethimba elizosebenza noMnyango wezaseKhaya odabeni oluthinta abafundi abangenamazisi. "Ngiyajabula ukuthi kuzobizwa umhlangano ohlanganisa le minyango yomibili ukuze kubhungwe ngezinhlelo zokubhekana nenkinga yalaba bafundi," usho kanje. Kwenzeka lokhu nje, kunamamashi asabalele ezweni lonke okuchitha abantu bakwamanye amazwe abakuleli ngokungemthetho. UNksz Maimela uthe njengoba kunamamashi abantu bakuleli abakhalaza ngabantu bokufika abakuleli ngokungemthetho, lezi zibalo zizobasiza ekutheni bakwazi ukuphendula ukuthi bangaki abafundi abasezikoleni. AboMnyango weMfundo bakuveza ukuthi abakwazi ukuxosha noma ukungabafundisi abafundi abakuleli ngokungemthetho ngoba umthetho kawuvumi.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Iyaqhubeka imizamo kuhulumeni yokulwa nomdlavuza. KUNENGEBHE ezikhulwini zoMnyango wezeMpilo kuleli ngokuthi umdlavuza ungase udlebeleke ubulale inqwaba yabantu uze udlule neHIV/AIDS. Izikhulu seziyisukumele eyokusheshe kuhlonzwe umdlavuza ukuze ungagcini usubulala abantu abaningi kuleli.. Lokhu kushiwo nguNgqongqoshe wezeMpilo kuleli, uDkt Aaron Motsoaledi izolo ethula isabelomali sika-R64.8 billion, ePhalamende. Ukhale ngomdlavuza womlomo wesibeletho athe ulele endaweni yesibili ngokubulala abesifazane kuleli. "Umdlavuza webele yiwona osabulala kakhulu abesifazane kuleli. Umdlavuza womlomo wesibeletho ulele endaweni yesibili ngokubhuqa abesifazane kanti yingakho siyisukumela eyokuvikela abesifazane kulo mdlavuza. Izingane zamantombazane ezineminyaka engu-9 kuya ku-15, zivikelwa ngokuthi zithole umgomo iHPV ezikoleni. Abesifazane abaneminyaka engu-35 kuya ku-45 kumele bahlolele njalo lo mdlavuza ukuze bakwazi ukusheshe bahlonzwe," usho kanje. Uthe sebeze nobuchwepheshe besimanje ukuze bavikele abesifazane kulo mdlavuza. "Abantu abaningi besifazane besibenza i-Pap smear ukubahlola lo mdlavuza kanti manje sesizobahlola sisebenzisa ubuchwepheshe besimanje bolibofuzo. Sithole ukuthi u-65% wabesifazane okutholakale ukuthi banalo mdlavuza, basuke behaqwe nayiHIV," kusho uMotsoaledi. Uveze nokuthi ngenyanga ezayo bazokwethula ngokusemthethweni umgomo wokuvikela abangakahaqwa yiHIV, iLenacapavir. "Umengameli wezwe uzokwethula lo mgomo ngoJuni 5, ngenyanga ezayo. Inhloso wukulwa nokusabalala kweHIV ngokuvikela abangakahaqeki. Abaseqhulwini ekutholeni lo mgomo kubalwa abesifazane abakhulelwe, abancelisayo, abaqwayizi, amadoda alala namanye, abazijova ngezidakamizwa kanjalo nentsha," usho kanje. Uthe basaqinisile nasempini yokulwa nokusabalala kwesifo sofuba esijuqa abantu abaningi kuleli. "Ngonyaka sifuna ukuhlola abantu abangu-5 million ukuthi abanayo yini iTB ngoba asifuni isabalale ngoba iyabulala kakhulu. Ngisanda kuthola imishini okwazi ukwehla wenyuka nayo yokwenza i-X Ray, ongakwazi ukuhlola isifo sofuba kubantu noma bekuphi kuphume imiphumela manje." Uthe imali abayithola kuMgcinimafa yokuphucula isimo kwezempilo, seyenze izinto eziningi okubalwa ukuqasha odokotela nabanye abasebenzi bezempilo. "Siqashe odokotela abangu-933 kwabangu-1 200 esasithe sizobaqasha. Sithenge imibhede eyevile ku-25 000 ezibhedlela. Sithenge ne-linen ebalelwa ku-73 000, nomatrasi ababalelwa ku-88 000 ezibhedlela zakuleli," usho kanje. Ukhale ngokuthi ukuncishiswa kwesabelomali kuyawushaya umkhakha wezempilo kuleli.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: UMHOLI waseBuhleni kwaShembe uNyazilwezulu ngesikhathi ehlangene nabaholi beKhomishini yezoKhetho kuleli sonto IZIKHULU zeKhomishini yezoKhetho kuleli zinabefundisi bakwaShembe ngesikhathi zihlangene noNyazilwezulu ZISONGE uhambo lwaKwaZulu-Natal ngokuhlangana neKhabhinethi yesifundazwe izikhulu zeKhomishini yezoKhetho kuleli. Lezi zikhulu beziqhubeka nokuhlangana nezinhlaka ezehlukene kuleli, okubalwa amaqembu ezepolitiki, abamahlelo ahlukene, amakhosi kanjalo nezinye izinhlaka. NgoLwesibili izikhulu ebeziholwa nguSihlalo weKhomishini, uMnuz Mosotho Moepya, zihlangane nomholi webandla lakwaShembe, ohlangothini lwaseBuhleni, uNyazilwezulu, KwaMhlabuyalingana. Kulo mhlangano lizikhulu beziyondlala izinhlelo zokhetho oluzayo, lwangoNovemba 4, 2026. Isitatimende seKhomishini emuva komhlangano, sithe obekuseqhulwini wukuqinisa eyokusebenzisana njengoba kuzoba nokhetho lohulumeni basekhaya. "Sifuna umphakathi ubambe iqhaza ezinhlelweni zokuvota ikakhulu eKZN. Sizimisele ukuxazulula zonke izikhalo ezithinta ukhetho nokuvota. Siyazibophezela ekubambeni ukhetho olunokuthula nolukhululekile," kusho iKhomishini ethe lube yimpumelelo uhambo lwayo. Izkhulu zeKhomishini zihamba ziphinde zibuyele kulesi sifundazwe nje, yingoba kunombiko owaveza ukuthi abantu bakulesi sifundazwe, abasayingeni eyokubamba iqhaza okhethweni. Lolu cwaningo lwajutshwa yiKhomishini ukuzwa ukuphawula komphakathi ngezithinta ukuvota kuleli. Kwenzeka lokhu nje, ngenyanga ezayo kuzovulwa ithuba lokuthi abantu babhalisele ukuvota. Lokhu kuzokwenzeka ngempelasonto yangoJuni 20 no-21. Abantu bayanxuswa ukuthi babhalisele ukuvota ngoba kulolu khetho bazokwazi ukuvota kuphela lapho bebhalise khona. Kwenzeka lokhu nje iqembu iMKP lifuna luhlehliswe ukhetho ngoba lisakhala ngokuthi labanjwa inkunzi emiphumeleni yokhetho lukazwelonke lwango-2024. Izikhulu zekhomishini zihlanganile muva nje nomholi waleli qembu uMnuz Jacob Zuma mayelana nezikhalo anazo kodwa yathi iyaqhubeka necala elizongena ngenyanga ezayo elimayelana nesikhalo ngale miphumela.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: KUKHALWE ngamacala asazohlehla ezinkantolo zakuleli, ukungalungiswa kwezinkantolo kanjalo nezinye izinselelo ezibhekene nabasebenza eMnyangweni wezobuLungiswa kuncishiswa isabelomali salo mnyango. Lokhu kuvezwe abamaqembu ahlukene ePhalamende ngesikhathi kunenkulumo-mpikiswano ngesabelomali salo mnyango esethulwe nguNgqongqoshe wezobuLungiswa nokuThuthukiswa koMthethosisekelo, uNksz Mmamoloko Kubayi. UNksz Kubayi uveze ukuthi isabelomali salo nyaka sehliswe ngo-R332 million, kanti singu-R26.3 billion. "Ngizizwile izikhalo zokuthi ezinye zezinto ngeke zenzeke ngenxa yokuncishiswa kwesabelomali. Zikhona izinhlelo esizoqinisa kuzona okubalwa ukuqinisa ithimba elisebenzisana namaphoyisa nokulandelela okuphuma kwiKhomishini kaMadlanga," usho kanje. UMnuz Mzwanele Manyi weMKP, ukhale ngokuthi amacala asazohlehla ngenxa yokungavalwa kwezikhala. "Kunezikhala ezevile ku-1 600 ezingavaliwe, nezinkantolo azilungiswa ngesikhathi okwenza kube nzima ukusebenza. Lokhu kukhomba ukuthi abasebenzi basazothwala kanzima ekubeni umnyango ubaluleke kakhulu ekushushiseni abakhohlakele." Namanye amalungu ePhalamende akhalile ngokungalungiswa kwezinkantolo, ukuhlehla kwamacala kanjalo nezinye izingqinamba ezikhona. UNksz Kubayi uthe basemkhankasweni wokuvala izikhala ezivulekile ngenxa yokukhushulelwa ezikhundleni kwabasebenzi. "Sibeke u-R2.7 billion wokunyusa amaholo ezimantshi, isiyonke imali yamaholo ingu-R16 billion okuwu-62% wesabelomali. Silwa nobugebengu ngokuqinisa ukubhaliswa kwama-sim card njengoba ubugebengu benzeka kakhulu kusetshenziswa ubuchwepheshe. Sibekele izinkampani zokuxhumana umnqamulajuqu wokuthi zihambisane nemigomo yeRICA, ezizohluleka ukwenza lokhu sizozithathela izinyathelo. Silwa nenkinga yokusabalala kwama-sim card angabhalisiwe kuleli ukunqanda ubugebengu." Uthe bandisa nezinkantolo ezizobhekana namacala athinta udlame olubhekiswe kwabesifazane. "Sibuyekeza nemigomo ethinta umqulu onamagama abantu asebelahlwe amacala okuhlukumeza ngokocansi ukuze uvuleleke. Ngaleyo ndlela kuzoba lula ukubona asebeke balahlwa amacala."

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Lenyukile izinga labangasebenzi kuleli Image: Ron Lach/Pexels PHEZU kokuba linyukile izinga labantu abangasebenzi kuleli, kodwa kunenhlansi yethemba KwaZulu-Natal kunyuka isibalo sabantu abatohozayo. Izinga lokungasebenzi linyuke laya ku-32.7% ekoteni yokuqala ka-2026, lisuka ku-31.4% ekoteni yesine yango-2025. Lezi zibalo zimenyezelwe nguMnuz Risenga Maluleke, iStatistician-General kwiStats SA, izolo. UMaluleke uthe kulahleke imisebenzi engu-345 000, kanti sesimi ku-16.8 million isibalo sabantu abasebenzayo kuleli. "I-KZN yisona sodwa isifundazwe esinyukelwe izinga labantu abasebenzayo ngabangu-6 000. Isifundazwe esehlelwe kakhulu yizinga labasebenzayo yiNorth West ngabangu-80 000, kulandele iGauteng ngabangu-67 000 neMpumalanga ngabangu-54 000." Uthe sinyukile nesibalo sentsha eneminyaka engu-15 kuya ku-24, engasebenzi. "Lingu-60.9% izinga lentsha eneminyaka engu-15 kuya ku-24 engasebenzi kuleli. Sinyuke saya ku-8.1 million isibalo sabantu abangasebenzi kuleli. Intsha iyona ebhekene nengwadla yokungasebenzi," usho kanje. Uthe kwabaneminyaka engu-25 kuya ku-34, izinga lokungasebenzi limi ku-40.6%. Ukhale nangokuthi sinyukile nesibalo salabo abalahle ithemba lokuthola umsebenzi saya ku-3.9 million. Uqhube wathi kuseva ukuyamamisa ukwehla kwemisebenzi nempi eqhubeka eMiddle East. Iqembu i-EFF ligxeke i-ANC ngokunyuka kwesibalo sabangasebenzi. Leli qembu lithe uKhongolose umatasa uvikela uMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa ezinkingeni abhekene nazo walaxaza abantu abangasebenzi. I-ActionSA ihlabe ikhwelo kuRamaphosa ukuthi axoshe bonke ongqongqoshe abakwiGNU ababhebhezela inkinga yokungasebenzi. "Sizobhalela uRamaphosa simnxuse ukuthi athathe izinyathelo ezinqala kongqongqoshe bezomnotho abahlulwa umsebenzi. Abantu abakwazi ukuthembela entweni engekho yokuthi ngelinye ilanga bayothola umsebenzi." Imikhakha okulahleke inqwaba yemisebenzi kubalwa ethinta ezokwakha, ezokuthutha neyasezindlini. Okukhule kuyona imisebenzi eyokukhiqiza, izimayini kanjalo nezolimo.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: AMAKHOSI ahlukene ahlangane nezikhulu zeKhomishini yoKhetho eKZN izolo ISIKHULU seKhomishini yezoKhetho KwaZulu-Natal, uNkk Ntombifuthi Masinga, emhlanganweni neNdlu yobuHoli boMdabu esifundazweni izolo ZIBUYA ziphindelela KwaZulu-Natal izikhulu zeKhomishini yezoKhetho i-Independent Electoral Commission (IEC), zizohlangana nabaholi abehlukene. Lezi zikhulu zisemkhankasweni wokuhlanganisa amehlo nabaholi abehlukene njengoba kubhekwe okhethweni lohulumeni basekhaya ngoNovemba 4, 2026. Namhlanje izikhulu zizohlangana nomholi webandla lakwaShembe, ohlangothini lwaseBuhleni, uMduduzi "Nyazilwezulu" Shembe. Akukapheli sikhathi esingakanani izikhulu zisesifundazweni,zihlangane naneSilo samaBandla, uMisuzulu kaZwelithini. Isitatimende se-IEC sithe uSihlalo weKhomishini, uMnuz Mosotho Moepya, uzohlangana noNyazi KwaMhlabuyalingana. Sithe izolo abaholi bebehlangane neNdlu yabaHoli boMdabu esifundazweni. "NgoLwesithathu, bazohlangana neKhabhinethi. Umhlangano uzoba seMgungundlovu," kusho i-IEC. Sithe le mihlangano eyokuhlanganisa nezinhlaka ezehlukene zobuholi, ukuzinzisa intando yabantu kuleli. "I-IEC iqinisa ubudlelwano nezinhlaka ezehlukene njengoba kubhekwe okhethweni. IKhomishini isike yahlangana ngisho nabaholi bamaqembu ezepolitiki." IKhomishini ibuya iphindelela kulesi sifundazwe nje, umbiko wocwaningo olwenziwa yikhomishini, waveza ukuthi abantu bakuleli sebelahle ithemba abasenamdlandla ngezinto ezithinta ukhetho. Lo mbiko waveza ukuthi abantu bakulesi sifundazwe, yibona asebelahle ithemba kakhulu ekuvoteni. Yingakho izikhulu zibuya ziphindelela ukuze zinxenxe abaholi ukuthi bagqugquzele abantu ukuthi babambe iqhaza okhethweni. Emuva komhlangano nezikhulu zekhomishini, iMbube yanxusa ukuthi abantu besifundazwe bavote njengoba kuza ukhetho. Okunye abantu abanxuswa ukuthi bakwenze ukubhalisela ukuvota ngenyanga ezayo. Ikhomishini ivule ithuba ngempelasonto yangoJuni 20 no-21, ukuthi abantu babhalisele ukuvota. Kumanje abantu bayanxuswa ukuthi bazibheke ukuthi babhalisele kuphi ukuvota. Banxuswa kanje ngoba okhethweni oluzayo, umuntu uvota lapho ebhalise khona, akakwazi ukuvota noma yikuphi ngoba kusuke kukhethwa abaholi abazohola emphakathini.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Umholi we-ActionSA uMnuz Herman Mashaba KUHLUKANE imibono ngesiphakamiso seqembu i-ActionSA ePhalamende, sokunciphisa isibalo songqongqoshe kwiKhabhinethi, ngokuqeda ngezikhundla zamaphini ongqongqoshe. Leli qembu lifuna iPhalamende linikwe amandla okuthathela izinyathelo ongqongqoshe ababhacazayo uma kungukuthi umengameli wezwe uhudula izinyawo. Muva nje iPhalamende libhunge lesi siphakamiso ngaphansi koMthethosivivinywa i-Twenty-third Constitutional Amendment Bill, ehlose ukubuyekeza uMthethosisekelo wezwe. UMnuz Athol Trollip we-ActionSA, uthe asikho isidingo samaphini ongqongqoshe ngoba bafana nabantu abangenzi lutho. Uthe bamosha imali yabakhokhi bentela wathi lokhu kumosha u-R1.5 billion, ngonyaka. "Kumele sizibuze ukuthi yini umsebenzi wamaphini ongqongqoshe? Uma ongqongqoshe bengekho abakwazi ukubamba izintambo emnyangweni," usho kanje. Okunye okuhloswe nguMthethosivivinywa, wukuchitha ngevoti kongqongqoshe ababhacazayo kuphinde kuhlolwe kabanzi ongqongqoshe ngaphambi kokuqokelwa ezikhundleni. UTrollip ukhale ngobukhulu beKhabhinethi ngabantu abangu-76, ongqongqoshe abangu-33 namaphini abo angu-43. "Amaphini ongqongqoshe bafana nabantu abafudumeza izihlalo. Abanamsebenzi walutho. Umengameli unikwe amandla okususa ongqongqoshe kodwa uma engakwenzi lokhu kumele iPhalamende lingenelele." U-Advocate Glynnis Breytenbach we-DA, uthe kunemigomo abayesekayo eMthethwenisivivinywa. "Eminye yemigomo iyasikhathaza. Ukunika iPhalamende amandla kuzoshintsha ukudla epuletini." UMnuz Oscar Mathafa we-ANC, uchithe eyokuthi awanamsebenzi walutho amaphini ongqongqoshe. "Lo Mthethosivivinywa kukhona lapho ungena ugamanxa khona ezintweni ezithinta ukuqokwa kongqongqoshe. Amandla okuqoka ongqongqoshe namaphini abo akumengameli wezwe," usho kanje. UMnuz Mzwanele Manyi we-MKP, uthe uyahambisana neyesiphakamiso sokuchitha ngevoti lokungabuthembi ubuholi bongqongqoshe. "Akekho ungqongqoshe okumele kuthiwe akathintwa uma umengameli engamthatheli izinyathelo. Awabekhona amaphini ongqongqoshe athamele nemihlangano yeKhabhinethi ukuze kube nozinzo eminyangweni." UNksz Mathibe Mohlala we-EFF, uthe bayayeseka eyokuqedwa kweyamaphini ongqongqoshe. "Asikho isidingo sabo ngoba kuqokwe ibamba likangqongqoshe emuva kokumiswa kukangqongqoshe wamaPhoyisa ekubeni likhona iphini likangqongqoshe. Asihambisani neyokuchithwa ngevoti kongqongqoshe." IPatriotic Alliance ne-UDM ayihambisani nalo Mthethosivivinywa.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: UMPHATHISWA woMnyango wezeMfundo KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Sipho Hlomuka KUXWAYISWE abazokopela njengoba kuqale ukubhalwa kwezivivinyo zika-matric omdala kanjalo nalabo ababhala izivivinyo zeNational Senior Certificate KwaZulu-Natal. Lesi sexwayiso sikhishwe uMphathiswa wezeMfundo esifundazweni, uMnuz Sipho Hlomuka, izolo, njengoba bengu-25 399 ababhala lezi zivivinyo. UHlomuka uthe bazobhekana nomthetho abazophambana nemigomo yezivivinyo. "Ngeke siyibekezelele eyabazobanjwa bekopela noma ukuputshuka kwamaphepha njengoba kuqale izivivinyo. Kumele ngaso sonke isikhathi sivikelwe isithunzi sezivivinyo. Bazobhekana nomthetho abazobanjwa bephula imigomo yokubhalwa kwezivivinyo," kusho uHlomuka. Uthe kunabafundi abangu-14 240 ababhala u-matric iNational Senior Certificate esuka ngo-2008 kuze kube yimanje. Kunabangu-11 159 ababhala u-matric wangaphambi kuka-2008, ababhalayo. "Kuqeqeshwe abazoqapha ukubhalwa kwezivivinyo abangu-1 000, ezindaweni ezingu-900 zokubhalela. Kuqokwe abamakayo abangu-681 kanti izincwadi zokubaqasha zizokhishwa ngoJuni 19." Ukumakwa kwamaphepha kulindeleke ukuthi kuqale ngoJulayi 3, kuphothulwe ngoJulayi 9. "Imiphumela izokhishwa ngo-Agasti 7, 2026. Kuzogaywa amaphepha okubhalwa abalelwa ku-8 million." Uthe benze izinhlelo zokubhekana nokuguquka kwesimo sezulu njengoba kubhalwa. "Sinezingxoxo eziqhubeka ukuqinisekisa ukuthi akukho okuphazamisa izivivinyo okubalwa nesimo sezulu." Unxuse ababhalayo ukuthi basheshe bafike ezikhungweni zokubhala, baphathe nezincwadi zabo zokubhala. Ubakhumbuze nokuthi bangabakhohlwa omazisi babo wathi uma sebebhala bangatatazeli. "Ababeke umoya phansi, bangatatazeli. Abakholelwe ekutheni babhala into abasebenze kanzima beyifunda." Uhlabe nekhwelo kubazali, umphakathi nothisha ukuthi beseke ababhalayo. Uphinde waveza nokuthi sebehlelela izivivinyo zokuphela konyaka zika-matric. Uveze nokuthi ngenyanga ezayo kuzobhalwa nezivivinyo zamaphakathi nonyaka zika-matric zokuhlola ukulungela kwabafundi ukubhala izivivinyo zokuphela konyaka. Uthe uzoveza okuningi uma esethula isabelomali somnyango esiShayamthetho ngoJuni 12, 2026. Kuzokhumbuleka ukuthi lesi sifundazwe siqophe umlando siqwaqwada zonke ezinye izifundazwe emiphumeleni yanyakenye ka-matric. Lesi sifundazwe senza kahle phezu kwezingqinamba ezikhona emnyangweni zemali. Lezi zingqinamba zenza umnyango ungakwazi ukukhokha ngesikhathi imali yezikole eyaziwa ngama-Norms and Standards. Awukwazi ngisho ukukhokhela ngesikhathi osonkontileka owenza nabo imisebenzi okubalwa nabathenga izincwadi zokufunda. Nyakenye umnyango uhluleke ukuthenga izincwadi zokufunda ezikoleni, wakwazi ukuthenga kuphela i-stationery ngenxa yemali.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Kumenywa abantu ukuba baphawule ngezinguquko ezizokwenziwa INGCABHA isisemphakathini ukuthi uphawule ngomthetho ozovumela abantu bakuleli ukuthi bagcine omazisi babo kumaselula. Ngaphansi komthetho i-Identification Act ka-1997, bazokwazi nokugcina izitifiketi zokuzalwa, ezomshado kanjalo nolunye ulwazi olubalulekile lwaseMnyangweni wezaseKhaya. Izichibiyelo zalo mthetho zimenyezelwe wuNgqongqoshe wezaseKhaya, uDkt Leon Schreiber, onxuse umphakathi ukuthi uphawule ungakapheli uJuni kulo nyaka. "Ngalezi zichibiyelo sifuna ukuletha ubuchwepheshe besimanje ezintweni ezithinta omazisi kuleli. Omazisi abakhona ama-smart ID, bazoqhubeka basebenze kanye nalabo bobuchwepheshe. Ngaleyo ndlela sifuna kube lula kubantu ukuthi bagcine imininingwane yabo kanjalo neminye imiqingo  ebalulekile komakhalekhukhwini. Abazogcina omazisi kuphela, kodwa bazokwazi nokugcina izitifiketi zokuzalwa nezomshado," kusho uSchreiber. Uthe ngalokhu bafuna ukwenza izinguquko emnyangweni ngokuqinisa kwezobuchwepheshe. "Sifuna ukuvikela ulwazi lwabantu ngokuthi siqede inkohlakalo edla lubi emnyangweni, ukulwa nenkinga yabantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho, ukuntshontshwa kolwazi lwabantu kanjalo nokuqinisa izinhlelo zethu. Sihlose ukuthi abantu bakwazi ukuthola izidingo behleli emakhaya," usho kanje. Uthe bafuna nokuphucula indlela okuqoqwa ngayo imininingwane yabantu emnyangweni. Uveze ukuthi bazoqinisa ezokuphepha ukuze imininingwanei yabantu ingafinyeleli ebantwini abangafanele. "Sisebenzisana neminyango ehlukene okubalwa nehhovisi likamengameli ukuqinisa ezobuchwepheshe kuhulumeni. Sifuna lonke ulwazi abantu baluthole kalula komakhalekhukhwini." Umphakathi unikwe kuze kube uJuni 6, 2026 ukuthi uphawule ngalezi zichibiyelo. Bangaqondisa ukuphawula kwabo ku:Chief Director: Legal Services kanti bangathumela ukuphawula kwabo ngokuzihambisela ngqo emnyangweni ekhelini elithi:10th Floor, Hallmark Building, 230 Johannes Ramokhoase Street, Pretoria, 0001. Bangathumela ngeposi ku:Private Bag X114, Pretoria, 0001. Bangaphinde bathumele nange-email ku:[email protected].

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: UNGQONGQOSHE wezeMfundo eyisiSekelo, uNksz Siviwe Gwarube Image: Itumeleng English / Independent Newspapers BASAZOTHWALA kanzima abafundi nothisha ezikoleni zakuleli, ngemuva kokuba uMnyango kaMgcinimafa ukhala ngokuthi ngeke ukwazi ukuxhasa zonke izinhlelo zoMnyango weMfundo eyisiSekelo. Lokhu kuvezwe nguNgqongqoshe weMfundo eyisiSekelo, uNksz Siviwe Gwarube, ngesikhathi enomhlangano nekomiti lasePhalamende. Kwenzeka lokhu nje, lo mnyango ubhekene nezinselelo zemali ikakhulu KwaZulu-Natal, njengoba ungakwazi ukukhokhela ngesikhathi ezinye zezidingo okubalwa imali yezikole eyaziwa ngama-Norms and Standards. Nyakenye uhluleke ngisho ukuthenga izincwadi zokufunda ezikoleni, wathenga kuphela i-stationery. UNksz Gwarube uthe isimo sisazoba nzima emnyangweni. "Umnyango kaMgcinimafa uthe ngeke ukwazi ukuxhasa ezinye izinhlelo. Usiyalele ukuthi sibheke lapho singathatha khona imali ezinhlelweni zomnyango, ukuze sikwazi ukuxhasa ezinye izinhlelo. Lokhu kuzokwenza ukuthi singakwazi ukufeza zonke izidingo." usho kanje. Uveze lokhu nje, maduzane kulindeleke ukuthi ethule isabelomali salo nyaka somnyango. Kulo mhlangano kuvele nendaba yokuthi kunabafundi abangobokufika kuleli abasezikoleni. UNksz Gwarube uthe uMthethosiskelo wezwe ucacile ukuthi akumele kukhishwe inyumbazane abafundi abangenazo izimfanelo zokuba kuleli. "Bakhona nabafundi bakuleli, abasezikoleni kodwa abangenazo izitifiketi zokuzalwa. Asikwazi ukubancisha imfundo ngoba bengenazo izitifiketi zokuzalwa. Asikwazi ukuphambana nokushiwo uMthethosisekelo olawula izwe." UMqondisi jikelele emnyangweni, uMnuz Mathanzima Mweli, uthe awukho umgomo wokuthi abafundi kumele bafundisane encwadini eyodwa wathi lokhu kwenzeka ngenxa yokushoda kwazo. "Baningi abafundi abasebenzisa incwadi eyodwa ekubeni ngabe akumele kube kanjalo. Lokhu kwande kakhulu emabangeni angaphansi kuka-matric. Awukho umgomo othi abafundi kumele basebenzise incwadi eyodwa," usho kanje. Kuphinde kwavela nendaba yezinselelo ohlelweni lokudla ezikoleni ikakhulu esifundazweni. Okuvezwe yizikhulu zomnyango ngukuthi kulesi sifundazwe, kwengezwe abafundi abevile ku-200 000 ekutheni bahlomule kulolu hlelo, ekubeni imali ingazange yengezwe ukuze badle. Lokhu kusho ukuthi sandile isibalo sabafundi asebedla ekubeni imali ingazange yengezwe. UNksz Gwarube ubuye waveza ukuthi njengoba uGrade R usuyimpoqo, bayazama ukutshala imali ukuze ungabikhona umthelela ongemuhle.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Image: MK Party/ Facebook AQASHWE ngelokhozi yizinhlaka zokuphepha nezinhloli amamashi athe chithi saka okuzwakalisa ukungenami ngabantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho ukuze kungagcini sekuqubuka udlame kuphinde nezibhelu ezenzeka ngo-2021. Lokhu kuvezwe okhulumela uMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa izolo, uMnuz Vincent Magwenya, esithangamini nabezindaba eKapa. Uthe uRamaphosa uthola ukwelulekwa cishe njalo ngabezokuphepha ngalawa mamashi. "Aqashwe ngelokhozi ukuthi kungagcini sekuphinda isehlakalo sangoJulayi 2021, lapho kwacekelwa khona impahla kwatatshwa nempahla ezitolo. Kujutshwe abezomthetho ukuthi baqaphe okwenzekayo. Kuqiniswe uphiko lwamaphoyisa aqapha izibhelu kanjalo nezobunhloli kuleli selokhu kwenzeka izibhelu zango-2021 ," kusho uMagwenya. Kwadaleka umonakalo omkhulu emnothweni wezwe kwashona nenqwaba yabantu ngezibhelu zango-2021, ikakhulu KwaZulu-Natal naseGauteng. Muva nje andile amamashi aholwa izishoshovu zomphakathi ezingeneme njengoba izolo eThekwini bekukhona ukhukhulelangoqo wemashi eye nasePhoyinti, okungesinye sesizinda okugcwele kuso abantu bokufika kuleli dolobha. UMagwenya uphinde wachitha eyokuthi abantu bakuleli, banenzondo nabantu bokufika kuleli. "UMengameli ube nezingxoxo nomengameli waseMozambique uMnuz Daniel Chapo, wamqinisekisa ukuthi abantu bakuleli banemfudumalo futhi ababazondi abantu bakwamanye amazwe. Into okumele ixoxwe ngukuthi kungani abantu bakwamanye amazwe bashiye emazweni abo baye kwamanye amazwe. Le ngxoxo kumele kube eyabo bonke abantu base-Afrika," usho kanje. Uveze ukuthi abantu bakuleli banezikhalazo ngobugebengu, obunye obenziwa abantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho. Uthe abantu bakuleli banelungelo lokumasha okuyinto eseMthethwenisisekelo wezwe. "UMengameli unxuse abantu bakwamanye amazwe abakuleli ukuthi bahloniphe imithetho yezwe. Nathi siyawuhlonipha umthetho ngakho nabo kumele benze okufanayo." UMagwenya ubuye waveza ukuthi uRamaphosa akanankinga nokuhlangana nowayengumengameli wezwe, uMnuz Jacob Zuma. Kunokukhuluma okusabalele bokuthi uRamaphosa angase ahlangane noZuma, osehola iqembu iMKP. "UZuma noRamaphosa abazona izitha. Banemibono ehlukile yezepolitiki, kodwa abazona izitha. Bayahlangana, bebehlangene muva nje eSwatini, lapho bajabulelana kwaba kuhle," kusho uMagwenya. Uthe uma behlangana kuzobe kungekhona ukuthi kuhlangana izitha. "UZuma wayengumengameli wezwe. Angahlangana noma yinini noRamaphosa ngoba unalo ilungelo lokwenza lokhu. URamaphosa uyahlangana nabanye ababengomengameli okubalwa uMnuz Thabo Mbeki. Bayahlangana emihlanganweni ye-ANC, baxoxe." Uphawule nangohambo lukaRamaphosa, lwaseZimbabwe muva nje. "URamaphosa uye eZimbabwe ngoba emenywe nguMengameli wakhona. Wayengazi ukuthi ethimbeni labantu abafica eZimbabwe, kunomlisa ofunwa abomthetho kuleli. Akamazi lo mlisa futhi useyalele abezomthetho ukuthi baqhubeke nomsebenzi wabo ngaphandle kokwesaba. Akukho okungale ayekuyele eZimbabwe," usho kanje.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: AKAXHAMAZELI uMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa, odabeni lwezinsolo ezibhekene noNgqongqoshe wokuThuthukiswa koMphakathi kuleli, uNksz Sisisi Tolashe. UNksz Tolashe usolwa ngokudukisa iPhalamende odabeni lomnikelo wezimoto ezimbili ezanikelelwa uphiko lwabesifazane lwe-ANC, angumengameli walo. Kuthiwa lezi zimoto ezazinikelelwe lolu phiko, wazinika izingane zakhe. Kuthiwa akazange ayiveze indaba yazo ebuzwa ePhalamende. Izolo emhlanganweni wasePhalamende, uthe akazange ayiveze indaba yazo ngoba zazinikelelwe i-ANC Womens League. "Kunezinsolo zokuthi ngadukisa iPhalamende, okungelona iqiniso." Okhulumela uRamaphosa, uMnuz Vincent Magwenya, ekhuluma nabezindaba izolo eKapa, uthe umengameli uwutholile umbiko ngoNksz Tolashe. "Umengameli uwumuntu ongaxhamazeli, othatha isikhathi sakhe uma enza into. Uwutholile umbiko odabeni oluthinta izimoto, maduzane ngeke ngimangale uma ehlangana naye uNksz Tolashe," usho kanje. Umfelandawonye wezinyunyana iSaftu, uzwakalise ukukhathazeka ngezinsolo ezibhekiswe nguNksz Tolashe. Ibuze ukuthi kungani uRamaphosa engamthatheli izinyathelo ezinqala uNksz Tolashe? "ONgqongqoshe baqokwa ngumengameli. Kungani ke ethuli uRamaphosa odabeni lukaNksz Tolashe? Kumele asichazele ukuthi usamethemba yini uNksz Tolashe." Ithe kwayena uRamaphosa umanxebanxeba odabeni oluthinta ipulazi lakhe iPhala Phala yingakho engathathi zinyathelo. UMagwenya ebuzwa ngabanye ongqongqoshe ababonakala befambula emsebenzini wabo okubalwa uNksz Siviwe Gwarube emnyangweni weMfundo ePhakeme ojube uphenyo ngolwethenda yezincwadi, uthe akulindwe uphenyo. "Maduzane kuzomenyezelwa izinyathelo ngezinto ezithinta uhlelo lwamathenda okuthengwa kwempahla kuhulumeni. Kunenkinga enkulu eyagqanyiswa yayiKhomishini kaJaji Raymond Zondo kanjalo nekaMadlanga," kusho uMagwenya.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: UPhakelumthakathi Ndabandaba noXolani Khumalo KUKHALWE ngokushoda kobuholi kuhulumeni wakuleli ngokubhukula kwabantu bemasha bekhala ngesihlava sokwanda kwabantu bakwamanye amazwe, abakuleli ngokungemthetho. Lokhu kugqame ngesikhathi kunempikiswano esiShayamthetho saKwaZulu-Natal, ngabantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho. Amalungu esiShayamthetho abeshintshana, aveze ukuthi lolu daba luyaphuthuma njengoba abantu sebediniwe ukusonga izandla kukahulumeni, abamsola ngokungenzi lutho ngalolu daba. Phezu kokuba uhulumeni eveza ukuthi kukhona akwenzayo ngabantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho njengoba kunenqwaba ephindiselwa emazweni abo kodwa abahola la mamashi bathathwe njengamaqhawe asukumele izwe lawo. Izishoshovu zamasiko okunguNgizwe Mchunu, noPhakelumthakathi bahola amamashi aqale esifundazweni, adlulela kuGompo City, ePitoli naseGoli, ukuzwakalisa ukungenami ngabantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho. UNksz Nompumelelo Gasa weqembu iMKP, uthe abantu bakuleli bazosolwa ngokuba nenzondo kubantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho ngenxa yokusukuma balungise izwe labo. Uthe kodwa akunjalo, ababuswa yinzondo kodwa balungisa isimo abasibona siphuma esandleni. "Bangamaqhawe abantu ababhukulile, bahola amamashi okukhala ngesihlava sokwanda kwabantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho. Batshengise ukuthanda nokukhathalela izwe labo ngokusukumela inkinga abayibona ikhula," usho kanje. Ukhale ngokuthi abantu bakuleli balinda amahora amade emitholampilo nasezibhedlela ngenxa yokugcwala kwabantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho. UMnuz Mongezi Twala we-EFF okunguye ophakamise ukuthi kubhungwe ngalesi sihlava, usole ukungabikhona kobuholi obuqotho ezweni ngalesi sihlava esihlasele ezweni. "Yingakho abantu bebhukulile bazihola bona ngoba bebona ukuthi abukho ubuholi kuleli. Sinenkinga yemingcele kuleli, abantu bakwazi ukuzingenela baphume noma yikanjani," kusho uTwala. UMphathiswa wezeMidlalo, ubuCiko namaSiko, uMnuz Mntomuhle Khawula weqembu i-IFP, uthe uhulumeni unomkhankaso wokulwa neyabantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho njengoba kunomkhankaso wokukhuculula le nkinga. Uthe kunomkhankaso oholwa nguNdunankulu, uMnuz Thami Ntuli, othi "engangeni ngesango iyafohla", olwa nale nkinga yabantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho. "Kunemithetho ecacile ezweni ethinta ukuqashwa kwabantu abavela kwamanye amazwe. Abanye osomabhizinisi baphula imithetho yezwe ngokuqasha abantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho ukuze babakhokhele imali encane." UNksz Sizophila Mkhizwe we-ANC, ugxeke ukushiswa kwezitolo nodlame wathi bayahambisana nekhwelo leSilo, lokuthi kumele amamashi abe nokuthula. "Izinkinga zomphakathi akumele zibuswe ngosomathuba. Uhulumeni unezinhlelo zokubuyisela emuva abantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho. Kuvakashelwa namabhizinisi kubhekwe abantu abaqashiwe khona abavela kwamanye amazwe ukuthi ngabe bakuleli ngokusemthethweni," usho kanje. UMnuz Mzamo Billy we-DA, uthe le nkinga ayivumbikanga manje, wathi isineminyaka ikhona. "Inkinga isuka kude ngaphansi kwe-ANC, imingcele ingaqashiwe ngendlela efanele. Inkohlakalo edla lubi kanjalo nezinye izinto okubalwa nokwehliswa kwesabelomali. Akumele kuvunyelwe umphakathi uzithathele umthetho ngezandla." UMphathiswa wokuThuthukiswa koMphakathi, uNksz Mbali Shinga we-NFP, uthe inkinga yabantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho kumele ilungiswe kulandelwe umthetho. "Sifuna abantu abakuleli balandele imithetho yezwe."

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Image: Armand Hough / Independent Newspapers NJENGOBA selumenyezelwe usuku lokhetho oluzayo lohulumeni basekhaya kuleli, iKhomishini yezoKhetho isigqugquzele abavoti ukuthi bazibheke lapho bebhalise khona. Ikhomishini ithe lokhu kuzosiza ekutheni umvoti uzozazi lapho ezobe ekhona ngosuku lokhetho okunguNovemba 4, 2026. Izitshudeni ezihlala kude namakhaya, ezizobe zisezikhungweni zemfundo ephakeme ngosuku lokhetho, ziyalelwe ukuthi zibhalise lapho zizobe zikhona ukuze zikwazi ukuvota. UMnuz Sy Mamabolo, isikhulu esiphezulu sekhomishini, uthe njengoba selumenyezelwe usuku lokhetho, bahlabela phambili namalungiselelo alolu suku olukhulu. Uthe bazimisele ukubamba ukhetho olungenazihibe futhi lingaphazamiseki. "Kubalulekile ukuthi abantu bazazi ukuthi bazobe bekuphi ngosuku lokhetho. Umuntu uvota lapho ebhalise khona kuphela ngakho kumele bazi ukuthi ngosuku lokhetho bazobe bekuphi." Ikhomishini izovula ithuba ngoJuni 20 no-21, ukuthi abantu babhalisele ukuvota. Kuhlelwe nokuthi elinye ithuba liphinde livulwe ngo-Agasti. Njengoba uMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa ememezele usuku lokhetho, osekusele ngukuthi uNgqongqoshe wezokuBusa ngokuBambisana neziNdaba zoMdabu, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa, afake lolu suku ngokusemthethweni emqulwini kahulumeni, i-Government Gazette. Ngelanga ayofaka lolu suku ngaphansi kwalo mqulu, lokho kuyosho ukuvalwa kosomqulu wokhetho, i-voters roll. Ukuvalwa kwalo mqulu kuyosho ukuthi akekho umuntu ozobe esakwazi ukubhalisela ukuvota. Okunye okuzokwenzeka ngukuthi iKhomishini, izodedela uhlu lwezinsuku lapho kuzolethwa uhlu lwabantu amaqembu azofolosa ngabo, kuphinde kulethwe nemali yokungenela ukhetho. Uma weqiwe ilezi zinsuku, lokho kuyosho ukuthi ngeke lelo qembu likwazi ukungenela ukhetho. Ngakolunye uhlangothi, uHlabisa unxuse amaqembu ezepolitiki ukuthi agqugquzele ukuthula njengoba kubhekwe okhethweni. Amaqembu ahlukene akwamukele ukumenyezelwa kosuku lokhetho ukuze ahlabele phambili nezinhlelo zokhetho. Iqembu iMKP isakhala ngokuthi kumenyezelwe usuku lokhetho ekubeni isanezikhalazo ngokhetho lukazwelonke lwango-2024. Leli qembu likhala ngokubanjwa inkunzi yikhomishini njengoba kwake kwaba nesikhathi lapho ibhodi lemiphumela yokhetho, lalingasebenzi cishe okwaba amahora acela kwamathathu ngawo u-2024. Lolu daba lweMKP nekhomishini luzongena enkantolo ngenyanga ezayo. UHlabisa uthe unethemba lokuthi uMnyango weMfundo eyisiSekelo noweMfundo ePhakeme, bazokwenza izinhlelo zokuthi kungaphazamiseki ukubhalwa kwezivivinyo ngesonto lokhetho yingakho kusheshe kwamenyezelwa usuku. URamaphosa unxuse amakhansela afuna ukubuyiselwa ezikhundleni emuva kokhetho, ukuthi azibambe ziqine aphinde aveze amava awo emphakathini.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Uthishanhloko waseSizanani Primary School eDube, eSoweto, uGugu Mdlalose ozimisele kakhulu ekufundiseni izingane ngokutshala imifino njengoba simbona lapha nezingane zesikole. Image: Dumisani Sibeko KUHLATSHWE ikhwelo lokuthi kubikwe izehlakalo zokuhlukunyezwa kwezingane emakhaya kanjalo nasezikoleni njengoba kwanda ukukhulelwa kwazo zisencane. Leli khwelo lenziwe yizinhlaka ezehlukene izolo, ngesikhathi kwethulwa umkhankaso wokuvikelwa kwezingane enkundleni yemidlalo iMangosuthu eDumbe, enyakatho yaKwaZulu-Natal. UNksz Neliswa Cekiso ongumqondisi wophiko lokuvikelwa kwezingane eMnyangweni wokuThuthukiswa koMphakathi, uthe izibalo ziveza ukuthi angaphezu kuka-3 000 amacala okuhlukunyezwa kwezingane kusuka ekoteni yokuqala kuya kweyesithathu onyakenimali u-2025/2026. "Sikhathazekile ngokudlwengulwa kwezingane ezingaphansi kweminyaka engu-16 ezigilwa abantu abadala. Sikhathazeke kakhulu nangezingane ezilalana zodwa, ezingaphansi kweminyaka engu-16. Yingakho kubalulekile ukuthi sibambisane ekulweni nalesi sihlava," usho kanje ekhuluma neNewzroom Afrika izolo, kwethulwa lo mkhankaso. Uthe bakhathazekile ngokukhulelwa kwezingane zisencane kuleli kanjalo nasesifundeni iZululand. Ngokwezibalo zeNational Child Protection Register, zekota yokuqala yonyakamali u-2025/2026 kuya kweyesithathu, angu-8 984 amacala abikwa okuhlukunyezwa kwezingame. UNksz Cekiso uthe banezinhlelo zokufundisa abazali ukuze baqaphe ngelokhozi izingane zabo. "Abanye abazali abakwazi ukusheshe babone uma izingane zabo zihlukunyeziwe. Yingakho sinezinhlelo zokubacija ukuze bakwazi ukusheshe babheke le nkinga." Izibalo zoMnyango wezobuLungiswa ziveze ukuthi andile amacala okudlwengulwa kwezingane esuka ku-127 aya ku-199 onyakenimali u-2025/2026. UNksz Cekiso ukhale nangotshwala athe bunomthelela ekutheni kuhlukunyezwe izingane. "Abahlukunyezwayo ababike enambeni yeChildline ethi-116 (mahhala). Uma kukhona ohlukunyezwayo ekhaya okungaba umama kungabikwa enombolweni yokulwa nesihlava sokuhlukunyezwa esikhungweni i-GBV, ethi: 0800 428 428. Ababikayo bazolulekwa ngokumele bakwenze baphinde badluliselwe ezinhlakeni ezifanele ukuze basizakale." Kuzokhumbuleka ukuthi othisha, othishanhloko, abahlengikazi, osonhlalakahle, odokotela kanjalo nanoma imuphi umuntu osebenza ngezingane, bayalelwa ukuthi babike uma kunengane engaphansi kuka-16 ekhulelwe. Laba bayalelwa ukuthi babike emaphoyiseni ukuze kuphenywe, kuboshwe labo abakhulelisa lezi zingane.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Image: Itumeleng English LIYALA ukugoba uphondo iqembu iMKP, ehlabela phambili necala lokukhalaza ngemiphumela yokhetho lwango-2024, emva kokuhlangana nezikhulu zeKhomishini yezoKhetho kuleli, i-Independent Electoral Commission (IEC). Ubuholi beMKP buhlangane nezikhulu zale khomishini ngoMsombuluko eNkandla, lapho bekubhungwa ngezinto ezehlukene ezithinta ukhetho. Lo mhlangano ubuholwa umengameli weMKP uMnuz Jacob Zuma, noSihlalo we-IEC uMnuz Mosotho Moepya. Okhulumela iMKP uMnuz Nhlamulo Ndhlela, uthe kulo mhlangano kuxoxwe ngezinto ezehlukene ezithinta ukhetho wathi zombili izinhlangothi zavumelana ukuthi ziphinde zibambe ezinye izingxoxo ngomuso. "Asijiki ekutheni siyaqhubeka necala esalifaka elithinta ukubanjwa inkunzi okhethweni lwango-2024. Okuseqhulwini esikhalaza ngakho ukwebiwa nokukhwatshaniswa kwamavoti, okwenziwa yi-IEC," usho kanje. Uthe bakwenza lokhu ukuvikela abantu bakuleli wathi bafuna izinhlaka ezigqugquzela intando yeningi ukuthi zenze izinto ngokuvuleleka. UMoepya uthe ezinye izinto abazange bafinyelele esivumelwaneni emhlanganweni wathi basazobamba eminye imihlangano neMKP ukuze baqhubeke nezingxoxo. "Asivumelananga ngezinto ezithile, kakade intando yeningi injalo. Sizobuye sihlangane sixoxe ngezinye izinto ezisalile kulo mhlangano," usho kanje. Uthe njengoba bebehlangene neMKP, bebesaqhuba umkhankaso wabo wokuhlangana nezinhlaka ezehlukene njengoba kuza ukhetho. "Sivulelane izifuba kulo mhlangano, sathola ngezikhalazo zeMKP, nathi saphinde saveza ezethu. Emkhakheni esikuwona, ngeke sihlale sivumelana kanti lokhu kuqinisa intanto yeningi," kusho uMoepya. Uthe bayaqhubeka nemihlangano nezinhlaka ezehlukene njengoba kuza lolu khetho. "Sahlangana neSilo uMisuzulu kaZwelithini, uNdunankulu waKwaZulu-Natal uMnuz Thami Ntuli, amaqembu ahlukene okuyi-IFP, EFF, NFP, ANC kanti sisazohlangana nezinye izinhlaka okubalwa nabamahlelo ahlukene ezenkolo. Kule mihlangano sibhunga nangombiko oveza ukuthi abantu baseKZN, abasayingeni eyokuvota." Uthe bazimisele ukuthi ukhetho lwangoNovemba 4 nonyaka lube ngolukhululekile kanjalo nokuthula. Kwenzeka lokhu nje uZuma wathi ufuna kuhlehliswe ngenxa yezikhalazo abasenazo. Wathi akusizi ukugijimela ukuba nolunye ukhetho ekubeni singakaphumi isinqumo ecaleni abalifakile ngoba lokhu kuzokwenza ukuthi abantu bangayithembi imiphumela yokhetho. "Kufanele sibatshele ukuthi sifuna ukwazi ukuthi ashonaphi amavoti ethu antshontshwa okhethweni olwedlule. Asibatshele ukuthi asifuni ukuthi kube khona olunye ukhetho ngoba kunezinkinga abangakazixazululi," kwasho uZuma.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Ungqongqoshe weMfundo ephakeme uButi Manamela Image: Ayanda Ndamane / IOL KUSHAYISANA imibono kwaqubuka nemvunge ngokufakwa ngaphansi komlawuli kwesikhwama esixhasa izitshudeni ngemali yokufunda ezikhungweni zemfundo, iNational Students' Financial Aid Scheme (NSFAS). Imvunge iqutshulwa ukuthi sekuphenduke insakavukela ukufakwa ngaphansi kwabalawuli abahlukene kwalesi sikhwama kepha izinkinga zingaxazululeki. UNgqongqoshe weMfundo ePhakeme, uMnuz Buti Manamela, ujube uSolwazi Hlengani Mathebula njengomlawuli walesi sikhwama. Ukwenze lokhu ngoba efuna ukuthi kube nozinzo ekulawulweni kwalesi sikhwama, kulandela ukusula kwamanye amalungu ebhodi, kubalwa ibamba likasihlalo. I-DA isinxuse uManamela ukuthi avele ePhalamende azochaza kabanzi ngezingqinamba ekulawulweni kwalesi sikhwama esixhasa izinkumbi zezitshudeni. I-EFF Youth Command ikugxekile ukujutshwa kukaMathebula, yathi kunezinsolo zokungaphathi kahle esekwa-SARS. "Kuyaqhubeka ukulawulwa kwe-NSFAS njengoba bekwenzeka naphambilini kusaphethe abanye oNgqongqoshe. Kushiya imibuzo ukuqoka umuntu olandelwe yifu elimnyama lapho ayesebenza khona, bese kuthiwa akengamele isikhwama esibaluleke kangaka," kusho i-EFFYC. Inhlangano emele imikhandlu yezitshudeni emanyuvesi, i-South African Union of Students' (SAUS), ihambisana ne-EFFYC ekuchitheni ukuqokwa kukaMathebula. Ithe UManamela akazange axhumane nezinhlaka ezifanele ngesikhathi ethatha isinqumo. "Bese kunethemba ngendlela izinto ebezenzeka ngayo kulesi sikhwama njengoba phambilini izitshudeni zazithwele kanzima, ezinye zilala endle. Babalelwa ku-8 abalawuli asebeke bajutshwa ukwengamela i-NSFAS okuyinto esikhathazayo," kusho i-SAUS. I-SASCO ikwamukele ukuqokwa kukaMathebula, yathi ibivele inezikhalazo ngebhodi lalesi sikhwama. "Siyasamukela isinqumo sokuqokwa komlawuli ngoba ziningi izinto ebesikhala ngazo. Sifuna umlawuli alungise izinkinga ezisabhekene nezitshudeni." USihlalo wekomiti leMfundo ePhakeme ePhalamende, uMnuz Tebogo Letsie, uzwakalise ukukhathazeka ngokungabikhona kozinzo kulesi sikhwama. Uthe kusuka ngo-2018, lesi sikhwama sesibe ngaphansi kwabalawuli abehlukene. "Kudingeka kwenziwe okuthile ukuhlenga lesi sikhwama. Samangala sesithi kuba nozinzo nyakenye kwasula usihlalo webhodi. Sekuphinde kwasula ibamba likasihlalo futhi kulokhu." Uthe kumele kutholakale umnyombo wokuthi kungani abaholi abanamava bengakwazi ukuzinza kulesi sikhwama. "Silindele ukuthi lesi sikhwama siqhubeke nokusiza abahlwempu, kuxazululwe ngokushesha izinkinga ezikhona. Sizoxoxa noManamela siyikomiti, ukuthola kabanzi ngesinqumo sakhe sokujuba umlawuli." Unxuse uManamela ukuthi athole umnyombo wezinkinga ukuze zilungiswe. UManamela ekhuluma nabezindaba, uthe ngeke kuphazamiseke eyemihlomulo yezitshudeni.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: UNGQONGQOSHE woMnyango weziSebenzi zikaHulumeni nokuPhatha iNkosi Mzamo Buthelezi AFUNA izimpendulo amalungu ePhalamende, ngemibiko eveza ukuthi bakhokhelwa izindodla zemali abasebenzi bakahulumeni abamisiwe. Amaqembu okubalwa kuwo i-DA ne-EFF, afuna uNgqongqoshe weziSebenzi zikaHulumeni nokuPhatha, Inkosi Mzamo Buthelezi, azochaza ngemibiko yokuthi laba basebenzi bakhokhelwa u-R800 million, ngonyaka. Nekomiti lasePhalamende lifuna uButhelezi azochaza ngalokhu elikubize ngokuxhashazwa kwemali yabakhokhi bentela. I-DA ithe isibhalele uSihlalo wekomiti lasePhalamende, ngoba ifuna uButhelezi azochaza kabanzi ngale mali. Ikhale ngokuthi inkulu imali echithwa wuhulumeni kukhokhelwa abasebenzi abamisiwe ekubeni namacala abo engaxazululwa ngokushesha. "Akuyona into encane ukuthi babalelwa ku-674 abasebenzi abamisiwe asebehlale izinsuku ezevile ku-90, amacala abo angaxazululwa. Laba bayaqhubeka bayakhokhelwa," kusho i-DA. I-DA ifuna ukwazi ukuthi kungani kugqoza ukuxazululwa kwamacala abasebenzi, nokuthi kuvezwe uhlelo lokuzama ukubuyisa le mali echithwa minyaka yonke. "Sifuna nokwazi ukuthi yikuphi okwenziwa iminyango kahulumeni ukunciphisa isikhathi esihlalwa emakhaya abasebenzi abamisiwe. Abantu bakuleli badinga izidingo kanti kunabasebenzi abahleli emakhaya abazixebulela umkhoma." Ne-EFF ithe ifuna incazelo ngokushesha ngalaba basebenzi ngoba inkulu imali emoshekayo, kukhokhelwa abantu abahleli emakhaya abanye abaneminyaka beholela amahhala. USihlalo wekomiti lomnyango ePhalamende, uMnuz Jan de Villiers, uthe bakhathazekile ngale mibiko yabakhokhelwa besemakhaya. Uthe ukungaxazululwa ngokushesha kwamacala kukhomba ukuthi abukho ubuholi eminyangweni ehlukene. "Sifuna uButhelezi azosichazela ngezizathu ezenza angasheshi ukuxazululwa amacala abhekene nabasebenzi. Sifuna asivezele nezibalo zabamisiwe kodwa abaqhubeka nokuhola. Ukulokhu beqhubeka behola kunyusa nemali ekhokhelwa abasebenzi kuleli," usho kanje. Uthe abatholakala benecalakumele bathathelwe izinyathelo ezibadakanya nokubuyisa imali abayihole behleli emakhaya. "Asifuni kuxhashazwe imali yabakhokhi bentela okwenziwa abantu abahluleka ukwenza umsebenzi wabo kuhulumeni. Asifuni futhi abasebenzi baqondiswe ubugwegwe kungazange kulandelwe yonke imithetho yezwe. Ngeke sisonge izandla sibona izinto zingahanjiswa ngendlela."

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: UNGQONGQOSHE weMfundo ePhakeme uMnuz Buti Manamela UTHEMBISA ukuthi ngeke iphazamiseke imihlomulo yezitshudeni uNgqongqoshe wezeMfundo ePhakeme, uMnuz Buti Manamela, emuva kokuba efake ngaphansi komlawuli isikhwama esixhasa ngemali yokufunda ezikhungweni zemfundo, i-National Students' Financial Aid Scheme (NSFAS). UManamela omemezele lesi sinyathelo izolo ntambama, uthe ufake lesi sikhwama ngaphansi komlawuli ukuze kube nozinzo kusona. Lokhu kulandela ukusula isigubhukane kwamalungu amabili ebhodi elilawula lesi sikhwama, okubalwa nebamba likasihlalo, uDkt Mugwena Maluleke, othe usule ngoba efuna ukugxila ezifundweni zakhe. "Nginqume ukuthi ngifake i-NSFAS ngaphansi komlawuli. Lesi sinqumo asibanga lula, ngikwenze lokhu ngenxa yokuthi ngifuna kube nozinzo ebhodini lalesi sikhwama," usho kanje. Uthe ngesikhathi ethatha izintambo eMnyangweni zazivele zikhona izikhalazo ngendaba yebhodi lalesi sikhwama. "Lesi sikhwama sisiza izinkumbi zezitshudeni ezivela emindenini ehlwempu. Yingakho singafuni ukuthi kube nezinkinga," usho kanje. Uthe sekuke kwaba nezikhalazo ngokwakheka kwebhodi lalesi sikhwama njengoba kunemibiko ebiveza lokhu ngaphakathi kwi-NSFAS. Uveze ukuthi kunezinto ezavezwa nguMcwaningi Mabhuku Jikelele ngendlela okuphethwe ngayo imali kulesi sikhwama. "Ngenxa yokusula kwebamba likasihlalo nePhini lakhe, ngibhalele amalungu ebhodi abesele ukuthi achaze ngezinselelo ezikhona. Ngaphambi kokuthatha isinqumo sokufaka umlawuli, ngizibhekile izincomo zamalungu asele." Uthe ujuba uSolwazi Hlengani Mathebula ukuthi abhekele lesi sikhwama, wathi unamava kwezokulawula. "Unamava athinta izimali kanjalo nasemkhakheni wemfundo ephakeme. Uke waba yingxenye ye-SARS kanjalo nakweminye imikhakha. Sethemba ukuthi uzobuyisa uzinzo kulesi sikhwama. Ngifuna ukuqinisekisa ukuthi ngeke kuphazamiseke ukusatshalaliswa kwemihlomulo yezitshudeni kanjalo nokukhokhelwa komastende. Lesi sinqumo engisithathile asibuswa yindaba yoqhekeko okuthiwa lukhona kulesi sikhwama," kusho uManamela. Uthe uzobhekela uzinzo ezintweni ezifaka nezindawo zokuhlala kanjalo nezinye. Sekuphenduke insakavukela ukujutshwa kwabalawuli kulesi sikhwama abazama ukulungisa izinto. Isikhwama sibhekene nezinselelo zokungakhokheli ngesikhathi omastende.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: USihlalo we-IEC uMnuz Mosotho Moepya, uhlangane nomholi weMKP uMnuz Jacob Zuma eNkandla IKHOHLISANE ihlomile izolo phakathi kwezikhulu zeKhomishini yoKhetho kuleli, kanjalo nobuholi beqembu iMKP njengoba ngenyanga ezayo kulindeleke ukuthi kungene icala elithinta ukungenami kwaleli qembu ngemiphumela yokhetho lwango-2024. Abaholi beKhomishini basemkhankasweni wokuhlangana nezinhlaka ezihlukene okubalwa namaqembu ezepolitiki, njengoba kuzoba nokhetho lohulumeni basekhaya ngoNovemba 4, nonyaka. Izikhulu zeKhomishini zikhuza ibuya KwaZulu-Natal njengoba muva nje bezihlangene neSilo samaZulu, kanjalo nezinye izinhlaka. Izikhulu zekhomishini ebeziholwa wuSihlalo uMnuz Mosotho Moepya, zihlangane nabaholi beMKP okubalwa nomengameli wayo uMnuz Jacob Zuma, emzini wakhe KwaDakudunuse eNkandla. Esitatimendeni seKhomishini ngaphambi kokuhambela eNkandla, kuvele ukuthi inhloso wukubhunga nezinhlaka ezehlukene okubalwa noNdunankulu wesifundazwe uMnuz Thami Ntuli. Sithe kule mihlangano kubhungwa ngezinto ezihlukene ezithinta intando yabantu, ukugqugquzela abantu ukuthi bavote nezinye ezithinta ukhetho. "Sihlangana neMKP nje, kusenecala mayelana nokhetho lwango-2024. I-MKP ikhala ngezinto eziningi kanti lolu daba luzolalelwa enkantolo ngoJuni. UZuma usanda kuphakamisa ukuthi ukhetho luhlehliswe ngenxa yokuthi basanezikhalo," kusho iKhomishini esitatimendeni. Ithe iyakuchitha ukuhlehliswa kokhetho. "Siyagqugquzeleka ngokubambisana okukhona ezinhlakeni ezehlukene njengoba kuzovotwa," kusho iKhomishini. Emuva komhlangano iMbube yanxusa abantu ukuthi baphume ngobuningi bayovota kulolu khetho.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: UMNYANGO wezeMpilo uthi phansi amaphaphu ngegciwane i-Hantavirus UMNYANGO wezeMpilo kuleli uthi phansi amaphaphu ngegciwane elitholakala emagundaneni, elihaqe omunye wabahlali baseBritain, olashelwa lona eNingizimu Afrika. Isitatimende soMnyango siveze ukuthi leli gciwane i-Hantavirus, litholakale kowaseBritain, obesemkhunjini i-MV Hondius, ebisuka e-Argentina iya eCanary Island. Lo mkhumbi wokungcebeleka ubudlula eCape Verde. Ubuthwele abagibeli abangu-150 kanti udlule eziqhingini ezehlukene okubalwa i-Antarctica, Falklands, South Georgia, Nightingale Island, Tristan, St Helena nase-Ascension. "Phezu kokuba lo mgibeli elashwe e-Ascension kodwa isimo sakhe kasibanga ngcono okuholele ekutheni aphuthunyiswe kuleli ukuze athole usizo esikhungweni esizimele eSandton, eGauteng. Imiphumela iqinisekise ukuthi uhaqwe yilo mbulalazwe wegciwane. Isimo sakhe sibucayi kakhulu, kanti ulaliswe yedwa lapho elashwa khona." UMnyango uthe leli gciwane litholakala emagundaneni kanti izimpawu zalo zibandakanya ukuphathwa yikhanda, imfiva, ubuhlungu kwesingezansi kanjalo nohudo. Litholakala emchameni wamagundane ahaqekile, okuthi uma kuheleza umoya uphefumulwa umuntu bese limhaqa igciwane. "Abanye abagibeli abebekulo mkhumbi, okuyindoda nonkosikazi wayo, kudingeke ukuthi bathole usizo lokwelashwa. Ngesikhathi lo mkhumbi udlula kuleli, abanye abagibeli baveze ukuxineka behluleka ukuphefumula," kusho uMnyango. Isitatimende soMnyango siveze ukuthi umgibeli oneminyaka engu-70, ogule ngesikhathi umkhumbi udlula eSt Helena, obenezimpawu zemfiva, ikhanda elibuhlungu, futhi ephalaza, ugcine eshonile. Isidumbu sakhe sisagcinwe eSt Helena ngaphambi kokuba sidluliselwe eNetherlands. "Omunye umgibeli wesibili oneminyaka engu-69 wesifazane, unkosikazi kamufi ugcine eshonile emuva kokuba equleke esesikhumulweni sezindiza i-OR Tambo, elinde ukugibela ibhanoyi eliya eNetherlands. Uphuthuyiswe esibhedlela eKempton Park, wagcina eshonile. Imiphumela yokuhlolwa kwakhe ayikabuyi." UMnyango uthe usebenzisana nesikhungo i-National Institute for Communicable Diseases noMnyango wezeMpilo eGauteng, ukuze kubhekwe abanye abahaqekile ngenhloso yokunqanda  ukusabalala kwegciwane. "Umphakathi awungatatazeli ngokuthi kushone abantu ababili ngenxa yaleli gciwane. I-World Health Organization, isebenzisana neziqhingi ezithintekayo ukuze kunqandwe ukusabalala kwalo igciwane."

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: 1008565321__20260303__0 UNGQONGQOSHE wezeMfundo eyiSisekelo uNksz Siviwe Gwarube Image:  Itumeleng English/ Independent Newspapers INHLANGANO yabafundi iCosas inxuse uMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa, ukuthi amise esikhundleni ngokushesha uNgqongqoshe weMfundo eyisiSekelo, uNksz Siviwe Gwarube, ngodaba lwethenda yezincwadi zokufunda ezikoleni. Le thenda kuthiwa eyokugaya izincwadi zamabanga aphansi, i-Foundation Phase. Kunezinsolo zokuthi enye yezinkampani eseKapa enikwe lo msebenzi, ibinezinsuku ezimbalwa isunguliwe emuva kokukhishwa kwethenda yokugaya izincwadi zakwaGrade 1 kuya kuGrade 3. UNksz Gwarube usebhalele uzakwabo eMnyangweni kaMgcinimafa, uMnuz Enoch Godongwana, ukuthi aphenye ngokukhishwa kwayo. ICosas ithe ifuna kuphenye iSIU olwale thenda. "Sifuna uMengameli amise ngokushesha uNksz Gwarube, aphinde ajube iSIU ukuthi iphenye. Sifuna kubhekwe kabanzi izinkampani ezenza umsebenzi noMnyango. Sifuna uMnyango usebenzisane nezikole ukuqinisekisa ukuthi abafundi bayazithola izincwadi," kusho iCosas esitatimendeni. ICosas ithe idumele ngokuthi enye yezinkampani ethole le thenda, ayinawo amava okwenza lo msebenzi. "Siyayibona imizamo kaNksz Gwarube, yokuzama ukudidisa izwe ngokuthi athi uMnyango kaGodongwana ufuna uphenye ngale thenda. Siyayibona nemizamo yokuzama ukuveza i-DA, okuyiqembu avela kulona njengeqembu elimsulwa," kusho iCosas. ICosas iphinde yasola i-DA ngokuqoka le nkampani enomuntu oyedwa omnyama ongumqondisi kuyona ekubeni abanye abaqondisi bemhlophe. "Ngeke sisonge izandla sibukele abafundi bexhashazwa. Uma uMengameli engenzi mnyakazo, sizosukuma senze umnyakazo ukuze sivikele abafundi. Sifuna lonke isenti eliseMnyangweni libhekele izimfuno zabafundi," kugcizelela iCosas. UNksz Gwarube uxwayise ngokuthi uzothathela abathintekayo izinyathelo uma kutholakala ukuthi kukhona okungahanjiswanga kahle ngesikhathi kukhishwa le thenda. "Uma uphenyo lukaMgcinimafa luveza ukuthi kukhona okungahambanga kahle, ngeke nginanaze ukuthatha izinyathelo kubona bonke abathintekayo." Imibiko yabezindaba iveza ukuthi le thenda ka-R1.6 billion, ibihlose ukuqinisa isisekelo semfundo yakuleli. Le nkampani okuthiwa yathola ingxenye kule thenda yokugaya lezi zincwadi, ibizohlomula ngo-R285 million. Iqembu i-ActionSA lixwayise ngokuthi inkohlakalo eMnyangweni ibeka engcupheni ukuhlinzekwa kwemfundo esezingeni. Leli qembu lithe liyayeseka eyophenyo, lathi kudingeka kutholakale ubuqiniso bezinsolo ezivezwayo ngale thenda. I-DA ithe iyayeseka eyophenyo, yazwakalisa ukukhathazeka ngekusasa labafundi nenkohlakalo eyenziwa yizikhulu zoMnyango. I-DA ithe uma kutholakala ukuthi kukhona isandla semfene, abathintekayo kumele bathathelwe izinyathelo.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: UMENGAMELI weCosatu uNksz Zingiswa Losi Image: Independent Newspapers UMENGAMELI weCosatu uNksz Zingiswa Losi, usedonse ngendlebe amadlelandawonye ayo i-ANC ne-SACP ukuthi angasebenzisi imigubho yoSuku lwabaSebenzi, ukuqhuba umdonsiswano nokukwebhana okukhona phakathi kwalezi zinhlangano. Uphumele obala wathi imigubho yalolu suku kusasa esezweni lonke, kumele ibumbe imihlathi eyalanayo okuyi-ANC ne-SACP. Ukhumbuze izinhlaka ukuthi  lolu usuku lwabasebenzi akulona olwe-ANC noma olwe-SACP. "USuku lwabaSebenzi lolu kanti kumele le migubho ibe yinkundla yobumbano nokuhlangana kwemihlathi eyazanayo. Akumele abasebenzi bahlukaniswe phakathi wudaba lomdonsiswano okhona phakathi kwe-ANC ne-SACP, odabeni oluthinta ubulungu obubili kanjalo neyokhetho," usho kanje izolo ekhuluma eLimpopo, ngamalungiselelo ngale migubho. Iyindaba egudwini eyomdonsiswano phakathi kwe-ANC ne-SACP ngeyokungenela ukhetho ngokuzimela kwamaKhomanisi. I-ANC inqumele ugwayi katiki amalungu angeke ayikhankasele, yathi azowukhomba onotshwala. Ngakolunye uhlangothi, i-SACP ihlabela phambili nesinqumo sokungenela ukhetho ngokuzimela, ingaseki i-ANC. UNksz Losi uthe umhlangano weCosatu, wakucacisa ukuthi kumele izinyunyana eziyingxenye yalo mfelandawonye, ziyibhunge eyomdonsiswano we-ANC neSACP. "Ngeke sizuze lutho uma abasebenzi benhlakanhlaka. Yingakho sisemkhankasweni wokuxoxa nezinyunyana ezaphuma kwiCosatu, ukuze kube nokubuyisana." Uthe abaholi beCosatu yibona abazobe bethula inkulumo yosuku emigubheni ehlukene. "Kumele kugqanyiswe izinto eziyizithiyo ezweni, ukungasebenzi kwabantu, ukunyuka kukaphethroli kanjalo nezinye izinto. NgoMeyi 1, uSuku lwabaSebenzi, abaholi bamadlelandawonye kumele bakhulume ngezinto ezizokhulula abantu nabasebenzi ebubheni," usho kanje. Uveze ukuthi kukhulu okuzuzwe abasebenzi kuleli, kubalwa eyeholo eliphilisayo i-National Minimum Wage kanjalo neyesibonelelo sabangatohozi. Umgubho kazwelonke usenkundleni yemidlalo i-Old Peter Mokaba, ePolokwane, okulindeleke ukuthi uhanjelwe nguMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa noma iPhini likaMengameli, uMnuz Paul Mashatile. KwaZulu-Natal umgubho wosuku lwabasebenzi usenkundleni iCurries Fountain, eThekwini.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: SAMUKELWE isinyathelo sokuhlehliswa kwentela nodizili Image: TUMI PAKKIES/INDEPENDENT NEWSPAPERS SAMUKELWE isinyathelo sikahulumeni sokuhlehlisa ukunyuswa kwentela kaphethroli nekadilizi obekulindeleke ukuthi inyuswe ngenyanga ezayo. Uhulumeni uhlehlisele uJuni kulo nyaka, ukunyuswa kukadizili nophethroli ukuze abantu bathi ukuphefumula. Isimemezelo senziwe nguMnyango kaMgcinimafa kanjalo nowezokuMbiwa phansi. Inhlangano i-Motor Industry Staff Association (MISA), ikwamukele ukwehliswa kwelitha likaphethroli ngo-R3. Iphinde yamukela ukwehliswa kwelitha likadizili ngo-R3.93 kuze kube uJuni 2, 2026. "Siyasamukela lesi sinqumo njengoba sizothula umthwalo abasebenzi, abamabhizinisi kanjalo nomkhakha wezokuthutha. Sidumele ngokuthi abantu abasebenzisa upharafini, bona abahlomulanga kulo mnyakazo ekubeni bebaningi abantu abawusebenzisayo." I-MISA ithe upharafini wona kulindeleke ukuthi unyuke ngo-R5, ilitha. "Abantu abahlwempu basazothwala kanzima, ikakhulu labo abasebenzisa upharafini. Bathembele kuwona ukuze bapheke, bashisise izindlu baphinde benze neminye imisebenzi ngawo. Sinxusa uhulumeni ukuthi abhekelele nabasebenzisa upharafini." Nomfelandawonye wezinyunyana zabasebenzi iCosatu, uyamukele eyokunganyuswa kwale ntela. UMnuz Matthew Parks weCosatu, uthe lesi sinyathelo sizosiza abasebenzi nabantu abebezonyukelwa yizona zonke izinto. Uthe lokhu kudalwe yimpi eqhubeka eMiddle East, wathi noma le mpi ingaphela kodwa kusazothatha isikhathi ukuthi amanani kaphethroli nodilizili abuyele esimweni. "Sikhathazekile ngokunyuka kukapharafini, njengoba kungekho isixegiso kuwona. Abasebenzi babhukuda ezikweletini ngakho bebezobhekana nomqansa ngokunyuka kukaphethroli nodilizi. Kuzonyuka izinto zokugibela ekubeni amaholo enganyuki kangako." Uthe kudingeka kwenziwe ezinye izinhlelo zokunyuswa kwesibonelelo sabangatohozi, ukuhlinzekwa kwamaphasela kwabahola izibonelelo, kwesekwe izinhlelo zolimo kuphinde kubhungwe ne-Eskom ngokwehliswa kukagesi. "Umkhakha ozimele kumele uzibophezele ekutheni ngeke udilize abasebenzi. Kumele abasebenzi banikwe ikhefu lokungakhokheli imishwalense. Kumele uhulumeni enze izinhlelo zokufukula umnotho ukuze kwakheke imisebenzi ngalesi sikhathi," usho kanje. Uhulumeni uveze ukutho lo mnyakazo wokunganyusi uphethroli nodizili, kuzokwenza ungakwazi ukuqoqa u-R17.2 billion, ezinyangeni ezimbalwa kumisiwe kusuka ngo-Ephreli kuya kuJuni nonyaka. "Kusuka ngoJulayi 1, 2026, intela yelitha kaphethroli izobuyela ku-R4.10 ilitha, kuthi ekadizili ibuyele ku-R3.93 ilitha." Ekuqaleni kwenyanga, uMnyango wezokuMbiwa phansi wathi ubuyekeza eyokubiza kukaphethroli okuwuhlelo okulindeleke ukuthi luphothulwe ngoMashi wangonyaka ozayo.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: UMPHATHISWA woMnyango wezeMfundo KwaZulu-Natal uMnuz Sipho Hlomuka ZIYAQONGA izinkinga eMnyangweni wezeMfundo KwaZulu-Natal njengoba usahlwaya imali ukuze ukhokhele izikole imali yazo ngenyanga ezayo. UMphathiswa woMnyango uMnuz Sipho Hlomuka, uthe bazoya eMnyangweni kaMgcinimafa ukuze abanike imali yokukhokhela izikole imali yama-Norms and Standards. "Siya kuMgcinimafa siyomnxusa ukuthi asheshe asinike imali phambili ukuze sikhokhele izikole imali yazo. Le mali kumele izikole ziyithole ngoMeyi, kanti sibhekene nezinselelo emalini," kusho uHlomuka ekhuluma emhlanganweni wekomiti lezeMfundo esiShayamthetho. Lo mnyango uhlale ubhekene nezinselelo ngasekukhokheni ngesikhathi imali yama-Norms and Standards. Le nkinga esiphenduke insakavukela yasusa umsindo izinyunyana ziyifuna ngodli imali zikhala ngokuthi akusebenzeki ezikoleni ngenxa yokuthi ayifakwa ngesikhathi. Akuyona kuphela inselelo yama-Norms and Standards ebhekene nomnyango kodwa kubalwa nendaba yokungakwazi ukukhokhela ngesikhathi osonkontileka owenza nabo imisebenzi. Amalungu esiShayamthetho akhale ngesimo esibi sezemfundo esifundazweni. Kuphinde kwakhalwa nangezinselelo ezibhekene nohlelo lokuthuthwa kwabafundi njengoba kuzokwehliswa isibalo sabafundi abathuthwayo ngabangu-44 000 njengoba bengu-76 000 abathuthwayo kumanje esifundazweni. Kwenzeka lokhu nje bevile ku-100 000 abasalinde ukuhlomula kulolu hlelo. UNksz Fikile Masiko we-ANC, ukhale ngokuthi lesi simo sifana nenhlekelele ebhekene nomnyango ngemali. "Kubalulekile ukuthi Mphathiswa uma kunezinkinga, uzibeke ezithebeni zekomiti. Kumele seseke isiphakamiso somnyango sokuthi uNdunankulu asize, ahlanganise izinhlaka ezehlukene ukuze kutholakale isixazululo enkingeni yomnyango." Uthe siyadabukisa isimo somnyango ngoba siveza ngokusobala ukuthi kunengane engeke ikwazi ukuthola izimfanelo zayo esikoleni. UDkt Imran Keeka weDA, ukhale ngesimo somnyango wathi kubukeka sengathi lo mnyango uzocwilisa sonke isifundazwe uma lesi simo singalungiswa. Ukhale ngokuthi ayikho imali esifundazweni wathi umnyango kumele ubheke ezinhlelweni zawo ukuthi imali uzoyithathaphi. UMnuz Nathi Ngcobo, inhloko yomnyango, uthe seziqalile izingxoxo phakathi kukaMngcinimafa nehhovisi likaNdunankulu ukuze kubanjiswane uma sekuyiwa kuhulumeni kazwelonke ngezithinta imali nesimo esibhekene nomnyango. Kwenzeka lokhu nje inkantolo eNkulu eMgungundlovu, iyalele umnyango ukuthi uqhamuke nohlelo oluzoveza ukuthi uzoyikhokha kanjani imali yezikole kanjalo nodaba olumayelana nokuthengwa kwezincwadi ezikoleni.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: USASHAQEKILE namanje umndeni wowesilisa waseThokazi, KwaNongoma, okuthiwa ushaywe womunye wesilisa ngequpha, washona, kubangwa eyokukora amagoli amaningi. Kulesi sigameko okuthiwa senzeke eMajomela, KwaNongoma, ngoLwesine olwedlule, kushone uMnuz Phumlani Dlamini (24). Ngokusho kukadadewabo, uNksz Qinisile Dlamini, isigameko senzeke sekuhlakazekwa emva kokuphela komdlalo umufi abeyidlala okuthiwa ibiphakathi kwesikole iMthombowesizwe High kanjalo neNongoma LoveLife Youth Centre. “Kuthiwa uhlaselwe abafana abambalwa okuthiwa wayekade exabane nabo ngempelasonto ende yokuqala kukaMeyi. Kuthiwa iqembu ayepikwe kulo, iMjiva yayikade idlala neqembu lalaba bafana esingalazi igama lalo, yena wase ekora amagoli ayisithupha,” kusho uNksz Dlamini. Uthe bezwa kuthiwa abasolwa ababediniwe yilawa amagoli, bazama ukumxakazisa khona lapho kodwa balanyulwa, kwahlukanwa. “Njengoba sebephinda bezomhlasela ngoLwesine. Ngosuku abulawe ngalo kuthiwa waqale washaywa ngoyedwa nenqindi, balanyulwa. Kuthe kusabhekwe lokho, waphinde washaywa owesibili, ngayo inqindi, wavele wawa, wadlikiza, wase ethula,” kusho uNksz Dlamini. Uthe umsolwa esebona ukuthi umlimazile umufi, wakhumula ibhande engalweni wamshaya ngalo. “Asazi noma wayesezama ukumvusa noma wayemqedela,” usho kanje. Uthe bayasola ukuthi ibhande elalifakwe umsolwa lalinomuthi onzima, owaholela ekutheni akwazi ukubulala umufi ngenqindi. "Kubuhlungu ngoba umfowethu ubengesiye umuntu wodlame. Ubekhonze ukuzihlekela futhi ezithandela ibhola. Indaba yokuthi aphume ekhaya eyodlala ibhola bese sifikelwa umyalezo wokuthi usebulewe enkundleni yemidlalo, isizwise ubuhlungu obukhulu,” kusho uNksz Dlamini. Uthe abakutholile ukuthi kwakudlalelwa isiteki, abangasazi ukuthi esamalini. Uthe umyalezo bawuthola ngomunye ayehambe naye ukuya ebholeni, kwathi uma befika, bathola sekufike namaphoyisa, eseqinisekisile ukuthi useshonile. UMphathiswa woMnyango wezokuThuthukiswa koMphakathi uNksz Mbali Shinga ubezovakashela umndeni kamufi izolo. Esitatimendeni esithunyelelwe abezindaba ukududuza umndeni, abangani nomphakathi waKwaNongoma, uNksz Shinga uzwakalise ukushaqeka nokuphatheka kabi ngesigameko. “Isigameko siyisikhumbuzo esibuhlungu sokuthi kufanele kugqugquzelwe indaba yokuxazulula ukungaboni ngaso linye ngendlela enokuthula ikakhulukazi kubantu abasha abazibandakanya kwezemidlalo,” kusho uNksz Shinga. Uthe ngale kokuyokhalisa umndeni kamufi, bazophinde bawuhlinzeke ngosizo lokwelulekwa ngokomqondo kulandela isigameko. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uSergeant Thenjiswa Ngcobo, uthe amaphoyisa aKwaNongoma abophe owesilisa oneminyaka engu-19 ngecala lokubulala kulandela isigameko sokubulawa kowesilisa. “Ushaywe washona ngoMeyi 7, 2026 KwaMajomela,” kusho uSerg Ngcobo. Uthe umsolwa uvele eNkantolo yeMantshi yaKwaNongoma ngoMsombuluko.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: NKOSINATHI Emmanuel Mzobe USEZE wonda nasemzimbeni owesifazane waseMthebeni, eNdwedwe, kulandela ukuphela kwezinyanga kwanyamalala indodana yakhe eyayisebenza njengonogada enkampanini yezimoto ezithwala imali. Ngokusho kukaNkk Joyce Mhlongo, indodana yakhe, uMnuz Nkosinathi Emmanuel Mzobe (36) yalahleka ngoDisemba 24 nyakenye. Elandisa ngesehlo uthe kwakungemuva kukaKhisimusi, ethola ucingo kowesifazane angamazi, owazethula njengesinqandamathe sikaMzobe, wathi umphathele umyalezo wokuthi ulahlekile. “Wangitshela ukuthi ufonelwe abangani bakhe (uMzobe), bemazisa ukuthi umjondolo wakhe osezakhiweni zase-Uganda eSiphingo, sekuphele izinsuku uvaliwe. Uthe owesifazane wamtshela ukuthi abangani bamtshela ukuthi bona bamgcine ngoDisemba 24, 2025, kade behleli naye khona e-Uganda,” kusho uNkk Mhlongo. Uqhube wathi waya khona ngakusasa, bahamba nowesifazane bayobika ngomuntu odukile emaphoyiseni aseSiphingo agcina ebadlulisela kwawaseMlaza, nokuyilapho bagcina bebika khona ngempumelelo. Uveze ukuthi abangani, athe wawanikwa amagama abo, abakaze bamthinte ukuze baziveze emndenini ukuthi babazana noMzobe. “Ngikhathazwa nawukuthi kungani bengezanga bazochaza ukuthi waphelelaphi njengoba kuyibo ababegcine ukubonakala naye,” usho kanje. Ukhale ngendlela amaphoyisa asingethe ngayo udaba, ethi wagcina kunezinhlelo zokuthi amaphoyisa azohloma imibuzo isinqandamathe kanjalo nabo abangani, okwagcina kungenzekanga. Uphinde wakhala ngokungalukhombisi uzwelo ephoyiseni elajutshwa ukuthi liphenye udaba. “Sagcina sesingasaboni ngaso linye, selingisola ngokuthi ngilifundisa umsebenzi walo uma nginemibuzo ngophenyo. Lokhu kwangizwisa ubuhlungu ngoba alibukhombisanga ubuntu, futhi alizange libe nesihe kimina ngingowesifazane ophithanelwe yikhanda ngokulahlekelwa yindodana ngendlela engaqondakali,” kusho uNkk Mhlongo. Uthe nangesikhathi sekushintshe uhlelo lokuthi ngeke abahlanu besaphoswa imibuzo, yena akaze aziswe ngalolo guquko. Uthe bekusinda kwehlela nangesikhathi kufanele kuyiwe emakhazeni kahulumeni ezindaweni ezehlukene, ukuyocinga ukuthi isidumbu sikaMzobe asikho yini kulezo ezisuke zilethiwe kuthiwa ezabangaziwal. Ubuye wathi umphenyi ubevele angabi khona, akhale ngokuba matasatasa ngamanye amacala abalulekile, yena agcine ezihambela yedwa. “Abasemakhazeni bebeze bangitshele ukuthi akuvumelekile ukuthi ngize ngedwa, kufanele ngiphelezelwe umseshi. Ngangisemakhazeni asePhoenix ngesikhathi umseshi efonelwa osebenza khona, wamtshela ukuthi umatasa yena,” usho kanje. Udalule ukuthi okunye  akuthola wukuthi emsebenzini wayegcine ngoDisemba 23, kanti ngakusasa wavuka waya emagaraji adayisa izimoto, ngenhloso yokuthenga eyodwa, ayezoza ngayo ekhaya. “Umzala wakhe okwathi uma esethola ukuthi ulahlekile, naye wathuka wacishe woma ethi ubenaye kanye nesinqandamathe sakhe ngesikhathi eyobheka imoto ayezoyithenga,” usho kanje. Uthe ngesikhathi sekugqekezwa emjondolo wendodana yakhe, akukho okusolisa ukuthi yahlaselwa phakathi, izimpahla zayo eziningi zazikhona futhi zihleli kahle. “Ngisho nomfaniswano wakhe womsebenzi wawukhona,” kusho uNkk Mhlongo. Uthe iselula yayilokhu ivalekile uma bezama ukuyifonela kodwa abakuqaphelayo wukuthi akhona amalungu omndeni athunyelwa imiyalezo engaqondakali emva kukaKhisimusi. “Sisola ukuthi kwakungabantu abase beyithathile iselula yakhe,” kusho uNkk Mhlongo, othe lonke lolu lwazi waludlulisela emaphoyiseni kodwa akukho akwenza ngalo. Uthe akangabazi ukuthi kukhona okubi okwehlela indodana yakhe kwazise yayingesiye umuntu ovele asuke anyamalale nje. “Ukunyamalala kwakhe kunesandla somuntu. Ngangifisa ukuthi amaphoyisa abathathe laba abahlanu ayobaphosa imibuzo, mhlawumbe ukhona umkhondo ongavela. Ngiphatheke kabi ngokungalutholi usizo ngokunyamalala kwengane yami. Bengimkhulu ngomzimba, sengize ngancipha ngaba mncane,” kusho uNkk Mhlongo. Unxuse noma ubani ongaba nolwazi abikele amaphoyisa aseduze ngoba unesifiso sokuthola ithambo lendodana yakhe ukuze azidelise. Uthe indodana inendodakazi (14) abaqale bayifihlela ukuthi uyise udukile, nokho bagcina beyitshela, bebona kuhamba isikhathi bengawutholi umkhondo.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UMUFI uNksz Zinhle Simphiwe Mchunu KUVUKE umunyu emndenini wowesifazane okuthiwa wabulawa yisoka, lamgqiba ngepotimende ngoNovemba nyakenye, ngesikhathi iNyuvesi yaKwaZulu-Natal yedlulisela iziqu zakhe emndenini emcimbini wokwethweswa kweziqu wezitshudeni obungoLwesihlanu, eThekwini. Isidumbu sikaZinhle Simphiwe Mchunu (23) waseRoosboom, eMnambithi, owayenza unyaka wokugcina ezifundweni zobuthishela kule nyuvesi, satholwa sigqitshwe ngepotimende ethuneni  eduze kweflethi elalihlala isoka lakhe kwa-C, eMlaza, ngoDisemba 20, 2025. Ngesikhathi kutholwa isidumbu kwase kuphele inyanga edukile, njengoba kuthiwa wagcina ukubonwa ephila ngoNovemba 23, 2025. IKHADI elinomyalezo kanjalo nezimbali iNyuvesi yaKwaZulu-Natal ebilibhalele unina kamufi, kwanikwa umndeni ngosuku lweminyezane Udadewabo, uNksz Nolwazi Mchunu, utshele Isolezwe ukuthi siqale phansi sabhibha isilonda sokubulawa ngesihluku kukamufi. “Ngizwe usizi ngesikhathi kubizwa isitshudeni ebesiphambi kwegama lakhe ohlwini lwezitshudeni ebezithweswa iziqu, sasukuma, sayithweswa iziqu zaso. Kwathi uma sekubizwa elakhe, kwangasukuma muntu, kwaze kwazosukuma esinye ezimenyezwe emva kwakhe,” kusho uNksz Mchunu. Uthe yilapho ubuye khona ngamandla umuzwa wokuthi konje udadewabo akasekho emhlabeni futhi wabashiya ngendlela enesihluku. Uthe emva komcimbi, babizelwe eceleni bamukeliswa iziqu zikamufi, kanjalo nezimbali nekhadi ebelinomyalezo inyuvesi ebiwubhalele unina, inyuvesi imduduza isibili. Uthe unina kamufi akakwazanga uphumelela kulo mcimbi njengoba ewumuntu osebenzela kude. Uthe kubafikele emcabangweni yabo ukuthi ngabe ujabule into engachazeki umufi ukube lesi sikhathi sifike esadla anhlamvana. Uthe wayengumuntu ophokophelele phambili futhi enethemba lokuthi nakanjani ikusasa lakhe lizoqhakaza njengoba enza izifundo esikhungweni semfundo ephakeme. “Ngabe ubesezokhuluma eyokuthi ufuna umsebenzi ngoba iziqu zakhe usezitholile,” usho kanje. Uthe ubungakabi khona umnyakazo otheni ngecala njengoba namanje lingakaqali ukuqulwa. Uthe lisalokhu lihlehliswa eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseMlaza, kanti umsolwa, uMnuz Themba Xaba (24), usalokhu etoke ejele ngengoba engadedelwanga ngebheyili. Ngesikhathi kwenzeka isigameko, kuthiwa umufi - owayeseqedile ukubhala izivivinyo zokuphela konyaka wokugcina enyuvesi - wahamba endaweni ehlala abafundi ePinetown, ewumuntu oyovakashela isoka lakhe eMlaza. Kusolakala ukuthi baba nengxabano, umsolwa wambulala, wase emgqiba ngepotimende. Kuthiwa esembulele, wazenza umuntu ocela ukufuniswa yena, ebhala nasezinkundleni zokuxhumana ukuthi isinqandamathe sakhe sidukile, siphume sahamba ebusuku emva kwengxabano. Umndeni waba nemibuzo ngesikhathi usufika eflethini likamsolwa, ubuza ukuthi uma ezihambele, uhambe kanjani ebusuku washiya iselula nesikhwama semali, esasizomsiza akwazi ukukhokha imali yokugibela yala ayeya khona? Emva kokungagculiseki komndeni ngophenyo lwamaphoyisa olwamthatha umsolwa, wayophonswa ngemibuzo, maqede wadedelwa, kuthiwa akukho okuphathekayo okukhomba ukuthi uyathinteka, umndeni waziqashela umphenyi ozimele, owavundulula ukuthi empeleni umsolwa unesandla. Phakathi kolwazi olwatholwa umphenyi ozimele, olokuthi ngezinsuku okwanyamalala ngazo umufi, umsolwa wake waboleka amathuluzi okumba umgodi kumasitende wakhe, wathi kukhona afuna ukukwenza. Kwathi uma sekuphenywa eduze kweflethi, kwatholakala ithuna elingashoni lapho umsolwa ayegqibe khona umufi ngepotimende, kwabe zimkhalela kanjalo. ABOMNDENI kaZinhle Simphiwe Mchunu waseMnambithi obulawe ngonyaka edlule bemukela iziqu zakhe e-UKZN ngoLwesihlanu

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: KWEHLE izinyembezi kuThembisani Mntungwa othweswe iminyezane ephethe isikibha esinomyalezo wokukhumbula unina osanda kushona SIKHETHE ukukhumbula unina ongasekho ngokuthi sinyukele esteji sabagqokiswa iminyezane siphethe isikibha esibhalwe umyalezo ngokushona kwakhe, isitshudeni saseNyuvesi yaKwaZulu-Natal, ebesithweswa iziqu ngoLwesihlanu. UThembisani Mntungwa okhulele eMalukazi, ngaseSipingo, uthweswa iziqu zeBachelor of Social Science in Criminology and Forensic Studies nje, akukapheli nezinyanga ezimbili unina, uNksz Nondumiso Mntungwa (40), amshiyile emhlabeni. Isikibha abesiphethe esinesithombe sikanina besikhombisa ukuthi uhambe emhlabeni ngoMashi 21, nonyaka. Besibhalwe umyalezo othi: “Umuntu obehlale engigqugquzela ukubadlula bonke. Njengamanje usuyingelosi engigadile. Mama uyisizathu ngilana namuhla.” Elandisa ngokushona kukanina, uthe kushiye esikhulu isikhala. “Ngifisa sengathi ubekhona ukuthi siwujabulele ndawonye lo mzuzu. Sasiwuhlelele, saxoxa ngokuthi sizowubungaza kanjani. Ubengumama wami, engumngani futhi engeseka kakhulu,” kusho uMntungwa. Uthe ngokuya esteji nesikibha esinalo myalezo, ubefuna ukuthi umhlaba wonke wazi ukuthi iziqu zakhe, kahle hle zingezikanina. Ekhumbula okunye, uthe unina wadela okuningi ukuqinisekisa ukuthi yena nezingane zakwabo ezintathu ezimlamayo banakekelwa ngendlela eyiyo. “Ubengumsebenzi wasendlini, kuthi ngezinye izikhathi, ahambe ayodayisa emgwaqweni ukuqinisekisa ukuthi sihlale sinakho ukudla kanjalo nemali yokuphatha esikoleni,” kukhumbula uMntungwa. Uthe nangesikhathi eseqale ukuqhuba izifundo zakhe enyuvesi, unina ubehlale emshayela ucingo embheka ukuthi kuhamba kanjani, ambuze ngamamaki akhe. “Lezo bekuyizinto ezincane ebezibalulekile kimina, kuthi ngezikhathi ezinzima, lapho sengifuna ukuyeka, ngivele ngikhumbule ukuthi nginomuntu ekhaya okholelwa kakhulu kimi futhi oziqhenyayo ngami, ofuna ukungibona ngizithola lezi ziqu, ngiba yisifundiswa,” usho kanje. Ngesikhathi ezothweswa iziqu, ubekhashwe nguyise kanjalo noninakhulu.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: INDAWO yesigameko kuQuarry Road lapho kungqongqe khona imijondolo elinganiselwa ku-130 Image: KZN HUMAN SETTLEMENTS UMNYANGO wezokuHlaliswa kwaBantu KwaZulu-Natal uphezu kwezihlelo zokutholela inqwaba yabafundi basemijondolo eyakhele umqwaqo uQuarry Road, eThekwini, umfaniswano wesikole ukuze basheshe babuyele esikoleni. Lokhu kuza emva kokuthi umlilo ungqongqise imijondolo elinganiselwa ku-130 ngoLwesine, kwasala dengwane inqwaba yemindeni. Abakhahlamezekile kuthiwa bagcinwe ematendeni amabili amakhulu agxunyekwe endaweni yesigameko. Okhulumela uMnyango, uMnuz Ndabezinhle Sibiya, uthe umlilo ushiye dengwane abantu abangu-477, okukhona kubo izingane ezingu-299 bese kuba abantu abadala abangu-178. “Njengamanje simatasatasa nokutholela abafundi umfaniswano wesikole njengoba kufanele babuyele esikoleni masinyane. UMphathiswa wezeMfundo uMnuz Sipho Hlomuka uhanjiselwe umbiko,” kusho uSibiya. Uthe olunye usizo ithimba elilunikeza abagilwa kule ndawo, olokubhalisa labo abalahlekelwe omazisi kanjalo nezitifiketi zokuzalwa zezingane. Uthe ngokuthola kwabo umlilo ocekele phansi izakhiwo kule ndawo uqale emjondolo womuntu wokufika kuleli, okuthiwa uvele wacela empunzini emva kwesigameko. Uthe ukuhanjiswa kosizo oludingwa amagilwa kufaka phakathi noMasipala weTheku njengoba besebenzisana nehhovisi leMeya uMnuz Cyril Xaba kanjalo nelikaNksz Thembi Simelane onguNgqongqoshe wezokuHlaliswa kwaBantu ezingeni likazwelonke. Uthe amathimba alekelela kule ndawo azoqhubeka nokuba khona kuyo ukuqinisekisa ukuthi abakhahlamezekile bayakuthola ukusizakala abakudingayo. Uveze nokuthi noMphathiswa wezeMpilo esifundazweni uNksz Nomagugu Simelane kanjalo nowezokuThuthukiswa koMphakathi uNksz Mbali Shinga nabo bawathumele awabo amathimba ukuzonikezela ngosizo oluqondene neminyango yabo oludingwa abagilwa. Ubonge ezinye izinhlangano, athe zifake isandla ekunikezeleni ngosizo kulesi simo. Phakathi kwazo uthe kukhona iGift of the Givers Foundation esize ngomatrasi nezingubo zokulala, i-Al Imdaad Foundation enikezele ngamaphasela okudla, iRed Cross elekelele ngokudla okufudumele, i-Ikabawo Performing Arts Academy namalungu omphakathi abanikele ngokudla okuvuthiwe.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UMSUNGULI weNtuzuma Neighbourhood Watch, uMnuz Andile Jali, uthe baphume benethemba lokuthi izocabeka indlela eya phambili Isithombe: SITHUNYELWE UMSUNGULI weThekwini Neighbourhood Watch, uMnuz Andile Jali, uwathole enenhlabathi amazwi ashiwo uKhomishana wamaPhoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uLieutenant General Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi, kulandela ukubulawa kwamalungu abo amathathu eBhambayi, eNanda, ngoMgqibelo. Esigamekweni okuthiwa senzeke ezintatha, abeqembu lemigulukudu badubule babulala amalungu eThekwini Neighbourhood Watch amathathu. Phakathi kwababulewe, bekukhona uMnuz Nkosinathi Mhlongo (41), Mnuz Mazuzo Nomonti (48) noMnuz Mdunyiswa Nozulela (64). Kuthiwa uNozulela noMhlongo bafele endaweni yesigameko, kwathi uNomonti washonela esibhedlela esiKwaMashu, iDkt Pixley Ka Seme Memorial. Kuvela ukuthi uMhlongo ubengowokudabuka KwaMaphumulo, kuthi uNomonti noNozulela babe ngabaseFlagstaff naseLusikisiki, e-Eastern Cape. Kuthiwa nakubasolwa abathathu okuthiwa bavulele ngenhlamvu kubafi, kufe ababili njengoba bese befayela ngenhlamvu bengasaboni ukuthi badubula bani. Kuvela ukuthi oyedwa wabo ufele esigamekweni, kwathi owesibili washonela esibhedlela esifanayo. Lieutenant General Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi Esitatimendeni esithunyelwe abezindaba, uMkhwanazi ugcizelele eyokuthi izinhlaka ezilwa nobugebengu emphakathini kufanele zisebenzisane namaphoyisa, zigweme eyokufuna ukubhekana ngqo nezigebengu. “Siyakugqugquzela ukuzibandakanya kwemiphakathi empini yokulwa nobugebengu. Iyona ndlela engasiza ukuthi kunqotshwe ubugebengu kodwa izinhlaka zomphakathi ezifana neCommunity Police Forum (CPF) nezinye izinhlangano kufanele zibe amehlo nezindlebe zamaphoyisa, zingenzi into ezogcina ibeka impilo yamalungu azo engcupheni,” kusho uMkhwanazi. Uthe zibonakele izigebengu zidubula amaphoyisa nokudweba isithombe esicacile sokuthi ngeke zicabange kabili ngaphambi kokuba zidubule umuntu ojwayelekile. “Sinxusa abaholi balezi zinhlangano ukuthi baziyamanise nemigomo yokusebenza kweCPF ebhalwe kuMthethosisekelo, bazibandakanye ezinhlelweni zokulwa nobugebengu ezivumelekile,” kusho uMkhwanazi. UJali uthe lesi sitatimende asehlanga kahle kubona. “Siyafisa uNdonga asihoxise lesi sitatimende esisihumushe ngokuthi sidutshulwa, silimale ngoba sizenza amaphoyisa. Kufike kuthiwe, asiwalekelele amaphoyisa, uma sesibulawa, bese kukhulunywa kanje,” kusho uJali. Uqhube wathi into ebasukumisa phansi bazibambele mathupha empini yobugebengu eNanda ukuthi uma ebizelwa izigameko zobugebengu amaphoyisa aye akhale ngokuthi awanele, kokunye athi amaveni awekho. Uthe bebengakulindele nhlobo ukuthi uMkhwanazi akhulume kanje emva kwesigameko. “Bekufanele uma ebona ukuthi kukhona esingakwenzi kahle, asondele kithi asinike umhlahlandlela ngoba iqiniso lithi ubugebengu buphumile esandleni eNanda. Uma sekushiwo kanje, sizizwa sengathi siyizimvu zomhlatshelo,” usho kanje. Uthe basalishumayela ivangeli lokuthi ayisukunyelwe phezulu eyobugebengu baseNanda, wathi kufanele kuphungulwe amaphoyisa aseziteshini ezingenabo ubugebengu obuningi, ayotshalwa eNanda, awoMkhandlu weTheku, aqinise izivimbamgwaqo eNanda, ukuvimba izigelekeqe ezicanasa ngezimoto nezibhamu ezizisebenzisa ukwenza ubugebengu, bese kusungulwa uhlelo lwama-wardens olubonakale luba wusizo eGoli. Uthe asengu-34 esewonke amalungu enhlangano yakhe asebulawe yizigebengu emalokishini aseThekwini, kusuka ngo-2022, nathe isigameko esenzeke ngoMgqibelo, sibashiye bekhathazekile ngoba sibadwebele isithombe sokuthi kusaqhubeka ukubulawa kwabo. Obekhona kwenzeka isigameko ocele ukungadalulwa, uthe iziwombe zokugqekezelwa kwabantu endaweni zaqala ngoLwesihlanu ebusuku, babikelwa ngazo. “Sahlangana saba yiqulu labaqaphi ababalelwa ku-16, sachusha emigwaqweni ehlukene endaweni. Izibhamu sasilokhu sizizwa ziqhuma ngapha nangapha kodwa singababoni nabafana,” kukhumbula owesilisa. Uthe bathi besachusha kanjalo, bavele bazithela kubasolwa abathathu behamba ngezinyawo, bazama ukubamisa babaseshe njengoba babesola ukuthi bayizigebengu. “Yilapho abavele bavulela ngenhlamvu bebhekise kithi, savele sasaphazeka yonke indawo, sibaleka. Kwadubuleka amalungu ethu amathathu,” usho kanje.
