Noma ngabe ubani osebenzela ukugxeka umengameli weqembu, usihlalo waKwaZulu-Natal, noma imuphi umholi weqembu, loyo muntu uyisitha sobumbano lwe-IFP."

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: Umsunguli we-IFP, Inkosi Mangosuthu Buthelezi UFA olubonakala kwi-IFP kufanele lubakhathaze abaholi beqembu. Iqembu elinezinhlangothi ezimbili ezibangayo lijwayele ukuba inyoka ezidla yona. Uma abaholi be-IFP bengakukholwa lokho abobuza kwi-ANC. I-ANC ilahlekelwe amandla nje namhlanje kungenxa yemibango yangaphakathi. Ngesikhathi i-ANC iya engqungqutheleni yokukhetha ubuholi yango-2007 kwakunezinhlangothi ezimbili, olweseka uJacob Zuma, nolwalweseka uThabo Mbeki. Sekuwumlando ukuthi kwanqoba uZuma nokwalandela ukuthi ababeseka uMbeki bahlubuke beyoqala inhlangano entsha, iCongress of the People. Umphumela wokuhlubuka kwabeseka uMbeki kwaba ukuthi kwehle ukweseka kwe-ANC okhethweni lwango-2009. Ezingqungqutheleni zokukhetha ubuholi be-ANC ezilandele eyango-2007 kuhlezi kunezinhlangothi ezimbili ezibangayo. Abasohlangothini oluhlulwayo bayaye behlubuke beqale amanye amaqembu njengoba i-ANC isizele amaqembu afana ne-EFF ne-MKP. Umphumela wokuhlubuka kwala maqembu uzwakale kakhulu kwi-ANC okhethweni lwango-2024 njengoba yahluleka ukuthola amavoti anele ukubusa ngokuzimela kuzwelonke nasezifundazweni iKwaZulu-Natal neGauteng. Abaholi be-IFP isike yabashaya le nduku Ngesikhathi owayengusihlalo we-IFP, uNkk Zanele kaMagwaza-Msibi, esungula iNFP, i-IFP yalahlekelwa inqwaba yomasipala okhethweni lohulumeni basekhaya lwango-2011. I-IFP yasala nomasipala ababili nje kuphela. Uma abaholi be-IFP bengabhekile ingase ibaphinde le nduku. Sekunesikhathi eside ikhulunyelwa phansi eyoqhekeko kwi-IFP. Mumva nje nengane encane isiyabona ukuthi kunomfantu onqabayo ukuvaleka nodalwa abathile abafuna ubuholi obehlukile ngaphakathi kwi-IFP. Lokhu kugqame kakhulu ngesikhathi kusabalala inkulumo eqoshiwe ephehla udlame yelungu lesiShayamthetho saKwaZulu-Natal elinguSihlalo woPhiko lwentsha kwi-IFP KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Mncedisi Maphisa. Kule nkulumo uMaphisa ukhuluma nelungu le-IFP, uNksz Lindi Ndlovu, elizwakala lithi ngeke lisigqoke isikibha esinobuso bomholi weqembu, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa. Kule nkulumo uNksz Ndlovu ukhala ngokubanjwa ngophondo kohlangothi lwabo emhlanganweni yokugcotshwa kwamaziko. Yile nkulumo efakazela ukuthi kunezinhlangothi ezimbili ezinezifiso ezingefani. UNksz Ndlovu uzwakala ethi abaholi abasohlangothini lwabo bavinjwa nangamatshe emigwaqweni ukuze bengayi emihlanganweni yokugcotshwa kwamaziko. UMaphisa uphendula ngokuthi akufanele abasohlangothini lwabo bavume ukudlala abasohlangothini ababanga nalo. UMaphisa uze asho nokusho ukuthi kufanele bashaywe, 'bafokofiswe', labo abasohlangothini ababanga nalo. UMaphisa noNkk Ndlovu bamisiwe njengoba bebhekene nekomiti lokuqondiswa ubugwegwe. Akuyona eyokuqala inkulumo eqoshiwe esike yasabalala. Phambilini kuke kwasabalala enkulumo eqoshiwe okukholakala ukuthi kuyo kukhuluma usomlomo woMasipala waseNewcastle, uMnuz Thengi Zulu. Kule nkulumo lomuntu okukholakala ukuthi uZulu uzwakala ecija itulo lokuthi bazoludlisela kanjani ogageni uhlangothi ababanga nalo emihlanganweni yokugcotshwa kwamaziko. Kusukela umsunguli weqembu osakhothama, Inkosi Mangosuthu kaMathole Buthelezi, wabeka phansi izintambo ngo-2019, ibilokhu ikhulunyelwa phansi eyezinhlangothi ezibangayo kwi-IFP. Kunezinhlangothi ezimbili ezibhekene ngeziqu zamehlo olunye olubizwa ngama-AU (abusekho ubunzima) kanye nelibizwa ngamaKKK (konke kuhamba kahle). Ama-AU kuthiwa ahamba noHlabisa ama-KKK wona kuthiwa afuna kukhishwe uHlabisa esikhundleni. Izimpi zangaphakathi kwi-IFP zigqame kakhulu emva kokukhothama kukaButhelezi ngo-2023 futhi sekubona ngisho nengane encane ukuthi inkulu inkinga lapha. Iphini lomholi we-IFP, Inkosi Mzamo Buthelezi, lisanda kuxwayisa ngokuthi iqembu alikulungele ukubhekana nomonakalo ozodalwa ilaba abagqugquzela uqhekeko eqenjini. Ikhuluma emcimbini obuseNquthu, Inkosi ithe baqala into abangeke bayimele laba abagqugquzela ukwehlukana eqenjini. "Le nto yethu yokuthi sibhekane sodwa izosilimaza kakhulu. Nginganitshela mina ngingabazi ukuthi njengeqembu asikulungele ukubhekana nomphumela wale nto esiyiqalayo. Angiphinde nginichazele, njengeqembu asikakasawoti ukuze sikwazi ukubhekana nalokhu esikuqala manje ukuba sikukhande. Ngamanye amanye amagama le nto yokuthi sibhekane sodwa, silwe sodwa, izosishaya isibhuqe nya. Siyophaphama ngakusasa kungekho kwalezihlalo esinazo." Emlandweni wayo weminyaka engu-51 i-IFP ayikaze ibhekane nezimpi zalolu hlobo. Umhlaziyi wezepolitiki waseNyuvesi yaKwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Zakhele Ndlovu, uthe akwethusi ukubona izimpi zangaphakathi ezifufusa kwi-IFP. "UMntwana uyena umuntu obeyibambile, ubeyinomfi. Siyazi ukuthi ukukhethwa kukaHlabisa akuhambisananga nenqubo ejwayelekile. UMntwana nje owakhomba uHlabisa. I-IFP ibanjwe isikhathi eside uMntwana, kunguyena oyi-glue. Njengoba engasekho ayisekho leyo glue ebiyihlanganisile." UNdlovu uthe okunye okudala uqhekeko kwi-IFP ukuthi sekunezikhundla kuhulumeni. "I-IFP isemandleni komasipala, kuhulumeni waKwaZulu-Natal, nakuhulumeni kazwelonke. Izikhundla zizobangwa ngoba wonke umuntu ufuna isinkwa. Kukhona abantu abangajabule ngenxa yokuthi bona abazitholanga izikhundla." UMENGAMELI we-IFP leader uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa Image: Leon Lestrade / Independent Media

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: AMAQEMBU aphikisayo alolela izembe uMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa, kulandela isinqumo seNkantolo yezoMthethosisekelo esivuse upelepele ogqokweni ngodaba lokuntshontshwa kwezishaqane zamadola aseMelika epulazini lakhe iPhala Phala. Amaqembu amabili asefake isiphakamiso sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaRamaphosa, kuneqembu lesithathu lona elifuna kusungulwe ngokushesha ikomiti elizoqhuba uhlelo lokukhipha uRamaphosa esikhundleni. Amaqembu i-MKP, EFF ne-ATM abhalele uSomlomo, uNkk Thoko Didiza. Nakuba izicelo zala maqembu zingafani kodwa onke afuna ukuthi uRamaphosa adliwe yizembe. I-MKP ne-ATM bafuna kulalelwe ngokushesha isiphakamiso sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaRamaphosa. I-EFF yona ifuna kusungulwe ngokushesha ikomiti elizoqhuba uhlelo lokukhipha uRamaphosa esikhundleni. Lolu hlelo oluhlongozwa yi-EFF luhlukile kunesiphakamiso sokungabethembi ubuholi. Umholi okhishwa ngaphansi kwalolu hlelo akayitholi imihlomulo yakhe okubalwa nempesheni njengoba kwenzeka kowayeyinhlomo yamajaji eWestern Cape, uDkt John Hlophe, nowayengumvikeli womphakathi, u-Advocate Busisiwe Mkhwebane. Uhlelo oluhlongozwa yi-EFF luyaye luthathe isikhathi njengoba kuba nezigcawu zokulalelwa kwezethulo lapho osuke esuswa esikhundleni enikwa ithuba lokuziphendulela. Uma kunesiphakamiso sokungamethembi umengameli kuyaye kube nempikiswano ePhalamende, bese kuyavotwa. Okungaphinde kubambezele uhlelo oluhlongozwa i-EFF ukuthi uRamaphosa aphonsele inselelo umbiko wethimba lasePhalamende elaliholwa yijaji eselathatha umhlalaphansi, uSandile Ngcobo, owathola ukuthi kungenzeka ukuthi kukhona uRamaphosa okufanele akuphendule ezinsolweni zokuthi awabikelwanga amaphoyisa ngokuntshontshwa kwemali epulazini lakhe. URamaphosa wake wazama ukuwuphonsela inselelo umbiko kodwa wabuye wayeka ngenxa yokuthi iPhalamende lawuchitha. Njengoba isinqumo sangoLwesihlanu sesibuyisele umbiko ezithebeni zePhalamende, kungeza uRamaphosa abuyele enkantolo. USihlalo we-EFF onguSotswebhu weqembu ePhalamende, uNkk Nontando Noluntshungu, ubhalele uNkk Didiza ecela ukuba kusungulwe ikomiti ngokushesha. UNkk Noluntshungu uthe isinqumo senkantolo siqede nya umbango obukhona ngalolu daba. Unqumele uNkk Didiza umnqamulajuqu wezinsuku ezimbili ukuba aqinisekise ukusungulwa kwekomiti. "Uma singayitholi impendulo kulesi esisibekile, uze wazi ukuthi sinelungelo lokukuthathela izinyathelo zomthetho. Lolu daba selubambezeleke kakhulu. Asifuni kuphinde kube nokubambezeleka." Umholi weMKP ePhalamende, uHlophe, uthe abasabuthembi ubuholi bukaRamaphosa. UHlophe uthe bafuna ukuthi isiphakamiso sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaRamaphosa silalelwe lingakashoni elangoLwesithathu. UHlophe nomholi we-ATM, uMnuz Vuyo Zungula, bathe bafuna ukuthi kuvotwe ngokuyimfihlo esiphakamisweni sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaRamaphosa. Ubuholi be-ANC KwaZulu-Natal buzwakalise ukumeseka uRamaphosa. Umdidiyeli wethimba elihola i-ANC KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Mike Mabuyakhulu, uthe isinqumo senkantolo asisho ukuthi uRamaphosa unecala. Amaqembu abambisene ne-ANC kuhulumeni wokubambisana, okubalwa kuwo iDA ne-IFP. awazange afune ukusho ukuthi azophikisana yini nokuthi kukhishwe uRamaphosa esikhundleni. La maqembu ame ngelokuthi kufanele kulandelwe umthetho.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: SBHEKWE ngabomvu isinqumo seNkantolo yezoMthethosisekelo ngodaba lwePhala Phala noMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa KUNGASE kuvuke upelepele ogqokweni azithole ebhekene nohlelo lokukhishwa esikhundleni uMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa, njengoba iNkantolo yezoMthethosisekelo izokhipha isinqumo ngodaba lokuntshontshwa kwezishaqane zamadola aseMelika epulazini lakhe iPhala Phala. Inkantolo izokhipha isinqumo esibhekwe ngabomvu namhlanje ngo-10 ekuseni. Inkantolo izonquma ukuthi kwakusemthethweni yini ukuthi iPhalamende lichithe umbiko wethimba elaliholwa yijaji eselathatha umhlalaphansi, uSandile Ngcobo. Umbiko wawuthole ukuthi kungenzeka ukuthi kukhona uRamaphosa okufanele akuphendule ezinsolweni zokuthi awabikelwanga amaphoyisa ngokuthathwa ngozwane kwenkece. Ukuchithwa kombiko kwasho ukuthi uRamaphosa uyaphunyuka esiphakamisweni sokuthi akhishwe esikhundleni. I-EFF ne-ATM babe sebefaka isicelo enkantolo bephonsela inselelo ukuchithwa kombiko. Bese kunesikhathi kulindwe isinqumo senkantolo njengoba icala laqulwa ngo-2024. I-EFF ike yaba nemibhikisho ehlukene ifuna ukuthi inkantolo ikhiphe isinqumo. Amalungu e-EFF azobe ebhikisha ngaphandle kwenkantolo namhlanje uma sekuphuma isinqumo. Umhlaziyi wezepolitiki waseNyuvesi yaKwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Zakhele Ndlovu, uthe uRamaphosa angase azithole esesobishini uma inkantolo ivuna i-EFF. UNdlovu uthe uma inkantolo ivuna i-EFF kuzoba nzima kuRamaphosa njengoba i-ANC ingasenazo izihlalo ezanele ePhalamende ezingenza ichithe noma yimiphi imizamo yokumkhipha esikhundleni. UNdlovu uthe kufanele uRamaphosa athandazele ukuthi amaqembu abambisene ne-ANC kuhulumeni aphikisane nemizamo yokumkhipha esikhundleni. "Abantu bamaqembu abusa ngokubambisana yibona engibabheke kakhulu. Umbuzo uthi amaqembu angaphakathi kuhulumeni wokubambisana ngabe azozama yini ukumvikela noma azokwenza umsebenzi wawo ngobuqotho." UNdlovu uthe kuzophinde kuncike nasohlelweni oluzosetshenziswa uma kuba nesiphakamiso sokukhipha uRamaphosa esikhundleni. "Uma kuvotwa ngokuyimfihlo uRamaphosa angajikelwa ngisho nangamalungu e-ANC angahambisani naye. Uma kuvotwa ngokuvulelekile uzosinda." Okhulumela i-EFF, uMnuz Sinawo Tambo, uthe basibheke ngabomvu isinqumo senkantolo. "Bese kuphele izinsuku ezingu-521 silinde isinqumo senkantolo. Yi-EFF kuphela ebilokhu imile, ifuna ukuthi uRamaphosa aphendule. Sibe nemibhikisho eminingi saphinde sabhalela nenhloko yamajaji (Jaji Mandisa Maya) sifuna izimpendulo ngalolu daba. Ukubambezeleka kwesinqumo kwenza ukuthi abantu bengazithembi izinhlaka zomthetho," kusho uTambo. Izinhlaka eziningi ezaphenya ngalesi sigameko okubalwa kuzo ihhovisi lomvikeli womphakathi, uphiko oluqapha ukusebenza kwamaphoyisa i-Ipid, iBhange loMbuso neSA Revenue Services zamkhipha phambili uRamaphosa. Lezi zinhlaka zalahla ngecala amaphoyisa ayegada uRamaphosa asolwa ngokuthi ashaya abasolwa aphinde asebenzisa izinsiza zoMbuso eyofuna abasolwa eNamibia. Umholi we-ATM ePhalamende, uMnuz Vuyo Zungula, ukhale ngokuthi izinhlaka zoMbuso zivikela uRamaphosa. "Lapha sibhekene nomuntu ovikelwa yizinhlaka zoMbuso ezihlukene. Abantu into okufanele bayazi wukuthi akekho umuntu ongaphezu komthetho. Naye umengameli kufanele abhekane nengalo yomthetho." Okhulumela iHhovisi likaMengameli, uMnuz Vincent Magwenya, unxuse ukuba abantu balinde isinqumo senkantolo. "Kunzima ukukhuluma manje ngoba inkantolo ayikasikhiphi isinqumo. Kunzima ukuthi sengingasho ukuthi kuzokwenzekani uma isinqumo senkantolo sisho lokhu. Okungcono asilinde ukuthi inkantolo ikhiphe isinqumo."

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMntwana uMuziwoxolo Zulu ISEMANZINI iNdlunkulu kaZulu kulandela ukushona koMntwana uMuziwoxolo Graduate Zulu obesebenza nophiko obelugada iSilo uMisuzulu Sinqobile kaZwelithini. UMntwana uMuziwoxolo ubeyiphoyisa futhi wayesophikweni olwalugada iSilo uGoodwill Zwelithini kaBhekuzulu. Okhulumela iSilo, uMntwana uThulani kaGqikazi Zulu, uthe uMntwana uMuziwoxolo ushone ngempelasonto. "Ifu elimnyama seliphinde lehla futhi eNdlunkulu kaZulu. UMntwana udlule ngokukhulu ukuzuma ngoMeyi 1. Udlula nje eneminyaka engu-49. Egameni leSilo Samabandla, iNdlunkulu nesizwe sonke sidlulisa ukulila bakwethu. Siyakhala, sikhalela iNgonyama ngoba lo ohambile ungomunye wabanawayo. Sikhalela isizwe, sikhalela abaNtwana baseNdlunkulu." UMntwana uThulani uthe uMntwana uMuziwoxolo ubezinikele kakhulu emsebenzini wakhe. "Usebenze kakhulu nophiko obelugada iSilo uZwelithini kaBhekuzulu kanti nakuyo iNgonyama esesihlalweni usebenzile." UMntwana uMuziwoxolo ushona nje iNdlukulu kaZulu ibisazikhotha amanxeba kulandela ukushona kwabaNtwana ngokulandelana. Ngenyanga eyedlule kushone abaNtwana ababili. Kuqale kwaguqa uMntwana owayekhongela iMbube ekhweni layo kwaMyeni, uGibizizwe Zulu, kwase kulandela uMntwana uGcinabani Thembisile "Sister Eunice" Zulu. UMntwana uThulani uthe kuyakhathaza ukudlula ngokulandelana kwabaNtwana baseNdlunkulu. "Sinobumbuzo ongephendulwe muntu ke nokho ezinhliziyweni zethu ukuthi awu kwenzekeni eNdlunkulu? Kwanomkhonto olokhu ugwaza uphindelela. Sicela imithandazo nina beSilo. Akukho esingakwenza, sibhekisa kuye umdali. Nilale ngenxa nina beNdlovu." UMntwana uThulani uthe uMntwana uMuziwoxolo uzongcwatshwa ngoMgqibelo, KwaNongoma. "UMntwana uzobekwa lapha eMakhosini, eMahhasini, emva kwenkonzo ezokuba lapha ezinkundleni zezemidlalo esigodlweni KwaKhethomthandayo ngehora lesishiyagalolunye ekuseni."

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: ZIKHALE ngaphansi izikhulu zikaMasipala wasebaQulusini, i-DA ivimba isiphakamiso sokuthi zigixabezwe ngamabhonasi. Image: Itumeleng English/ Independent Newspaper ZIKHALE ngaphansi izikhulu zikaMasipala wasebaQulusini, i-DA ivimba isiphakamiso sokuthi zigixabezwe ngamabhonasi. Isiphakamiso sokuthi izikhulu zomkhandlu zinikwe amabhonasi sichithiwe emhlanganweni womkhandlu emva kokuba i-DA izwakalise ukungahambisani nesiphakamiso. Umasipala uphethwe ngokubambisana yi-IFP ne-DA. Ukwenqaba kwe-DA ukweseka isiphakamiso kwenze ukuthi singaphumeleli. IKhansela le-DA, uMnuz Swelakhe Shelembe, lithe banqume ukuphikisana nesiphakamiso ngenxa yokuthi abukho ubufakazi abanikwe bona obukhombisa ukuthi lezi zikhulu ebezizonikwa amabhonasi ziwenze ngendlela encomekayo umsebenzi wazo. "Ukunika umuntu ibhonasi engakhombisanga ukuthi ukwenze konke abebekelwe ukuba akwenze kufana nokuthi uyamupha nje imali yomphakathi. Kufanele kube nombiko onobufakazi bokuthi umuntu ukwazile ukukwenza konke abebekelwe khona ngaphambi kokuthi umbonge ngebhonasi." UShelembe uthe bacele izikhulu obekuhlongozwa ukuthi zinikwe amabhonasi ukuba zilethe ubufakazi obukhombisa ukuthi zikwazile ukukwenza konke ebezibekelwe khona. "Ngenxa yokuthi abuzange bulethwe ubufakazi ebesibufuna, isiphakamiso sokuthi banikwe amabhonasi asizange siphumelele. Siyalele imenenja kamasipala ukuba yenze isiqiniseko sokuthi asikho isiphakamiso esifana nalesi esizolethwa emhlanganweni womkhandlu ngaphandle uma kuwukuthi sizokube sihambisana nobufakazi." UShelembe uthe kunzima ukukhuluma indaba yokunika izikhulu zomkhandlu amabhonasi ekubeni ingqalasizinda yomkhandlu ifadabala. Uthe ukubusa ngokubambisana angeke kubenze ukuthi bavume noma yini ephakanyiswa yiqembu abambisene nalo. "Sikukhombisile lokho namhlanje ngokuthi siphikisane nalesi siphakamiso. Ngesikhathi singena kuhulumeni sazibophezela ekusebenzeni ngobuqotho saphinda futhi sazibophezela ukuthi sizoqinisekisa ukuthi abantu bazithola ngendlela izidingo. Angeke sigudluke kulezi zibophezelo esazenzayo. Ngeke sivumelane nezinqumo ezingeke zibasize ngalutho abantu basebaQulusini. Abantu basebaQulusini kufanele bazi ukuthi imali yabo isebenze kanjani."

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: KUMISWE uSihlalo we-IFP Youth Brigade (IFPYB) KwaZulu-Natal, ozwakala engxoxweni eqoshiwe ephehla udlame, uMnuz Mncedisi Maphisa. UMaphisa umiswe nelungu le-IFP, uNksz Lindi Ndlovu, elizwakala kule nkulumo lithi ngeke lisifake isikibha esinobuso bomholi weqembu, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa. UMaphisa uyilungu lesiShayamthetho saKwaZulu-Natal futhi uke waba imeya kaMasipala wasebaQulusini, ekubeni uNksz Ndlovu, yena usebenza kumasipala ophethwe yi-IFP. Isinqumo sokumisa uMaphisa noNksz Ndlovu sithathwe emhlanganweni oyisipesheli wesigungu esiphezulu kwi-IFP obizwe emva kokusabalala kwayo. Okhulumela i-IFP, uMnuz Mkhuleko Hlengwa, uthe isigungu esiphezulu sithathe isinqumo sokumisa uMaphisa noNksz Ndlovu emva kokuba uMaphisa evumile ukuthi nguyena okhuluma kule ngxoxo eqoshiwe. UHlengwa uthe uMaphisa noNksz Ndlovu bazoqondiswa ubugwegwe. "UMaphisa umiswe kuzo zonke izikhundla okubalwa kuzo ukuba uSihlalo we-IFPYB KwaZulu-Natal nokuba ilungu loMkhandlu kaZwelonke kwi-IFP. Uzomiswa esikhundleni kuze kube udaba lwakhe lulalelwa uMkhandlu kaZwelonke. UNksz Ndlovu umisiwe kuzo zonke izinto ezithinta iqembu, akavumelekile ukuba abe yingxenye yezinto ezithinta iqembu kuze kuba kuphuma isinqumo ohlelweni lwakhe lokuqondiswa ubugwegwe lulalelwa uMkhandlu kaZwelonke." UHlengwa uthe isigungu esiphezulu sizoqhubeka nokuphenya lolu daba, bese sethula umbiko ogcwele emhlanganweni woMkhandlu kaZwelonke. "I-IFP ixwayisa abaholi bayo, amalungu nezinhlaka zeqembu ukuba bagweme ukwenza izinkulumo ezidala ezibudedengu, ezifaka iqembu ehlazweni nezidala uqhekeko eqenjini. Ubuholi be-IFP buzokwenza isiqiniseko sokuthi iyalandelwa yonke imigomo yeqembu." UMaphisa noNksz Ndlovu bangene obishini emva kokuba kusabalale inkulumo eqoshiwe lapho kuzwakala khona bekhuluma ngezimpi zangaphakathi kwi-IFP. Kule nkulumo kuzwakala uNksz Ndlovu ekhalaza kuMaphisa ukuthi abantu abasohlangothini lwabo bayavinjwa uma kunemihlangano yokugcoba amaziko. UMaphisa uphendula ngokuthi uNksz Ndlovu nabanye abasohlangothini lwabo akufanele bavume ukudlala abantu abasohlangothini ababanga nalo. UMaphisa uzwakala ethi abasohlangothini lwabo kufanele bashaye abasohlangothini oluphikisayo emihlanganweni yokugcotshwa kwamaziko okuvinjwa kuyo abasohlangothini abahambisana nalo. Uma iqhubeka inkulumo kuzwakala uNksz Ndlovu ethi kade ayenikwa izikibha ezinobuso bomuntu ambize ngalo baba, nokukholakala ukuthi ubesho izikibha ezinobuso bukaHlabisa. UNksz Ndlovu uzwakala ethi yena ngeke azigqoke izikibha ezinobuso "balo baba". Amalungu e-IFP asanda kuvunyelwa ukuba agqoke izikibha ezinobuso bukaHlabisa. Phambilini, bekuvumeleke izikibha ezinobuso bomsunguli weqembu, Inkosi Mangosuthu Buthelezi.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMXHUMANISI weDA neNdlunkulu kaZulu, uMnuz Swelakhe Shelembe UMXHUMANISI weDA neNdlunkulu kaZulu, uMnuz Swelakhe Shelembe, ungenele umbango wesikhundla esibhekwe ngabomvu engqungqutheleni yokukhetha ubuholi beDA KwaZulu-Natal. UShelembe uphakanyiselwe emjahweni wesikhundla sephini likasihlalo weDA KwaZulu-Natal nokuyisikhundla esibangwa kakhulu. Bayisishiyagalolunye ababheke lesi sikhundla, kanti ingqungquthela izoba ngoMeyi 9. UShelembe uthe ukuqokelwa kwakhe kulesi sikhundla kuzoqinisa ubudlelwano beqembu neNdlunkulu kaZulu namakhosi, kuphinde kukhulise iDA ezindaweni zasemakhaya, emalokishini nasemapulazini. "Abantu abaphakamise igama lami bathe into yokuqala abayibona ibalulekile wukuthi siyibukele eduze into ethinta ubukhosi, umphakathi wasemakhaya, owasemalokishini kanye nabantu abahlala emapulazini. Mina ngisebenzile kakhulu ezindaweni zasemakhaya, emalokishini nasemapulazini. "Ngiqale ukusebenza kulezi zindawo ngo-2012. Ukukhankasa kulezi zindawo kwehlukile, akufani nasesilungwini lapho okwazi khona ukukhankasa ngokuthi ufonele abantu noma ubathumele imiqhafazo. Abantu basemakhaya badinga ukuthi usondele eduze kwabo, wakhe ubudlelwano nabo." UShelembe uthe kuningi akwenzile kusukela aqokwa ukuba axhumanise iDA neNdlunkulu kaZulu ngo-2023. Uthe wakwazi ukuhlela ukuthi umholi weDA osanda kuphuma esikhundleni, uMnuz John Steenhuisen, ayokotha iSilo uMisuzulu Sinqobile kaZwelithini. "Ngaphinde ngahlelela ubuholi beDA KwaZulu-Natal ukuba buyokotha iSilo. Ngaphinde ngahlelela ubuholi besifundazwe ukuthi buyobona uNyazi (umholi wamaNazaretha ohlangothini lwaseBuhleni. Nemeya yaseMngeni (uMnuz Chris Pappas) maningi amakhosi engimxhumanise nawo. Lokhu ngikwenza ngoba ngiyazi ukuthi iKwaZulu-Natal yakhelwe kakhulu esisekelweni samasiko nenkolo." UShelembe uwusihlalo wekomiti elibhekele ukusebenza kwemali yomphakathi kuMasipala wesiFunda iZululand, aphinde abe uSotswebhu weDA kuMasipala AbaQulusi. Bobabili labo masipala baphethwe ngokubambisana yi-IFP neDA. UShelembe uzishaya isifuba ngokuthi uvundulule inkohlakalo eningi kule mikhandlu. UShelembe uyena umvusi wenyamazane ezinsolweni ezagcina ziholela ekuxoshweni kowayeyimeya kaMasipala wasebaQulusi, uMnuz Mncedisi Maphisa. "EZululand ziningi izimenenja ezixoshiwe ezinye eziphenywayo ngenxa yomsebenzi owenziwe yikomiti engiliholayo. Kungokokuqala emlandweni ukuthi kube nosihlalo wekomiti olwa ngale ndlela nenkohlakalo," kusho uShelembe. UShelembe uke waba ngumholi wophiko lwentsha kwiDA KwaZulu-Natal, njengamanje uyingxenye yethimba eleluleka Inkosi yaseNadi, eMgungundlovu, uVusizwe Zondi. UMXHUMANISI weDA neNdlunkulu kaZulu, uMnuz Swelakhe Shelembe

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMHOLI weNFP, uMnuz Ivan Barnes UMHOLI we-NFP, uMnuz Ivan Barnes, ushiye angalazi kumholi we-EFF, uMnuz Julius Malema, amsola ngokuvikela abokufika abakuleli ngokungemthetho. UBarnes ubize uMalema ngohlanya oluhambe luvikela abantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi amukela amalungu ajoyine iqembu esifundeni uThukela. UMalema usanda kukhwela adilike ebantwini abahola imibhikisho elwa nabokufika ethe chithi saka ezweni. Imibhikisho iqale esifundazweni iKwaZulu-Natal, yabe isidlulela e-Eastern Cape. Ngeledlule le mibhikisho ingenise esifundazweni iGauteng edolobheni eliyisizinda somnotho wakuleli, iGoli, kanye nasenhloko dolobha yezwe iPitoli. UMalema uthe le mibhikisho yenzeka ezifundazweni lapho abantu abamnyama babebulalana bodwa ngesikhathi sobandlululo. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ekhuluma esidlweni sakusihlwa ebesihlelwe inhlangano engenzi nzuzo iCollen Mashawana Foundation. UMalema uthe abahola imibhikisho abazi lutho bazi ukuphuza intelezi nempesu. UMalema uthe akanendaba noma bengangayivotela i-EFF labantu abaqhuba le mibhikisho. "Anginendaba namavoti abo, iMKP ingawathatha uma iwafuna amavoti abo. Angifuni mina ukuvotelwa abantu abafuna ukuthi ngizonde abantu balapha e-Afrika." UBarnes unxuse abantu ukuthi bengamnaki uMalema. UBarnes uthe naye uyahambisana nomkhankaso wokuxosha abokufika abakuleli ngokungemthetho. "Lo ogula ngekhanda othi badla intelezi nempesu, uma bekwenza ngakubo, abahambe ngakubo ke. Thina la KwaZulu sithi umuntu nomuntu akabuyele ngakubo. La kwelikaMthaniya sithi umuntu nomuntu akabuyele ngakubo. Uma uyiSulumane buyela ngakini emaSulumaneni amanye eSomalia. Uma ungowaseNigeria hamba ngakini eNigeria. Uma ungowaseZimbabwe hamba ngakini eZimbabwe. Anisenamahloni yini ukuthi selokhu kwathi nhlo iNingizimu Afrika iyahlupheka ngenxa yenu? Sesikhathele." UBarnes uthe nabo beyiNFP bazowujoyina umkhankaso wokuxosha abokufika wanxusa abaholi imibhikisho, uNgizwe Mchunu noNkosikhona "Phakel'uthakathi" Ndabandaba ukuba babameme emkhankasweni. UBarnes ukhuluma kanjena ngoMalema nje lamaqembu ahlela ukubambisana neMKP KwaZulu-Natal ekuketuleni uhulumeni wesifundazwe. I-MKP ihola umkhankaso wokugudluza uhulumeni wokubambisana oholwa i-IFP, iNFP ingababeki benkosi esiShayamthetho saKwaZulu-Natal. Uma lingagcina liphumelela itulo leMKP lokuchitha uhulumeni wesifundazwe kungasho ukuthi izobambisana namaqembu anemibono eyehlukile odabeni lwabantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: Izimoto ezinikelwe umnyango kaCogta UTHATHWE emalini yezinye izinhlelo zoMnyango wezokuBusa ngokuBambinsana kanye neziNdaba zoMdabu KwaZulu-Natal u-R 19 million okuthengwe ngawo izingqovungqovu zezimoto ezinikwe imikhandlu yamakhosi angu-30 KwaZulu-Natal. Ingxenye yemali ethenge lezi zimoto ezingundaba mlonyeni bekuhlelwe ukuthi kuholelwe abasebenzi abebezoqashwa umnyango. Lokhu kuqukethwe empendulweni ebhalwe phansi yoMphathiswa woMnyango, uMfu Thulasizwe Buthelezi, obephendula imibuzo yelungu leDA, uNksz Marlaine Nair. UButhelezi uveze ukuthi banqume ukuthi imali bathenge ngayo izimoto ngenxa yokubambezeleka kohlelo lokuqashwa kwabasebenzi abebezoholelwa ngale mali. Enye imali bekufanele ithenge imishini yamakhompyutha. "Sithathe yonke le mali engazange isebenze sabe sesithenga izimoto, asizange sisebenzise ngokweqile isabelomali soMnyango." UButhelezi uthe bazoqhubeka nokuthenga izimoto ezizonikelwa emikhandlwini yamakhosi. Uveze ukuthi izimoto zohlobo lweFord Everest ezingu-12 ebiza u-R772 259 ngayinye, kanye nama-GWM P300 D/C angu-18 abiza u-R563 494 ngayinye. UNksz Nair uthe usephinde wabhalela uButhelezi eminye imibuzo. Uthe bafuna ukwazi ukuthi izimoto azithengangwa yini ngemali ebibekelwe ukulekelela omasipala noma ukubhekana nezinhlekelele. UNksz Nair uthe bafuna ukwazi ukuthi imikhandlu yamakhosi izokwazi yini ukumelana nezindleko zalezi zimoto okubalwa ukufaka uphethroli, ukukhokhela imishwalense, ukulungisa izimoto namasondo. UNksz Nair uthe ufuna ukuthi uMnyango uchaze kahle ukuthi yiluphi uhlelo olulandelile ngesikhathi ukhetha imikhandlu yamakhosi enikwe izimoto. Ukuthengwa kwezimoto sekususe umsindo njengoba ubuholi benhlangano yobuholi bomdabu, iCongress of Traditional Leaders of SA (Contralesa) KwaZulu-Natal busola ukuthi uButhelezi wakhetha iphela emasini ngesikhathi aba izimoto. Ngesikhathi kwethulwa izimoto uMnyango wathi zizonikwa amalungu endlu yobuholi bomdabu KwaZulu-Natal, osihlalo kanye namaphini osihlalo bezindlu zobuholi bomdabu ezifundeni. Abaholi beContralesa KwaZulu-Natal baveza ukuthi kukhona osihlalo abashiywa ngaphandle ngesikhathi kwabiwa izimoto, bathi kukhona amakhosi angebona osihlalo kodwa ahlomula. Ngokohlu lwamakhosi ahlomula oluqukethwe empendulweni kaButhelezi, bayisithupha osihlalo abathola, kwathola amaphini osihlalo amabili. Kunezifunda ezingu-11 KwaZulu-Natal. Uhlu luveza ukuthi kunamakhosi angu-14 angamalungu engeziwe ezindlu zobuholi bomdabu ezifundeni ahlomula. IContralesa KwaZulu-Natal isanda kubika izikhalazo zayo kusihlalo wekomiti elibhekelele ukusebenza komnyango ePhalamende, uDkt Zweli Mkhize.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: KUDILIZWE uSomlomo woMasipala wasoPhongolo, uNkk Celiwe Nxumalo-Sibiya, obengakaqedi nesonto eqokelwe esikhundleni. UNkk Nxumalo-Sibiya wehliswe esikhundleni yisinqumo seNkantolo eNkulu eMgungundlovu esithi umhlangano aqokwa kuwo wawungekho emthethweni. Isinqumo senkantolo siphume ngeledlule. UNkk Nxumalo-Sibiya, oyikhansela le-ANC, waqokwa emhlanganweni owawusemasontweni amabili edlule. Ukuqokwa kwakhe kwamangaza abaningi ngenxa yokuthi i-IFP iyona ephethe umkhandlu njengoba inamakhansela angu-14 kwangu-29 emkhandlwini. I-IFP ivota ne-DA enekhansela elilodwa kulo mkhandlu. UNkk Nxumalo-Sibiya wakhethwa ngo-elethu ngenxa yokuthi amakhansela ayisishiyagalombili  e-IFP awezanga kulo mhlangano ngenxa yezinsolo zokuthi ayengahambisani negama lobuholi be-IFP obabufuna ukuthi aqokelwe esikhundleni. Ubuholi be-IFP babuyalele amakhansela eqembu ukuba akhethe uMnuz Ndukisebandla Mavuso, ukuba abe usomlomo womkhandlu. Isikhundla sasikade siphethwe uMnuz Kwenzakakufani Nxumalo, owayalelwa ubuholi be-IFP ukuba asule esikhundleni. Okhulumela uMnyango wezokuBusa ngokuBambisana kanye neziNdaba zoMdabu KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Senzelwe Mzila, uthe iJaji Nontuthuzelo Mlaba lichithe zonke izinqumo ezathathwa emhlanganweni okwaqokwa kuwo uNkk Nxumalo-Sibiya njengosomlomo. "Inkantolo iyalele uMphathiswa (uMfu Thulasizwe Buthelezi) ukuba ahlele umhlangano okuzoqokwa kuwo usomlomo ukuze kungeke kuphazamiseke ukusebenza komkhandlu." Inkantolo iphinde yachitha nezinqumo ezathathwa emhlanganweni womkhandlu owawungo-Ephreli 7 kanye nowawungo-Ephreli 28. UMzila uthe le mihlangano yabanjwa ngaphandle kokulandela imigomo elawula imihlangano yomkhandlu. Inkantolo iphinde yanquma ukuthi imenenja yomkhandlu ebhekene nezinsolo zenkohlakalo, uMnuz Mntonjani Bethuel Khali, ingalubhadi emahhovisi omkhandlu. UMzila uthe inkantolo iyalele uKhali ukuba angalinge aqhubeke nokuzenza imenenja yomkhandlu noma anikeze abasebenzi bomkhandlu imiyalelo. UKhali wamiswa emva kwezinsolo zenkohlakalo kodwa wabuye wabuyiselwa emsebenzi. UMzila uthe isikhulu somnyango esajutshwa ukuba siyobamba kwesokuba imenenja yomasipala ngoMashi, uMnuz Khulekani Ngcobo, isona esizoqhubeka nokubamba isikhundla. UMzila uthe isinqumo senkantolo sizoqinisekisa ukuthi uyalandelwa umthetho kuMasipala wasoPhongolo.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: THABO Mathonsi Chonco KUBE ubutatata inkabi eboshwe nenkosi uSimpiwe Erick Zuma ivukwa yisifo sokuwa  enkantolo . UThabo Mathonsi Chonco uvukwe isifo sokuwa ngaphambi kokuthi kuqale ukuqulwa kwecala lokubulawa kowayeyikhansela le-DA kuMasipala waseMngeni, uMnuz Nhlalayenza Ndlovu. UChonco ubevele eNkantolo yesifunda eMgungundlovu. Bekulindeleke ukuthi uzolivuma icala izolo kodwa kwangabe kusenzeka lokho njengoba kuphoqe ukuthi aphuthunyiswe esibhedlela emva kokugula. Uphume enkantolo eqhutshwa ngesihlalo esinamasondo, eyethile. Isifo simvuke kungazelele muntu ngesikhathi ehlezi emabhentshini, elinde ukuba kuqale ukuqulwa kwecala. Bake babukana bodwa abebesenkantolo, kwasweleka ozomlekelela. Isimo siholele ekutheni iMantshi, uBemal Jaynarayan, ithethise ojele abebelethe uChonco. UJaynarayan uthe ojele kufanele babe nohlelo lokulekelela iziboshwa uma zivukwa wukugula. Ummeli kaChonco, uMnuz Zipho Khanyile, utshele inkantolo ukuthi uChonco unesifo sokuwa. "Ngiyazi ukuthi udla amaphilisi esifo sokuwa." UKhanyile unxuse inkantolo ukuba ikhiphe umyalelo wokuba uChonco anikezwe amaphilisi njengoba esejele. UKhanyile uthe bafuna nokuthi uChonco angavalelwa yedwa ejele ukuze kube khona umuntu ozosheshe ambone uma evukwa yisifo sokuwa. Uthe wesaba ukuthi uChonco uvalelwa yedwa njengoba esethuthelwe ejele eliseKokstad, eBongweni. "Angicabangi ukuthi eKokstad banalo uhlelo lokuthi iziboshwa zivalelwe ndawonye, sengathi wonke umuntu uvalelwa ngayedwana." Icala lihlehliselwe uMeyi 28. UChonco nasolwa naye, uMnuz Khayelihle Shabalala, bahlela ukulivuma icala. Inkosi uZuma noMnuz Thobani Masobho Hlongwa bona bayaliphika icala. UChonco uyayikazela yizigwebo. Ngenyanga edlule wagwetshwa iminyaka engu-20 ebhadla ejele ngecala lokubulala owayephikisana nokudayiswa komhlaba eHowick, uMnuz Xolani Ndlovu/Ntombela. NgoFebhuwari wagwetshwa eminye iminyaka engu-20 ngecala lokubulala owayengundunankulu wesizwe sakwaNxamalala, uMnuz Qalokunye Zuma. NgoJanuwari wagwetshwa odilikajele abahlanu ngecala lokubulala umndeni waseBulwer. UChonco uphinde abhekane necala lokuqothwa kwamalungu omndeni wakwaMemela ayishumi abulawa eMbali, eMgungundlovu.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMnuz Mncedisi Maphisa I-IFP isijube uphenyo emva kokusabalala kwenkulumo eqoshiwe okukholakala ukuthi ngeyelungu lesiShayamthetho elizwakala ligququzela ukuthi kushaywe ozakwabo eqenjini ngesikhathi linengxoxo nowesifazane ozwakala ethi angeke asigqoke isikibha esinobuso bomholi weqembu, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa. I-IFP isiqale uphenyo lwangaphakathi emva kokuba kusabalale inkulumo eqoshiwe okukholakala ukuthi eyelungu lesiShayamthetho eliphinde libe uSihlalo wophiko lwentsha kwi-IFP KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Mncedisi Maphisa. Kule ngxoxo lona okukholakala ukuthi uMaphisa uzwakala ekhuluma nowesifazane okhala ngokuthi kukhona ababanjwa ngophondo emihlanganweni yokugcotshwa kwamaziko e-IFP. Ozwakala njengoMaphisa uthi ugqugquzela ukuba kushaywe labo abayizimbangi zabo eqenjini. Okhulumela i-IFP, uMnuz Mkhuleko Hlengwa, uthe bayalele uMaphisa ukuba alethe incazelo ngalolu daba. "Le nkulumo eqoshiwe ingahumusheka ngokuthi igqugquzela udlame emihlanganweni yokugcotshwa kwamaziko. Lolu daba lubucayi ngakho ke ubuholi be-IFP buzolusukumela. I-IFP inxusa amalungu eqembu ukuba ehlise amaphaphu, agweme ukukhuluma ngalolu daba esidlangalaleni." Akukhona okokuqala uMaphisa efakwa obishini inkulumo eqoshiwe. Ngesikhathi esayimeya kaMasipala waseBaQulusini wadilizwa emva kokuba kusabalale inkulumo eqoshiwe enamagama alumelayo. UMaphisa kuthiwa wenza inkulumo esabalele ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ngeSonto. Kuthiwa le nkulumo wayenza emva kokuhambela umhlangano we-IFP okwakhuzwa kuwo abadala uqhekeko eqenjini. UMaphisa kuthiwa wenza inkulumo emva kokuphatha uhlelo emcimbini we-IFP lapho khono iPhini lomholi weqembu, Inkosi Mzamo Buthelezi, lakhuza abadala uqhekeko eqenjini. Ikhuluma emcimbini we-IFP wokuvivela ukhetho lohulumeni basekhaya oluzayo obuseNquthu, ngeSonto, Inkosi yathi labo abadala uqhekeko eqenjini baqala into abangeke bayimele. "Le nto yethu yokuthi sibhekane sodwa izosilimaza kakhulu. Nginganitshela mina ngingangabazi ukuthi njengeqembu asikulungele ukubhekana nomphumela wale nto esiyiqalayo. Angiphinde nginichazele, njengeqembu asikakwazi ukubhekana nalokhu esesikuqala manje. Ngamanye  amagama, le nto yokuthi sibhekane sodwa, silwe sodwa, izosishaya isibhuqe nya. Siyophaphama ngakusasa kungekho kwalezi zihlalo esinazo." UMaphisa wasukuma emva kwenkulumo yeNkosi, naye wakhuza uqhekeko. Ilwa buthule impi yangaphakathi kwi-IFP lapho kubhekene khona uhlangothi olwaziwa ngama-AU (Abusekho Ubunzima) nohlangothi olubizwa ngaKKK (Konke Kuhamba Kahle). Ama-AU kuthiwa ahambisana noHlabisa, amaKKK wona kuthiwa awahambisani noHlabisa.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMPHATHISWA wezokuThutha KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Siboniso Duma KUSHAYISANA izincazelo ngokungakhokhelwa kosonkontileka abakweletwa izizumbulu uMnyango wezokuThutha KwaZulu-Natal njengoba uMphathiswa woMnyango, uMnuz Siboniso Duma, esho okuhlukile kunalokho okushiwo uMphathiswa wezeziMali esifundazweni, uMnuz Francois Rodgers. UDuma ukhale kakhulu ngobuhixihixi obudalwe uhlelo olusha lokukhokha, kepha uRodgers uthe inkinga idalwe ukuthi kuqale unyakamali uMnyango unezikweletu eziningi. UDuma unikeze le ncazelo ngesikhathi ekhuluma nosonkontileka abebewotha ubomvu eThekwini ngoMsombuluko. Osonkontileka abangakhokhelwe bebekade besabise ngokuthi bazomisa yonke into uma bengakhokhelwa. Osonkontileka bakhala ngokuthi uMnyango ubakweleta imali enkulu esukela ngonyaka owedlule. UDuma ube esebiza umhlangano ophuthumayo nosonkontileka lapho efike wabatshela khona ukuthi ukushintsha kohlelo olusetshenziswa iminyango kahulumeni ukukhokha izikweletu ludale ukuthi kube nobuhixihixi. UMnyango kaDuma ukhale nangokuthi imali oyithola nyanga zonke ayanele ukuthi ukwazi ukukhokha zonke izikweletu. UMnyango kaDuma uthe ufisa ukuthi uthole u-R1 billion njalo ngenyanga ukuze uzokwazi ukukhokhela zonke izikweletu. "Esabelwenimali soMnyango esingu-R13 billion, sithola imali eshodayo. Kwesinye isikhathi sithola u-R200 million ngenyanga, kwesinye isikhathi kube u-R500 million kuya ku-R700 million. Le mali ayanele ukuthi sikhokhele bonke esibakweletayo." URodgers uvumile ukuthi ukushintshwa kohlelo lokukhokha kwadala ubuhixihixi emasontweni ayisithupha okuqala kodwa wathi izinkinga ezibhekene noMnyango wezokuThutha aziqalwanga ukushintshwa kohlelo lokukhokha. URodgers uthe inkinga enkulu ebhekene noMnyango ukuthi unezinhlelo eziningi ozenzayo ezisuke zingahlelelwe ukuthi zizokhokhelwa kanjani. URodgers uthe ngesikhathi kungena isabelomali sakulo nyaka esingu-R13 billion, ingxenye engu-R2.5 billion yakhokhela izikweletu zangonyaka owedlule. Odabeni lwemali enikwa uMnyango nyanga zonke, uRodgers uthe iminyango iyaye itshelwe kusaqala unyakamali ukuthi yimalini ezotholwa nyanga zonke. "Imali eqhamuka kuhulumeni kazwelonke siyithola mancozu. Iminyango kahulumeni wesifundazwe siyaye siyabele imali esuke ikhona ngaleso sikhathi." URodgers uthe uMnyango wezeMfundo esifundazweni usanda kucela ukuba usheshe unikwe imali ukuze uzokhokhela izidingo ngenxa yokubona ukuthi imali owabelwa yona nyanga zonke ayanele ukubhekana nezindleko. "UMnyango wezokuThutha awuzange usho ukuthi wona unenkinga efanayo." UMPHATHISWA wezeziMali KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Francois Rodgers

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMHOLI  weNational Coloured Congress, uMnuz  Fadiel Adams oboshwe amaphoyisa ePKTT ePhalamende izolo Image: Ayanda Ndamane/ Independent Media LILALE libaliwe ilungu lePhalamende elisolwa ngokuphazamisa uphenyo lokubulawa kowayengunobhala jikele we-ANC Youth League, uMnuz Sindiso Magaqa. UMnuz Fadiel Adems, ongumholi wenhlangano iNational Coloured Congress, ukhalelwe amasongo kaSigonyela izolo emva kokwehluleka ukuhlangabezana nomnqamulajuqu wokuba azinikele emaphoyiseni. U-Adams uboshwe esezindlini ezihlala amalungu ePhalamende, eCape Town. U-Adams usolwa ngokuphazamisa uphenyo lokubulawa kukaMagaqa. Okwamdalela amazinyo abushelelezi ukuthi waya kobona inkabi eyavuma icala lokubulawa kukaMagaqa, uSibusiso Ncengwa. UNcengwa wagwetshwa iminyaka engu-25 emva kokuvuma icala lokubulala uMagaqa. Okhulumela amaphoyisa, uBrigadier Athlenda Mathe, uthe bafuna ukwazi ukuthi yini eyenza ukuthi u-Adams aye kobona uNcengwa. "Amalungu ePhalamende ayazi ukuthi kunemigudu okufanele ayilandele uma enza umsebenzi wawo. Uma kuwukuthi wayeyokwenza umsebenzi wakhe njengelungu lePhalamende kwakufanele okungenani abikele usihlalo wekomiti lasePhalamende elibhekelele ukusebenza kwamaphoyisa. Yini lena eyamenza ukuthi aye ejele eyobona inkabi eyingozi ngale ndlela?" UBrigadier Mathe uthe u-Adams waya kobona uNcengwa ejele ngesikhathi wawushisa phansi umkhankaso wokuba kuhlakazwe ithimba lamaphoyisa eliphenya amacala okubulawa kosopolitiki KwaZulu-Natal. UBrigadier Mathe uthe u-Adams uzovela enkantolo KwaZulu-Natal. Uthe empeleni bekufanele ukuba u-Adams avele enkantolo eKwaZulu-Natal ngoMsombuluko. "Senza izinhlelo nommeli wakhe ukuba avele enkantolo kodwa akazange alubhade enkantolo. Siphinde sakhipha umyalelo wokuba azinikele emaphoyiseni kodwa wangakwenza lokho. Ingakho amaphoyisa egcine embopha." U-Adams ucashunwe phambi kwabezindaba, wayofakwa ngemuva evenini yamaphoyisa. U-Adams uzwakale enza izinsolo zokuthi amaphoyisa azomhlukumeza. "Maningi amathuba okuthi ngizofakwa ishubhu, iyona ndlela abenza ngayo izinto lena. Anginendaba, abenze noma yini abafuna ukuyenza." U-Adams uthe akazi ukuthi kungani amaphoyisa enqume ukumbopha ekubeni ebeshilo ukuthi uzimisele ukubambisana nawo ophenyweni lwawo. Uthe amalungu ePhalamende wawabikela ngodaba lukubulawa kukaMagaqa ngonyaka odlule. "Ngawatshela amalungu ePhalamende ukuthi isibhamu i-AK 47 okwabulawa ngaso uMagaqa sathengwa ngemali yophiko lwezinhloli. Inhloko yezinhloli uLieutenant General Dumisani Khumalo." UMagaqa wabulawa ngo-2017, kusolwa ukuthi wabulawelwa ukukhononda ngenkohlakalo yezigidi zamarandi ngesikhathi kulungiswa ihholo lesikhumbuzo eMzimkhulu. Icala lokubulawa kukaMagaqa lizobuyela eNkantolo eNkulu eMgungundlovu maphakathi nenyanga. Abasolwa ababhekene necala iloyo owayeyimenenja yoMasipala waseMzimkhulu, uMnuz Zweliphansi Skhosana, uSibonelo Myeza noMbulelo Mpofana.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UPAPA Penny usule isigubhukane ekubeni yilungu leMK Party nasekubeni yilungu laleli qembu ePhalamende UMAKADEBONA emculweni nezikaqedisizingu obesegxile kwezepolitiki, uGezane Eric Kobane, odume ngelikaPapa Penny - ukhale ngobunyoka ebuholini beqembu lezepolitiki uMkhonto Wesizwe Party (MK) ngenkathi esula isigubhukane kulona ngoLwesihlanu. Encwadini yakhe yokwesula ayibhekise kumholi weqembu uMnuz Jacob Zuma, uPapa Penny uthe ukwesula ekubeni yilungu le-MKP nasekubeni yilungu layo ePhalamende kube yisinqumo esingelula neze nesimphule inhliziyo. Uthe wajoyina i-MK Party ngokwakhe ngoba efuna ukukhulula abantu bakuleli zwe, kodwa lokho kwaphazamiseka ngenxa yengxenye ethile yobuholi baleli qembu eLimpopo - akhale ngokuthi idale ukuthi abe nyamanambana emalungwini eqembu. Ukhale nangokuthi ubebhekene nezimpi ebeziqondiswe kuyena, ehlukunyezwa futhi kwenziwa isiqiniseko sokuthi uhlale ezizwa ecindezelekile. Wengeze nangokuthi bekuze kusetshenziswane nabezindaba ukucekela phansi isithunzi sakhe negama lakhe akusebenzele kanzima. UPAPA Penny usule isigubhukane ekubeni yilungu leMK Party nasekubeni yilungu laleli qembu ePhalamende Image: VUYILE MADWANTSI Njengoba ngiwumuntu okhathalele inhlalakahle yabantu neyomphakathi, bengingazibekezelela lezi zimo ukube beziyimbangela yabanye abantu abaseceleni. Manje inkinga yami wukuthi ziqhamuka ngaphakathi eqenjini ebengikulona okwenza ukuthi kube nzima ukuzishaya indiva sengathi angiboni ngibe ngibona kahle,” kusho uPapa Penny. Nokho uthe nakuba kunjalo, uyazibongela kuZuma ngokumnika ithuba lokuthi amele iqembu ePhalamende futhi amele nabantu baseNingizimu Afrika esebenzisa amandla eMK Party. Leli qembu eliholwa wuZuma owayengumengameli wezwe, lilokhu liqhubeke njalo nokubhekana nezinkinga ezilizamazamisayo selokhu langenela ukhetho lukazwelonke eminyakeni emibili edlule, okufakazelwa wukuhlale kushintsha izinto ngaphakathi kulona. Sekuvamile ukuthi lihlale lipheka lithulula ezikhundleni ezihlukene. Ukwesula kukaPapa Penny kulindeleke ukuthi kushaye kuzwele kuleli qembu eLimpopo, ikakhulu kuMasipala wesifunda iMopani naseGiyani, okuyilapho enabalandeli kakhulu khona. UPapa Penny uke waba nohlelo kwiMzansi Magic obeluthandwa kakhulu oluthi Papa Penny Ahe - nolwakhonjiswa amasizini amane. Wafungiswa ukuba yilungu lePhalamende le-MK Party emva kokhetho lukazwelonke ngo-2024.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UMCULI we-house ne-deep house uSboniso L Musician usematheni kulezi zinsuku ngecwecwe lakhe elisha elithi Loss & Love EP “YIQINIISO elingenakuphikwa ukuthi akuwona wonke umuntu ojatshuliswa wuthando ngakho ngibone kukuhle ukuthi ngisebenzise ubuciko bomculo ukuzwakalisa ilaka lalabo abaphoxekile othandweni, ngibe ngiveza futhi ubuhle nobumnandi bokuthandwa.” Usho kanjalo umculi we-house ne-deep house, uSboniso L Musician elandisa ngecwecwe lakhe elisha elisihloko sithi Loss & Love EP, eliphume ngenyanga edlule nelididiyele izingoma ezinhlanu eziqukethe umyalezo owehlukene oweyamene nomuzwa wothando. USboniso waKwandengezi, eThekwini, udalule ukuthi kulo msebenzi usebenzisane nabaculi oDa Alto noBrandon Dhludhlu; kanjalo noDa Gifto - ofake isandla ekuphrojuseni izingoma zawo. “Lo msebenzi uyinhlanganisela yezingoma ezikhuluma ngobuhlungu bokuthanda umuntu kepha yena engakuthandi ngale ndlela omthanda ngayo, futhi iveza obala ukuthi ukuphoxwa ngabantu obathandayo kungenza ukuthi ugcine ungasakholelwa othandweni. Zikhona futhi izingoma ezimbalwa eziveza ukuthi nakuba kunjalo, kodwa lukhona uthando lweqiniso,” usho kanje. UMCULI we-house ne-deep house uSboniso L Musician usematheni kulezi zinsuku ngecwecwe lakhe elisha elithi Loss & Love EP Eqhuba, uthe okunye abhale nacula ngakho kwi-Loss & Love EP kusukela ezimweni abhekane nazo okwangempela empilweni yakhe, nabone kukuhle ukusebenzisa ubuciko ukuzelapha ngokukhipha ubuhlungu abuzwayo ngaphakathi enhlizweni yakhe. “Kungithathe cishe izinyanga ezimbili ukwenza lo msebenzi ngiwuqede, engisizwe kakhulu nawukuthi vele ngiwumuntu ohlale ese-studio isikhathi esiningi ngipheka umculo engihlela ukulokhu ngiwukhipha kancane, kancane ngize ngichume kule ndima,” kusho yena. Leli ciko igama lalo lokuzalwa wuSiboniso Msweli. Ligqame emculweni ngecwecwe lalo lokuqala eliphume nyakenye elithi The Weight of Silence; kanti ngale kwalokho selisebenze namanye amaciko esingabala kuwona oMngomezulu, uLance Hebron noKnightSA.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UMCULI we-house nama-piano uDe Rose ufike kwezwakala emculweni UMA kubalwa izintokazi ezifike kwezwakala emculweni nyakenye, alisali ngaphandle igama lentokazi yaseMlaza, eningizimu yeTheku - uDe Rose ongelinye lamaciko afike kwezwakala, egila izimanga ngengoma ethi Lutho ekwi-albhmau kaDJ Jaivane ethi Onkgopotse. Ngale kwe-Lutho edayise ama-stream angaphezu kwa-50 million, uDe Rose ungenise futhi ngengoma yakhe noSfarzo ethi Hello, nayo eyenze kahle idayisa i-platinum eliphindwe kabili, futhi wenza kahle nange-albhamu yakhe yokuqala ephume ngoNovemba nyakenye ethi 925. Elandisa ngokumsize ukufeza konke lokhu esikhathini esifishaane esemculweni futhi eyiciko lesifazane, uthe usizwe wukuthi uziveze ngendlela ehlukile kunamanye amaciko njengoba yena ecula ngesigqi esiyinhlanganisela yeRn’B ne-Hip-Hop, okwenza ukuthi ehluke kwabanye. “Lokho kwenza ukuthi ngizwakale ngendlela eyehlukile kokujwayelekile, kangangokuthi baningi abantu abavame ukungibuza ukuthi ngake ngaba wumrepha yini, okukhomba ukuthi indlela engicula ngayo ayifani nhlobo nabajwayele ukukulalela emculweni,” usho kanje. UMCULI we-house nama-piano uDe Rose ufike kwezwakala emculweni Eqhuba, uDe Rose uthe okunye akuqikelelayo wukuthi noma ngabe ucula ingoma enomyalezo ongaqondene nye ngqo, kepha kumele umyalezo wayo uqine futhi ube nesisindo - okuthola indawo ekhethekile endlebeni nasemqondweni womlaleli. “Kufana nakule ngoma ethi Lutho, equkethe umyalezo ongangithinti kangako, kepha ngoba ngangazi ukuthi kukhona umuntu ozomthinta - ngavumela ukuthi ngibe sesimweni salowo myalezo ewuqukethe ukuze ngizokwenza ubulungiswa kuyona,” kulanda yena. Uthe uzimisele ukuqhubeka akhele kulokhu asekuzuzile manje ngomculo wakhe ukusiza ukucaba indlela yokufeza okunye okukhulu, nokuzomsiza ukukhula nokuchuma endimeni. UDe Rose igama lakhe lokuzalwa wuThandeka Cele, kanti kumanje usematheni ngengoma yakhe entsha eshaya ngesigqi seHip-Hop ethi Easy, apike kuyona oBlue Pappi noLowfeye. Usesebenze nenqwaba yamaciko okubalwa kuwona oFrank Mabeat, uTycoon, uBabalwa M, uSino Msolo, uKelvin Momo, uNomfundo Moh, uTyler ICU, iMurumba Pitch, uSoa Mattrix, uCnethemba Gonelo, uStixx, uSam Deep no-Omit ST ukukha nje phezulu.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UMCULI kamaskandi Umafikizolo, ngelinye lamaciko agile izimanga ngokulalelwa kakhulu kwiSpotify ngonyaka odlule KUKHUTHAZWE amaciko aseNingizimu Afrika ukuba aqhubeke asebenzise izilimi zawo ezehlukene zebele nezomdabu ukukhombisa ubuciko bawo, nokuzigqamisa ngendlela ehlukile kunejwayele ukusetshenziswa amaciko akwamanye amazwe. Lokho kungenxa yokugqama komculo wesintu umaskandi, ongeminye yemikhakha yomculo elalelwe kakhulu kwiSpotify. Izibalo ezikhishwe yile nkampani zikhombe ukuthi ikhule ngo-37% indlela okulalelwa ngayo umculo oculwa ngolimi isiZulu, okusho ukukhula ngo-120% kule minyaka emibili edlule. INhloko yoPhiko loMculo e-Afrika eseNingizimu kwiSpotify, uPhiona Okumu, idalule ukuthi lokhu kukhomba ukuthi abantu bayawuthakasela umculo ovutshelwe kusetshenziswa izilimi zomdabu, okuwuphawu lokuthi inkulu imakethe yawo emhlabeni. U-Okumu usho njalo ekhuluma kwesinye sezigcawu zokucobelana ngezobuciko saminyaka yonke ebesenziwe yiSpotify emahhovisi ayo amasha aseRosebank, eGoli, ngoLwesithathu. “Lokhu kukhombisa ukuthi akuphoqelekile ukuthi uze usebenzise izilimi zakwamanye amazwe ukugqamisa ubuciko bakho, ngakho sikhuthaza namanye amaciko asafika endimeni ukunganqeni ukucikoza esebenzisa izilimi zawo zebele ezehlukene,” usho kanje. Lezi zibalo zifakazelwe wukuthi umculi kamaskandi Umafikizolo ugile izimanga kwiSpotify nyakenye ngengoma yakhe ebishisa izikhotha ethi Uyoncengwa Unyoko, okuvela ukuthi idobe abantu abangaphezu kuka-15 million bayilalela. U-Okomu uthe okunye okubajabulisile wukuthi ibalelwa ngaphezu kuka-R504 million inzuzo yemali engeniswe wukulalelwa komculo wamaciko akuleli zwe ngonyaka odlule, nokuthi abe wu-67% amaciko akuleli zwe okube nezingoma zawo ebezingena zishintshana ohlwini lweziwu-50 ezisuke zihamba phambili ngenkathi kuqhubeka unyaka odlule. “Ngale kwalokho, sithole nokuthi ungaphezu kuka-74% umculo ovutshelwe eNingizimu Afrika ofinyelele emazweni omhlaba ahlukene nyakenye, okube yisibalo esikhulu kakhulu nesingakaze sifinyelele kusona phambilini,” usho kanje.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: KUSUKA kwesokunxele usomabhizinisi ne-podcaster u-Amahle-Imvelo Jaxa, umculi weRn'B uLloyiso Gijana, uPhiona Okumu noBryan Johnson beSpotify bekwesinye sezigcawu zokubhunga ngomculo nobuciko ebesiseRosebank, eGoli ngoLwesithathu Image: SIMANGALISO NTSHANGASE ILOKHU ikhule njalo inzuzo yemali eyenziwa amaciko akuleli zwe ngokulalelwa komculo wawo kwiSpotify. Izibalo zangonyaka odlule zikhombie ukuthi ukulalelwa komculo wawo kungenise imali ebalelwa ngaphezulu kuka-R504 million, okusho ukwenyuka ngo-28%. Lezi zibalo zihlaluke esigcawini seSpotify saminyaka yonke sokucobelelana ngolwazi lwezomculo nezobuciko  i-Loud & Clear, ebesisemahhovisi amasha eSpotify eRosebank, eGoli kuleli sonto. Njengoba iSpotify igubha iminyaka ewu-20 yasungulwa, okuhlanganisa neyisishiyagalombili yethulwa kuleli zwe kusuka ngo-2018, lezi zibalo zikhombise ukukhula okukhulu okukhomba ukuthi amaciko akuleli enza kahle ngokulalelwa komculo wawo. I-Loud & Clear iwuhlelo lwale nkampani eyisizinda sokulalela umculo wamazwe ehlukene emhlabeni, nolwaqala ngo-2021 ngenhloso yokuveza obala izibalo ezikhomba ukuthi umculo wamaciko ulalelwa kangakanani nokuveza ukuthi inzuzo yenziwa kanjani ukuze kungabi nakudideka emacikweni afaka umculo kuyona. Okugqame embikweni walezi zibalo yilokhu okulandelayo: Umqondisi omkhulu weSpotify kwiSub-Saharan Africa, uJoceleyne Muhutu-Remy, uthe lezi zibalo zikhomba ukuthi amaciko akuleli awagcini ngokukhula nje ngobuciko, kepha alokhu engenise njalo emhlabeni wonke. “Ukuphumelela kwawo kukhomba ukuthi ayinyama kangakanani emhlabeni jikelele, okuzothi uma kuqhubeka kanjena agcine esenezigidigidi zabalaleli emhlabeni jikelele futhi kuwavulele amathuba amakhulu,” usho kanje. UNgqongqoshe wezokuXhumana nezobuChwepheshe, uMnuz Solly Malatsi, esitatimendeni asithumele ukuze sifundwe kulo mbuthano - ubonge iSpotify ngokukhetha iNingizimu Afrika nangokukholelwa kuyona nasemacikweni emikhakha ehlukene enza kahle. Ugqugquzele ukuthi kuqhutshekwe kuhlonzwe ikhono lamaciko futhi kulekelelwe kakhulu lawo asebenzisa izilimi zawo zomdabu ebucikweni bawo, bese esizwa nangengqalasizinda ezowalekelela ukuze athuthuke..

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UMQONDISI jikelele woPhiko lwezobuDlelwano lwe-UKZN), uDkt Normah Zondo ethweswa iziqu zobudokotela aziphothule kuyo le nyuvesi SEKUYISIKHATHI eside i-University of KwaZulu-Natal  (UKZN) ilokhu ingesinye sezikhungo ezihlale zenza imicimbi yokuthweswa izitshudeni iziqu, okuwuphawu lokuzihlonipha nokuzibongela ngenxa yomsebenzi wazo omuhle wemfundo emikhakheni eyehlukene. Omunye walabo abahlale beseqhulwini futhi bezikhandlela ukuqinisekisa ukuthi konke kuhamba ngohlelo kuleyo micimbi wuDkt Normah Zondo, uMqondisi jikelele woPhiko lwezobuDlelwano kwezeBhizinisi e-UKZN osebenzisana nehhovisi lomphathi wenyuvesi ukwenza lokho. Nokho wenze okuhlukile kulokhu, njengoba kuthe kuklonyeliswa izitshudeni nezifundiswa emikhakheni eyehlukene naye wabizwa kwizifundiswa ezithweswe iziqu zobodokotela, athi kukhuthazwe yigebe alibone phakathi kwabasebenzi benyuvesi nezitshudeni. UDkt Zondo uthe ucwaningo lwakhe belubheka ukungena nokuphuma kwezitshudeni emanyuvesi, kusuka ngenkathi zifika zizokwenza unyaka wokuqala kuze kufike esiphethweni sohambo lwemfundo yazo ngokwehlukana kwemikhakha yazo. UMQONDISI jikelele woPhiko lwezobuDlelwano kwezeBhizinisi e-UKZN), uDkt Normah Zondo, ethweswa iziqu zobudokotela aziphothule kuyo le nyuvesi “Ngaphambi kokuthi zihambe, izitshudeni zincika kwabenyuvesi ukubhekena nezifundo zazo. Nokho uma sezingasekho emanyuvesi, zibhekana nenkinga yengcindezi yokuthungatha umsebenzi. Inselelo wukuthi ziba nenkinga yokungakutholi ukwesekwa lapho zizama ukusebenzisa amava ezikufunde ngaphandle ukwakha impumelelo ngemfundo,” kulandisa yena. Uthe ucwaningo lwakhe luveza ukuthi uhambo lwezitshudeni alulingani futhi luveze nokuthi lezo zitshudeni ezisuke zingazi muntu lapho ezisuke zikhona zibhekana nenkinga nengcindezi yokungakwazi ukwenza umsebenzi nokulindeleke kuzona. “Ocwaningweni lwami ngiveza amasu okumele kwenziwe ukweseka lezo zitshudeni ohambweni lwazo olunjalo ukuze zizethembe futhi zingathwali kanzima uma sezisebenza kwamanye amazwe noma ezindaweni ezingazazi nezingazejwayele,” usho kanje. Uthe ingxenye enkulu yocwaningo lwakhe ubevame ukuyenza ekuseni kakhulu andukuba aye emsebenzini, ebusuku kakhulu andukuba alale, emva kwemihlangano yasemsebenzini nangasemva kwemicimbi eyahlukene yase-UKZN. Kanti okumsize ukuphothula izifundo zakhe, abezisheba nomsebenzi wase-UKZN nowokuba wuMengameli we-International Education Association of South Africa (IEASA), uDkt Zondo ubengajahe ndawo kepha wazisebenzisa njengokuthi ziyingxenye yohambo lwakhe lokuba wumholi.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UDKT Phumelele Basi uthweswe iziqu zobodokotela e-UKZN ngocwaningo lwakhe mayelana nomjolo wezitshudeni emanyuvesi UBUHLE nobubi bokuthandana kwezitshudeni emanyuvesi, yizona zethulo ezigqame ocwaningweni lukaDkt Phumelele Basi ezifundweni zakhe zobudokotela asanda kuzethweswa yi-University of KwaZulu-Natal (UKZN). Ngokuthweswa lezi ziqu ze-PhD ye-Gender Education, uDkt Basi (25) waseHlokozi, ogwini oluseningizimu yeKwaZulu-Natal, uqophe umlando ngokuthi wuyena obe yisitshudeni esincane kunazo zonke izifundiswa ezithweswe iziqu zobudokotela kulo nyaka. Isihloko socwaningo lwakhe sithi "Negotiating Heterosexual Relationships on Campus: Female Students Sexual Practices, Desire, Pleasure and Risk at a South African University", okumthathe iminyaka emibili kuphela futhi wakuphasa ngamalengiso. Elandisa ngokumkhuthaze ukucwaninga ngalokhu, uDkt Basi uthe kungenxa yokuthi uhlale ecabanga futhi enemibono ehlukene ngendlela abantu bobulili obehlukene abaphathana ngayo besebenzisa imibono yezindlela zokwenza zamasiko, ukujwayela nangokuphushwa yizimo zabadlule kukho empilweni yabo. “Ngiqinise kakhulu kulokhu sengenza ucwaningo lwami lwe-master’s lapho ebengicwaninga khona ngesimo sabantu abahlale befuna ukuba nemibono ngempilo yabanye, futhi behlale befuna ukuthi izinto ezithile zenzeke ngendlela ethile. Lokho kuholele ekutheni ngiqhubekele ekucwaningeni ukuthi abantu besifazane babhekana kanjani nobudlelwano bothando abangena kubona uma sebesezikhungweni zemfundo ephakeme,” kusho uDkt Basi. Ocwaningweni lwakhe ubheka ukuthi abantu besifazane abasebancane baba buthaka futhi bacindezeleke kangakanani othandweni lwabo nabantu besilisa, bese eveza nokuthi uthando olunjalo luba nobuhle, ububi nabungozi buni - ngenhloso yokugqugquzela ukwanda kobudlelwano obunokulingana ngokobulili nokungenabungozi. Uthe akazukuphelela lapha njengoba esevele uhlela ukuqhubeka nemfundo yakhe ebambisene nabeSouth African Research Chairs Initiative (SARChi) ukuqhubeka acwaninge ngokunye okumayelana nezobulili.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UNKSZ Thembeka Mpanza, osanda kuthweswa iziqu ze-Master of Arts in Applied Theatre e-UKZN UKUBHEKANA nezinselelo ezihlukene esafika enyuvesi - iningi lazo elalidalwa wukuthi wayesuka endaweni yasemakhaya futhi engakazi okuningi ngenqubo okwenziwa izinto ngayo emanyuvesi - kwamkhuthaza ukucwaninga ngezindlela zokuqeda leyo nkinga. Lwaqala kanjalo uhambo locwaningo lukaNksz Thembeka Mpanza osanda kuthweswa iziqu ze-Master of Arts in Applied Theatre zase-University of KwaZulu-Natal, ngocwaningo lwakhe oluthi Investigation on Black Rural Students Mental Health Wellness. Engxoxweni neSolezwe Ngempelasonto ngalokhu, uNksz Mpanza odabuka eNhlungwane, oLundi, uthe yizimo abhekane nazo ngqo ezamphusha ukuthi uma esenza i-Master’s yakhe acwaninge ngalesi simo. “Ngenkathi ngisafika enyuvesi eminyakeni engaphezu kwemihlanu edlule ngaba nenkinga yokungakwazi ukuxhumana kahle nabanye ozakwethu, futhi kwaba nzima nokuqonda into esuke ifundiswa ngaleso sikhathi ngenxa yokuthi ngenkathi ngisafunda ezikoleni zasemakhaya, izinto eziningi sasizifundiswa ngesiZulu nje kuphela,” kusho uNksz Mpanza. UNKSZ Thembeka Mpanza, osanda kuthweswa iziqu ze-Master of Arts in Applied Theatre e-UKZN Eqhuba uthe okunye afike wakuqaphela enyuvesi wukuthi izitshudeni ezidabuka emakhaya njengaye neziphuma emindenini eswele beziba nenkinga yokuzizwa zingamukelekile futhi zizibona zisalela emuva kozakwabo ngenxa yokweswela imali nezinsiza zokufunda. “Ngithole ukuthi konke lokho kuhlukumeza kakhulu izitshudeni emqondweni futhi kudale nokuthi ukufunda kwazo kuvame ukungahambi ngendlela efanele kunalezo ezikhulele emadolobheni nasemalokishini ngoba zona zifika sezivele zikwazi okuningi. “Yingakho ocwaningweni lwami ngibheke kakhulu amasu angasiza ukulungisa lesi simo, futhi ngibheka kakhulu ukuthi qhaza lini okudingeka ukuthi libanjwe wubuholi bamanyuvesi ukusiza  izitshudeni ezifana nami ukuze ukufunda kwazo kungabi nzima,” kulanda yena. Uthe isifiso sakhe wukuthi kusetshenziswe izethulo ezifuze ezocwaningo lwakhe ukuzama ukuphucula isimo sokufunda emanyuvesi nasezikhungweni zemfundo ephakeme ezihlukene okuzosiza ukuthi zonke izitshudeni zizizwe zamukelekile futhi zingacindezelekile.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UMENGAMELI Cyril Ramaphosa usethobela umthetho ngodaba lwePhala Phala UMENGAMELI Cyril Ramaphosa, usedalule ukuthi uyasemukela futhi uyasihlonipha isinqumo seNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo enqume ukuthi iPhalamende alilusingathanga ngendlela efanele udaba lwePhala Phala. Ekhulunyelwa wumkhulumeli wakhe uMnuz Vincent Magwenya, uRamaphosa uthe umile ekutheni akekho umuntu ongaphezu komthetho, nokuthi lezi zinsolo ezibhekiswe kuyena kumele zilandelelwe ngokomthetho, ngokungachemi futhi kungancikwa ohlangothini oluthile. “UMengameli usesibonile isinqumo esithathwe yiNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo kuleli cala ebelidluliselwe phambilini ngabe-Economic Freedom Fighters, besebenzisa isigatshana somthetho u-Section 89. Ngakho uMengameli uyasihlonipha isinqumo futhi uyazibophezela ukuthi uzolandela konke okushiwo wumthetho wezwe,” kusho uMagwenya. Eqhuba, uthe uRamaphosa uzibophezele ungokukhipha usizo olungase ludingeke kuyena ukuze lolu daba lusingatheke ngendlela efanele futhi ezogculisa abathintekayo kulona. “URamaphosa umile ekutheni akekho umuntu onamandla ngaphezu komthetho, nokuthi zonke izinsolo ezibhekiswe kuye kumele ukuthi zilandelelwe ngokungachemi,” usho kanje. Izolo iNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo inqume ukuthi iPhalamende laphula umthetho ngenkathi livota ngo-2022, liphikisa isigatshana somthetho u-Section 89 - okwakubikwe ngawo izinsolo zokwephula umthetho ezibhekiswe kuRamaphosa - okwavela wukuthi kwatholakala izishaqane zemali  epulazini lakhe ePhala Phala, eLimpopo, ngo-2020. INkantolo ithole ukuthi leso sinqumo sePhalamende sasingafanele, futhi asihambisani nhlobo nomthetho, yase inquma ukuthi lowo mbiko wangaleso sikhathi uhoxiswe, bese kuvulwa ithuba lokuthi udaba lulandelelwe futhi luphenywe kabusha. Leli cala belidliuliselwe eNkantolo yi-EFF ne-African Transformation Movement, bekhala ngokuthi iKomiti lePhalamende lasheshe lanquma ngalolu daba kungakabi yisikhathi esifanele. Ngakho lesi sinqumo seNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo sisho ukuthi manje kuzodingeka ukuthi iKomiti lePhalamende liphinde licubungule kabusha bese linquma ukuthi isisombululo kuzofinyelelwa kanjani kusona. Umholi we-EFF, uMnuz Julius Malema, uthe bayasamukela isinqumo athi bathemba ukuthi sizosiza ukuthi kwenzeke ubulungiswa kuvele obala ugcobho ngodaba lukaMengameli. “Kufanele abantu bazi ukuthi kwenzekani ePhala Phala ukuze bazinqumele sebenolwazi oluphelele ukuthi ngokhetho oluzayo bavotela isigebengu noma cha,” kusho uMalema. USihlalo we-ActionSA kuzwelonke, uMnuz Dewan de Swardt, naye ufanise lesi sinqumo nophawu lokunqoba kubantu baseNingizimu Afrika. “Lokhu kuqondane kahle kakhulu njengoba kuzothi uma lolu daba seluphinda ludingidwa ePhalamende kube sekuwukuthi akuseyona i-ANC eqhoqhobele amandla yodwa, obekungenza kube lula ukuthi ivikele umholi wayo,” kusho u-de Swardt.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UMCULI wama-piano uZee Nxumalo usemenyezelwe yiSpotify ukuba yinxusa lohlelo lwayo lokuqhakambisa amaciko esifazane KUVALEKE amanxeba esilonda esidalwe wukuqokwa eminxeni eyisikhombisa kepha wangathola ndondo yamaMetro FM Music Awards kumculi wama-piano uZee Nxumalo, othole ingqayizivele yethuba alinikwe yinkampani edlala umculo nge-internet i-Spotify. Lo mculi,ongaconsi phansi kubalandeli bomculo, umenyezelwe ngabeSpotify ukuthi sebemkhethe njengenxusa lohlelo lwabo lwazinyanga zonke oluthi -EQUAL Africa, onhloso yalo wukuqhakambisa ubuhle bemisebenzi eyenziwa abesifazane emculweni. I-Spotify idalule ukuthi lo mculi ufakwe kulolu hlelo ngenxa yokuthi kuthe sekuhlanganiswa izibalo zezingoma zamaciko ezilalelwe nezidlalwe kakhulu nyakenye, kwavela ukuthi uZee Nxumalo odabuka eSwatini, kodwa osezinze eGoli uqenggeleza phambili. Kuvele ukuthi umculo okuzwakala iphimbo likaZee Nxumalo kuwona uqale ukugqama kakhulu ngo-2024 ngengoma yakhe ethi Funk 55 - ayishaya noDBN Gogo, uCeekaRSA, Chley neShakes & Les, esidayise ngaphezu kwe-platinum eliphindwe kahlanu. UMCULI wama-piano uZee Nxumalo usemenyezelwe yiSpotify njengenxusa lohlelo lwayo lokuqhakambisa amaciko esifazane Uqhubekile nokuhamba phambilini ngengoma yakhe ebishisa izikhotha nyakenye ethi Ngisakuthanda, apike kuyona oPYY Log Drum King no-TBO. Ezikhulumela ngokuthola leli thuba, uZee uthe into abona ukuthi imsize kakhulu ukuze afike kulesi sigaba akusona manje wukwenza umculo wakhe ngendlela afisa ngayo nakholelwa kuyona, wangabe esazixaka kakhulu ngokulandela okushiwo abantu. “Sengifundile ukuthi kumqoka ukuvikela indawo yami nobumina uqobo, okuyinto engenzekanga kalula ngoba ekuqaleni bengihlale ngikhathazeka kakhulu ngokuthi abantu bacabangani ngami. Manje sengizibeka mina phambili nengikuzwa ngaphakathi,” usho kanje. Uthe ithuba alithole manje lisho lukhulu kuyena ngenxa yokuthi libeka ngokusobala ukuthi ukwenza umculo ngendlela ethinta nejabulisa abantu akuphoqi ukuthi ube wubulili obuthile kuphela, kepha kudinga ukuthi wenze okusuka ngaphakathi kuwena zikhathi zonke, nokuthi ukholelwe entweni oyenzayo. UMCULI wama-piano uZee Nxumalo useqokwe yiSpotify ukuba abe yinxusa lohlelo lwayo lokuqhakambisa amaciko esifazane Bekungekhona okokuqala leli ciko lihlonishwa ngemisebenzi yalo, njengoba ngesonto elidlule linqobe indondo ye-Best Upcoming African Music Sensation kuma-African Golden Awards abese-Nairobi, eKenya. Ngale kwalokhu, uZee - ogama lakhe lokuzalwa wuZandile Nxumalo, uvele usematheni nge-EP yakhe esanda kuphuma esihloko sithi Izinja Zam Volume 1 - eyelama imisebenzi yakhe yaphambilini ethi KwaNxumalo EP (2022), KwaNxumalo: Deluxe (2023), nayegcine ngayo ngo-2024 esihloko sithi Inja YeGame EP.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UNKSZ Nokuthula Dlamini uvukwe wumunyu ethweswa iziqu ze-Bachelor of Arts Honours in Sociology e-University of KwaZulu-Natal (UKZN) USEBHEKE ukuqhubeka asebenzise imfundo yakhe ukushintsha isimo sakubo uNksz Nokuthula Dlamini, obesematheni kuleli sonto futhi wathinta abantu abaningi emva kokusabalala kwezithombe nama-video akhe ekhala izinyembezi ethweswa iziqu. UNksz Dlamini (24), waseNhlazatshe nowukuphela kwengane kaNksz Lindiwe Dlamini, uthweswe iziqu ze-Bachelor of Arts Honours in Sociology e-University of KwaZulu-Natal (UKZN emcimbini wokuthwesa izitshudeni iziqu kuleli sonto. Emva kokwamukela iziqu zakhe, ujabulise futhi wathinta abantu abaningi eseqonda ngqo kunina, wamanga ekhala izinyembezi zenjabulo - nebezidalwa nawukukhumbula ubunzima adlule kubo ngokufika kulowa mzuzu ‘wokunqoba’. KUBE wumunyu nezinyembezi zenjabulo kuNksz Nokuthula Dlamini, anga unina uNksz Lindiwe Dlamini - emukela iziqu zakhe ze-Bachelor of Arts Honours in Sociology e-University of KwaZulu-Natal (UKZN) Emcimbini wokuthweswa ieziqu ubengaswenkile okutheni njengoba kuvame ukwenzeka ngezitshudeni nezifundiswa eziningi ezivame ukugqoka ziconse ngengqephu uma sezamukela umqhele nomvuzo wokuzikhandla ngokusebenza kanzima. “Bengingafuni ukugqilaza umama ngokumfuna umswenko obizayo ngoba ngiyasazi futhi ngisiqonda ngokuphelele isimo sasekhaya ukuthi sinzima kangakanani. Ngibe senginquma ukuthi ngizigqokele izingubo zami ezijwayelekile enginazo ngoba bekumqoka kakhulu kimina ukuthi ngibe khona emcimbini wokuhlonishwa ngeziqu zemfundo. Ngiphushwa nawukuqonda ukuthi umzuzu onjena kuyenzeka ufike kanye empilweni yomuntu,” usho kanje. UNKSZ Nokuthula Dlamini, ujabule kanjena eseshutha izithombe emva kokuthweswa iziqu ze-Bachelor of Arts Honours in Sociology e-University of KwaZulu-Natal (UKZN) Image: K.O.R MEDIA PRODUCTION Eqhuba,uthe indlela abezizwa ngayo ibixutshwe yinjabulo nosizi ngenxa yokuthi ubekhumbula zonke izinselelo abhekane nazo wazinqoba esafunda - okumsize ukuthi aze afike esicongweni sohambo lwakhe. Uthe okumfikisele usizi nezinyembezi wukubonga okugcwele enhliziyweni yakhe ukuthi ekugcineni uze wanqoba, ejatshuliswa nawukuthi kulowa mzuzu wenjabulo bekukhona nonina, obezojabula naye ngesikhathi esihle nesimnandi empilweni yakhe. UNKSZ Nokuthula Dlamini, ujabule  eseshutha izithombe emva kokuthweswa iziqu ze-Bachelor of Arts Honours in Sociology e-University of KwaZulu-Natal (UKZN) Image: K.O.R MEDIA PRODUCTION Ubonge kakhulu uDkt Siphamandla Sithelo ongomunye wabebemfundisa nowamsiza kakhulu ngonyaka wakhe wokuqala enyuvesi wamtholela indawo yokuhlala.;Ubonge nesitshudeni abehlala naso endlini uNksz Khethukuthula Khoza obevame ukumsiza ngokudla nanganoma yini abesuke eyidinga ukuze afunde. “Ngiyabonga kuwona wonke umuntu osengithintile engisiza, ngibonga nezethembiso  zosizo olwehlukene oluzosiza ukuphucula isimo sempilo yami. Ngifisa ukuthi lokhu okwenzeke kimina kukhuthaze nabanye abeza ngemva kwami ukuthi baqedele okuhle abasuke sebeqalile ukukwenza empilweni,” kusho uNksz Dlamini.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: INJABULO kuMnuz Siyabonga Khumalo, ethweswa iziqu ze-Bachelor of Social Sciences summa cum laude e-UKZN Image: NKOSI GCABASHE UKUNGAVUMELI ukuthi ukukhubazeka kumise izinto azifisela zona ngempilo nangekusasa lakhe kuthele izithelo kuMnuz Siyabonga Khumalo, ophila nokukhubazeka ngokuba mfishane ngokwedlulele phecelezi i-dwarfism. UKhumalo (21) ngesinye sezitshudeni eziwu-153 ezithweswe iziqu zemikhakha ehlukene yi-University of KwaZulu-Natal (UKZN), ephumelela ngamalengiso izifundo ezingu-21, wathola izitifiketi eziwu-14 neziyisithupha ahlonishwe kuzona wuDean ngokwenza kahle emkhakheni abewufundela we-Bachelor of Social Science, awuphase ngezinga lika-summa cum laude. Leli bhungu eliwubude obuwu-120cm, lazalwa line-scoliosi, isimo sokukhubazeka esithikameza indlela okukhula ngayo umgogodla , kodwa lokho kwangamvimba ukufeza izinto ezinhle akhule ezifisela zona ngempilo yakhe. UMNUZ Siyabonga Khumalo, ejabula nonina uNksz Feziwe Khumalo, emva kokuthweswa iziqu e-UKZN Image: NKOSI GCABASHE Ngo-2022 uphothule u-matric eSarel Cilliers High, eGlencore, enyakatho yeKwaZulu-Natal, lapho aklonyeliswa khona ngeDux Scholar - umklomelo onikwa umfundi osuke ebashaye bonke emakhanda kulesi sikole. “Ngenkathi ngifika enyuvesi ngaqhubeka lapho engangigcine khona emabangeni aphezulu, ngazitshela ukuthi ukuphasa ngamalengiso kuwukuthi uthole u-80% nangaphezulu esifundweni, okungisize ngokuphasa ngale ndlela okwenzeke ngayo manje,” usho kanje. Leli bhungu aligcini ngokwenza kahle ezifundweni kuphela njengoba kule nyuvesi beliyingxenye yezinhlelo ezihlukene okubalwa kuzona iGolden Key International Honour Society, Campus HIV and AIDS Support Unit ne-Differently Abled Student Association. Kanti kumanje uKhumalo usevele uqhubeka nemfundo yakhe njengoba enza i-honours degree, akwenza ngenhloso yokuthi abe neminyaka ewu-40 eseneziqu zobudokotela, okuzomlekelela kakhulu ukuthi abe yi-clinical psychologist.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: ISHINGA laKwaNongoma, uPhakel' Umthakathi likhala ngobuholi bukahulumeni obugxeka umphakathi olwa nabokufika abakuleli zwe ngokungemthetho 'SEKUNGENE umswane wembabala ekhaya' ngokuqonga komkhankaso wokulwa nabokufika abakuleli ngokungemthetho kulandela ukubhavumula kukaNgqongqoshe Khumbudzo Ntshavheni osole abasekhaleni ngokudunga izwe. Omunye wabaqavile kulo mkhankaso weMarch and March, uNkosikhona Ndabandaba owaziwa ngelikaPhakel' Umthakathi, ukhwele wadilika kwabezepolitiki, ebasola ngokwehlulwa wumsebenzi wokuhola ngobuqotho nangokuhlanekezela umbono wemibhikisho eqhubekayo ezweni yokulwa nabokufika abakuleli ngokungemthetho. UPhakel’ Umthakathi usho njalo ephendula inkulumo kaNgqongqoshe eHhovisi likeMengameli, uNksz Ntshavheni okhale ngokuthi bewuhulumeni ngeke bayimele eyesenzo sabantu abadunga izwe nabahlukumeza abantu bokufika abakuleli, kangangokuthi lezo zenzo zabo zize zikapakele nakulabo abangabakuleli zwe kepha abangezona izinhlanga ezithile. UPHAKEL'  UMTHAKATHI eseqhulwini lweminye yemibhikisho eqhubekayo ezweni yokulwa nabantu bokufika abakuleli ngokungemthetho Image: DOCTOR NGCOBO/INDEPENDENT NEWSPAPERS “Siyazi ukuthi kunabantu bakithi abahlukunyezwayo nokugcina kuthiwa bangabokufika ngoba nakhu bengakhulumi izilimi ezikhulunywa ngabantu abathile, okugcina kuhamba kuze kufike esigabeni lapho behlukunyezwa futhi bephathwa kabi ngendlela efana nokwenziwa ngayo kulaba abadabuka kwamanye amazwe ase-Afrika abalapha eNingizimu Afrika," kukhononda uNgqongqoshe. Lokhu kuphawula kukaNtshavheni kumqhathe nabantu ezinkundleni zokuxhumana abamsole nangokuthi nguyena otshala ingxabano phakathi kwabantu bakuleli. UNgqongqoshe ubephawule ngokuthi lezi zigameko ezenzeka ezweni zokuhlukumeza abantu bokufika ziyindlela yokudunga izwe ngenhloso yokuthi lingabuseki. “Kumele sikuqonde ukuthi abantu bokufika abakuleli zwe beze ngezizathu ezihlukene, okubalwa kuzona ukuzosebenza ezweni lethu nabanye abafike ngoba bedinga usizo nokuvikelwa ezimweni ezihlukene ezimbi ababhekana nazo emazweni abo. Futhi yinto eyaziwayo ukuthi nalaba abasuke bezosebenza noma bezohweba ezweni lethu uhulumeni uyaqikelela ukuthi balandela yonke imithetho efanele,” kusho uNksz Ntshavheni. Ephendula leyo nkulumo, uPhakel’ Umthakathi ukhale ngokuthi kungukudideka ukucabanga nokukholelwa ekutheni imibhikisho eqhubekayo ezweni ngenhloso yokulwa nabokufika abakuleli zwe iwukuhlukumeza nokuzama ukudala udlame nobutha ezweni. UNdabandaba, obehlangene noNdunankulu waKwaZulu-Natal namalungu esigungu sakhe ngoLwesihlanu, ukhombe ukungazi kukaNgqongqoshe okumenza akhulume kanje. “Lokhu esikwenza manje ezweni lethu asikuqalanga manje, kade saqala ukulwela ukuthula ezweni lethu, kuphela nje into esingayifuni wukuthi kube khona abantu abakuleli zwe ngokungemthetho nabacekela phansi isithunzi sezwe lethu ngezenzo zabo ezingalungile. “Esingakufuni wukuthi kuvele kusuke umuntu ezihlalele lapho ekhona, enethezekile - bese ezokhuluma into angayazi nangayiqondi ngalo msebenzi esizama ukuwenza ngenhloso yokuphucula izwe lethu. Asikwazi ukusonga izandla, sibuke konakala izinto ezweni - sizoqhubeka nokuzikhandla nokulwela ukuthula nobumbano,” kushoa uPhakel’ Umthakathi. “Siphelile isikhathi sokuhlala dekle singenzi lutho ekubeni konakala kangaka nsuku zonke ezweni lethu. Abathule babuke ukuthi senzani ukulungisa izwe lethu, noma basijoyine ukuze babone ukuthi yini lena esizama ukuyenza,” usho kanje. Uthe abantu abayeke ukugxeka into abangayazi nabangakaze benze lutho ukuzama ukuyilungisa, wagcizelela ukuthi bazoqhubeka nemibhikisho abayenzayo ezweni nokuthi bazozeseka izinhlangano ezifana neMarch and March - enombono ofana nowabo. Oyisishabasheki kulo mkhankaso, uNgizwe Mchunu, naye ukhwele wadilika kuNgqongqoshe - emsola ngokuthi uhlanekezela umsebenzi abawenzayo wokuphucula izwe, wamsola ngokuthi ucwasa ngokobuhlanga abantu abangamaZulu. UNdunankulu uThami Ntuli kanye neMeya yeTheku nabo bangenelele ngokuhlangana nabaholi beMarch and March, lapho okuvele khona ukuthi abalo mkhankaso abanklamunklamu ekuthambiseni isitilobho ngemibhikisho esidale uvalo lokuthi ingase iphenduke inhlekelele noma nini.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UNKSZ Kipi Skweyiya, okubahleli bomcimbi wabesifazane nomama iMother's Day Brunch INHLANGANO esebenza ingabheke nzuzo ukusiza umphakathi Ikhethelo Society Group, izosebenzisa usuku lokuhlonipha omama, iMother’s Day, ukubahlanganisa kubhungwe ngamasu okubasiza bazimele empilweni. Lokhu kuzokwenzeka emcimbini iMother’s Day Brunch, ozoba seGarden Court Marine Parade, eThekwini ngeSonto ngo-11 ekuseni kuze kube ntambama, lapho okulindeleke ukuthi kubuthane abesifazane abangaphezu kuka-120. Kuzongenwa ngo-R600 umuntu ngamunye. Omunye wabahleli bomcimbi, uNksz Kipi Skweyiya, uthe babone kumqoka ukusebenzisa uSuku loMama ukuhlanganisa abantu besifazane babahlomise ngezinto namasu okungabazisa ukuthi bakwazi ukuzimela nokubhekana nezimo ezibahluphayo empilweni. UMBHALI wezincwadi Indlovukazi Mapule ngesinye sezikhulumi ezizobe zikwi-Mother's Day Brunch “Lokhu sikwenza ngoba sikuqonda ukuthi kuningi kangakanani okuhlupha abantu besifazane emphakathini ekubeni kube kuyibona ababhekene nomsebenzi wokukhulisa izingane, nokumisa imindeni namakhaya abahlala nabaganele kuwona,” kusho uNksz Skweyiya. Eqhuba uthe kulo mcimbi bazobe behambisana nezikhulumi nabazonandisa kuwona okubalwa umbhali wezincwadi Indlovukazi Mapule, Zonke Le Poet, umculi we-Afro pop uNdoni Radebe, uDJ uMalume Richy nozobe eqhulula amahlaya u-2K Womsakazi. UMCULI we-Afro pop uNdoni Radebe kwabazonandisa kwiMother's Day Brunch “Sihlele nezinhlelo zokuthi izethameli zomcimbi zibhucwabhucwe ukuzijabulisa, ziphinde zithole ithuba lokuxoxa nokwakha ubudlelwano bokuthi umuntu nomuntu asizakale ekhonweni analo nakunoma yini enhle akhonze ukuyenza,” usho kanje. Ngale kukaNksz Skweyiya - amanye amalungu ale nhlangano oNkk Duh Ndlovu, Nandi Goodjohn, Zah Duma, Ncamo Nkonjela, Buyi Gambu noNksz Luh Nzimande. IMBONGI uZonke Le Poet kwabazonandisa kwiMother's Brunch

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: BEKUKUHLE kwethulwa isakhiwo esisha sebandla i-Great Army of Jehovah Ministries eliKwaSwayimane, eMgungundlovu KUBHEKWE ukuthi sibe wusizo emphakathini futhi silekelele ngokubamba iqhaza ezinhlelweni ezihlukene ezizothuthukisa umphakathi isakhiwo esisha sebandla i-Great Army of Jehovah Ministries, esiseMambedwini, KwaSwayimane. Lokho kushiwo wumholi waleli bandla, uMfu Wiseman Vidima, ekhuluma emcimbini wokwethulwa kwesakhiwo sebandla ngokusemthethweni emcimbini obungesonto eledlule, lapho kubuthane khona amalungu ebandla, ubuholi bomphakathi izinhlaka ezizimele nezikahulumeni. “Ngizovula izandla ebantwini bakule ndawo namaphethelo abazofuna ukwenza izinhlelo nemibuthano ehlukene okungaphambene nenqubo kaNkulunkulu ukuthi beze basebenzise le ndlu. Sihlose ukuthi ibe wusizo kubantu bakithi,” usho kanje. UMFU Wiseman Vidima noMfu Vusi Dube bevula ngokusemthethweni isakhiwo esisha sebandla i-Great Army of Jehovah Ministries eliKwaSwayimane, eMgungundlovu Omunye wezihambeli ebezikhona kulo mcimbi,uNkk Nomfundo Mcoyi-Zondo wenkampani yabangcwabi Icebolethu Funerals, nongomunye wabafake isandla ukwakha lesi sakhiwo. Uthe kuhlale kusemkhondweni wabo ukubamba iqhaza ezinhlelweni ezisiza umphakathi. UMFU Vusi Dube ephethe uhlelo emcimbini wokwethula isakhiwo sebandla i-Great Army of Jehovah Ministries eliKwaSwayimane, eMgungundlovu “Sithemba ukuthi lo mbono uzoqhubeka uye phambili.Inhloso yethu wukuqhubeka sisize nabanye esingakwazi ukubasiza ukufeza imibono emihle njengalona ngoba iba wusizo kakhulu emphakathini ikakhulu ezindaweni zasemakhaya,” usho kanje. UNKK Nomfundo Mcoyi-Zondo ekhuluma emcimbini wokuvula isakhiwo esisha sebandla i-Great Army of Jehovah Ministries eliKwaSwayimane, eMgungundlovu Umcimbi wokuvula leli sonto ubumeleleke kakhulu njengoba ubuhanjelwe nawusomabhizinisi uMnuz Themba Njilo, umakadebona kwezokulingisa uVusi Kunene, u-Ayanda Msweli, ilungu lesigungu soMnyango wezoLimo uMnuz Super Zuma, uMphathiswa woMnyango wezokuThutha nokuHlaliswa kwaBantu uMnuz Siboniso Duma, iMeya kaMasipala wesiFunda uMgungundlovu uMnuz Mzi Zuma noMfu Vusi Dube obephethe uhlelo emcimbini.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UMENGAMELI weZwe uMnuz Cyril Ramaphosa INKANTOLO yoMthethosisekelo isinqume ukuthi umbiko wesinqumo seKomiti lePhalamende malungana nodaba lwePhala Phala kwakungekho emthethweni, nokuthi kusuka manje sekuthathwa ngokuthi yinto engekho, okusho ukuthi lolu daba sekumele ukuthi luyodingidwa kabusha ePhalamende. Leso sinqumo siphume ngoLwesihlanu ekuseni, futhi semukelwa ngamaqembu ehlukene ezepolitiki aphikisayo. Nokho umbuzo omkhulu ngothi kuzokwenzekani kusukela manje? INkantolo yoMthethosisekelo yethule izethulo ezintathu isusela ekutheni abeqembu i-Economic Freedom Party namanye amalungu esigungu ePhalsmende ayedlulisele lolu daba phambili ngoba engagculisekile ngesinqumo sokungatholi gcobho kulolu daba. Kuzokhumbuleka ukuthi iKomiti lePhalamende lalivote laphikisa umbiko wesigatshana somthetho u-Section 89, okwakukhalwa kulandelelwa kuwona malungana nodaba lokutholakala kwezishaqane zemali yakwamanye amazwe epulazini likaMengameli weZwe, uMnuz Cyril Ramaphosa - okwavela ukuthi ingxenye yayo yayebiwe ngo-2020. Njengoba sekunqunywe kanjena manje, kusho ukuthi lo mbiko walolu daba kuzophoqa ukuthi ubuyiselwe ePhalamende ukuthi kuzophenywa kabusha ngawo ukuze kutholakale ukuthi akubanga nagcobho yini malungana nalolu daba, futhi kubhekwe ukuthi asizukuba bikho yini isidingo sokuthi kushushiswe uRamaphosa malungana nalokhu. Isinqumo seNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo siphikisa isinqumo esaphuma ngoDisemba 2022, esakhishwa yiKomiti elalilawulwa ngamalungu e-African National Congress, abanquma ukuthi ukuthi kungalandelelwa umbiko wekomiti elizimele - owawuveze ukuthi kwakunobufakazi bokuthi uRamaphosa wephula umthetho ngokugcina le mali ngokungemthetho epulazini lakhe ngoFebhuwari wango-2020, okuvela ukuthi yayilinganiselwa ku-580 000 wamaDola aseMelika, okungaba ngaphezudlwana kuka-R9.4 million. Njengoba sekuphume lesi sinqumo seNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo, amalungu ePhalamende kuzomele ukuthi abuyele kulesi sigatshana somthetho u-Section 89, abheke nalowo mbiko - bese kuphenywa kabusha ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi konke kulandeleka ngokusemthethweni. Leli komidi elizimele, eliholwa yiNhloko yamaJaji uSandile Ngcobo, yathola ngoNovemba wango-2022 ukuthi kwakunobufakazi bokuthi uRamaphosa wasebenzisa kabi amandla negunya analo ukuthi agcine le mali yakwelinye izwe epulazini lakhe, futhi wagunyaza nokuthi isetshenziswe ngasese ngale komngcele waleli zwe. Kanti manje izinto sezishintshe kakhulu uma uqhathaniswa nango-2022, njengoba ngaleso sikhathi iPhalamende lalilawulwa ngamalungu e-ANC, okusolakala ukuthi yiwona aqinisekisa ukuthi lolu daba luyacindezeleka. Kanti-ke manje kubhekwe ukubona ukuthi luzosingatheka kanjani njengoba seluzobe lwenganyelwe ngamalungu ohulumeni wokubusa ngokubambisana. Ngenkathi lolu daba lusaqhubeka, uRamaphosa wayelokhu emile kwelokuthi umsulwa kwasolelwa khona.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: KWA-TOYOTA badayise amaCorolla Cross, akhiwa eThekwini, angu-1 144 ngo-Ephreli BAYACHICHIMA yinjabulo abasembonini yezimoto kulandela ukunyuka kwesibalo sezintsha ezidayiswe ngo-Ephreli uma kuqhathaniswa nenyanga efanayo ngonyaka odlule. Ngokwezibalo ezikhishwe yi-naamsa, zibe ngu-47 979 izimoto ezintsha ezithengiwe. Lesi yisibalo esikhulu sango-Ephreli kusuka ngo-2013. Sinyuke ngo-5 512 uma kuqhathaniswa no-42 467 owadayiswa ngo-Ephreli nyakenye. Ngesikhathi isibalo sezimoto ezidayise kuleli sinyukile, esezidayiswe ngaphandle sehle ngo-4.0% zaba ngu-30 939 zisuka ku-32 229 ngo-Ephreli nyakenye. I-naamsa ithe izibalo zango-Ephreli zikhombisa umfutho oqale ezinyangeni ezedlule nokuba ngcono kwezimo zokuthenga kodwa konke lokhu sekubhekene nezingqinamba zokunyuka kwentengo kaphethroli, ukwehla kwamandla emali okulindelekile kanjalo nokubuyekezwa kwenzalo yemalimboleko. Isazi sezomnotho kwaWesBank, uThanda Sithole, sithe imiphumela yango-Ephreli iyagqugquzela. “Lokhu kunyuka kwezibalo bekusabalele ngoba kwenzeke ezimotweni ezincane, amaveni nezokuthutha impahla kanjalo namaloli amakhulu,” kusho uSithole.
