USihlalo wenhlangano yamagaraji adayisa izimoto iNational Automobile Dealers’ Association (NADA), uBrandonn Cohen, ujabulele izibalo wathi bekuyinyanga ebigcwele amaholidi nezinxushunxushu zase-Middle East. “Bekukholakala ukuthi konke lokhu kanjalo nokunyuka kwentengo kaphethroli kuzokwehlisa umdlandla wabantu emakethe. Akwenzekanga. Izimoto ezincane zibe ngu-34 414 nokuwukunyuka ngo-14.3% uma kuqhathaniswa nesikhathi esifanayo ngonyaka odlule ngesikhathi ama-light commercial vehicle enyuke ngo-9.7% kuno-Ephreli 2025. Kuyajabulisa nokuthi kunyukile nakumaloli aphakathi namakhulu njengoba aphakathi anyuke ngo-10.5% kwathi amaloli namabhasi anyuka ngo-9.9%” Izinkampani ezingu-15 ezidayise kakhulu izimoto ezintsha ngo-Ephreli. Kwesokunxele ngezidayiswe kuleli kutii kwesokudla kube ngezidayise ngaphandle

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: NGESIKHATHI amehlo amaningi ebheke ukubona ukuthi ubani ozodla umhlanganiso emjahweni iComrades Marathon ezogijinywa isuka eThekwini iya eMgungundlovu ngenyanga ezayo, abanye bazojatshuliswa ukuzithela phezu kobuso ababujwayele. IComrades yanonyaka, okuzoba ngeka-99, izoba mhla ka-14 Juni. Emjahweni wokugcina owawunyuka ngo-2024, kwabesifazane kwanqoba uGerda Steyn okungangatshazwa ukuthi uyintandokazi nakulokhu. Kwabesilisa intambo yashaywa wuPiet Wiersma emuva kokuthi owayebhekiwe uTete Dijana abanjwa ngamajaqamba. Baningi abagijimi ababheke ukuphosela uGerda noPiet inselelo kulokhu. Kwabesilisa uTete nakanjani uzobe ekhona kanjalo nomgijimi wamabanga amade ophethe amarekhodi amaningi, u-Aleksandr Sorokin, waseLithuania useqinisekisile ukuthi uzogijima iComrades okokuqala. Nokho amanye amehlo azobe efuna ukubona ukuthi yibaphi abantu abaziwayo abazobe begijima. Umculi uMandisi Dyantyis ungomunye wabasohlwini lwabazobe begijima iComrades yanonyaka ebe engaqali. Muva nje uqede i-Two Oceans Marathon engu-56km ngesikhathi esinu-04:49:21. Omunye umculi osebalwa nezingqwele njengoba ene-green number (etholwa ngabaqede imijaho engu-10 kuya phezulu njengoba yena eseqede ka-13), uKabelo Mabalane wodumo lwe-TKZee, uyavela kwabangenele. Le nsizwa eseyashintsha impilo yayo yabuye yamukela nobizo lokuba uMfundisi. Muva nje ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ubesematheni ebonakala enandisa esiteji abantu bencoma ukungarobhi kwakhe abalandeli ngenxa yokucula enganyakazisi umlomo kuphela. Omunye osendimeni yomculo novivela umjaho wakhe wokuqala nguSabelo Ngema oyilungu leqembu i-Afro Soul. Uhlale enekela abalandeli bakhe ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ukuthi uthando lokugijima lwasukaphi futhi ukuzilolonga kuhamba kanjani. Uzakwabo agijima naye uDJ Nzwiri oklwebha amapuleti futhi obuye alunguze njengomlingisi kuZalo nakuMalanga Awafani yena uphoqeleke ukuhoxa ngenxa yokulimala. Ulimale esezibekisele indawo ngomjaho iCosmos 3-in-1 eyayiseSecunda ngoMashi. Usomabhizinisi odume nangokushaya isibhakela owake wangena eringini nomrepha uBig Zulu, ubhalisiwe kwabangenele lo mjaho ozoba ngu-85.777km. Emuva kokushaya uBig Zulu ulandele ngomlingisi wodumo lweSkeem Saam u-Pholoso Mohlala wabe esephosela inselelo uNaak Musiq. Ngempelasonto uqede iDurban International Marathon ebisuka eProspecton yaphelela ePeople’s Park eMoses Mabhida Stadium ngo-4:11. Kuyona iDurban International Marathon bekugijima nomsakazi weGagasi FM ongumfowabo kaZakes Bantwini, uHeazy Madida. Uyisebenzise ukuvivela iComrades yakhe yokuqala. Uzobe esemgwaqeni nozakwabo kwezokusakaza uClement Manyathela we-702 odume ngokupheka ngemibuzo osopolitiki. Kuzobe kungokwesibili uClement egijima njengoba ngo-2024 aqeda ngo-09:59:40. Osopolitiki ababhalisile nguSihle Zikalala oyiPhini likaNgqongqoshe wezemiSebenzi yoMphakathi. UZikalala uziqeqesha ngokuzikhandla njengoba esanda kuqeda neTwo Oceans eKapa. Ngempelasonto ugijime u-10km wabe eseseka abanye abagijimi kwiDurban International. Ngo-2024 wagcina enyulile esebhalisile. Bakhona nabanye osopolitiki abazobe bengaqali ukugijima iComrades okungoMakashule Gana weqembu iRISE Mzansi noDavid Masondo oyiPhini likaNgqongqoshe wezeziMali. USabelo Ngema nozakwabo agijima nabo uMorgan Shandu (kwesokunxele) noDJ Nzwiri (kwesokudla)

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: UTOBZA Tee okhiphe ingoma entsha ethi Mshana ka-Aunt AKAZIMISELE ngokuyeka ukuphatha izinhlelo zemicimbi uTobza Tee osengene wagamanxa emculweni. UThobekile Njapha, odume ngelikaTobza Tee (31), uqale ukugqama ngokuba nomfutho esiteji uma ephethe uhlelo emicimbini yobumnandi. Muva nje, le ntokazi yaKwaMakhutha eThekwini, ikhiphe ingoma yayo entsha ethi Mshana Ka-Aunt ngaphansi kwenkampani iSphithiphithi Vibes. Iyichaze ngokuthi isuselwe ezintweni ezenzeka elokishini nokuyingakho kuzoba lula ukuthi abantu bayithande ngoba ikhuluma ngabakwaziyo. "Ikhuluma ngesimo sempilo esihlale sisibona kodwa sixoxwa ngendlela emnandi futhi ehehayo. Bengifuna ukukhuluma ngento eyiqiniso kodwa ezokwenza abantu badanse futhi bamamatheke," kusho uTobza Tee ocula i-house ne-Afro Pop. Uthe ingoma yendlalela i-EP yakhe entsha azoyikhipha ngoJulayi. Kuyona uthe ziningi izindaba azixoxayo futhi ishaya ngesigqi esisheshayo. Uqhube wathi yize esengene wagamanxa emculweni kodwa uzimisele ngokuqhubeka nokuphatha izinhlelo zemicimbi. Uthe ukwenza yomibili le misebenzi kudinga uthando nokuhlonipha akwenzayo. "Ngiyawuthanda ngenhliziyo yami yonke umculo futhi nokuphatha uhlelo kuyinto enginikeza umfutho. Ngenza isiqiniseko sokuthi kokubili ngikunaka ngendlela efanele." Uthe abantu abalindele umculo omusha kuye, uzosebenza nabantu abahlukene futhi basazombona emicimbini eminingi azonandisa kuyo. Uveze ukuthi yize eba nomfutho uma esesiteji kodwa ngasese uzothile futhi uthanda ukuzithulela.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: IMEYA kaMasipala waseMfolozi, uMnuz Xolani Bhengu (ophakathi), uKhansela uNhlakanipho Conco nemenenja kamasipala, uMnuz Fred Mazibuko Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu AZOPHELA amahlathi okucasha kwesaKwaMthethwa ngaphansi kukaMasipala uMfolozi, njengoba sekuphothulwa ukwakhiwa kwesiteshi samaphoyisa kule ndawo. Lokhu kuvezwe yimeya yalo masipala, uMnuz Xolani Bhengu, esithangamini nabezindaba eThekwini, ngoLwesihlanu. Uthe ubugebengu obudlange kakhulu kule ndawo wukwebiwa nokudunwa kwezimoto. UBhengu uthe njengamanje banesiteshi esisodwa esiKwaMbonambi. “Leso siteshi besikwazi ukuthi sisize kwesaKwaMthethwa, KwaSokhulu naKwabuyazi. Lokho bekwenza ukuthi uma kunokuganga okwenzeka kwesaKwaMthethwa uthole ukuthi bayaphuza ukuphendula ngenxa yokuthi indawo yaseMfolozi ivuleke kakhulu. Uma sesizoba neziteshi zamaphoyisa ezimbili kusho ukuthi sebezokwazi ukulwa nezigebengu, kube khona nokwesaba futhi uma bebona abomthetho bebaningi bazokwazi ukuthi badlalele kude,” kusho uBhengu. Uthe lesi siteshi esakhiwe ngokubambisana phakathi kukahulumeni waKwaZulu-Natal nokazwelonke, sesiphelile ukwakhiwa, kuphela sekuqedelwa ukufakwa ugesi. “Alukho usuku olubekiwe okwamanje (ukuthi sizovulwa nini) kodwa ngiyathembisa uuthi ngeke ushaye uJulayi lungaphumanga ngoba ngokwesakhiwo sesiphelile. Sesilinde ukuthi izigilamkhuba uma zisaqhubeka zitokele phakathi,” kuchaza uBhengu. Uthe ukubeke kwacaca ukuthi akafuni sakhiwe bese siba yisakhiwo esingasebenzi, uhulumeni wathembisa ukuthi izinsiza zizoba khona kanjalo nabasebenzi. “Sakubeka ukuthi asifisi ukuthi sikhandwe bese siphenduka isakhiwo nje. Ngenza isibonelo ngesiteshi samaphoyisa saseMambuka esisaziyo sonke esakhandwa uhulumeni ubambisene noTransnet, esasebenza isikhashana ngoba zingekho izinsiza zokusebenza. Sigcine sicekelwa phansi singasasebenzi.”

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: AMACIKO akhale "ngokungcwatshwa" ephila yiPlayhouse eThekwini ngesikhathi ebhikisha ngoLwesihlanu Image: Sibonelo Ngcobo BAZODLULISELWA koKlebe nakwiSpecial Investigating unit (SIU) bonke abathinteka ekuphathweni budedengu kuka-R51.8 million owanikwa umfelandawonye wezinyunyana zamaciko, iCreative Industries Federation of South Africa (CCIFSA) wuMnyango wezemiDlalo, ubuCiko namaSiko kuzwelonke phakathi konyaka-mali ka-2014/15 no-2023/24. Lokhu kushiwo wuNgqongqoshe uGayton McKenzie emuva kokuthola komnyango wakhe umbiko wophenyo acela ukuthi alwenziwe yiGobodo Forensic and Investigative Accounting (GFIA) ngokusebenza kwemali. Ngokwesitatimende soMnyango, uphenyo luthole ukuthi ngo-2016 kwenziwa ushintsho enkontilekeni yoMnyango neCCIFSA kwanyuswa imali yoxhaso ngo-R77,884 kokwakuvunyelwene ngayo. U-R5.4 million okwakumele ubuyiselwe emnyangweni ngo-2016/17 ngoba ungasetshenziswanga iCCIFSA yaqhubeka nokwenza ngawo ezinye izinhlelo ngeminyaka okwakungenasivumelwano kuyo. Kuthiwa umbiko weCCIFSA wokuthi imali iyisebenzise kanjani wawudukisa. U-R13 million okwakumele iCCIFSA iwusebenzisele uhlelo lweDowntown Music Hub wahlanganiswa nemali yayo kwi-akhawunti eyodwa nokuyinto okuthiwa kwakungamele yenzeke. Kuvela nokuthi iCCIFSA yahluleka ukuchaza ngokusetshenziswa kuka-R10 million wemiklomelo ebizwa ngokuthi Usiba. Uhlahlomali lwe-CCIFSA lwesicelo soxhaso lwaluveza ukuthi izothatha u-32% wesamba ikhokhele amaholo abasebenzi nezikhulu nokuyimali ephindeke kathathu ku-10% ogunyaziwe ngokwesivumelwano. UMcKenzie uyalele uMqondisi Jikelele woMnyango, uDkt Stella Khumalo ukuthi athathele izinyathelo abasebenzi abathinteka embikweni. Uthe uMnyango uzophinde udlulisele umbiko kuMcwaningi Mabhuku Jikelele, i-SIU noKlebe ukuze baqhubeke nophenyo. "Umnyango uzophinde ubuyekeze ubudlelwano bawo neCCFISA obukhona nobangomuso." kusho yena. UMcKenzie uthe umbiko uqeda zonke izinkulumo ngokuthi uhlukumeza iCCIFSA. "Okuvezwe wuphenyo wukuthi akukho muntu ohlukunyezwayo. Uveza ukungaphathwa kahle kwemali yomphakathi, ukuhluleka ukuchaza ngokusetshenziswa kwemali, ukuhluleka ukubuyisa imali engasebenzanga nokungabeki ngendlela ukuthi imali isebenze kanjani. Abantu baseNingizimu Afrika namaciko le nhlangano okwakumele ibasebenzele bafanelwe yiqiniso ngokuthi kwenzekeni ngale mali," kusho uMcKenzie. UMengameli weCCIFSA kuzwelonke, uJoy Mbewana, uthe sekunesikhathi efuna ukuthola umbiko ogcwele njengoba namanje engakawutholi. Esitatimendeni somnyango kubikwe ukuthi umbiko ogcwele ngowawo wodwa ngaphakathi. "Awukwazi ukuba yinto yomnyango kungenjalo sizoya enkantolo. Siyawufuna ngoba sifuna ukuvala imilomo bonke asebesithukile ngezinsolo ezindala." Uthe uMcKenzie ungene ehhovisi wavala uxhaso abebeluthola ngaphandle kobufakazi bokuthi kukhona ukungaphathwa ngendlela kwemali. "Kwathi engena esikhundleni wakhwela wadilika kithina. Nasemngcwabeni kaWinnie Khumalo wathi sithola izigidi kodwa singabiki okuyinto engekho. Uma ngifika ehhovisi ngo-2019 lwase lwenziwe uphenyo kwavela lokhu akuvezayo manje. Akukusha. Thina sahlala phansi nomqondisi womnyango salungisa izinto nokuyingakho ngaphansi kobuholi bethu kungaveli lutho oluwugcobho," kusho uJoy. Khonamanjalo, iCCIFSA KwaZulu-Natal ibe nombhikisho ngaphandle kwasePlayhouse, eThekwini, izolo ikhala ngendlela lesi sikhungo esiphethwe ngayo. USihlalo wayo eKZN uThokozani "T'zozo" Zulu uthe bafuna umphathi wePlayhouse uLinda Bukhosini akhethe isikhundla esisodwa kwaziphethe. "Akatholakali uma kufanele aklame indima yakhe yokuba wumqondisi wezobuciko. Sifuna nokuthi kuvulwe iPlayhouse eseMayville osekunesikhathi ivaliwe. Okunye esikhala ngakho wukuthi iPlayhouse ithola u-R57 million kuhulumeni abathi ngowokukhokhela abasebenzi nonogada. Njengamaciko kumele sikhokhe uma siyisebenzisa sikhokhele nesikhathi esengeziwe sabasebenzi nokuyinto engalungile." Uthe babanike umnqamulajuqu wezinsuku eziyisikhombisa ukuthi baphendule. Imizamo yokuthola uBukhosini ayiphumelelanga njengoba ucingo lwakhe belukhala lungabanjwa.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: ISILOo uMisuzulu Zulu nomkhulumeli waso uMntwana uThulani Zulu UPHIKE wama ngentaba ukuthi iSilo uMisuzulu kaZwelithini siyadunguzela umkhulumeli waso uMntwana uThulani Zulu kulandela ukuvela kwemibiko. "Hhawu, amanga angaka! Amanga aluhlaza cwe," usho kanje uMntwana uThulani ngesikhathi ethintwa yiSolezwe Ngempelasonto izolo ntambama. "Ngisesikhumulweni sezindiza kodwa iNgonyama benginayo khona manje, kade siphuza itiye." Izolo kusabalale imibiko yokuthi  iSilo singeniswe esibhedlela eThekwini emuva kokuhlabeka kade sihambele eSwatini muva nje. Besithamele imigubho yokuzalwa kukamalume waso uMswati III. USihlalo wekomiti lokuBusa nokuBambisana neziNdaba zoMdabu esiShayamthetho KwaZulu-Natal, uMarlaine Nair, ukhiphe isitatimende  ethi bayibonile imibiko ngokudunguzela kweSilo. "Egameni lekomiti, uSihlalo uMarlaine Nair udlulisa izilokotho ezinhle eSilweni futhi usifisela amandla nokululama okugcwele ngokushesha." Uthe bazobeka iNgonyama, iNdlunkulu nesizwe sonke emithandazweni ngalesi sikhathi. Kwi-voicenote uMntwana uThulani uthe kumphathe kabi ukuzwa "iphutha" ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ngokuthi iSilo siphuthunyiswe esibhedlela saze safakwa egunjini labagula kakhulu. "Ngifisa ukukubeka kucace ukuthi lokhu kuwuHubhu kaBhejane. ISilo sinakho ukuvakashela odokotela ukuhlola isimo sempilo okwenziwa umuntu wonke njengokujwayelekile. Njengamanje iSilo siyaziqhubekela nemisebenzi yaso esemthethweni noma imisebenzi nje yaso eqondene naso," kusho uMntwana uThulani.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: IZULU Messengers izobe icula bukhoma kwiSicathamiya Concert ePlayhouse, ngoMeyi 30 BAFUNA ukuthi umculo wesicathamiya uvuleleke kubantu abaningi abahleli bekhonsathi ebizwa ngeSicathamiya Concert ezoba sePlayhouse, eThekwini, ngoMeyi 30. Lo mcimbi sekungokwesibili ukhona njengoba nangonyaka odlule waba ngenyanga efanayo. Umholi weqembu iZulu Messengers, uSikhumbuzo "Mavulakuvaliwe" Mhlongo, uthe bayiqala ngonyaka odlule ikhonsathi ngenhloso yokushintsha indlela isicathamiya esibukwa ngayo. "Sasifuna ukuthi isicathamiya sivele ukuthi naso singadlalwa njengeminye imiculo ngoba sidhlale siba khona ngokuqhudelana. Ngomcimbi wokuqala sasifuna ukubona ukuthi kungenzeka yini, ngenhlanhla waphumelela. IPlayhouse yabe isizibophezela ukuthi awubuye ngoba abantu bayawuthanda," kusho uMavulakuvaliwe. Uthe ucothoza - obuye waziwe ngokuthi yingomabusuku - usudume ngokuthi udlalwa ebusuku futhi nakhona amaqembu asuke encintisana, wathi yingakho umcimbi uqala ngo-2 emini ukushintsha lokho futhi uhehe nabantu abaningi. "Njengemizamo yokuheha igenge encane, imidlalo yethu sithanda ukuthi ingagcini ngokuthi ibe sebusuku kuphela kodwa nasemini ukuze izoba khona futhi iyithande. Ukhona nje omunye esiwuhlela eGlebe maduze ngoba senzela khona ukuthi igenge encane iyibone iqhubeke nayo ngoba ebusuku ayisitholi isikhathi sokuba khona. Sizama ukushintsha wona njalo umqondo wokuthi kumele kuhlanganwe ebusuku kuphela." Uthe ekhonsathini yasePlayhouse bashintshe izinto ngokuhlanganisa amaqembu amadala namasha. Phakathi kwakhona kubalwa iPomeroy Golden Stars, Zulu Messengers, Royal Messengers, Inkululeko, Kalabhayi Boy, oBen 10, Mlazi Temendous namanye. Uthe umcimbi awuwuphazamisi umncintiswano wesicathamiya wasePlayhouse wangoSepthemba. "Amathikithi asekhona futhi atholakala ngo-R100. Ungalithola ngisho emaqenjini azobe edlala futhi kuyokusiza lokho ngoba cishe ngoMsombuluko azobe esenyuka eba ngu-R150," kusho uMavulakuvaliwe. Amathikithi adayisa naseWebticket.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: Urenda Mhlongo nendodakazi yakhe uSni Mhlongo AMA-VIDEO nezithombe zabo ezinkundleni zokuxhumana bekhombisa ukuba ngabangani sekwenze ukuthi uBrenda Mhlongo nendodakazi yakhe uSnikiwe "Sni" Mhlongo bathandwe abaningi. Ukuthandwa kwabo kwenza nezinkampani zibanake njengoba beke babonakale bekhangisa ngemikhiqizo ethile. Njengoba ngeSonto kugujwa uSuku loMama uBrenda, ongumlingisi oqale wazungeza amazwe omhlaba nomdlalo iThe Lion King, noSni, oyi-influencer, bakhulume ngobudlelwano babo nokuthi bazolugubha kanjani lolu suku. UBrenda uluchaze ngokuthi wusuku lokuhlonipha omama. Uthe ngaphezu kokuba wumama kuSni uphinde abe ngumngani wakhe omkhulu. “Angikhuliswanga umama,” kusho lo mlingisi odabuka KwaMashu. “Ngakhuliswa ugogo nokuyikhona okwenza ngenza isiqiniseko sokuthi ngiba nobudlelwano obuhle nendodakazi yami. Ngangihlezi ngilangazelele ukuba nabo nomama. Yingakho namanje singabangani noSnikiwe.” Yize engandanga kakhulu ngonina kodwa uthe yena wenza isiqiniseko sokuthi uba khona ngaso sonke isikhathi empilweni yezingane zakhe zontathu. “Singabangani abakhulu. Sinobudlelwano engangifuna ukuba nabo nomama wami. Sikhuluma ngayo yonke into. Akekho ongangena phakathi kwethu.” USni uchaze unina njengomuntu ongawubambi umshini yize bengabangani. “Uyawuqinisa umthetho! Singabangani impela kodwa akadlaleli ngasekuthambiseni isandla uma efuna kwenziwe izinto ngendlela efanele,” kusho uSni olandelwa yizinkulungwane ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ngenxa yokuthanda ingqephu nokunye. USni uthe kuningi akufunda kunina okuyohlala naye ingunaphakade. “Ungifundise ukuba wumuntu nokubazi abantu,” kusho uSni. Uthe njengoba behlala emadolobheni ahlukene, ngeke bakwazi ukulugubha ndawonye uSuku loMama. “Noma kunjalo kodwa ngizokwenza isiqiniseko sokuthi uyazibungaza egameni lami!” UBrenda uphethe ngokululeka omama bamanje ukuthi banganqeni ukukhuluma nganoma yini nezingane zabo. “Ikakhulukazi amantombazane. Asenze bangasisabi abantwana bethu kodwa basihloniphe bakwazi ukukhuluma nathi nganoma yini,” kusho uBrenda.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: UMCULIi wowokholo uThinah Zungu nonina uLindiwe MaMbonambi Zungu NJENGOBA ngeSonto kugujwa uSuku loMama, osaziwayo abahlukene bafisele onina nenzalabantu usuku oluhle. Labo saziwayo ngumlingisi woZalo, uNothando Ngcobo odlala indawo kaHlelo, umculi wowokholo uThinah Zungu, yimbongi uSbo Da Poet nomsakazi weGagasi FM uDJ Happy Gal. Nothando Ngcobo ozalwa wuPrincess “MaPri” Ngcobo Ngikufisela usuku oluhle lomama, ma (Princess “MaPri” Ngcobo). Ngiyabonga ngokuba wumama omangalisayo. Akekho omunye umzali ongcono ebengingamcela kuNkulunkulu. Ulokhu uyidwala kimi nasezinganeni zakwethu futhi wasibumba saba munye njengomndeni. Siyabonga kakhulu ngothando lwakho nobumnene bakho. Sengathi uNkulunkulu angaqhubeka akubusise nemisebenzi yakho. Ngiyakuthanda mama. UMLINGISI uNothando Ngcobo nonina uPrincess "MaPri" Ngcobo Thinah Zungu ozalwa wuLindiwe MaMbonambi Zungu Ngifisela omama uSuku loMama oluhle. Sibonga izimfundiso zabo ngoba ziyavela manje. Sibonga ukusithwala izinyanga eziyisishiyagalolunye. Ubona isizwe sisikhulu kangaka nje omama abenza isiqiniseko sokuthi bayayikhathula indima yokusikhulisa. Ngibafisela usuku oluhle, uNkulunkulu ababusise. Siyabathanda kakhulu sengathi uNkulunkulu angabagcina ebaphe eminye iminyaka bebone yonke impumelelo yethu besaphila. Yilokho engikufisayo. IMBONGI uSbo Da Poet nonina uNonhlah Mbutho Sibonelo “Sbo Da Poet” Mbutho nomyalezo kuNonhlanhla Mbutho Ngiyohlezi ngimbonga umama ngokusikhulisa kahle wasifundisa inhlonipho nokwesaba uNkulunkulu. Konke engikuzamayo ngizama ukujabulisa yena. Ngemuva ngokushona kukababa sisebancane, wasifukamela lo mama nezingane zasekhaya. Wasiphilisa impilo emnandi esipha uthando sonke. Namhlanje noma siphumela ebantwini siphuma nezimfundiso nothando. Omama ngempela bayinjini yekhaya, basinika imfudumalo nesibindi sokuphuma siyobhekana nomhlaba. Usuku okuhle komama bonke, inzalabantu. Izikhukhukazi zezwe. UDJ Happy Gal nonina uBusisiwe MaXulu Ndlovu Happiness “DJ Happy Gal” Ndlovu nomyalezo kanina uBusisiwe MaXulu Ndlovu Ngifisela bonke omama usuku oluhle nomama wami ongizalayo. Ngibonga izimfundiso zakho esezingenze ngaba wumuntu engiwuye namhlanje. Ngibonga ukuba ugogo oqotho nonothando ezinganeni zami. UNkulunkulu angigcinele wena. Ube nosuku lomama oluhle.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: Osaziwayo benhlangano Imvelo Social Development NPC. Kusuka kwesokunxele uMenzi Biyela, Thembinkosi Thwala, Swazi Mokoena, Ndumiso Dlamini noShon G AFONGQE isigqoko acela uxhaso kunoma wubani ongawasiza amaciko aqhuba umkhankaso wokuqwashisa ngezihlava ezihlukene ezihlasele abantu abasha nokufundisa ngamakhono. La maciko anenhlangano ebizwa ngokuthi Imvelo Social Development NPC. Usihlalo wayo umlingisi woZalo uThembinkosi Thwala, isekela lakhe umrepha uMpumelelo "Shon G" Gumbi, unobhala jikelele umlingisi uNdumiso Dlamini kuthi uzakwabo ekulingiseni uSwazi Mokoena abe yiphini lakhe bese kuba nomlingisi uMenzi Biyela ongumgcinimafa. UMenzi, ongumsunguli wenhlangano, uthe ukukhwabanisa nenkohlakalo okwenzeka kuhulumeni yikho okwenza imali iphelele ezandleni igcine ingafinyeleli lapho idingeka khona kakhulu. "Sicela uhulumeni nezinkampani ezizimele bafake isandla kwesikwenzayo ukuzei abantu abasha babe nekusasa eliqhakazile. Asiceli kuhulumeni kuphela kodwa noma ngabe uyinkinsela enoshisanyama KwaMashu ungasixhasa," kusho uMenzi olingise emidlalweni eminingi okubalwa kuyo iThonga, Uzalo neminye. Uthe nyakenye baqale uhlelo lokuhambela ejele iWestville beyohlomisa iziboshwa ngamakhono kwezokulingisa, ukucula, nokuqondisa imidlalo. Uthe baqale ngephakethe labo kodwa bathola uxhaso lwabe-Arts and Living Cultures ukuze baqhubeke kuze kube wuMashi. Udalule ukuthi sebentula imali yokwenza umcimbi lapho iziboshwa abaziqeqeshile zizokhombisa khona ezikufundile. Ngesikhathi besalinde lokho,uMenzi uthe sebehambela izikole beqwashisa ngobubhoklolo, ukuhlukumeza ngokobulili, ukusetshenziswa kwezidakamizwa nokunye. Uthe sebehambele izikole abale kuzo iChesterville High School, Thokozamnganga High School eShongweni nePhambili High School eSeaview. NgoMsombuluko bazoya eManzibomvu Primary School nasoZabeni Primary School. "Sizohambela izikole ezingu-14 ezifake umnikelo zithi ziyakuthanda esikwenzayo zicela sifinyelele nakuzona. Akwenzeki mahhala esikwenzayo ngoba kumele sihlele okokuhamba nendawo yokulala." Udalule ukuthi bafuna ukubuyisa ezemidlalo ezikoleni ukuze abafundi babe nabakwenzayo bangachithi isizungu ngezidakamizwa. Uthe bafuna nokuthatha ama-theatre angasanakiwe eThekwini bawasebenzise ukuze intsha izicijwe ngamakhono.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: UMLINDO The Vocalist nonina wengane yakhe uTaylor Allison SEKUQUBUKE inkombankombane ngezinsolo zokushayana nokuhlukumezana emoyeni phakathi komculi uMlindo the Vocalist nentombi yakhe okungacaci ukuthi usajola yini nayo, uTaylor Allison. Kusuke umsindo ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ngoLwesine ebusuku kusabalala imibhalo okuthiwa ifakwe wuTaylor edalula izinsolo zokuthi uMlindo umbeke isandla futhi walimaza ingane yakhe ekhanda ngeselula. Le ntokazi noMlindo wodumo lwengoma ethi AmaBlesser, banengane. "Phambilini ngayishiya le ndoda kodwa yakhala yangincenga ithi angiyibuyise futhi ifuna ukuba 'yindoda yomndeni' kodwa iyisigebengu. Uthanda kakhulu ucansi futhi usengithelele ngezifo izikhawu eziningi athi ziqhamuka ethoyilethi," kubhala uTaylor. Uqhube wathi uMlindo akabenzeli lutho nengane ngoba unezinye izinganeazinakekelayo. Uthe yingakho ngesikhathi ehamba efulethini ababehlala kulo athatha yonke into ngoba kwakuthengwe nguye ngemali yakhe. Esitatimendeni asifake ezinkundleni zokuxhumana, uMlindo, ogama lakhe laokuzalwa nguLindokuhle Mgedezi, uziphikile izinsolo zokuthi uyahlukumeza. "Sekuyisikhathi eside ngithule ngoba ngihlonipha ubudlelwano bethu futhi ngethemba ukuthi sizolungisa izinto ngasese. Ngiyabona kodwa manje ukuthi ukuthula kwami kuthatheka ngenye indlela. Ngibona kubalulekile ukuthi ngiveze ukuthi nami ngike ngahlukumezeka emoyeni nasemzimbeni ngabhekana nezinye izingqinamba ebudlelwaneni engikhethe ukuthi ngingazivezi emphakathini," kusho uMlindo. Uthe okusatshalaliswa emphakathini kungcolisa igama lakhe. UMlindo uthe ucela ukunikwa isikhathi sokubhekana nezinto zakhe futhi unethemba lokuthi iqiniso lizovela ngokuhamba kwesikhathi.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: UMPHATHI woKhozi FM uLwazi Mthabela UKHOZI FM alufani nezinye iziteshi zomsakazo ezithe chithi saka umhlaba wonke. Ngale kokuthokozisa abalaleli balo, Ukhozi luyisikhungo esiyifagugu lesizwe esidumile, uZulu. Lesi siteshi sikhipha ulwazi, sibuye sifundise kodwa sibe siyiwumthombo wokuvikela nokukhulisa ulimi lwesiZulu. Ngamanye amagama, Ukhozi luklama indima enkulu ekuthuthukiseni ulimi nangosiko lwesiZulu njengoba luyisiteshi esibizwa nge-public broadcasting service (PBS) vele. Iziteshi zalolu hlobo zakhelwe ukwazisa, ukufundisa nokujabulisa ngolimi oluthize njengoba sibona Umhlobo Wenene, ogxile olimini isiXhosa. Yingakho-ke izingququko esiteshini esinje zithinta abaningi ngoba abalaleli baso banezwi, futhi kufanele, ekulawulweni komsakazo. Ukhozi lusanda kushintsha izinhlelo, lwafaka nabasakazi abasha abasebancane. Yinto ejabulisayo lena futhi ekhombisa ukuthi balungiselela ingomuso. Kuyijoka elinzima kubaphathi balesi siteshi ngoba bathi beqinisekisa ukuthi Ukhozi FM luyaqhubeka nokuba yigugu kubalaleli, kodwa futhi kudingeke bakwazi ukuheha abakhangisi ukuze isiteshi sikwazi ukwenza inzuzo okuyiyo ephila ngayo. Nansi-ke inselelo ezivezayo kubaphathi: yokuthi noma izinto zishintsha, imali ingabi phambili bese bekhohlwa okumelwe yisiteshi. Ulimi kumele kuqikelelwe ukuthi aludungeki ngoba lokho kuthinta abalaleli entweni abanemizwa ejulile ngayo. Okukhulunywa oKhozini kufinyelela kwabaningi, ngakho ukuchezuka kungagcina kuyindlela ejwayelekile yokukhuluma ekubeni ithunaza futhi ulimi. Abasakazi babhekene nenselelo yokuthi bafike nokwehlukile nokuhehela ontanga babo kulesi siteshi, kodwa bebe bevikela leli gugu abalaleli balo msakazo abangezwa mshini ngalo. Kukule ndawana-ke lapha abasakazi abasha bezovivinyeka khona ngoba akukhona ukugijima nekhono kuphela, kodwa ukunyathela emgqeni owamukelekile kubanikazi bendaba - abalaleli. Sibonile ezinsukwini ezinkundleni zokuxhumana abantu bentinyela umethuli omusha wezemigwaqo uNokwanda Tema. Yize kungekho monakalo otheni kwayekusho noma ekwenza kodwa okwahlala obala wukuthi umlaleli woKhozi uyiphoyisa "eligade umzila" walo. Okuhle ukuthi bakhona ongoti bolimi abasebenzisana nalo Ukhozi abangeseka umsakazo ngamagama ashaya ngqo nasebenza kulesi simanjemanje ukuze abasakazi bengakhoseli kaningi esiNgisini nxa bexinwa ukuncishelwa eguleni lolimi.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: UTony Liu oyisikhulu esiphezulu sakwaChery South Africa Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu ISIKHULU sakwaChery South Africa, uTony Liu, sithi banezinhlelo ezinkulu zokufukula imboni yezezimoto eNingizimu Afrika njengoba ngoJuni bezothatha ngokusemthethweni ifemu obekungeyakwaNissan, eseRosslyn, ePitoli. Le nkampani ithenge ifemu kulandela isimemezelo seNissan emhlabeni jikelele sokuthi izama ukunciphisa izindleko ngokuchitha ezinye zezinto zayo okuhlanganisa nezindawo zokukhiqiza. ULiu, obesingathe isidlo sasebusuku nabezindaba eWuhu, eChina, kuleli sonto lapho bekuneChery International Business Summit, uthe bazoba yinkampani ezobamba elikhulu iqhaza eNingizimu Afrika ngenxa yefemu yabo entsha. “Ekupheleni kukaJuni sizomemezela ukuthi yimalini esizoyitshala siphinde siveze nezinhlelo zethu. Asidayisi izimoto ezimbalwa kuphela kodwa ikusasa lethu libeka phambili abantu baseNingizimu Afrika. Sizofaka esikhulu isandla ekufukuleni umphakathi. Nami ngizoba yisakhamuzi saseNingizimu Afrika njengani,” kusho uLiu. Uqhube wathi kuningi iNingizimu Afrika neChina abangakwenza ngokubambisana. “Kuningi futhi esingakwenza kule mboni yezezimoto, hhayi kuphela kwaChery kodwa ngisho imboni yonke. Ngikhuluma ngezimoto ezingama-new energy vehicle nokuhlinzekwa kwamaphathi yizinkampani zendawo.” Uthe bake bahlangana noMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa nePhini lakhe uPaul Mashatile bakhombisa okukhulu ukujabula ngokutshala kwabo imali. Kulo mbuthano bebesingathe abamele uhulumeni bevela eMnyangweni wezoHwebo, iziMboni nokuNcintisana, inhlangano yezinkampani ezikhiqiza izimoto i-Naamsa, Automobile Association, WesBank nabanye. Uthe bazokwakha ama-SUV futhi bazoshiya nomunye ulayini wokuthi bakhiqize iveni. E-Australia kusanda kwethulwa iveni iChery KP31 elindeleke ukuthi iqale ukudayisa kuleli ngasekupheleni konyaka noma ekuqaleni kozayo. Yize engafunanga ukudalula okuningi ngesikhathi ebuzwa yileli pephandaba kodwa iJetour ikuqinisekisile esitatimendeni ukuthi nayo izokhiqiza kule femu. Isikhulu sakwa-Jetour International, nayo engaphansi kweChery, u-Ke Chuandeng, simemezele ukuthi bazokhiqiza iT1 neT2 kusuka ngo-2027. ULiu uthe abafuni ukuzikhukhumeza ngabakwenzayo kunalokho ‘sizohlala sizithobile sifunde nasezinkampanini ezifana neToyota’. IToyota isineminyaka ikhiqiza ezinye zezimoto zayo njengeHilux eProspecton, eThekwini.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: I-iCaur V27 okubhekwe ukuthi ifike eNingizimu Afrika ekupheleni konyaka noma ekuqaleni kuka-2027 Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu KUYOPHELA le nyanga esevuliwe amagaraji enkampani entsha yaseChina engenisa kuleli i-iCAUR ezozethula ngezimoto ezimbili. I-iCAUR yinkampani engaphansi kweChery eyakha ama-SUV ahamba ngogesi. Kukhona nangama-Range Extended Electric Vehicle (REEV) okusho ukuthi ane-generator kaphethroli eshaja ibhethri. I-iCaur izoqala ngokudayisa i-V23 ezobe isilandelwa ngenye i-0T3. Embukisweni iBeijing International Auto Show ikhombise nge-SUV entsha esawumcabango okwamanje i-ROBOX. Ibukeka iyisiqwalantaba njengoba ifakwe amathayi asogwadule. Nokho imininingwane ephelele ngayo ayikho njengoba kusewumfanekiso. Enye iSUV abayethulile yi-V27 eshayelwa ngakwesokudla. Lokhu kusho ukuthi isizosabalala nakwamanye amazwe okubalwa kuwo iNingizimu Afrika ngasekupheleni kuka-2026 okanye ekuqaleni kuka-2027. Ngaphakathi i-iCaur V27 inkulu futhi intofontofo Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu Sithole ingqayizivele yethuba lokuyizwa amandla sisuka eWuhu, sanqamula endaweni yezivakashi iGao Chun Old Street sashosholoza njalo phezu kwebhuloho iShijiu Lake Bridge elinganiselwa ku-12km ehlanganisa iLishiu neGaochun. Ngaphandle ibukeka sa-SUV koke wayibona njengoba kungathi yiLand Rover Defender, kwezinye izindawo ungathi ithathe kwiToyota Land Cruiser Prado. Ikhanyisa ngamalambu angama-LED, inamarimu angu-21 inch bese ishiya igabade ngo-224mm. Kuningi ongakwenza kuyo ngaphandle ukuze yehluke njengokuyifaka ama-roof rails, isitebhisi sokuya okhakhayini, izindawo zokulayisha emaceleni, i-towbar, uyakwazi nokuyiphakamisa ufake amasondo asobhuqwini nokunye. Uma ungena ngaphakathi ukuba wu-5m kwayo yilapho okubona khona ukubaluleka kwakho ngoba ivulekile. Inezihlalo zesikhumba futhi ngemuva angiboni kungaba khona ongakhala ngesikhala ngoba iwudedangendlale. Empeleni bengizitshela ukuthi ilayisha abagibeli abayisikhombisa. Ngaphambili in-touchscreen infotainment system enkulu kodwa ngikuthandile ukuthi bafake namabhathini okuhlela amazinga okushisa ngezansi ukuze kube lula. Ukuba negiya eceleni kwesiteringi kuvule isikhala sezindawo ezimbili zokushaja ngaphandle kwentambo. Zikhona ezokushaja ngentambo ezimbili ngezansi bese kuba nezinye futhi ngemuva. Okhakhayini ebesihamba ngayo ibine-panaromic sunroof phakathi nendawo ehlukaniswe yisipikha sePioneer. I-iCaur V27 idonsa ngawo wonje amasondo ngezinjini zikagesi ezimbili. Injini kaphethroli engu-1.5 litre turbo isebenza ukushaja ibhethri ayiwafaki nhlobo amandla emasondweni. Lokhu kwenzelwa ukuqeda uvalo ukwazi ukuhamba ibanga elide kwazise ibhethri ingu-34.31kWh abathi uma ulishaje lagcwala ungahamba amakhilomitha alinganiselwa ku-150 ngogesi wodwa. Uma ithangi likaphethroli elingu-60 litre ligcwele bathi ingahamba amakhilomitha alinganiselwa ku-1000. Uma uthanda uyakwazi ukufaka ama-roof rails kwi-iCaur V27 Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu Amandla e-V27 Reev angu-335kW ne-torque engu-505Nm. Ihamba njengemoto kagesi ngenxa yokuthula kwayo futhi uma unyathela iyashesha nokuphendula ngamandla. Ngiyizwe intofontofo nasemgwaqeni angazi noma bekwenziwa yimigwaqo emihle yalapho besikhona engingabonanga ngisho nomgodi owodwa kuyo. Ibithule ngaphakathi, kubonakala ukuthi yimoto yokuzikhipha nomndeni nishaywe wumoya. Ingahamba nasobhuqwini ngenxa yokuphakama nokudonsa kwayo ngawo wonke amasondo kodwa akusona isiqwalantaba njengoba ingenayo i-diff lock no-4L. Lapho ngiqale ukuyizwa iduma khona yingesikhathi ipakile kuxhunywe umshini wokwenza ikhofi ngoba uyakwazi ukuyisebenzisa njenge-generator. Sihambe amakhilomitha angu-88 yaveza ukuthi idla 8.3l./100km. Ezinkundleni zokuxhumana isiqalile ukususa ukukhuluma, silinde ukubona kuyoba njani uma sekuqinisekiswe nentengo yayo.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: I-Omoda C4 ikhanyisa ngamalambu angamaLED ngaphambili nangemuva Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu KUNGEKUDALA umndeni wakwa-Omoda eNingizimu Afrika uzokwandiswa nge-C4 evezwe okokuqala embukisweni iBeijing Auto Show, eChina, ngesonto eledlule. I-C4 izongena ngaphansi kwe-C4 esiphenduke intandokazi, hhayi kuphela kuleli, kodwa nakwamanye amazwe njengoba kuyiyona moto i-Omoda eyazethula ngayo emphakathini. Kulindeleke ukuthi incintisane namanye ama-SUV angangayo okubalwa i-VW T-Cross, Chery Tiggo 4 Pro neKia Sonet. Ibukeka izoheha abaningi ngendlela ekhanga ngayo ngaphandle njengoba inama-criss amahle emzimbeni. Ngaphandle ungalindela amalambu angama-LED ngaphambili nangemuva kanjalo namarimu angu-18 inch. Ngimangazwe yisikhala ngaphakathi kwayo ngoba ngaphandle ibukeka iqoqekile. Ivulekile bo! Ngaphakathi i-Omoda C4 ayinalo uxhaxha lwamabhathini njengoba okuningi ukwenza kwi-touchscreen infotainment system engu-13.2-inch Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu Ilayisha abagibeli abayisihlanu futhi okumnandi ngemuva phakathi nendawo ezinyaweni wukuthi akukho gquma elikhona nokwenza kuhlaleke kahle. Khona ngemuva abagibeli banezimbobo zokukhipha umoya we-aircon kanjalo nezindawo ezimbili zokushaja nge-USB. Ibhuthi ilingana nayo kodwa ngithe ngiphenya ngangalibona isondo eliyisipele. Nokho kusengenzeka ukuthi elethwa kuleli ifike nalo. Ngaphambili amehlo ami athathwe yibhathini lokuyidumisa elizishaya sengathi ele-Lamborghini. Kwesinye kunezinto ezincane njengamabhathini ezikwenza uzibone usezingeni elingaphezu kwemoto okuyo. Kugqama ne-touschreen infotainment system enkulu lapho wenza khona cishe konke. Ukwazi nokudlala i-game kuso. Nangemuva ikhanyisa ngamalambu angamaLED i-Omoda C4 Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu Okhakhayini ubona isibhakabhaka kodwa aluvuleki. Kwa-Omoda & Jaecoo eNingizimu Afrika bathembise ukuyiletha ungakapheli lo nyaka. Yilapho futhi kuzoqinisekiswa khona nezinhlobo zezinjini ezizayo kodwa bakuvezile ukuthi bazoletha ekaphethroli nengunhliziyombili, i-hybrid. Izobe inezinsiza zomshayeli ezengeza ezokuphepha ezingu-16, amakhamera aveza umzimba wonke nokunye. Uma izobiza intengo encane ibukeka izothatha abaningi.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: IJaecoo J5 hybrid okulindeleke ukuthi ifike eNingizimu Afrika ngoJulayi Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu INKAMPANI eneminyaka emithathu ikhona, i-Omoda & Jaecoo, isizibekele umgomo wokuthi kuphele u-2027 ibe isidayisa izimoto ezingaphezu kwesigidi ngonyaka. Kule minyaka emithathu eyedlule, i-Omoda & Jaecoo isikwazile ukudayisa izimoto ezingu-1 million emhlabeni jikelele kodwa manje isifuna kungayithathi iminyaka. ENingizimu Afrika iJaecoo izibule nge-J7 eyi-SUV kwathi i-Omoda yona yazethula nge-C5. Isikhulu sakwa-Omoda & Jaecoo International, uShawn Xu, sikhuluma kwiChery International Business Summit, eWuhu, eChina kuleli sonto, sithe kule minyaka emithathu edlule sebekwazile ukuvula amagaraji angu-1 364 emazweni angu-69. UXu the bazimisele ngokuqhubeka nokudlondlobala, yingakho beziphosela inselelo yokudayisa izimoto ezingu-1 million ngonyaka. Eminyakeni emithathu ezayo i-Omoda & Jaecoo izokwethula izimoto ezintsha ezingu-13 emhlabeni jikelele, ngokusho kwesikhulu sakwaChery International, uZhang Guibing. I-Omoda & Jaecoo ingenye yezinkampani ezingaphansi kweChery. ENingizimu Afrika kulindeleke ukuthi umndeni wamaJaecoo wande nge-J5 hybrid, okanye i-SHS ngokolimi abalusebenzisayo. I-J5 ekhona emakethe yakuleli njengamanje ayiwona unhliziyombili njengoba ihamba kuphela ngenjini kaphethroli engu-1.5 litre turbo enamandla angu-115kW. KwaJaecoo bazishaya isifuba ngokonga kwe-J5 SHS kuphethroli kulandela ukuthi izintatheli zasemazweni ayisishiyagalolunye zincintisane ngokuthi wubani ozokonga kakhulu kuphethroli eChina. EzaseNingizimu Afrika zilale isithathu zihamba 625km iveza ukuthi idla 3.7l/100km. Kwabaphumelele ibidla 3.4l/100km. IJaecoo J8 plug-in hybrid yiSUV elayisha abagibeli abayisikhombisa okusabhekwa ukuthi ingeza yini eNingizimu Afrika Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu Le moto kulindeleke ukuthi itheleke kuleli ngoJulayi. Kubo kwayo bathi kuphethroli idla amalitha angu-5.3 ngo-100km. Phakathi kwezinto enazo kubalwa i-touchscreen infotainment system enkulu ngaphakathi, inqwaba yezinsiza zomshayeli nezokuphepha, izihlalo zesikhumba nokunye. Imininingwane ephelele ngayo nentengo sizobika uma isifika. Enye engase itheleke yi-J8 SHS plug-in hybrid. Iyi-SUV enkulu alayisha abagibeli abayisikhombisa abahlala ezihlalweni eziyisikhumba. Esomshayeli isihlalo ngisizwe sintofontofo futhi besingiwotawota. Ngemuva nokho besithanda ukuqina mbijana. Kulesi sikhashana engizithole ngikuyo ibizwakala intofontofo kakhulu. Ine-sunroof, i-touchscreen infotainment system enkulu, ama-airbag angu-10 nezinsiza zomshayeli. Inenjini kaphethroli engu-1.5 litre turbo esebenza nezikagesi ezintathu njengoba amandla ziwafaka kuwo wonke amasondo. Amandla lawa angu-395kW ne-torque engu-650Nm. Bathi uma ithangi likaphethroli elingu-70 litres nebhethri elingu-34.46kWh ligcwele ungahamba 1 400km.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: IToyota Legend 55 eyokuvalelisa iHilux njengoba ngoJuni kulindeleke ukuthi kwethulwe entsha IMOTO: TOYOTA LEGEND 55 NGASO sonke isikhathi uma ngigudla ngaseningizimu yeTheku amehlo ami sengiwavula kakhulu uma sengingaseProspecton. Phela yilapho ifemu yakwaToyota South Africa Motors (Tsam) izinze khona. Yilapho futhi kukhiqizwa khona intandokazi yemoto eNingizimu Afrika, iHilux. Ngisho ngamabomu ukuthi yimoto hhayi iveni ngoba iHilux yodwa edayisa kakhulu okudlula zonke izimoto kuleli, hhayi kuphela amaveni. Ukuvula kwami amehlo mawala yingoba ngisuke ngithembe ukuthi kungenzeka ngizithele phezu kweHilux entsha osekubalwa izinyanga ukuthi iqale ukudayisa emagaraji. Ngempelasonto inhlanhla iwele ngakimi ngiyibona elolini kuN3 ngibuya emngcwabeni eMtshezi. Nokho ngiyibone kancane kwazise iloli belihamba ngangakwazi ukuba nesikhathi, ngabe ngikuchazela kangcono. Ngingakucebisa ukuthi ungalinge uyeke ukufunda le ngosi kwiSolezwe Ngempelasonto ngoba nakanjani ngoJuni uma seyethulwa sizobe sikhona bese sibuya nombiko ogcwele ngayo. Ngesikhathi isalindiwe, kwaToyota benze okuvame ukwenziwa ngamakholwa, okuwukulinda uMfundisi ngeculo. Iculo kulokhu yiLegend 55 okuyiyona ndlela kwaToyota abavalelisa ngayo iHilux eqale ukudayisa kuleli ngo-2016. Kusuka ngo-2004, kwaToyota bakha iHilux yokugubha iminyaka engu-35 bayibiza ngeLegend 35. Abaphindanga babheka emuva ngoba balokhu benza amanye amaLegend okuyi-40, 45, 50 njengoba beku-55 nje. Benze isiqiniseko sokuthi ungadideki nakancane ukuthi yiyo ngokuyiqopha igama layo ezindaweni eziningi. Ulithola ezicabheni ngaphambili, kwi-styling bar esihlukile kunamanye amaHilux nangemuva esikhenkeni. Ngingakangeni phakathi, khona ngaphandle, ukuze yehluke kwezinye bayenze yacwebezela kwi-grille, ezibukweni nasezimbanjeni zezicabha. Yize iToyota Hilux ngaphakathi ibukeka indala kunezimbangi kodwa yakhiwe yaqina ukuze ihlale iminyaka Amarimu angu-18 inch bese kuthi esikhenkeni kube nerabha ukuze sivikeleke uma ulayishe impahla engase iklwebhe. Ngiyakuthanda ukuthi uyakwazi ukusikhiya isikhenke impahla ivikeleke ngaphakathi njengoba kune-roller shutter kodwa engasebenzi ngogesi. Uma usungena ngaphakathi awusoze ukhohlwe ukuthi uhamba ngani ngoba nakhona iqoshwe ezindaweni eziningi uLegend 55. Ngaphakathi futhi yilapho ekhombisa khona ukuthi izimbangi zintsha kunayo ngoba isashaya ngegiya elide ne-handbrake, yinye imbobo yokushaja nge-USB ne-touchscreen infotainment system ewumhlobo “mdi”. Kwi-touchscreen uyakwazi kodwa ukuxhuma iselula nge-Apple CarPlay/Android Auto futhi iveza nengaphandle ukuze ungashayisi. Injini ehamba ngayo yi-2.8 litre GD-6 turbodiesel eno-gearbox oyi-6 speed auto. Inamandla angu-150kW ne-torque engu-500Nm. Engikuqaphelile wukuthi sengathi bayithuthukisile indlela entofontofo ngayo emgwaqweni noma ingafiki ezingeni le-Ford Ranger ezihambela yodwa. Yize izimbangi zinezinjini ezinamandla amakhulu kodwa ngiwezwe ekahle nakuyona isukuma uma unyathela. Njengoba iyi-4x4 bengihamba ngokukhululeka ngokuthi angisoze ngibhajwe ndawo ngoba zikhona zonke izinsiza ezifana ne-diff lock no-4 low range. Kudizili ibidla amalitha angu-9.9 ngo-100km futhi ethangini ungalindela ukuhamba ngaphezu kancane kuka-600km. Zonke zifika ne-service plan yamasevisi ayisishiyagalolunye noma u-90 000km ne-warranty yeminyaka emithathu noma u-100 000km.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: KwaJetour bethule iT1 ne-T2 i-DM okuyizimoto ezingonhliziyombili njengoba zihamba ngenjini kaphethroli nekagesi webhethri ISIKHULU sakwaJetour emhlabeni jikelele sidalule ukuthi le nkampani yaseChina isezinhlelweni zokukhiqiza izimoto zayo eNingizimu Afrika. U-Andy Yuan, oyi-Vice President yakwaJetour International, wenze lesi simemezelo eSun Bet Arena kuleli sonto ngesikhathi le nkampani yethula izimoto zayo zokuqala kuleli ezingama-new energy vehicle (NEV). UYuan uthe basabalala emazweni angomakhelwane nawo adayisa izimoto ezishayelwa ngakwesokudla okubalwa kuwo iNamibia, Botswana, Zambia namanye. Uthe bafuna ukuvula ifemu yokwakha izimoto kuleli ukuze kunciphe izindleko futhi kudaleke amathuba omsebenzi. Ifemu izobe izihlanganisa izimoto, hhayi ukuzakha kusuka phansi. Kuzokhumbuleka ukuthi iChery South Africa isanda kumemezela ukuthi ithenge ifemu yakwaNissan ePitoli. IJetour ingenye yezinkampani ezenganyelwe yiChery emhlabeni jikelele. Izimoto ebezethulwa yi-T1 iDM neT-2 iDM ezingama plug-in hybrid. Zisuselwe kuma-T1 neT2 ahamba ngophethroli nabamba elikhulu iqhaza ekundlondlobaleni kweJetour kuleli. I-T2 ingenye yezimoto ezibanga isicoco se-2026 SA Car of the Year. I-T1 i-DM inenjini kaphethroli nezimbili zikagesi okukhipha amandla ahlanganisiwe angu-250kW ne-torque engu-530Nm. Ibhethri eligcina ugesi lingu-18.4kWh futhi uyakwazi ukuyisebenzisa njenge-generator ekhipha amandla angu-3.3kW. Ukuyishaja endaweni esheshayo bathi kuthatha imizuzu engu-27 ukusuka ku-30% iye ku-80% kuthi ngogesi wasendlini kuthathe amahora alinganiselwa kwamathathu ukuthi igcwale. Uma ibhethri nophethroli kugcwele bathi ungahamba amakhilomitha angu-1 200, kuthi ngogesi wodwa uhambe angu-100. I-T2 i-DM yona inamandla angu-265kW ne-torque engu-610Nm. Nakuyo bathi ungahamba amakhilomitha alinganiselwa ku-1 200 kuthi ngogesi wodwa uhambe angu-90. Ibhethri layo nezikhathi zokushaja kuyafana nakwiT1 i-DM.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: UMCULI we-jazz, uNduduzo Makhathini, nendodana yakhe, uThingo Makhathini, asebenze nayo kwi-albhamu yakhe ezophuma ngoJuni Image: Instagram/Nduduzo Makhathini UMCULI we-jazz, uNduduzo Makhathini, ujatshuliswa ukuphrojusa i-albhamu yakhe entsha  ngokuhlanganyela nendodana yakhe, uThingo, akubona kuzoheha nentsha. UNduduzo ophinde abe wuthisha womculo njengoba eneziqu zobudokotela kuwo, ulungiselela ukukhipha i-albhamu, i-The Myth We Choose ngoJuni. Kumanje usekhiphe ingoma eyendlalelayo ethi Kuzodlula. Uthe i-albhamu uyiphrojuse ngokuhlanganyela noThingo Makhathini (18). “Ukusebenzisana noThingo akuyona into eqalayo. Kwi-albhamu yokuqala eyayithi Sketches of Tomorrow (eyaphuma ngo-2014), babekhona abantwana uNailah, uThingo noMoyo becula. Balokhu beqhamuka bevela emsebenzini ngezindlela ezahlukile kodwa useyaqala ukuhlala esihlalweni sokuthi kube wuyena umdidiyeli noma uphrojusa kule albhamu,” kusho uNduduzo ekhuluma naleli phephandaba ese-United States of America (USA), lapho enomjikelezo khona. Uthe izingane zakhe ziyawuthanda umculo ngoba beziwufunda ezikoleni zamabanga aphansi kodwa uThingo uyena obonakala ngathi ufuna ukuwuqhuba. “Ulethe izithako ezintsha ezenza ukuthi lo mculo nabantu abancane ngokweminyaka bazowuthanda kakhulu.” Uthe baningi asebenze nabo okubalwa kubo uBlack Coffee, umkakhe u-Omagugu, Dalisu Ndlazi, Lukmil Perez, Ayana Sikade, Shabaka Hutchings, Robin Fassie, Keenan Ahrends, Thando Zide noMuneyi. Uthe i-albhamu likhuluma ngomlando nendlela okuthiwa abantu bavela ngayo emhlabeni. “NgesiZulu kuthiwa sadabuka ohlangeni, kube khona abantu abanjengoMvelikuqala kube khona oNomkhubulwane. Siyabheka ukuthi mhlawumbe lezo zindaba zendabuko zixhumana nekusasa? Yiziphi kulezi zindatshana esizikhumbulayo nokuthi ziwukhanda kanjani umlando wethu nendlela yokuziphatha? Ngizama ukuxhumanisa lokho njengoba mhlawumbe eminyakeni eyikhulu ezayo, sikhulume ngoNomkhubulwane ukuthi yiziphi izindaba ezintsha eziyokwakha abantu nemiphakathi nendlela yokuziphatha.” Uphethe ngokudlulisa amazwi enduduzo ngokudlula emhlabeni kuka-Albert Mazibuko weLadysmith Black Mambazo, asebenze naye. Muva nje, bakhiphe i-albhamu ngokuhlanganyela neMambazo, kubalwa noMbuso Khoza ethi One Voice – One World. “Abantu abanjengobaba uMazibuko babe negalelo nanokuthi babe nendlela yokuthi yini abafuna ukuyishiya siyikhumbula ngabo lokho okuyifudumezayo inhliziyo ngesikhathi sokukhala. Basishiye nolwazi oluningi, basishiye namathuba amaningi futhi sizohlala sibakhumbula ngamagalelo abo. Kuye kuthiwa umuntu onjengobaba uMazibuko akahambi usekhona, uphila kumculo nezimfundiso nakho konke akwenzile emhlabeni.”

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: I-LADYSMITH Black Mambazo ivalelisa ngomculo ku-Albert Mazibuko enkonzweni yomngcwabo wakhe eMtshezi High, ngoMgqibelo ekuseni UZOGCINWA ngencwadi nangeqophamlando, umlando wengwazi yeLadysmith Black Mambazo, u-Albert Mazibuko, eshone emasontweni amabili adlule, emuva kokugula isikhashana. UMazibuko (77) ushonele esibhedlela eThekwini, lapho ehlinzwe khona. Udlule emhlabeni esethathe umhlalaphansi ekunandiseni neqembu, ubeseba khona kuphela uma lizilolonga. NgoMgqibelo ekuseni, ufihlelwe emathuneni asekhaya eMtshezi, kwase kuqhubeka inkonzo enkundleni yemidlalo eMtshezi High. Lokhu kuye ngokwesifiso sakhe nokuthi endaweni kungcwatshwa engakashayi u-11 ekuseni, ngokusho kwemenenja yeMambazo, uXolani Majozi. UMajozi uthe uMazibuko bazomkhumbula ngokukhipha incwadi ekhuluma ngomlando wakhe. “Kuningi esikuqophile esaphila, kuzokwazi ukuthi kube nomthelela omuhle ekuhlanganiseni iqophamlando esizolenza,” kusho uMajozi. Ubonge nohulumeni wesifundazwe nokazwelonke ngokufaka isandla ezindlekweni zomngcwabo. “Uma umngcwabo kungowomndeni nomakhelwane, kuye kungabi nzima ukuwuthwala kodwa uma sekuzofika abantu abaningi, ngoba abantu abebesemngcwabeni bebalelwa ku-2 000, kuye kube nengcindezi emndenini ngezindleko. Uhulumeni waKwaZulu-Natal oholwa ubaba u(Thami) Ntuli ukwazile ukuthi usondele ubheke ukuthi umndeni yikuphi la odinga ngakhona, wase uyalekelela. NoMnyango kazwelonke wezemiDlalo, ubuCiko namaSiko usondelile wanikela ukuze umcimbi ube sezingeni. Senelisekile ngokwesekwa kuhulumeni nasemphakathini,” kusho uMajozi. Enkonzweni bekukhona uNtuli, iPhini likaNgqongqoshe wezemiSebenzi yoMphakathi neNgqalasizinda uMnuz Sihle Zikalala, uMqondisi Jikelele woMnyango wezemiDlalo, ubuCiko namaSiko, uNkk Stella Khumalo, iMeya kaMasipala Inkosi Langalibalele, uMnuz Mduduzi Myeza, owayenguNgqongqoshe wezemiDlalo, uMnuz Zizi Kodwa nabanye. Umndeni ududuzwe ngomculo yiMambazo eyacela ukuthi uMazibuko angafihlwa ingakabuyi e-United States of America (USA), lapho eyayinomjikelezo khona, iqembu laseSwatini iNcandweni Christ Ambassadors, Abanqobi, Thee Legacy nabanye. Izikhulumi bezibabaza inhlonipho nokuzithoba kukaMazibuko oshiye emhlabeni umkakhe uBongiwe Mazibuko, izingane nabazukulu.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: I-Kia Tasman entsha ishiya abantu abaningi behlukene phakathi ngendlela ebukeka ngayo BASUKELE isidleke sezinyosi kwaKia South Africa ngokwethula iveni labo lokuqala ngqa, iTasman, ababheke ukuzuza lukhulu ngalo. Umphumela kuyoba wukuthi zibatinyele okanye bafinyelele ekhekheni kube wuju lodwa. Izinyosi kulokhu yizingqungqulu ezikhonya emkhakheni wamaveni angama-double cab okuyi-Ford Ranger, Toyota Hilux, Isuzu D-Max, VW Amarok, GWM P-Series, Nissan Navara ne-Foton Tunland. Ngeke ubasole ngokuzama ukufika ojwini kwazise iconsisa amathe le makethe njengoba nyakenye kudayiswe ama-double cab angaphezu kuka-63 000. Uqala nje unyaka u-2026, evile ku-10 000 asefinyelele emakhasimendeni. Uma betinyeleka bazobe belandela ezinyathelweni zeMercedes-Benz ngeveni labo iX-Class eyayisuselwe kwiNissan Navara eyabhacaza baze bayihoxisa. Nokho iTasman ayifani neX-Class ngoba yona ayisuselwe ndawo, kunalokho kwaKia bayakhe kusuka phansi kuya phezulu. Ivele okokuqala emehlweni abantu ngo-2024 kwasuka okukhulu ukukhuluma ngendlela ebukeka ngayo. Namanje lokho kukhuluma akukapheli kusashiya abantu bengundaza ngezizathu ezingefani. Ngingomunye obeshaya amakhala kodwa emuva kokuyizwa ngezami izandla izinsukwana eWestern Cape ngesikhathi yethulwa, ngigcine sengingenankinga ngayo. Nabanye kungenzeka bajike umqondo uma sebeyijwayela. Ukuba le moto ingumuntu mhlawumbe beyizophiwa igama lokuthi uBuhlebuyeza. Ibukeka njengemoto encane okanye iSUV ngaphakathi iKia Tasman Okwamanje ezweni kukhona angu-150 futhi esinye isitokwe samaTasman angu-300 sisendleleni. Lokhu kukhombisa ngokusobala ukuzimisela kwabo ngokunyusa isibalo sezimoto abazidayisayo nonyaka, ngokusho kwesikhulu sakwa-Kia South Africa, uPaul Turnbull. Nyakenye badayise izimoto ezingu-18 843 nokuyisibalo esinyuke sisuka ku-14 103 ngo-2024. Ngo-2026, uTurnbull uthe bafuna ukudayisa ezingu-23 000 kuya phezulu. Ngale kweTasman, kunezinye izimoto ezintsha sha eziyisihlanu ezizayo nonyaka nezimbili ezinamagama asevele ekhona kuleli. Uma sibuyela kwiTasman, ngaphambili igolozile, iyagqama uma ithushuka. Iyagqama njengoba ubude bungu-5.410 mm kuthi ububanzi bube ngu- 1.930 mm. Ama-LED headlights ahlanganiswe nama-daytime running lights bawanameke ezinhlangothini bese ezansi kuba nama-fog lights. Ngikubone kuwabeka engcupheni yokulimala, ikakhulukazi uma usugudla ehlathini elithothene. Uma uyibuka ohlangothini kuvela amarimu angu-17 inch afakwe emasondweni angama-all terrain newindi langemuva elidimile. Kugqama amafenda aqumbile anombala omnyama okuthi uma uthanda uthole afana nombala ofana nomzimba wemoto. Esikhenkeni kunokokusivikela ukuthi singaklwebheki uma ulayishe impahla. Ngikuthandile ukuthi isivalo sesikhenke asisindi uma usivula noma usivala. Kuningi okunye ongakwengeza ngokuthanda kwakho njenge-bull bar, styling bar, i-roller shutter esikhenkeni kanjalo ne-towbar. I-towbar le ungakwazi ukudonsa ngayo isisindo esingu-3 500kg. ITasman ifika ngezinhlobo ezintathu okuyi-LX edonsa ngamasondo amabili, SX ne-X-Pro ezidonsa ngawo wonke. “Wu-last number” iX-Pro ebesihamba ngayo. Ngaphakathi ungafunga ukuthi yi-SUV. Inezihlalo zesikhumba, ezangaphambili okwazi ukuzifudumeza uphinde uzibandise. Okunye okokushisisa yisiteringi. Iphinde ibe ne-touchscreen infotainment system engu-12.3 inch ehlangene ne-digital instrument cluster. Phakathi nendawo kuwona la ma-screen kunesinye esincane esikukhombisa amazinga okushisa nokuthi umoya uphuma kuphi. Besingabonakali kahle ngasohlangothini lomshayeli kudingeka ngitshekise ikhanda ukulunguza. Kwi-infotainment udlala umculo ngezipikha ezikhala kamnandi ze-Harman Kardon, ikukhombisa lonke ingaphandle njengoba inamakhamera zinhlangothi zombili ngaphambili nangemuva, uxhuma iselula nge-Apple CarPlay/Android Auto ngaphandle kwentambo nokunye. Ngiyakuthanda ukuthi kunamabhathini asheshe akufikise kofuna ukukwenza ungathinti kwi-touchscreen ize ingcole. Ngibala inkinobho yokunyusa umsindo, ezokushintsha amazinga okushisa nokunye. Kunezimbobo ezimbili zokushaja nge-USB ngaphambili, eyokushaja ngaphandle kwentambo nezinye ezimbili zokushaja ngemuva. Ngemuva isikhala sabagibeli ngisibone sikahle, kuphela ezinyaweni sincanyana. ITasman ifika nenjini eyodwa engu-2.2 litre kadizili ekhona nakwezinye izimoto zakwa-Kia njengeSorento. Inamandla angu-154kW ne-torque engu-440Nm bese kuthi u-gearbox ube yi-8 speed automatic. Indlela isisuse eWaterfront yaze yayophelela eLambert’s Bay, bude buduze nasezweni elingumakhelwane iNamibia. Sigudle etiyeleni, sangena obhuqwini, saphinde sabuyela etiyeleni. Ngisanda kuyisusa ngiyizwe sengathi inokuthanda ukushintshashintsha amagiya kodwa sagcina sijwayelene. Ngemuva ifika nokokuvikela isikhenke iKia Tasman Amandla abezwakala enele uma isukuma futhi iyicela indlela uma ngifuna ukudlula ezinye izimoto namaloli ahudula izinqola ezilayishe impahla. Inama-drive modes amane okungu-Eco, Normal, Sport no-Tow. Ngaphakathi ithule futhi uma umgwaqo uqala ukuba mubi bekuzwakala kodwa hhayi ngendlela ekhalisayo. Ngeke nokho uyibeke ezingeni leRanger. Ngichazwe yindlela ebambelela ngayo okusizwa kakhulu wukuthi idonsa ngawo wonke amasondo amandlla iwafake lapho edingeka khona. Uma uthanda uyayishintsha idonse ngamabili bese kuthi uma ususobhuqwini uyifake ku-4H okanye u-4Low. Ngike ngayishiya ku-4 Auto obhuqwini ngayibona ilubamba kodwa ngiyizwa ne-traction control ingenelela ukungigcina endleleni. Obhuqwini ibingakhalisi nhlobo ingazweli kakhulu futhi ilinyusa nejubane ngale kokukuthusa ngokuthi ingakuphosa esikhotheni. Akukho lapho sixakeke khona kwadingeka ukuthi sisebenzise i-diff lock kwazise asiziqwalanga izintaba. Angiboni ukuthi ibizoshaya phansi ngoba igabade ilishiye ngo-252mm. Ikwazi nokuzihambela yona uma uyifaka kuX-Trek ongawufanisa ne-cruise control yasobhuqwini. Siphinde sayihloma esihlabathini, okuyindawo ekwazi ukuhamba kuyo ngale kokuxakeka. Esiteringini kunamabhathini okukutshela ukuthi uhamba endaweni enjani njengasesihlabathini, ematsheni nasodakeni Yona ibe isizilungisa ngendlela efanele njengokuthi ithi ukulibamba igiya esihlabathini. KwaKia bathi ngo-100km iphuza amalitha angu-7.8 litres ethangini elingu-80 litres. Ngilunguze ngayibona idla 8.9l/100km. Ngokwami iTasman yiveni elisezingeni nelingase licoshacoshe emakhasimendeni. Izinyanga ezizayo yizona ezizosidweba sicace isithombe sokuthi abashayeli baseNingizimu Afrika bahamba nayo noma bazoqhubeka nokubambelela ezintandokazini zabo iRanger, Hilux okulindeleke entsha maduze neD-Max ethuthukisiwe ezokwethulwa noma yinini. Kia Tasman 2.2D AT 4x2 LX                        R 679,995 Kia Tasman 2.2D AT 4WD SX                      R 879,995 Kia Tasman 2.2D AT 4WD X-PRO               R 999 995 Zifika ne-service plan yeminyaka eyisithupha noma u-90 000km, Roadside assistance weminyaka emihlanu engakalelwe banga ne-warranty yeminyaka emihlanu nayo engakalelwe banga.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: Kuqwashiswa ngobungozi bokuphazanyiswa okuthile ube ushayela nokungadala izingozi zomgwaqo U-EPHRELI uphawulwa njengenyanga yokuqwashisa abantu ngobungozi bokushayela kukhona okubaphazamisayo, nokuyinto okuthiwa ingenye yezimbangela ezinkulu zezingozi emgwaqweni. Isikhulu senkampani efundisa ukushayela futhi egqugquzela ukuphepha emgwaqweni iMasterDrive, u-Eugene Herbert, sithe imininingwane yezinkampani zemishwalense ikhomba ukuthi ukushayela bese kuba nokukuphazamisayo kwenyusa amathuba okushayisa ngo-60%. “Ngokwe-World Health Organisation, ukusebenzisa iselula ube ushayela kunyusa amathuba okushayisa ngokuphindwe kane. Lokhu kuhlanganisa ukuyibamba ngesandla nokusebenzisa iBluetooth. ENingizimu Afrika, iRoad Traffic Management Corporation (RTMC) ihlale ibalula ukuphazamiseka komshayeli njengokuphambili ezingozini okufa kuzo abantu. Kunzima ukuthola ulwazi oluqondile ngoba emuva kwengozi akulula ukusho kugcwale umlomo ukuthi ingozi idalwe wumshayeli obephazamisekile,” kusho uHerbert. Uthe ucwaningo lososayensi luthi kunzima ukuthi unganaka ngokugcwele izinto ezimbili kanye kanye. Kunalokho umqondo ulokhu ushintsha ngokushesha unaka izinto ozenzayo ngokwahlukana. “Kuleyo mizuzwana unganakile yonke into ingaphuma esandleni. Ngesivinini esingu-120km/h, imoto ihamba ibanga elilinganiselwa ku-33 metres njalo ngomzuzwana. Ukubuka iselula imizuzwana emine kuya kwemihlanu kufana nokuhamba ibanga enkundleni ye-rugby ucimezile,” kusho uHerbert. Uthe akuyona iselula kuphela kodwa nakhu okunye:

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: UPANJARO elenga kwibhonethi imoto ibe iphenduka emncintiswaneni i-Red Bull Shay'iMoto Image: Craig Kolesky/Red Bull Content Pool USIVIKELE ngempumelelo isicoco sakhe uJean “Panjaro” Kruger emncintiswaneni i-Red Bull Shay’iMoto obuseSuncoast Casino, eThekwini, ngoMgqibelo ebusuku. Lo mncintiswano ubusubuya eThekwini okwesibili iminyaka ilandelana njengoba ubuqala ukuba khona nyakenye. Yilapho uPanjaro, ohlala eMahikeng, athatha khona isicoco kuBoksie waseKapa. Abashayeli banikezwa imizuzu emibili nohhafu wokuthi bashaye izidudla, bechushe nasezikhaleni, benze neminye imigilingwane ngemoto. Abanye baphuma imoto ihamba babuye bangene baqhubeke nokushayela. U-KING Tyler nomsizi wakhe benza abadume ngazo kwi-Red Bull Shay'iMoto Image: Mpumelelo Macu/Red Bull Content Pool UPanjaro uhehe izethameli elenga kwibhonethi evulekile imoto ibe ishaya isidudla. Konke abakwenzayo kumele kwenelise amajaji nezethameli nazo ezivotayo. NgoLwesihlanu ebusuku, umncintiswano uqale kunabashayeli abangu-16, kwase kuyiwa kowamanqamu ngoMgqibelo, sekusele abayisishiyagalombili. Abane abathole amaphuzu amaningi banikwe ithuba lokuzikhethela abafuna ukuqhudelana nabo. Bese kusele uPanjaro, Magesh Junior, Team VQ25, King Tyler, uBubu okunguye yedwa obemele iKwaZulu-Natal, King Kruger ongumfowabo kaPanjaro, Team 2xSpicy JZ noBemors. Uhlelo beluphethwe nguHope Mbhele nomakadebona kulo mdlalo, uVic Pardal. Ngokunqoba kabili kulandelana, uPanjaro ulandele ezinyathelweni zikaSam Sam obeyijaji okokuqala kulokhu. USam Sam wanqoba ngo-2021 nango-2022. UPanjaro ongandanga ngamazwi uthe: “Ngiyabonga kakhulu ngokungeseka, ngizonibona ngonyaka ozayo.”

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: IZINKOMBA ziveza ukuthi ingase iphinde yenyuke intengo kaphethroli, udizili nopharafini ngenyanga ezayo Image:  Tumi Pakkies / Independent Newspapers UMFELANDAWONYE wezinyunyana zabasebenzi, iCosatu, uhlabe ikhwelo kuhulumeni ukuthi uphinde uqhamuke nezinye izindlela zokunciphisa ukuzwela kokunyuka kwentengo kaphethroli nodizili, okulindeleke ukuthi kwenzeke ekuqaleni kukaMeyi. Ekuqaleni kwenyanga intengo yelitha likaphethroli u-93 no-95 inyuke ngo-R3.06. Ekadizili u-500ppm inyuke ngo-R7.37 kwathi elika-50ppm lanyuka ngo-R7.51. Ilitha likapharafini linyuke ngo-R11.67. Lokhu kunyuka kwentengo kudalwe yimpi ephakathi kwe-Iran ne-Israel (ebambisene ne-United States of America). Iphazamise ukuthuthwa kukawoyela ongahluziwe eStrait of Hormuz. Uhulumeni wamemezela ukuthi uzokwehlisa isikhashana intela kaphethroli ngo-R3 isuka ku-R4.10 yaba ngu-R1.10 ilitha. Kudizili yehle isuka ku-R3.93 yaba ngu-R0.93 ilitha kule nyanga futhi kuzophinde kubuyekezwe ngezayo. Lokhu wathi kuzowulahlekisela ngo-R6 billion emnothweni. Uhulumeni ekhasini lawo kwi-X, uveze ukuthi ukunyuka kwentengo kawoyela nokushintshashintsha kwamandla erandi, kulindeleke ukuthi kunyuse intengo kaphethroli ezinyangeni ezizayo. ICosatu ithe imibiko yakamuva yeCentral Energy Fund, iveza ukuthi intengo yelitha likaphethroli ingase yenyuke ngo-R3, R10 elikadizili no-R7 kwelikapharafini. “Lokhu ngokunye ukushayeka emnothweni onyuka ngo-1% kule minyaka engaphezu kuka-10 nasempini yamazinga okungasebenzi aku-41.1%. I-International Monetary Fund isivele ikwehlisile ukuqagela kokunyuka komnotho ngo-2026, yakubeka ku-1% isuka ku-1.4%,” kusho iCosatu. Ithe ukwehliswa kwentela kaphethroli inyanga eyodwa yigxathu elihle kodwa kudingeka okunye ngokushesha. Ithe inovalo lokuthi abasebenzi nomnotho ngeke bakwazi ukumelana nokunye ukunyuka kwentengo kaphethroli, udizili nopharafini. “Udizili ubalulekile ezithuthini zomphakathi abasebenzi abathembele kuzo kanjalo nopharafini osetshenziswa yizinkulungwane zemindeni. Abasebenzi bavele bacwile ezikweletini, banakekela izihlobo eziyisikhombisa umsebenzi ngamunye, bachitha u-40% womholo wabo kwezokuthutha futhi ngeke bakwazi ukumelana nokunyuka kwentengo kaphethroli, kadizili nekapharafini.” ICosatu ithe kumele kuphinde kwehliswe intela kaphethroli nenye intela. Ibalule nokuthi kumele kuqhanyukwe nezindlela zokwehlisa intengo kapharafini. Okunye ithe wukuthi kwenziwe izithuthi zomphakathi zishibhe.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: UMCULI uSabelo Ngema ovivela ukugijima iComrades Marathon okokuqala ngoJuni UMCULI oyilungu leqembu i-Afrosoul ufuna ukugqugquzela ozakwabo ngokubaluleka kokuzivocavoca ukuze bagweme izifo. Uzokwenza lokhu ngokugijima iComrades Marathon okokuqala ngoJuni 14 nonyaka. USabelo Ngema uzoba ngomunye wezinkulungwane zabagijimi ezizosuka eThekwini, zilibangise eMgungundlovu, kulo mjaho ozoba ngoka-99 kulo nyaka. Lo mculi uzobe engaqali ukusebenzisa ukugijima ukuqwashisa abantu ngokubaluleka kokunakekela impilo njengoba ngonyaka odlule, yena nozakwabo bagijime besuka eThekwini baya ePort Edward, befundisa ngezifo zengqondo. “UNkulunkulu usidale ngendlela yokuthi akukho okungasihlula ukukwenza. Ngathi uma ngibona umkhulu omdala eqeda iComrades ngonyaka odlule, ngazitshela ukuthi nami ngifuna ukuzophonsela inselelo yokuthi ngiyiqede. Sengiwagijimile ama-marathon (42.2km), ngase ngithi ake ngizwe iComrades,” kusho uSabelo. Uthe ukugijima kuyamsiza empilweni nasemqondweni ngoba uyakhohlwa yizinkinga uma esemgwaqweni. “Uthi uma ugijima amabanga amade ubuye usuwakhe isitezi ngomqondo, usuthenge nezimoto. Ubuya namaqhinga amasha okuzithuthukisa, yingakho ngikuyamanisa kakhulu nezifo zengqondo ngoba ukhwantalala nengcindezi kuyaphela,” kusho yena. Uthe nasekhaya isimo siba ngcono uma ujima ngoba ukhwantalala nengcindezi, kusuke kuphansi. “Kuthina esiganelwe, ekhaya kumnandi. Umama uhlala ehleka futhi upheka kahle. Uma uyindoda uhlala ujabule, ungakhathazeki nangokuhamba imitholampilo yamadoda ngoba uba wuqanduqandu. Lokho ngezinye zezinto ezinhle ezenziwa ukujima ngoba umndeni uyabumbana,” kusho uSabelo oshadelwe wuzakwabo acula naye eqenjini, uThandeka Zulu. Uthe ugqugquzelwa kakhulu umculi we-kwaito ophinde abe wumfundisi, uKabelo Mabalane, osegijime iComrades izikhawu eziningi. Uqhube wathi baningi abanye njengoDJ Sndara, naye oseke wayigijima iComrades Marathon phambili. “Ngiyabasifela abafowethu esinabo emkhakheni wezokungcebeleka ukuthi bakujwayele ukuzivocavoca futhi behlise nasezinkanjini zikaFaro. Ngiyazi ukuthi ngizozwakala njengomuntu ozenza ngcono kodwa asisebenzise uphuzo njengento yenjabulo ngaleso sikhathi, hhayi ukuthi silusebenzise ngokweqile ngoba luzohlukumeza imizimba yethu. Asijimeni. Buka ubaba uHhashi Elimhlophe ukuthi uma esesteji, udlula izintwana ezincane.” Uthe ngokujima yena usehlale enomfutho singabi khona nesidingo sokusebenzisa izikhuthazi nokusiza impilo yakhe. “Ngiyakhumbula eminyakeni edlule uL’vovo ngesikhathi ewa esteji, ngaba ngomunye wabokuqala engaya ukuyomsiza. Ngiyambona manje ukuthi uyajima, okuyinto engikhuthazayo nami nengifisa ngathi bakhona nabanye abangafunda kuyo.” Uphethe ngokuveza ukuthi uzoqala amaqoqo okugijima ngalapho ehlala khona, eReservoir Hills ngenhloso yokukhuthaza nabanye.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Kuphele 'ukuphapha' kuboshwa abebedlala ngezulu lezandla Amaphoyisa aseNingizimu Afrika (SAPS) abophe amadoda amabili ayamaniswa nezibhamu abonakale kwi-video esakazwa ezinkundleni zokuxhumana lapho abesifazane bebonakala bedlala budedengu bephethe izibhamu. Emuva kokusabalala kwe-video, abeSAPS Gauteng Crime Intelligence baqale umkhankaso wokuthungatha abasolwa okuwaholele eTembisa, eGauteng, lapho abasolwa betholakale khona baboshwa. Izibhamu ezibonakale kuvidiyo zithathwe ngamaphoyisa kanti uphenyo lokuqala luveza ukuthi lezi zibhamu azinalayisensi. Ngesikhathi kuqhubeka lo mkhankaso abasolwa baphinde batholakala nemoto ebiduniwe. I-Gauteng Crime Intelligence iyaqhubeka nokuphenya ngabasolwa. Laba balisa ababili abaneminyaka engu-21 no-34 baboshelwe ukwephula umthetho iFirearms Control Act, ukutholakala nezibhamu ezingekho emthethweni nezinhlamvu kanye nokuba nemoto eduniwe. Amantombazane abonakala kule video agcine atholakele ngemuva kokuthi umkhondo wabasolwa ukhombe amaphoyisa lapho ahlala e-Ebony Park, eMidrand. Ngesikhathi amaphoyisa ebuza ngawo kuvele ukuthi abonwe namadoda aseNingizimu Afrika eshayela imoto emhlophe yohlobo lwe-VW Polo. Imoto ibe isivinjwa eduze kwaseKaalfontein, abesifazane ababili abebefunwa batholakale emotweni base beyiswa eTembisa South SAPS. Amaphoyisa aphinde axwayise amalungu omphakathi ngokuphatha budedengu kanye nokukhonjiswa kwezibhamu, ngoba lokho kubeka izimpilo zabantu engozini futhi kuyicala elinzima. Abasolwa kulindeleke bavele eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseTembisa ngesonto elizayo.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Kubikwa ukuthi zimkhalele ephuma kwikhomishini kaMadlanga uBrown Mogotsi. Image: Oupa Mokoena / Independent Newspapers Kubikwa ukuthi zimkhalele ephuma kwikhomishini uBrown Mogotsi ngoLwesihlanu ntambama. Kuthiwa uzovela eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseGoli ngoMsombuluko. UMogotsi uboshwe yithimba lamaphoyisa eSAPS ngesikhathi eshayela esuka ePitoli elibangise eGoli - cishe imizuzu engu-45 ephumile kwikhomishini, nalapho echithe cishe amahora amane ephekwa ngemibuzo. Ngesikhathi ethula ubufakazi, uMogotsi ubelokhu ephindelela ukuthi ubengafuni “ukuzifaka icala” ngesikhathi ecindezelwa ngumholi wobufakazi kanye namakhomishana ngezinto eziningi ezibalulekile. Amaphoyisa akuqinisekisile ukuthi kukhishwe incwadi egunyaza ukuboshwa kwakhe i-J50 ngokuphula umthetho. Ngokusho kwamaphoyisa, leli cala lisukela ecaleni lokuzama ukubulala uMogotsi eVosloorus ngoNovemba nyakenye. Abaphenyi bathi isigameko sokudubula sahlelelwa ngamabomu ukuze kwakhiwe isithombe sokuthi uMogotsi wayekhonjwe indlela.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Kuthunjwe osanda kuthola ekaRAF Amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal ahlenge owesifazane owayethunjwe kanye nabanye abayisikhombisa ekhaya labo eChappies Section, eMandeville, eSundumbili, ngamadoda angaziwa ezintatha zangoLwesihlanu, 15 Meyi 2026. Izisulu eziyisikhombisa kubikwa ukuthi zidedelwe KwaDabeka ngemuva kwesikhashana, nokho owesifazane, osanda kuthola imali yakhe ye-Road Accident Fund (RAF), uyiswe endaweni engaziwa. Ithimba leProvincial Tracking Team lisebenze ngokuzikhandla lathola imoto eyodwa kwezimbili ezasetshenziswa ngesikhathi kuthunjwa, abopha abasolwa abathathu. Uphenyo luholele amaphoyisa ePhoenix lapho isisulu, esiseminyakeni yo-30 ubudala, sitholakale singenamyocu. Amaphoyisa anxusa abahlomuli be-RAF ukuthi bangazidaluli izinkokhelo zabo noma baziqhayise ngale mali. Abasolwa bazamile ukukhipha imali kaningi kodwa kwanhlanga zimuka nomoya, kodwa bakwazile ukuthenga ngemali elinganiselwa ku-R30 000. Abasolwa ababoshiwe bazovela enkantolo maduze. Kusathungathwa abanye abasolwa.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: 1008617120__20260430__0 ULehlogonolo Chauke, odume ngelikaShebeshxt ULehlohonolo “Shebeshxt” Chauke (31) uvele okokuqala eNkantolo yesiFunda ePolokwane ngamacala okugebenga nokutholakala nezibhamu ezingekho emthethweni nokuzama ukubulala. Ubhekene namacala angu-20 esewonke, amanye awo inqwaba yokuzama ukubulala. Udaba luhlehliselwe umhla ka-28 Meyi 2026 ukuze kuvunyelwe umbuso ukuthi uqedele ukudalula okuqukethwe emadokodweni abekwe endaweni eyodwa. Umsolwa ugqunywe esitokisini kusukela aboshwa ngonyaka odlule. Uzohlala esitokisini. UFadiel Adams evele enkantolo yeMantshi ePinetown Image: Sibonelo Ngcobo/Independent Media Umholi weqembu lezepolitiki i-NCC nelungu lePhalamende, uFadiel Adams, unikezwe ibheyili ka-R10 000. Icala lihlehliselwe umhlaka-14 Agasti 2026 ukuze kuqhutshekwe nokuqhubeka. Njengengxenye yemibandela yebheyili, ummangalelwa uyalwa ukuba angaxhumani, ngokuqondile noma ngokungaqondile, nanoma ibaphi ofakazi boMbuso kanye/noma ukushushiswa. Ummangalelwa uyalelwa ukuba azibike mathupha eHhovisi Lamaphoyisa aseMitchells Plain Police Station phakathi kwehora le-06h00 no-20h00 njalo ngoLwesibili nangoMgqibelo, kusalindwe ukuphothulwa kwalolu daba. USOMATEKISI uJoe “Ferrari” Sibanyoni nasolwa nabo uMvimbi Daniel Masilela noPhilemon Msiza namhlanje bajoyinwe umsolwa wesine ozinikele emaphoyiseni uBafana Sindane. Namhlanje babuyele enkantolo yeMantshi eKwaggafontein, eMpumalanga icala lahlehliselwa uMsombuluko. Image: Oupa Mokoena / Independent Newspapers Abammangalelwa bepulazi lezidakamizwa eSwartruggens Babuyela esitokisini abammangalelwa anga-11, abatholwe epulazini elikhiqiza izidakamizwa eSwartruggens, eNorth West. Laba nammangalelwe abayisihlanu (5) badabuka eMexico, uFabian Astorga, Jesus Alonso, Medina Astorga, Luis Alberto Ramirez Rios, Jose Andres Medina, Jacquelin Lopez Madrid(owesifazane); abantu ababili (2) baseMozambique, u-Ismael Afiado Massinge, uLourenco Constantino Cumbane; oyedwa (1) ongowaseZimbabwe, uTobias Soyani kanye nezakhamuzi zaseNingizimu Afrika ezintathu (3), uTyron John Schutte, uKyle Schutte, uVusi Amos Mkambi.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Amaphoyisa ashaqe impahla ongumbombayi eGoli I-SAPS e-Gauteng ishaqe izimpahla zomgunyathi ezibiza cishe u-R23m ngesikhathi somkhankaso wezinhlaka eziningi ohlose ukuqeda izimpahla eziwumkokotelo kanye nezingekho emthethweni endaweni edolobheni laseGoli ngoLwesihlanu. Lo mkhankaso ubudidiyelwe uphiko oluphenya izimpahla zomgunyathi lwaseGauteng ngokwesekwa ngamaphoyisa asemngceleni, Public Order Policing (POP), uphiko lwezobugebengu bezohwebo, abavikeli bemikhiqizo kanye nophiko lwezentela lwaseNingizimu Afrika (i-SARS). Impahla eshaqwe amaphoyisa enkabeni yedolobha eGoli Amathimba abomthetho abehamba ehlola amabhizinisi asenkabeni yedolobha ukuthi ayayithobela yini imithetho. Ngesikhathi kuqhubeka lo mkhankaso kuhanjelwe izitolo ezingu-23 zaseshwa nokuholele ekutheni kuthathwe izimpahla nezicathulo zomgunyathi ezingu-27 058. Impahla ezishaqiwr zenani elilinganiselwa ku-R23m. Ama-ejensi okuqinisekisa ukuthotshelwa komthetho azoqhubeka nokuqinisa imisebenzi yokuthobela kanye nokuphoqelela ukuthotshelwa kwemithetho kulo lonke elaseGauteng ukuze kuliwe nezenzo zobugebengu ezihlobene nezimpahla zomgunyathi nezingekho emthethweni. Amateki kanokusho awasalanga

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Kudutshulwe kwabulawa abantu ababili okusolwa ukuthi yizigebengu ebezihlomile ngesikhathi bedubulana namaphoyisa eSydenham ngoLwesine ntambama. Amaphoyisa azibonele isigameko sokugetshengwa kuBurnwood Road lapho abasolwa abathathu, abebeshayela iKia sedan emhlophe, bebegebenga owesilisa impahla yakhe. Abasolwa asukume abona ukuthi kukhona amaphoyisa, bashaya bachitha ngemoto. Ngesikhathi abasolwa bebaleka, omoto yabo ishayisane netekisi base beyishiya. Babaleke ngezinyawo bedubula bebhekise emaphoyiseni, kwadutshulwana. Abasolwa ababili badutshulwe balimala kabi, oyedwa waboshwa. Uzobhekana necala lokubamba inkunzi ehlomile nelokuzama ukubulala emaphoyiseni. Alikho iphoyisa elilimale ngesikhathi sokudubulana.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Kwengezwe amanye amacala kuFannie Nkosi Image: Oupa Mokoena / Independent Newspapers USergeant Fannie Nkosi kulindeleke ukuthi avele ngaphambi kwenkantolo yeMantshi yaseThohoyandou ngoLwesihlanu, 15 Meyi 2026. Kusolwa ukuthi ngomhlaka-10 Novemba kunomsolwa owaboshwa ngokutholakala nensangu, izibhamu ezingekho emthethweni kanye neziqhumane. Uphenyo lukhomba ukuthi u-Sgt Nkosi wafika walanda idokodo lecala lokuqala enza sengathi uthunywe indlunkulu yamaphoyisa. Emuva kwezinyanga ezimbalwa kuthiwa waphindela eThohoyandou, wazichaza njengoColonel osuka ehhovisi elikhulu wakhipha insangu eyayishaqwe lapho okugcinwa khona ubufakazi emaphoyiseni. Yize ubufakazi wabubhuka kwelomkhulu, ngokuhamba kwesikhathi kwatholakala ukuthi kunesikhwama esishodayo sensangu. Kwavulwa icala lokuphazamisa ukusebenza kwengalo yomthetho.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Amaphoyisa athole iziza zokukhiqiza izidakamizwa Abasolwa abayishumi nanye kulindeleke ukuba bavele okokuqala eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseSwartruggens, namhlanje. Laba babhekene namacala ahlobene nokukhiqiza izidakamizwa, ukutholakala nezinsimbi eziyigugu ngokungemthetho, ukutholakala nempahla eyingozi kanye nokwephula uMthetho wokufika kwabantu bokufika. Lokhu kulandela umkhankaso wezobunhloli owenziwe yiNhloko yeCrime Intelligence, ihhovisi lenhloko uezobugebengu obuhleliwe, kanye neDirectorate for Priority Crime Investigation (DPCI) South African Narcotics Enforcement Bureau (SANEB)  kanye nabanye ababambiqhaza okuholele ekuboshweni kwabasolwa abayishumi nanye (11) abaxhumene necala lokukhiqiza izidakamizwa ngoMeyi 13. Lo msebenzi uholele ekutholakaleni kwesikhungo esikhulu sokukhiqiza izidakamizwa esingekho emthethweni okukholakala ukuthi siyabandakanyeka ekukhiqizeni i-methamphetamine.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: USOMATEKISI uJoe “Ferrari” Sibanyoni nasolwa nabo uMvimbi Daniel Masilela noPhilemon Msiza besenkantolo yeMantshi eKwaggafontein Image: Oupa Mokoena / Independent Newspapers “MINA ngiyinceku kaNkulukulu”, kusho uJoe “Ferrari” Sibanyoni etshela abezindaba ukuthi umsulwa ngesikhathi evele enkantolo yeMantshi eKwaggafontein, eMpumalanga. USibanyoni uvele nabanye abasolwa okunguMvimbi Daniel Masilela noPhilemon Msiza ngamacala okuqola namabili okushushumbisa imali. Icala elibhekene nosomatekisi uJoe “Ferrari” Sibanyoni livele lashuba ngemuva kokuthi ummeli wakhe uShaun Abrahams SC owayeyisikhulu seNPA, esole uMbuso ngokungazimiseli ngesikhathi ufaka isicelo sokuhlehlisa inqubo yesicelo sebheyili. Abashushisi batshele inkantolo ukuthi uphenyo lusaqhubeka futhi kusadingeka isikhathi sokuqoqa ubufakazi. UMbuso uphinde waveza ukuthi isicelo sebheyili singase singaqhubeki ngoba imantshi obekulindeleke ukuthi ilalele lolu daba ibingakatholakali. U-Abrahams ukuphikisile lokhu wathi uMbuso uhlulekile ukuzilungiselela ngendlela yize uphenyo seludonse isikhathi eside. U-Abrahams uphinde waqondisa abashushisi enkantolo, wathi lolu daba lungaphansi kwesigaba 5 hhayi u-6 we-Criminal Procedure Act. UMbuso uphinde wagxekwa ngokungabanikezi abameli babasolwa uhlu lwamacala Imantshi u-J.T. Erasmus ibuze abashushisi ukuthi ngabe uhlu lwamacala ludluliselwe yini ku-Abrahams. UMbuso uvumile ukuthi awuzange. U-Abrahams utshele inkantolo ukuthi uyayidinga incwadi ukuze aqhubeke nesicelo sebheyili. Inkantolo iluhlehlisele uLwesihlanu lolu daba.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Usomatekisi waseMpumalanga Joe “Ferrari” Sibanyoni Image: Screenshot/TikTok Isikhulu samatekisi esidumile eMpumalanga, uJoe “Ferrari” Sibanyoni, singomunye wabesilisa abathathu ababoshiwe esigamekweni esididiyelwe samaphoyisa sokuqola okuhlobene necala osekunesikhathi liqhubeka eKwaggafontein elibandakanya izinsolo zokusatshiswa kanye nezimfuno zezimali eziphindelelayo kusomabhizinisi. Uyamataniswa nezinsizwa okusolwa ukuthi ziyiqoqwana longongqondongqondo bobugebengu okubalwa kubo uVusimuzi ‘Cat’ Matlala. Laba nasolwa baneminyaka ephakathi kuka-46 no-60 baboshwe ezintatha zangoLwesibili eGauteng naseMpumalanga wuphiko lwamaphoyisa aphenya ubugebengu obuhleliwe. Okhulumela amaphoyisa esifundazweni, uColonel Malesela Masondo, uthe leli cala lisukela ezinsolweni zokuthi abasolwa bafuna imali kaningi kusomabhizinisi isikhathi eside ngaphambi kokuthi agcine elubika esiteshini samaphoyisa eKwaggafontein ngo-2025. Icala lidlulele ophikweni oluphenya amacala ahleliwe eMpumalanga, okuyilona elihole uphenyo kwabe sekuboshwa. UMasondo ukuqinisekisile ukuthi bobathathu abasolwa kulindeleke ukuba bavele eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseKwaggafontein ngoLwesithathu, Meyi 13, babhekene namacala okubamba inkunzi. Umsolwa oyedwa usagcwele amathafa. "Kukhona umsolwa oyedwa ongakaboshwa. Okwamanje amaphoyisa athi kungenzeka kwengezwe amanye amacala kubasolwa njengoba uphenyo lusaqhubeka." UMasondo uthe amayunithi ayisipesheli asebenzela ukuhlakaza amanethiwekhi okuqola futhi wanxusa izisulu ukuthi ziphumele obala.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Umengameli Cyril Ramaphosa noNgqongqoshe wezokuVakasha uPatricia De Lille ngokusuku lokuqala le-Africa's Travel Indaba, e-ICC eThekwini UMENGAMELI Cyril Ramaphosa wethule inkulumo yosuku embukisweni we-Africa’s Travel Indaba 2026, e-Inkosi Albert Luthuli International Convention Centre, eThekwini, ngoLwesibili ekuseni. URamaphosa ugqamise ukuthi imboni yezokuvakasha ayigxilile ekuthuthukiseni umnotho nje kuphela, wayichaza “njengendlela ephilayo ebonisa lokho esiyikho njengabantu.” Uphawule ukuthi iNingizimu Afrika yamukele izivakashi zamazwe ngamazwe eziyizigidi eziyi-10.5 onyakeni odlule, futhi ingxenye yekota yabantu abafikayo bevela esifundeni se-SADC - okukhombisa ukuthi "ama-Afrika akhetha i-Afrika." Uphinde wagcizelela umsebenzi omele iNingizimu Afrika namazwe angomakhelwane wokugqamisa i-SADC Tourism UNIVISA ukuze kube lula ukuhamba amazwe alesi sifunda ngaphandle kokubhajwa emingceleni. "Sisebenzela ukuthi sivule imingcele yethu ibe sendaweni eyodwa futhi sithuthukise izindlela ezibheke emingceleni ezibonisa ukunotha kwesifunda sethu. Uma abantu base-Afrika behamba phakathi kwe-Afrika, siqinisa umnotho wethu, sijulise ubudlelwano bethu bamasiko futhi sakhe izwekazi elididiyelwe. Ekuqaleni kwalo nyaka, enkulumweni yami yeSimo Sezwe, ngenza ikhwelo embonini yethu yezokuvakasha, kwiziphathimandla kanye nemiphakathi. Ngithe: "Manje kufanele sikhuthaze izinto ezikhangayo ezihlukile zamasiko, ezomlando nezemvelo ezikhombisa ubunjalo bezwe." Ngemuva kokwethula inkulumo yakhe, uRamaphosa uhole inqubo yokusayinwa kwesifungo sezokuvakasha. Lesi sifungo siqinisekisa ukuzibophezela okuhlanganyelwe ekukhuliseni umnotho wezokuvakasha e-Afrika, ukuxoxa izindaba zase-Afrika nokusebenzisana ukwakha i-Afrika engcono nomhlaba ongcono ngokuvakasha, ukubambisana, kanye nokwabelana inzizo yentuthuko.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: USomlomo wePhalamende likazwelonke, uNkz Thoko Didiza, usenqume uhlelo oluzolandelwa iSishayamthetho sikazwelonke ukuphendula isinqumo esikhishwe yiNkantolo YoMthethosisekelo Image: Tumi Pakkies/ Independent Newspapers USomlomo wePhalamende likazwelonke, uNkz Thoko Didiza, usenqume uhlelo oluzolandelwa iSishayamthetho sikazwelonke ukuphendula isinqumo esikhishwe yiNkantolo YoMthethosisekelo ngoLwesihlanu, ziyi-8 kuMeyi 2026, odabeni oluthinta i-Economic Freedom Fighters ebisola uSomlomo wePhalamende kanye nabanye, mayelana noMthetho 129I weMithetho yeSishayamthetho sikazwelonke kanye nombiko wePhaneli lezobulungiswa elizimele liholwa owayengumengameli wamajaji uSandile Ngcobo. Ngokwesitatimende esikhishwe yiPhalamende, siveze ukuthi uDidiza uyasihlonipha isinqumo seNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo futhi uzohambisana ngokugcwele nomyalelo neziqondiso zeNkantolo. Kuvezwe uhla olulandelayo njengezinyathelo ezizokwenziwa: 1. Ngokuhambisana nokufundwa okubuyekeziwe koMthetho we-129I, uSomlomo uzokwazisa ngokusemthethweni isiGungu Sikazwelonke ngombiko wethimba elizimele ngokwethula amajenali afanelekile ePhalamende. 2.USomlomo uzohlinzeka umengameli wakuleli ngekhophi yombiko wethimba elizimele ngokushesha, njengoba kuyalele inkantolo yoMthethosisekelo. 3. Ngokuhambisana nesinqumo senkantolo, uSomlomo uzoqala inqubo yokuhlela ikomidi elizophenya icala ngokweMithetho 129J kuya ku-129O yeMithetho yesiGungu Sikazwelonke ukuze kucutshungulwe inqubo yophenyo yesigaba sama-89 ehlongozwe kuMthethosisekelo kanye neMithetho yesiGungu. 4. USomlomo uzodlulisela ngokusemthethweni umbiko wethimba elizimele eKomidini elizophenya icala njengoba kuyalele inkantolo yoMthethosisekelo. 5. USomlomo uzodlulisela isinqumo senNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo ekomidini elincane lePhalamende likazwelonke lokubuyekezwa kwemithetho ukuze licubungule izichibiyelo ezidingekayo zeMithetho yesiGungu sikaZwelonke ngokulandela okutholwe, ukufundwa, kanye neziqondiso zeNkantolo. Ikomidi elincane lizobika ngomsebenzi walo ekomidini lemithetho, lona elizohambisa izincomo zalo esiGungwini Sikazwelonke ukuze sizicubungule. 6. USomlomo uzonquma uhlelo olufanele, izinhlelo zenqubo, izikhathi ezibekiwe kanye nezinyathelo zokweseka isikhungo ezidingekayo ukuze ikomidi eliphenya icala likwazi ukwenza futhi liqedele umsebenzi walo ngempumelelo, ngokungakhethi nangohlaka loMthethosisekelo kanye neMithetho yesiGungu sikaZwelonke.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Abammangalelwa ngesikhathi bevele enkantolo yeMantshi eKempton Park Usomabhizinisi uTariq Downes, oyiNhloko yezoBunhloli ophikweni lwamaPhoyisa aseNingizimu Afrika (SAPS) uMajor-General Feroz Khan, kanye neNhloko yesiFundazwe saseGauteng yeDirectorate for Priority Crime Investigation (DPCI), uMajor-General Ebrahim Ahmed Kadwa, bavele okokuqala phambi kweNkantolo yeMantshi yaseKempton Park  ngoMsombuluko bebhekene namacala amabili okuphula umthetho owengamele ukuphathwa komcebo wezimbiwa kanye nokuphazamisa ukusebenza kwengalo yomthetho.
