ULwamba ongumgadli odabuka eDemocratic Republic of Congo (DRC), ushaye elokunqoba ngomzuzu ka-72 elungisa iphutha lakhe, kwazise iGalaxy ibithole igoli ngaye ngesikhathi umkhonto ugwaza ekhaya esiwombeni sokuqala. ICity ayiqedanga nje kuphela ishobolo isomiso sezindebe eKZN eyagcina ngeLamontville Golden Arrows ngesizini ka-2009/10 inqoba i-MTN8, kodwa iqede ishobolo leminyaka ewu-54 lesi sifundazwe sibhekwe yisambane kulo mqhudelwano womkhumulajezi. Kusukela ngesizini ka-1971 lo  mqhudelwano usaziwa ngeLife Challenge,  amaqembu aKwaZulu-Natal abelokhu ehluleka ukuwunqoba. Emaqenjini aseKZN aseke afinyelela kowamanqamu phambilini kubalwa AmaZulu FC, African Wanderers, Manning Rangers, nayo iCity eyaguqa kowamanqamu ngesizini ka-2017/18 isabizwa ngeMarizburg United. ICity, okuyisizini yayo yokuqala le ikhushulelwe esigabeni seBetway Premiership, beyize kulo mdlalo wamanqamu inenhloso yokuziqophela owayo umlando ngokuwina indebe yayo yokuqala kusukela yasungulwa. Ngakolunye uhlangothi iGalaxy beyize kulo mdlalo izimisele ngokusinqoba okwesibili lesi sicoco kwazise yasinqoba ngesizini ka-2018/19 ishaya iKaizer Chiefs ngo 1-0. ICitizens iqeqeshwa uPitso Dladla osabambile noziqophele owakhe umlando ngokunqoba indebe yakhe yokuqala esigabeni sePremiership.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UKHETHUKUTHULA Ndlovu weKruger United (osebholeni) owathathwa exinwe uLihle Dlamini weMidlands Wanderers, ungomunye wabadlali abamqoka kuleli qembu osekusele kancane lidle isicoco seMotsepe Foundation Championship UMDLALI wasophondweni lwesokunxele kwiKruger United, uKhethukuthula “Jaguar” Ndlovu, ukholwa wukuthi sekusezandleni zabo ukufeza isifiso sikasihlalo waleli qembu sokulibona likhushulelwa esigabeni seBetway Premiership. IKruger ihlezi esicongweni se-log yeMotsepe Foundation Championship ngamaphuzu awu-55 emuva kwemidlalo engu-28. Ivule igebe lamaphuzu ayisishiyagalombili phakathi kwayo neMilford FC neHungry Lions abayilandela ngawu-47 endaweni yesibili neyesithathu. Idinga amaphuzu amathathu kuphela emidlalweni emithathu esele ukuze ibe ngompetha baka-2025/26 beMotsepe Championship. Umdlalo wayo wasekhaya ezowudlala neBlack Leopards namuhla ngo-3 ntambama KaNyamazane Stadium, KaNyamazane, yiwona obukeka uzoba yingqophamlando kwiKruger ngokukhuphukela esigabeni sePremiership. Uma leli qembu laseBushbuckridge, okuyisizini yalo yesibili kwiMotsepe Championship, liphumelela ukukhuphukela kwiPremiership, lizoba ngelesibili lasesifundazweni iMpumalanga. Okwamanje lesi sifundazwe sishaya ngeTS Galaxy kuphela. UNdlovu, odlale amasizini amabili kwiRoyal AM, ngomunye wabadlali abanamava okudlala kwiPremiership iKruger eqinise ngabo isikwati sayo ngaphambi kokuqala kwale  sizini. Phakathi kwabo kubalwa uWandisile Letlabika, Morne Nel, Kagiso Malinga, Celimpilo “Zidane” Ngema, Sipho Sibiya ongukaputeni, Tercious Malepe, nonozinti uPhilasande Manqele obolekwe kwiRichards Bay FC. Ngewindi likaJanuwari, iphinde yaqinisa isikwati ngoNtsako “Neverdie” Makhubela noLindokuhle “Ma-11” Mtshali. “Sekuseduze phambili, futhi wonke umdlali okhona eqenjini uyakuqonda ukubaluleka kokuthi siwunqobe umdlalo esiyowudlala neBlack Leopards, yize sazi ukuthi akuzukuba ngumdlalo olula njengoba nayo ilwelwa ukusuka ezembeni. Kodwa esizibophezele ngakho wukuthi silwe njengamabhubesi, sikhiphe amandla okugcina sifeze isifiso sikasihlalo wethu (uBasil Khoza) sokubona iqembu likhushulelwa kwiBetway Premiership. Sesilwe kakhulu ngakho asikwazi ukuyilahla ekugcineni sesisebenze kangaka. Sekusezandleni zethu manje ukuphetha imbenge,” kusho uNdlovu, odabuka eBathenjini, eMsinga. UNdlovu ungomunye wabadlali abasale dengwane ngesizini edlule ngenkathi iRoyal AM ixoshwa yiPremier Soccer League (PSL) ngenxa yamacala ebibhekene nawo ngokukweleta umqoqi wentela, i-SARS. Ngaphandle kweKruger esizibeke ethubeni lokungena kwiPremiership, amaqembu asenethuba lokuzibekisela indawo kuma-PSL Promotion Play-Offs yiMilford, Hungry Lions, Cape Town City neCasric Stars. Esishozini sezembe nakhona isabambene ngezihluthu phakathi kweLeopards, Midlands Wanderers, ne-The Bees. ILeopards esendaweni ka-15 kwi-log ingase ibe sengcupheni yokulandela abakhaya bayo baseLimpopo iBaroka FC asebevele begawulwe yizembe. Imidlalo yeMotsepe Foundation Championship: Milford FC v The Bees (Umhlathuze Sports Complex); Hungry Lions v Upington City (Mxolisi Dicky Jacobs Stadium); Kruger United v Black Leopards (KaNyamazane Stadium); University of Pretoria v Lerumo Lions (Tuks Stadium) Venda FC v Leicesterford City (Thohoyandou Stadium); Cape Town City v Gomora United (Athlone Stadium)

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UMQEQESHI weDurban City, uPitso Dladla, nowe-TS Galaxy, uBernard Parker, okuyibona abazobe behola la maqembu kowamanqamu eNedbank Cup kusihlwa ePeter Mokaba Stadium, ePolokwane NGAPHANDLE kokuthi ukufinyelela kweDurban City kowamanqamu weNedbank Cup yinto ebingacatshangwa yiningi lezingqapheli nabathandi bebhola jikelele baseNingizimu Afrika njengoba kuyisizini yayo yokuqala esigabeni seBetway Premiership, kungase kube yingqophamlando nakumqeqeshi wayo imbala, uPitso Dladla. UDladla (47), ongumqeqeshi osabambile kwiCity, uzohlala ebhentshini njengenhloko yabaqeqeshi njengoba bezobhekana ne-TS Galaxy kowamanqamu weNedbank Cup namuhla ngo-6 ntambama, ePeter Mokaba Stadium, ePolokwane. Lo mqeqeshi ubanjiswe izintambo zokuqeqesha ekuqaleni kukaFebhuwari ngemuva kokuxoshwa kukaSinethemba Badela. Usethubeni lokuba ngumqeqeshi waKwaZulu-Natal ozoqeda isomiso seminyaka engu-16 sezindebe emaqenjini akulesi sifundazwe. Usethubeni futhi lokuziqophela owakhe umlando ngokuba ngumqeqeshi wokuqala waleli qembu laseThekwini ozonqoba indebe kwiPremiership. “Asizikhathazi ngemidlalo yethu emithathu esingenzanga kahle kuyona ngaphambi kwalo mdlalo wamanqamu esizowudlala ne-TS Galaxy. Umdlalo womkhumulajezi wehlukile kunomdlalo weligi, ngakho umdlalo wamanqamu esiya kuwo sizowuthatha ngendlela ehlukile,” kusho uDladla. Emidlalweni emine yePremiership ngaphambi kowamanqamu wePremiership, iCitizens ihlulwe yiMamelodi Sundowns, Lamontville Golden Arrows neMagesi FC, ngaphambi kokudlala ngokulingana ngo 1-1 ne-Orbit College. “Ukufinyelela kwethu lapho esikhona manje (kowamanqamu) akukhona okwami kuphela, kodwa kungenxa yokubambisana ethimbeni lethu labaqeqeshi engibala kulo u-Ashraf Hendricks noRowen Fernandez. Kithi lo mdlalo wamanqamu mukhulu kuneqembu ngoba asimele iDurban City nje kuphele kodwa simele idolobha iTheku nesifundazwe sonke iKwaZulu-Natal. Ukwesekwa esikuthola eMnyangweni wezeMidlalo esifundazweni oholwa uMntomuhle Khawula, kuyisikhuthazi esikhulu kithina njengoba ethembise ukukhipha  amabhasi azothwala abalandeli abazoseseka benze inkundla iPeter Mokaba ifane nenkundla yethu yasekhaya iChatsworth Stadium.” UMDLALI wasezinhlangothini, uSamkelo Maseko, ngomunye wabazothwala amathemba aleli qembu uma selibhekene neTS Galaxy emdlalweni wamanqamu weTS Galaxy ePeter Mokaba Stadium, ePolokwane, namuhla. UDladla odabuka eHambanathi, oThongathi, ungomunye wabaqeqeshi asebeqeqeshe kuzo zonke izigaba zebhola eNingizimu kusukela kwezama-amesha kuze kufinyelele kwesikhokhelayo sePremier Soccer League (PSL). Ngesizini ka-2016/17 wayeqeqesha noRonnie Gabriel uThongathi FC  ludla isicoco sikazwelonke seSafa ABC Motsepe League, lwakhushulelwa kwiMotsepe Foundation Championship. Ngemuva kwamasizini amane eqeqesha esigabeni seMotsepe Championship, ngesizini ka-2021/22 wanqoba isicoco seligi neRichards Bay FC esebenza naye uGabriel. Ngesizini edlule ubesethimbeni labaqeqeshi leCitizens ngesikhathi inqoba isicoco seMotsepe Championship eyiphini likaSimo Dladla. Nakuba eseyibamba-mqeqeshi kuleli qembu kodwa uliqonda kangcono kwazise usehlale kulona amasizini amathathu. Lokhu kumbeka ethubeni elihle lokulinqobela isicoco, aziqophele umlando wokuba ngumqeqeshi wokuqala waKwaZulu-Natal ozonqoba iNedbank Cup okuyindebe engakaze itholwe yiqembu lakulesi sifundazwe kusukela ngo-1971 umqhudelwano usabizwa nge-Life Challenge Cup. ICity efudukele eThekwini ngesizini edlule ka-2024/25, seyike yafinyelela kowamanqamu eNedbank ngesizini ka-2017/18, isaziwa ngeMaritzburg United, yaguqiswa kowamanqamu ngo 1-0 yiFree State Stars. IGalaxy nethuba lomunye umlando IGalaxy yaKwaNdebele, eMpumalanga, yaqopha umlando ngesizini ka-2018/19 iba yiqembu lokuqala elalidlala esigabeni seNational First Division (esiyiMotsepe Championship) eliqukule indebe yeNedbank ngokuguqisa iKaizer Chiefs ngo 1-0 kowamanqamu. Isethubeni lomunye umlando kowanamuhla wamanqamu. Leli qembu liya kowamanqamu liholwa wuBernard Parker njengebamba lomqeqeshi, kulandela ukukhonjwa indlela kuka-Adnan Beganovic onganqobanga nowokubika umdlalo kwengu-11 yakamuva. Nokho, njengoba kuyinto eyaziwayo ukuthi umdlalo womkhumulajezi nowamanqamu uvamise ukuyintshinga ngewindi ifomu yeligi, kungemangaze ukuvuka inja ebomvu kwaleli qembu. UParker, owazakhela igama esengumgadli ovutha uphondo kwiChiefs eminyakeni embalwa edlule, naye usethubeni lokuziqophela owakhe umlando ngesicoco sakhe sokuqala njengomqeqeshi uma kwenzeka i-The Rockets iphakamisa iNedbank. Ukubeke ngokucacile ukuthi akayifakile emqondweni wakhe eyokuqashwa ngokugcwele kodwa ugxile emsebenzini asanikwe wona njengamanje wokuhola iqembu. “Angikakucabangi lokho. Okwami wukuqinisekisa ukuthi ngenza lo msebenzi engisanikwe wona ukuqinisekisa ukuthi ngiwenza kangcono nangokusemandleni ukufaka umoya wokulwela impumelelo kubadlali. Kungenzeka noma yini kowamanqamu,” kusho uParker owanqoba iNedbank Cup esagijima kwiChiefs. “Njengomqeqeshi osemncane, ngiyafunda usuku nosuku. Luselude uhambo engisazoluhamba kule ndima yokuqeqesha. Ngakho asikho isidingo sokuxhamazela, okumqoka nje wukusebenzisa ithuba enginikwe lona.” Isithombe ISIKHWISHIKHWISHI se-TS Galaxy, uSeluleko Mahlambi

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe U-AKANI Simbine osingathe ngempumelelo iSimbine Classic, ePitoli, usebheke ukuyoyibamba kowe-World Relay Championships, eGaborone, eBotswana, ngempelasonto INSEPHE yomgijimi webanga lika-100m, u-Akani Simbine, ikuqinisekisile ukuthi izobe iyibambe kwi-World Relay Championships ezobanjelwa eBotswana, kule mpelasonto. USimbine (32) ongumsunguli nomhleli weSimbine Classic, okungumjaho wohlobo lwe-track and field ogijinywe okokuqala nonyaka ePilditch Stadium, ePitoli, ngoLwesibili, uzwakalise injabulo nomunyu ngempumelelo yalo mjaho odonse abagijimi abaseqopheleni eliphezulu nezibukeli ebeziphume ngobuningi ukuzowethamela. Uthe okuqale njengephupho kuyena kugcine sekuba yindumezulu yomqhudelwano ogqugquzele abantu abaningi baseNingizimu Afrika ukuthi bakholelwe emaphusheni abo. “Ngijabule ukuthi ube yimpumelelo lo mjaho. Bekugcwele kuchichima ezihlalweni yizibukeli, izingane zibone amaphupho azo efezeka, nabagijimi bakithi bathola ithuba lokuncintisana nezihlabani zabagijimi bamazwe,” kusho uSimbine, oveze isifiso sakhe sokuletha i-Diamond League eNingizimu Afrika ngelinye ilanga. “Ngibonga kakhulu kuwona wonke umuntu ngokukholelwa kuleli phupho lami nokwazi ukuthi into enjengalena ingenzeka. Nginethemba lokuthi singawukhulisa lo mjaho. Lesi kuyesiqalo nje.” Kulo mjaho uSimbine ushaye isikhathi esiwu-9.98 seconds kowandulela owamanqamu ku-100m, okuyisikhathi esimsize ekuzibekiseleni indawo kuma-Commonwealth Games azobanjelwa eGlasgow, eScotland, ngoJulayi 23 kuya ku-Agasti 2. Nakuba uSimbine ehlulekile ukuwunqoba lo mjaho njengoba ephume ekugcineni kowamanqamu ka-100m onqotshwe ngu-Emanuel Eseme waseCameroon, ukuqinisekisile ukuthi uzoyibamba kwi-World Relay Championships ezobanjelwa eGaborone, eBotswana, ngoMgqibelo kuze kube yiSonto. Ukusho lokhu ngemuva kokuba ephume eseqhuga, kunokwesabela ukuthi ulimele. Nokho ukuqinisekisile ukuthi ubebanjwe ngamajaqamba nje. “Akukho okutheni, amajaqamba nje. Indlela engiqale ngayo umjaho iwunyakazile umzimba wami, emva kwalokho wenqaba nokuyilapho engiqale khona ukubanjwa ngamajaqamba. "Ngiyazi ukuthi ama-World Relays ayeza, yingakho ngiqede umjaho (Simbine Classic) sengizigijimela kancane ngoba bengifuna ukwenza isiqiniseko sokuthi umzimba ukahle. Umzimba udinga ukululama.” Kwi-World Relay, uSimbine neqembu lakhe lika-4x10mm banenselelo yokuvikela isicoco abasinqobe nyakenye eGuangzhou, eChina. KwiSimbine Classic, uPrudence Sekgodiso, udle umhlanganiso kwabesifazane kowamanqamu ka-1500m ngesikhathi sika-4 min, 08.93sec, eshiya uKarabo More kwathi uTshepo Tshite wadla umhlanganiso ku-300m kwabesilisa eshiya uLuan Munnik ngesikhathi sika-7min 54.05sec.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UMARCELO Allende weMamelodi Sundowns egadulisa uRodney Maphangule wePolokwane City emdlalweni wePolokwane City emdlalweni weBetway Premiership eSeshego Stadium, ePolokwane, ngoLwesithathu Mamelodi Sundowns (0) 1 IMAMELODI Sundowns ibuyele esicongweni se-log yeBetway Premiership ishaya iPolokwane City ngo 1-0 eSeshego Stadium, ePolokwane, ngoLwesithathu ebusuku. Igoli eliqinisekise ukuthi iSundowns ibuya nawo womathathu amaphuzu ePolokwane livalelwe phakathi uMarcelo Allende ngesiwombe sesibili. Ukunqoba kweSundowns yiPolokwane kusho ukubuyela emgqigqweni wayo wokunqoba njengoba ibisilahle amaphuzu emidlalweni emibili yakamuva ibambana neStellenbosch FC ngo 1-1 neRichards Bay FC ngo 0-0 ngokwehlukana. AmaSandawana aqhwakele kwi-log yePremiership ngamaphuzu awu-61, alandelwe yi-Orlando Pirates endaweni ngawu-59. Azophinda adlale neRise and Shine ngeSonto kowomzuliswano wesibili eLoftus Versfeld Stadium, ePitoli. Njengoba amaSandawana neZimnyama sebelingana ngemidlalo engu-26, lokhu kusho ukuthi le midlalo emine esalele la maqembu iyona esiyocacisa ngelizokhala lemuke nesicoco yize amaSandawana esevule igebe lamaphuzu amabili.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UMGADLI weRichards Bay FC, uLundi Mahala, ongomunye wabadlali abamqoka abathwele amathemba aleli qembu okulwela ukuqeda kwi-Top 8 ekupheleni kwesizini IMIPHUMELA yakamuva isibuyise ithemba kumqeqeshi weRichards Bay FC, uRonnie Gabriel, ngokuphinda izibekisele indawo kwi-Top 8 njengoba selidumela emasumpeni ngokusongwa kwesizini yeBetway Premiership. IBay esendaweni yeshumi kwi-log yePremiership, isalelwe yimidlalo emine - okubalwa kuyo emibili ezoyidlalela ekhaya - ukulwela ukubuyela kwi-MTN8 ihlandla lesibili ngesizini ezayo. NgeSonto iphazamise umgqigqo weMamelodi Sundowns esembangweni wesicoco seligi, iyibamba ngo 1-1 eMhlathuze Sports Complex, eRichards Bay. IBay ibuye namaphuzu ayisishiyagalombili emidlalweni emine yakamuva. “Senza kahle emidlalweni yasekhaya. Obekusikhathaza wukungenzi kahle emidlalweni yethu yasekuhambeni, okuyingakho kusibuyisele ithemba ukubuya namaphuzu amathathu ekuhambeni kwi-TS Galaxy. Ifomu iyanyuka, iqembu liya ngokuya likhula kodwa iligi ingumjaho omude. Ngakho ngibone sithole ifomu ngesikhathi esifanele. Akuvamile ngalesi sikhathi sesizini isiyophela ukudlala imidlalo emine kwiPSL (Premiership) ungahlulwa. Sisalelwe yimidlalo emine futhi ngikholwa wukuthi sisazokwazi ukuba yiqembu okungelula ukulehlula kuze kuphele isizini, izinga lokuzethemba liyenyuka eqenjini,” kusho uGabriel, oqeqesha ngokubambisana noPapi Zothwane. “Bekuvele kungomunye wemigomo yethu kusukela kuqala isizini ukuqeda kwi-Top 8, futhi ngokwezibalo sisengakwazi ukuwufeza lo mgomo wethu kule midlalo esisalele. Ngaphandle kokubukela phansi amaqembu esisazodlala nawo kodwa uma ngibheka imidlalo esisazoyidlala ngikholwa wukuthi sinalo ithuba lokuweba amaphuzu.” INata Rich Boyz okuyisizini yayo yesine le kwiPremiership kulandela ukukhushulelwa kwayo kulesi sigaba ekupheleni kweka-2021/22, idlale okokuqala emqhudelwaneni weMTN8 kule sizini ngokuqeda endaweni yesishiyagalombili ngesizini edlule. Emidlalweni emibili esazoyidlalela ekhaya kwemine eyisalele, izodlala nePolokwane City neSekhukhune United, idlale ekuhambeni neMarumo Gallans neMagesi FC ngokwehlukana. Leli qembu laKwaZulu-Natal eligqishe ngabadlali abasebancane, seliphendule inkundla yasekhaya, uMhlathuze Sports Complex, indawo yokuthwalisa kanzima izitha. Emidlalweni engu--15 eseliyidlalile kule nkundla kusukela ngoSepthemba, lisahlulwe yi-Orbit College kuphela.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe U-DOCTOR Mkhonza no-Ayanda Dlamini abangabaqeqeshi boMvoti FC osethubeni lokuyodlala umdlalo wokuhlunga iqembu elizomela iKwaZulu-Natal kumaPlay-Offs kazwelonke eSafa ABC Motsepe League Image: UMVOTI FC FACEBOOK YIZE izinto zivuna bona ngokuqeda esicongweni kwi-log ka-Stream A weSafa KwaZulu-Natal ABC Motsepe League kodwa umqeqeshi woMvoti FC, uDoctor Mkhonza, ukubeka ngokucacile ukuthi ngeke bawuthathe kancane uMzinto United abazodlala nawo kowokusonga isizini. Umvoti ohlezi esicongweni se-log ngamaphuzu awu-56, udinga iphuzu emdlalweni wokugcina wesizini ka-2025/26, usugadulisana noMzinto eKing Edward Park, eGreytown, ngoMgqibelo ngo-3 ntambama. INjampela esendaweni yesibili kwi-log ngamaphuzu awu-53, kudingeka iwunqobe kumnyama kubomvu umdlalo wayo wokusonga isizini neHellenic ngawo uMgqibelo ngo-3 ntambama, eMthunzini Sports Field, eMthunzini, bese ithandazela ukuthi uMvoti uhlulwe wuMzinto. UMzinto osemsileni kwi-log ka-Stream A, akusekho okudlalelayo njengoba usugawulwe yizembe kulesi sigaba. “Ngeke siwuthathe kancane uMzinto ngoba uyiqembu elisekugcineni kwi-log ngoba lokho kungasifaka enkingeni. Sizowuthatha njengomdlalo omqoka okufanele silwele ukuwunqoba,” kusho uMkhonza oqeqesha ngokubambisana no-Ayanda “Cobra” Dlamini. “Indlela esidlale ngayo kule sizini kusukela iqala kuze kufike manje njengoba sesiyiqeda isizini, isinika ithemba ngokuyodalla amaPlay-Offs. "Osekusele nje wukuthi siwuqedele kahle umsebenzi esiwuqalile, sigweme ukuphoxeka ekugcineni sesibenze ngale ndlela.” UMvoti osahlulwe kanye kule sizini, usethubeni lokudlala umdlalo wokuhlunga iqembu elizomela iKwaZulu-Natal kumaPlay-Offs kazwelonke e-ABC Motsepe League. Amaqembu azodla umhlanganiso ku-Stream A no-Stream B, azodlala owamanqamu wokuhlunga elizomela isifundazwe kwekazwelonke yokuhlungela ukukhuphukela kwiMotsepe Foundation Championship. Ku-Stream B ushisa phansi umbango phakathi koMkhambathi FC noMsinga United, abehlukaniswe ngamaphuzu amabili kuphela. UMkhambathi osazihola phambili ku-Stream B ngamaphuzu awu-52, ulandelwa wuMsinga endaweni yesibili ngawu-50. UMkhambathi udinga amaphuzu amathathu emdlalweni wawo wokugcina neFC Drakensberg, eLambert Park, eMnambithi, ngoMgqibelo ngo-3 ntambama. UMsinga nawo uwadinga ephelele kumnyama kubomvu amaphuzu emdlalweni wokugcina neKwaMashu Durban Knights ngoMgqibelo ngo-3 ntambama, eMzisho Stadium, eMsinga.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UKHULISO Mudau oyisethenjwa seMamelodi Sundowns ezodlala nePolokwane City namuhla ebusuku koweBetway Premiership eSeshego Stadium, ePolokwane UKULAHLA amaphuzu kweMamelodi Sundowns emidlalweni emibili yakamuva yeBetway Premiership, kuyishiye nenselelo yokuvuka izithathe njengoba izobhekana nePolokwane City kabili kulandelana. ISundowns esembangweni oshisa phansi weligi yePremiership ne-Orlando Pirates, iphazanyiswe yiStellenbosch FC emgqigqweni wayo iyibamba ngo 1-1. Iphinde ilahle elinye ithuba lokubuyela esicongweni se-log yePremiership ibambana ngo 1-1 neRichards Bay FC ngeSonto, eMhlathuze Sports Complex, eRichards Bay. AmaSandawana asendaweni yesibili kwi-log yePremiership ngamaphuzu awu-58 ngemuva kwe-Orlando Pirates esaqhwakele ngawu-59. Azotholana phezulu nePolokwane namuhla ngo-7.30 ebusuku, eSeshego Stadium, ePolokwane. Azophinda adudulane nePolokwane kowomzuliswano wesibili ngeSonto ngo-3 ntambama, eLoftus Versfeld Stadium, ePitoli. IRise and Shine ezabalazela ukuhlala kwi-Top 8, kubukeka sekuyiyona esiphethe ukhiye wesicoco seligi yamaSandawana embangweni weligi. Leli qembu laseLimpopo liwaphonsele inselelo amaSandawana ngesizini edlule njengoba liwaguqise ngo 1-0 emzuliswaneni wokuqala wangesizini edlule. Ngakho lokhu kwenza le midlalo emibili elizoyidlala namaSandawana ibhekwe kakhulu ukuthi leli qembu lingakwazi yini ukuphinda liphazamise umgqigqo waleli qembu lasePitoli elisazihambela lodwa ngokudla izicoco zePremiership amasizini elandelana kusukela ngesizini ka-2017/2018. Oyisitobha seSundowns, uKhuliso Mudau, ubona kusemqoka kakhulu kubona ukuvuka bazithathe ngowePolokwane. “Lesi yisikhathi sokuthi sibhekane nomdlalo ngamunye, singazifakeli ingcindezi ngokunye okwenzekayo. "Umdlalo esizowudlala nePolokwane City kuzoba ngumdlalo onzima, ikakhulukazi njengoba sizodlala nayo imidlalo emibili ilandelana ngesikhathi esifushane. "Kodwa kusemqoka ukuthi sinqobe kwiPolokwane, sibuyise ithemba silethe nenjabulo kubalandeli bethu ngemuva kokulahla amaphuzu sidlala ngokulingana imidlalo emibili, okuyinto esingajwayele ukuyenza," usho kanje uMudau.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UNONKULULEKO Mlaba oyingxenye yamaProteas esifazane eya kwiNdebe yoMhlaba ye-T20 e-England naseWales, ngenyanga ezayo UKUKHULA okukhonjiswe ngamaProteas esifazane emidlalweni yakamuva ewuchungechunge ne-India kwenza umqeqeshi, uMandla Mashimbyi, aye kwiNdebe yoMhlaba ye-T20 ngethemba lokuthi lo nyaka kungaba yiwona leli qembu lesizwe eliqeda ngawo ibhadi lokuphunyukwa yisicoco salo mqhudelwano. UMashimbyi ukusho lokhu izolo, ngesikhathi ekhuluma nabezindaba kulandela ukumenyezelwa kwesikwati samaProteas esifazane esiya kwiNdebe yoMhlaba ye-T20 eqala ngoJuni 12 kuze kube nguJulayi 5, e-England naseWales. Leli qembu lesizwe okusale kancane ukuthi lidle umhlanganiso emiqhudelwaneni yakamuva ye-ICC (International Cricket Council) kwiT20, liboshelwe ku-Pool 1. Lizoqala eyoMhlaba ngokubhekana ne-Australia ngoJuni 13 eManchester, kulandele iPakistan, India, Netherlands neBangladesh. Kababaningi abadlali okuthusile ukufakwa kwabo kuleli qembu ngaphandle kukaShabmin Ismail owagcina ukubonakala kwiNdebe yoMhlaba ye-T20 yango-2023. Ukaputeni, uLaura Wolvaardt osefomini enhle kulezi zinsuku, uzoqhubeka nokuhola leli qembu kanti nabadlali okubalwa kubona noNonkululeko Mlaba, Ayabonga Khakha noTumi Sekhukhune babiziwe. “Wonke amaqembu esizwe uma eya kwiNdebe yoMhlaba asuke enethemba lokubuyela ekhaya nesicoco ngakho-ke nakithina kawukho umehluko,” kusho uMashimbyi ethimbeni labezindaba leCricket South Africa (CSA). “Umphumela esiwothole kwi-India (ompetha bomhlaba) muva nje, kufanele usenze sikukholwe ukuthi singabuya naso isicoco e-England naseWales." Sesisonke isikwati samaProteas seNdebe yoMhlaba simi kanje; Laura Wolvaardt (ukaputeni, Fidelity Titans), Tazmin Brits (DP World Lions), Nadine de Klerk (World Sports Betting Western Province), Annerie Dercksen (Garden Route Badgers), Shabnim Ismail (DP World Lions), Sinalo Jafta (DP World Lions), Marizanne Kapp (World Sports Betting Western Province), Ayabonga Khaka (DP World Lions), Sune Luus (Fidelity Titans), Karabo Meso (DP World Lions), Nonkululeko Mlaba (Hollywoodbets Dolphins), Kayla Reyneke (World Sports Betting Western Province), Tumi Sekhukhune (DP World Lions), Chloé Tryon (DP World Lions) noDane van Niekerk (World Sports Betting Western Province).

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UMQEQESHI weMamelodi Sundowns, uMiguel Cardoso, okhononde ngokungesekwa kweqembu lakhe UKUBAMBELELA komqeqeshi weMamelodi Sundowns, uMiguel Cardoso, kwinkolelo yokuthi kukhona abahamba leli qembu laseChloorkop ngemuva ngenhloso yokuqinisekisa ukuthi kalengezi ngenkanyezi yesibili ejezini layo ngeCaf Champions League, kubukeka kungase kumdalele amazinyo abushelelezi kwezinye izingxenye zabalandeli beDowns. Lona ngumuzwa oqapheleke kulandela inkulumo kaCardoso nabezindaba kulandela ukunqoba kweSundowns ngo 7-4 kwiSiwelele FC emdlalweni weBetway Premiership ngoMgqibelo, eLucas Moripe Stadium, ePitoli. Esikhundleni sokujabulela ukuthi iqembu lakhe lizigcine lisesicongweni kwi-log ngaphambi komdlalo wokugcina wesizini ne-TS Galaxy, uCardoso ugxile ekusoleni abathile ngokuputshuzela i-AS FAR yaseMorocco i-video yomdlalo weSundowns weligi neKaizer Chiefs. ISundowns izothi ingaqeda imidlalo yeligi (kusasa ngo-7.30 ebusuku eMbombela Stadium, eNelspruit), iqale amalungiselelo omlenze wokuqala womdlalo wamanqamu weChampions League ne-AS FAR ngeSonto ngo-4 ntambama, eLoftus Versfeld Stadium, ePitoli. “Kunzima ukuba yiSundowns ngoba kuhlale kunenzondo ekulandelayo ekubeni konke okwenziwa yileli qembu kuqhakambisa iNingizimu Afrika,” kusho uCardoso. “Siyayijabulela iwini kodwa amagoli esiwavumele ukuthi angene ngakithi ayibohlisile injabulo (yewini). “Kusekhona umdlalo (ngoLwesibili) njengoba ngempelasonto sidlala omunye wemqoka kunayo yonke kithina. “Kukhona konke lokhu kasizwa sengathi sikuthola konke ukwesekwa okusifanele. Izitha zethu kwiChampions League (i-AS FAR) zine-video egcwele ngezindlela zethu zokudlala eyathunyelwa kuzona ngumuntu othile ngesikhathi sibhekene neKaizer (Chiefs). “Kulungile kodwa sizoqhubeka kunzima kunjalo,” kusho uCardoso. Akaqali uCardoso ukukhala ngokuputshuzelwa kwezitha ulwazi olubucayi kwazise ngoFebhuwari nonyaka, kwaze kwamiswa emsebenzini ilunga lebhentshi leSundowns (uMario Masha) ngoba lisolwa ngokudlulisela ulwazi oluqukethe izinhlelo zikaCardoso kuRulani Mokwena owayesaqeqesha i-MC Alger yase-Algeria eyayizodlala neSundowns. Kuqaphelekile ukuthi emuva kwale nkulumo kaCardoso abalandeli baqhubekile nokuyimunyunga ezinkundleni zokuxhumana kucaca ukuthi bayavumelana ngokuthi lo mqeqeshi wasePortugal wenzisa okomuntu osevele unalo ihawu uma izinto zingahambi kahle kwiligi nakwiChampions League. Bebeshiyelana inkundla abalandeli bebhola ngesikhathi bekhuluma ngoCardoso emakhasini abo ka-X. “Kunzima ukuqonda noma uCardoso ukhuluma iqiniso noma uzama ukudida i-AS FAR ingqondo kodwa kuyaqapheleka ukuthi iqembu lakhe liyoniwa njalo ngaphambi kwemidlalo emqoka,” ku-@Musendzi ku-X.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UMFUNDO Vilakazi osuke ebhentshini washayela iKaizer Chiefs igoli ngesikhathi inqoba kwiSekhukhune United emdlalweni weBetway Premiership Sekhukhune United (0) 0 OMUNYE wabaqeqeshi ababanjiswe umsebenzi kuze kuphele isizini kwiKaizer Chiefs, uKhalil Ben Youssef, ufisa kube kuyagcina ukuthi iqembu elithathwa njengelikhulu njengaleli laseNaturena, lizabalazela ukuzibekisela indawo kwiCaf Confederation Cup. UBen Youssef ukusho lokhu ngaphambi kokuqoqa amaphuzu agcwele kwiSekhukhune United emdlalweni weBetway Premiership izolo ebusuku, ePeter Mokaba Stadium, ePolokwane. Womabili la maqembu kuqale umdlalo enethuba lokumela iPremier Soccer League (PSL) kwiConfed Cup ngesizini ezayo ngokuqeda endaweni yesithathu kwi-log yePremiership. Kube ngubuqhawe bukaTashreeq Morris obuqinisekise indawo yeChiefs kwiConfed Cup ngegoli alishaye ngomzuzu ka-86. Leli goli lilandelwe yiphenathi kaMfundo Vilakazi naye obesanda kungena. “Kufanele sizihluphe ngokuthi iqembu elithathwa njengelikhulu njengeChiefs lilwela okungaphezulu kweConfed Cup kumasizini ezayo,” kusho uBen Youssef kwaSuperSport. “Siyaqonda ukuthi womabili amaqembu abheke umphumela ofanayo kwazise abanga indawo eyodwa kodwa kukithina ukuthi sikhombise ukuthi iChiefs yiqembu elithathwa njengelikhulu. “Sinethuba lokuqoqa amaphuzu athile uma siyinqoba yonke imidlalo esisalele ngakho-ke sihlele lokho. Akufanele nokho kumasizini ezayo ukuthi sikwamukele kalula ukuthi silwela ukuqeda endaweni yesithathu ngoba iChiefs nabalandeli bayo bafanelwe ngokungcono kunalokho,” kusho uBen Youssef. Kudlalwe kwaze kwafika ekhefini lingekho iqembu elikhombisa izimpawu zokuyifuna ngabomvu indawo kwiConfed Cup okufakazelwa ngukuthi onozinti bebezipholele nhlangothi zombili. Isiwombe sesibili siqalwe nguThabo Cele noReeve Frosler abangene ezindaweni zikaThabiso Monyane noSibongiseni Mthethwa abangabuyanga kwesesibili. Ukungena kwalaba badlali kuqondane nokuthi kube sengathi neChiefs iyawukhuphula umdlalo kwaze kwangena noMorris obese kuphele unyaka agcina ukubonakala enkundleni. Ukuqhubeka kokubanda kwalo mdlalo esiwombeni sesibili kuze kwaphela ngamagoli asheshayo ngemizuzu yokugcina ashaywe ngoMorris noVilakazi.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UMDLALI wasemuva weBafana Bafana, uKhulumani Ndamane, owenze amaphutha amabili aholele ekutheni kungene amagoli ngesikhathi bebhekene neSiwelele FC ngempelasonto edlule Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX NAKUBA umqeqeshi weMamelodi Sundowns, uMiguel Cardoso, evuma ukuthi kawazibeki amaphutha akamuva kaKhulumani Ndamane kodwa ngeke ayeke ukusibophela lesi sitobha ngoba yisona sodwa angakwazi ukusisebenzisa kulezi zinsuku. ISundowns izosonga isizini yeBetway Premiership namuhla ngokubhekana ne-TS Galaxy ngo-7.30 ebusuku, eMbombela Stadium, eNelspruit. Iwini yeSundowns kwiGalaxy izoyigcina esicongweni ngamaphuzu amagu-71, bese konke kulala kwi-Orlando Pirates yona ezosalelwa ngemibili. IPirates enamaphuzu angu-65 endaweni yesibili, izoqala umdlalo wayo neDurban City ngoMgqibelo ekhaya, seyikuqonda kahle ekudingayo ukuze iqede indlala yeminyaka engu-14 yesicoco seligi. Ngesikhathi ekhuluma nabezindaba emuva kokunqoba kweSundowns ngo 7-4 kwiSiwelele ngempelasonto, uCardoso uvumile ukuthi uNdamane wenza amaphutha asobala kulezi zinsuku. Kumagoli amane ashaywe yiSiwelele abukeka ezoba wusizo kwiPirates, uNdamane wenze amaphutha amabili lapho ephasele khona isitha kwangena amagoli amabili. Ngaphambi kwalokho, udale iphenathi sekuyophela umdlalo ngesikhathi bembambana ngo 1-1 neStellies. “Okusobala ngoNdamane ngukuthi ukhombisa izimpawu zokukhathala hhayi emzimbeni kuphela kepha nasemqondweni okwenza kube sengathi usalela emuva uma kufanele enze lokhu akujwayele,” kusho uCardoso. “Inkinga esinayo ngukuthi nguyena kuphela isitobha esikhona kwezamaphakathi nenkundla esikwazi ukudlala ngonyawo lwesinxele." Nakuba uCardoso emvikela uNdamane kodwa kungenzeka ukuthi amaphutha akamuva amlahlekisele ngengqayizivele yethuba lokuyodlala kwiNdebe yoMhlaba. UNdamane ngomunye wabadlali okubhekwe ukuthi bathole indawo esikwatini seBafana Bafana sabadlali ababalelwa ku-55 umqeqeshi, uHugo Broos, azoqoka kubona esezoya kwiNdebe yoMhlaba obekulindeleke ukuthi sihanjiswe kwiFifa. Izolo bekuwusuku lokugcina lwamaqembu esizwe lokuhambisa kwiFifa lolu hlwa lwabadlali okuthiwa kufanele lube nonozinti okungenani abane. Okusemqoka ngalolu hla wukuthi akekho umdlali ongekho kulona ozoqhamuka esefakwa kweseNdebe yoMhlaba ngisho ngabe kukhona abalimalayo kulelo qemu lesizwe. NgoMeyi 25, amaqembu ayaphoqwa ukuba adedele abadlali bawo abasemaqenjini esizwe aya kwiNdebe yoMhlaba eCanada, Mexico nase-United States of America (USA). Lolu suku seluyolandelwa nguJuni 1 noma 2 lapho iFifa iyomemezela khona wonke amaqembu esizwe abadlali abangu-23.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UTEBOHO Mokoena okhonjwe nguTeko Modise njengokhiye weBafana Bafana kwiNdebe yoMhlaba OMUNYE wabadlali ababethwele amathemba eBafana Bafana kwiNdebe yoMhlaba yeFifa yango-2010 eMzansi, uTeko Modise, ukhombe ifomu kaTeboho Mokoena weMamelodi Sundowns njengokhiye waleli qembu lesizwe wokugwema ukubalwa namazwe aphume ekuseni ekubeni umqhudelwano unamazwe angu-48. IBafana ifakwe ku-Group A walo mqhudelwano osekusele amasonto ambalwa ukuthi uqale eMexico, Canada nase-United States of America (USA). Ngaphandle kobunzima beqoqo, iBafana iyona evula umqhudelwano ngokubhekana nosokhaya iMexico ngoJuni 11 e-Azteca Stadium, eMexico City. Emuva kwalokho, izobhekana neSouth Korea, ivale iqoqo neCzech Republic. Njengoba iNdebe yoMhlaba inamaqembu angu-48 okokuqala emlandweni, kusho ukuthi kwandiswe ngamazwe angu-16 esibalweni esejwayelekile. Lokhu kuzitolika ngokuthi azokuba ngu-12 amaqoqo esewonke, bese kuthi amazwe amabili aqede phezulu kuwona (amaqoqo) adlulele kwi-last 32. Kuzophinde kugcwaliswe ngamanye amazwe ayisishiyagalombili azoqeda esendaweni yesithathu ngezibalo ezingcono. UModise, obekhuluma ohlelweni lwakwaSuperSport lokukhangisa ngeNdebe yoMhlaba ngoLwesibili, ubegxilile ekutheni iBafana inethuba njengoba kuzodlula amazwe amathathu eqoqweni. “Kangingabazi ukuthi iBafana izodlulela kwi-last 32 kodwa konke kulele ekutheni singakuvumeli ukuthi umqhudelwano usijike endleleni esifuna ukudlala ngayo,” kusho uModise. “Uma sizovumelana ngokuthi konke sizokwenza ngendlela esiyijwayele kuyofana nokuthi siyavumelana ukuthi uMokoena nguyena ukhiye. “UMokoena nguyena injini yeBafana kulo mqhudelwano kwazise lo msebenzi uwenza ngempumelelo kwiSundowns emidlalweni emqoka nesezingeni lomhlaba neBafana. “Ukhiye weBafana ulele kuMokoena ngoba ukuba semdlalweni kwakhe kuvusa abadlali abafana no-Oswin (Appollis) noLyle (Foster) ukuthi bakwazi ukusebenzisa ijubane labo. “Unamaphasi amahle kanti sonke siyazi ukuthi ithuba lokushayela ipali akaliyeki. Sengiyibuke kaningi iBafana neSundowns ngokwahlukana, yingakho ngiphuma noMokoena njengokhiye wethu wokusidlulisa kuleli qoqo. “Anzima amaqembu esiqhathwe nawo kodwa lokhu ngeke kuwenze ukuthi asizele ngobuso ngoba abadlali abahlanganisa naye uMokoena, bangabanye babahlonishwayo emhlabeni ngamagalelo abo."

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UMQEQESHI we-Orlando Pirates u-Abdeslam Ouaddou ovume eyokunukelwa yisicoco seligi emakhaleni NAKUBA ekuvuma ukuthi sesimnukela emakhaleni isicoco seligi umqeqeshi we-Orlando Pirates, u-Abdeslam Ouaddou, kodwa ushumayela ivangeli lokungayiqali imibhiyozo kuze kube sekusemthethweni ukuthi bangompetha. IPirates esele ngomdlalo kwiMamelodi Sundowns (eqhwakele), inqobe ngo 3-0 wamagoli kaPatrick “Tito” Maswanganyi, Kamogelo Sebelebele no-Oswin Appollis kwiMagesi FC koweBetway Premiership ngoMgqibelo ebusuku ePeter Mokaba Stadium, ePolokwane. Le wini isondeze iPirates kwiSundowns esicongweni se-log njengoba isimbalwa imidlalo esele ukuba kuphele isizini ka-2025-2026. IPirates neSundowns abaqala ngokuqala kwayo isizini ukubanga isicoco seligi bangase baqede belingana uma beyinqoba yonke imidlalo yabo esele kodwa iPirates inethuba lokuba ngompetha kwazise ivunwa yizibalo zamagoli. ISundowns iyayisonga isizini yayo kusasa ne-TS Galaxy eMbombela Stadium, kodwa iPirates izobe isasalelwe ngowasekhaya neDurban City ngempelsonto ezayo nowokugcina ekuhambeni ne-Orbit College FC ngoMeyi 23. “Siyakhuleka kuMdali ukuthi sisike iphethini eqenjini lethu leDDC (DStv Diski Challenge) sisidle nathi lesi sicoco ngoba iminyaka engu-14 yisikhathi eside ukuthi abalandeli bePirates bangabuka abamanye amaqembu bebaklolodela ngokuhlabana kwamaqembu abo,” kusho u-Ouaddou. “Sekuseduze kodwa umsebenzi kawukaqedwa ngakho-ke kusemqoka ukuyimisa okwamanje imibhiyozo kuze kube semthethweni ukuthi singompetha. “Okumnandi kakhulu ngalokhu okwenzekayo ngukuthi iPirates iphethwe ngabantu okubafanele ukuthi balandelwe yimpumelelo emihle kumasizini onke njengamanye amaqembu athathwa njengamakhulu. “Abadlali abasemabhukwini ePirates kule sizini bayamangalisa ngoba isimo abakusona nethuba lomlando abami phambi kwalo bakukhombisa ngabakwenza enkundleni ukuthi bayakuqonda. “Siyanuka emakhaleni isicoco kodwa wonke amandla esinawo kufanele siwafake emidlalweni emibili esisalele. “Kumqoka ukuya kule midlalo esele ngomqondo ohluzekile kwazise sibhekene kuyona namaqembu alwela indawo kwi-Top 8 nasesigabeni esikhulu sebhola laseNingizimu Afrika ngokwahlukana,” kusho u-Ouaddou.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: AMABHOKOBHOKO abaneminyaka engaphansi kwengu-20 kulandela ukudla kwabo isicoco se-U/20 Rugby Championship ngempelasonto eGqeberha Image: SAJUNIORRUGBY/X UKUDLA isicoco se-U/20 Rugby Championship kwamaBaby Boks ngempelasonto, kufanele ukuba kuphelezelwe ngumyalezo okhumbuza leli qembu lesizwe ngobuningi bamabhawodi okusafanele liwaqinise ngaphambi kokuqala imicabango yokuvikela isicoco seNdebe yoMhlaba. Lokhu kuphume emlonyeni womqeqeshi waleli qembu, uKevin Foote, kulandela ukubambana kwalo ngo 29-29 nezimbangi iNew Zealand, emdlalweni obuqinisekisa isicoco seRugby Championship emdlalweni obuseGqeberha, ngempelasonto edlule. INingizimu Afrika ifike kulo mdlalo ivele idinga iphuzu ukuze yethweswe umqhele we-U/20 Rugby Championship okokuqala ngqa emlandweni. Isifundo uFoote athe uphume naso kulo mqhudelwano ukuthi iqembu lakhe kalikho esimweni abecabanga ukuthi likusona kwazise kukhona lapho okusafanele alungise khona. “Bekufanele siwunqobe kalula umdlalo weNew Zealand kodwa senza amaphutha amaningi nokuyiwona angikhumbuze ngobuningi bezinto okusafanele sizibophisise ngaphambi kokuqala ukuvikela isicoco seyoMhlaba,” kusho uFoote. “Bekuvele kusezinhlelweni zethu ukuwina iChampionship kulo nyaka kodwa esikubheke kakhulu ngukuvikela isicoco sethu soMhlaba nengingangabazi ukuthi kuzoba nzima. “Kusicacele ngendlela esinqobe ngayo iChampionship ukuthi kunamabhawodi amaningi okufanele siwaqinise ngaphambi kokuqala kweNdebe yoMhlaba." INingizimu Afrika iqale umqhudelwano ivele ithwelwe ngeqoma kodwa umdlalo wokugcina ulikhumbuzile leli qembu lesizwe ukuthi kalikafiki kuleli qophela elizitshela ukuthi selikulona. INew Zealand ebambe iqembu lakuleli ngo 29-29 ngoMgqibelo, iqale lo mqhudelwano inganikwe lutho nokufakazelwe ngeminye yemiphumela yayo njengokukhala ngaphansi kwi-Argentina. AmaBhokobhoko amancane wona aqale umqhudelwano evele ethishwe ukuba awudle kwazise abesefomini enhle ukuwedlula wonke amazwe kanti imidlalo ibisekhaya kuwona. INdebe yoMhlaba ka-U/20 izodlalelwa khona eGqeberha, kusukela ngoJulayi 1.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: U-JURENZO Julius weHollywoodbets Sharks eshaya enye yama-try akhe amathathu emdlalweni we-United Rugby Championship (URC) UKUBHUBHUDLA kweHollywoodbets Sharks ngo 46-7 iBenetton yase-Italy emdlalweni owandulela owokugcina we-United Rugby Championship (URC) kuchazwe njengeholo labalandeli abawe bevuka naleli qembu laseThekwini, kule sizini, baphinda bathola nesithombe sokuthi liqhakaze kangakanani ikusasa lalo kumasizini ezayo. Lokhu kushiwo yinhloko yabaqeqeshi kwiSharks u-JP Pietersen kulandela ingcwenga yomdlalo yize ubungasasho lutho. Kulo mdlalo kugqame abadlali abancane njengoJurenzo Julius. ISharks ishaye ama-try ayisishiyagalombili kulo mdlalo obashiye bechwaza abalandeli abebephume ngezinkani ngoMgqibelo ntambama, eHollywoodbets King’s Park Stadium, eThekwini. UPietersen othathe umsebenzi maphakathi nezizini kuJohn Plumtree, uzamile ukuyibuyisela emgqeni inqola kodwa kusemqoka nokukhumbula ukuthi kunesikhathi lapho eke waphoqeleka khona ukudlala ngaphandle kwabadlali abangu-22 abebelimele. UJulius owaqokwa kowe-Junior Springbok Player of The Year ngesizini edlule ushayele iSharks ama-try amathathu. Ubegqamile kulo mdlalo noZekhethelo Siyaya oneminyaka engu-18 osuswe kwi-fullback wafakwa kwi-flyhalf nakhona wafika wagqama. “Umuntu oqalayo ukusibona sidlala angazitshela ukuthi sisembangwnei wesicoco kanti lutho, sibe nomdlalo omuhle kwisizini ebinezingqinamba eizningi,” kusho uPietersen ethimbeni labezindaba leSharks. “Okwehla kahle nakakhulu ukuthi sibaholele abalandeli bethu abahlale benathi noma sekusobala ukuthi kasenzi ngendlela efanele ukwesekwa yibona. “Ngiyafisa ukuthi baqhubeke nokwenza lokhu kodwa nginethemba lokhuthi abakubone kulo mdlalo kubakhuthazile ngokungazuzwa yiqembu kumasizini ezayo. “Badlale kahle abafana abancane abaningi. Ngifisa ukuthi lokhu kungagcini ngokukhuthaza bona (abadlali) kepha kuvukuze okuthile kubalandeli ngoba bebona ukuthi liqhakaze kangakanani ikusasa leSharks ngokwabadlali abancane esinabo emabhukwini,” kusho uPietersen. Amanye ama-try eSharks shaywe nguSiya Kolisi, Andre Esterhuizen, Edwill van der Merwe noLitelihe Bester.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UTSHEGOFATSO Mabasa we-Orlando Pirates obolekiswe kwiStellenbosch FC kuze kuphele isizini I-ORLANDO Pirates izowugijima neStellenbosch FC "ibanjelwe" umdlalo weBetway Premiership wokunciphisa igebe lamaphuzu eliphakathi kwayoneMamelodi Sundowns esicongweni se-log kwazise izisindisile ebungozini bomgadli embolekise kwiStellenbosch, uTshegofatso Mabasa. Lo mdlalo obhekwe ngabomvu umphumela wakhona kubathandi bebhola laseMzansi, uzodlalwa namuhla ngo-7.30 ebusuku e-Athlone Stadium, eKapa. IPirates esele ngomdlalo, ilandela emuva kwiSundowns ngamaphuzu amahlanu esicongweni se-log yePremiership njengoba isizini izosongwa ngasekupheleni kwenyanga. IBucs egcine ukuba senkundleni ngasekupheleni kwenyanga edlule emdlalweni ebambane kuwona neKaizer Chiefs ngo 1-1 e-FNB Stadium, izodinga amaqhinga okubuya namaphuzu amathathu kuleli qembu eliholwa nguGavin Hunt. UMabasa ophelelwa yinkontileka nePirates emasontweni ambalwa ezayo, ngeke adlale namuhla ngenxa yesivumelwano esiphakathi kweZimnyama neStellies esivimbela ukuthi abhekane nazo. Yize iPirates yayingakwazi okuzokwenzeka ngesikhathi ibeka lo mbandela ekubolekaneni kwayo neStellies kodwa isivuna izithelo njengoba isizobhekana naleli qembu laseKapa, engekho uMabasa osekhombisa ukubuyelwa yifomu yakhe. Kusukela uMabasa efikile kwiStellies, usephenduke omunye wabadlali bayo abamqoka kule sizini okubukeka sengathi zidonsa kanzima kuyona ezikaHunt. Lo mgadli iPirates ebolekise ngaye esesele ngamagoli ayisishiyagalombili ngaphambi kokufica irekhodi lomdlali oshaye amagoli amaningi eliphethwe nguBennedict Vilakazi, useyibhakuzise amahlandla amane inethi kwiStellies emidlalweni yeligi engu-11. Lokhu kuwubufakazi bokuthi iPirates iyona esethubeni lokuqoqa amaphuzu amqoka eKapa, kwazise isikhali seStellies esikhulu sizowubuka nabalandeli umdlalo. Ngesikhathi iStellies ibhekene neSundowns muva nje, uMabasa usuke ebhentshini waba yiqhawe lePirates engaqondile, eshaya phakathi iphenathi ephuca ompetha beligi amaphuzu amabili ngemizuzu yokugcina yomdlalo. “Kuyajabulisa ukuthola umdlali wohlobo lukaMabasa, yikhona nje ukuthi kunezikhathi lapho singeke sivumekele khona ukumsebenzisa ngisho ngabe simdinga kangakanani,” kwasho uHunt ngoJanuwari, uMabasa eqeda ukushaya igoli lakhe lokuqala kwiStellies.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UMQEQESHI weMamelodi Sundowns uMiguel Cardoso NAKUBA kungamhleli kahle umqeqeshi weMamelodi Sundowns, uMiguel Cardoso, ukuthi bazobhekana neKaizer Chiefs ephumule ngokwanele kodwa lokhu akusho ukuthi bazothambisa kusukela esikimini abazoqala ngaso umdlalo kuya endleleni abazobe behlasela ngayo. UCardoso ukusho lokhu kwabezindaba kulandela ukunweba kwezakhe igebe esicongweni se-log yeBetway Premiership ngomphumela oncomekayo abawuthole kwiPolokwane City ngeSonto ntambama eLoftus Versfeld Stadium. ISundowns esalelwe yimidlalo yeligi emithathu ishoda ngamaphuzu ayisishiyagalombili ukuthi isonge ngesicoco sayo sesishiyagalolunye kulandelana. Indlela yaBafana Ba’Style kumele idlule kwiChiefs abazodlala nayo ngoLwesithathu ngo-7.30 ntambama kuyona le nkundla yasePitoli (Loftus Versveld). Ubhekwe ngabomvu umphumela walo mdlalo weSundowns neChiefs kwazise abaxhubemene ne-Orlando Pirates esendaweni yesibili kwi-log nesele ngomdlalo bawuthatha njengokuyiwona yiwona oyithemba labo lokugcina ngesicoco. “Nakuba bengigxile kwiPolokwane ezinsukwini ezedlule kodwa izinhloli zeqembu seziluqoqe lonke ulwazi esiludingayo ukuze sizothola umphumela ovuna thina kwiChiefs,” kusho uCardoso esithangamini nabezindaba. “Ngeke sikubalekele ukuthi sibhekene neqembu elithathwa njengelikhulu emdlalweni olandelayo ngakho-ke kuyasiphoqa ukuya kuwona ngenhlonipho. “Inhlonipho esithi sizoya ngayo kwiChiefs kayisho ukuthi sizozithambisa kulo mdlalo kumbe sizokwehlisa endleleni esihlasela ngayo kulezi zinsuku. “Isimo esikusona siphoqa ukuthi sihlohle imbudlu yamagoli ngisho ngabe kubekwa liphi iqembu phambi kwethu. “Kubalulekile nokuqaphela ukuthi ezinsukwini ezedlule besimatasatasa nemidlalo enzima nemqoka kodwa iChiefs ibinethuba lonke lokusilungisela njengoba yona yagcina enkundleni ngomdlalo weSiwelele FC (ngo-Ephreli). “Kawukho uphawini wokucasha ngokuthi imidlalo ithothene ngoba sisemabhukwini eSundowns ngakho-ke uma sekuphele lo mdlalo neChiefs ngibheke ukuthi amaphuzu amathathu asale kithina kwazise yithina futhi esidlalela ekhaya,” kusho uCardoso.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: ABAQEQESHI ababanjiswe umsebenzi kwiKaizer Chiefs uCedric Kaze noKhalil Ben Youssef NGAPHANSI kobuholi obubanjiswe uKhalil Ben Youssef waseTunisia noCedric Kaze waseBurundi, iKaizer Chiefs isemgqeni wokuqoqa isibalo samaphuzu esikhulu kunawo wonke amasizini kusukela yawina isicoco seligi yeBetway Premiership ngeka-2014-2015 iqeqeshwa nguStuart Baxter. Nakuba umgqigqo weChiefs wokungehlulwa emidlalweni eyisikhombisa yeligi unqanyulwe yiSiwelele FC ngoLwesithathu kodwa leli qembu laseNaturena lisenethuba lokuqeda isizini nesibalo samaphuzu osekuneminyaka engu-11 lagcina ukufika kusona. Ngesikhathi iChiefs imemezela ukuthi kuzoqhubeka uBen Youssef noKaze emuva kokuxosha uNasreddine Nabi, kwakuhlukene imibono ngenxa yamava alaba baqeqeshi abebefike omunye ezosiza lo mqeqeshi waseTunisia, omunye ezomtolikela. Njengoba isizini isiyela emaphethelweni, isinqumo seChiefs sokugcina uBen Youssef noKaze sibukeka njengesasiphusile ngenxa yendawo iqembu elikuyona kwi-log nesibalo samaphuzu. Kumasizini amabili adlule, iChiefs ihlulwe wukungena kwi-Top 8 kodwa kulokhu isibalwa namaqembu azodlala kwiMTN8 ngesizini ezayo ekubeni isasalelwe yimidlalo emine kuphele isizini yePremiership. Ngaphezu kwalokho, inethuba lokubuyela kwiCaf Confederation eyidlale kule sizini ngenxa yokuwina iNedbank Cup ngedlule. UBen Youssef noKaze basemgqeni wokwedlula ngisho isibalo samaphuzu angu-57 iChiefs eyawaqoqa iholwa ngu-Ernst Middendorp ngesikhathi idedela isicoco seligi ngosuku lokugcina ngesizini ka-2019-2020. Lokhu kuqubula umbuzo ngekusasa likaBen Youssef noKaze kuMakhosi kwazise abazobe bekwenzile kwehlule inqwaba yabaqeqeshi abahlonishwayo ebholeni laseNingizimu Afrika. Uma iChiefs iyinqoba yonke imidlalo eyisalele izoqeqa inamaphuzu angu-59 okuzobe kuyisibalo esenza uKaze noBen Youssef babengcono kunoSteve Komphela (50), Giovani Solinas/Middendorp (39), Gavin Hunt (36), uStuart Baxter esebuya ihlandla lesibili (47), Arthur Zwane (44), Molefi Ntseki/Cavin Johnson noNabi (32). Kusukela kwiChiefs kaBaxter yango-2014/2015 eyaqeda isizini inamaphuzu angu-69, akekho omunye umqeqeshi oseke wasondela kulokhu ngaphandle kukaMiddendorp owaphoxeka nabalandeli ngo-2019/2020. Imidlalo emine esalele uKaze noBen Youssef ingase ibe nomthelela ngezinqumo ezinzima okufanele zithathwe ngabaphathi baleli qembu laseNaturena. Nakuba kunjalo kodwa konke kulele ekutheni iChiefs yenzenjani kweyisalele neMamelodi Sundowns, Sekhukhune United naMaZulu FC ekuhambeni ngaphambi kokusonga ekhaya ngeChippa United.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UMGADLI weMamelodi Sundowns uLebo Mothiba ongenabo abalandeli abaningi ABAKHOHLWE ukuthi bazophumelela abazama ukunyundela umgadli weMamelodi Sundowns, uLebo Mothiba, kumqeqeshi waleli qembu laseChloorkop, uMiguel Cardoso, ngoba ngeke baphumelele. Lawa ngamazwi kaCardoso awatshele abezindaba ngenhloso yokuvikela uMothiba odlale ngephenathi ngesikhathi benqoba ngengcacamezela ka 1-0 kwiPolokwane City ngoLwesithathu ebusuku eSeshego Stadium, ePolokwane. Bekumqoka ukuthi iSundowns inqobe ngamagoli angaphezulu kwelilodwa njengoba isemjahweni wesicoco seligi oshisa phansi ne-Orlando Pirates. Ngokunqoba kwiPolokwane, leli qembu laseChloorkop libuyele esicongweni se-log. ISundowns inethuba lokulinweba igebe lamaphuzu lihlale kwamahlanu esicongweni njengoba izophinda nePolokwane ngeSonto ngo-3 ntambama eLoftus Versfeld Stadium, ePitoli. UMothiba obesanda kungena usize iSundowns ngokuyakhela igoli elishaywe nguMarcelo Allende egcine inqobe ngalo. Emuva kwalokho, wehlulwe wukushaya phakathi iphenathi evinjwe ngonyawo ngunozinti wePolokwane ezama ukuyikha ngendlela esakutayela. Ukuyishaya phakathi kwakhe bekuzokwehlisa isikweletu samagoli abasele ngawo kwiPirates. Kuqale usaqhubeka umdlalo ukugxekwa kukaMothiba ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ngendlela athathe ngayo iphenathi. Kusukela uMothiba afika kwiSundowns esuka eFrance ngesizini edlule akukho okutheni asekwenzele leli qembu. Okugqamile ngoMothiba ngukuthi ungomunye wabadlali azifelayo ngabo uCardoso kodwa iSundowns usayishayele igoli elilodwa kule sizini emidlalweni yeligi engu-11. Kunemidlalo lapho uCardoso edlalisa khona uMothiba ngisho kubonakala ukuthi kudingeka ijubane lika-Iqraam Rayners (ongawuqedanga umdlalo wePolokwane). UCardoso uzichaze njengomuntu ongayibonanga kahle indlela uMothiba athathe ngayo iphenathi kodwa ubengakungabazi ukuthi ukungangeni kwayo bekungaxhumene nokuzithwala komdlali kumbe izinga lakhe. “Kabakhohlwe abacabanga ukuthi bazonyundela uMothiba kimina ngoba ungomunye wabadlali abamqoka kulokhu esizama ukukwenza kwiSundowns,” kusho uCardoso. “Kangingabazi ukuthi ubezama ukuyishaya phakathi iphenathi futhi akayigejanga ngoba etayela kumbe ekhombisa izimpawu zokuzithela ngabandayo. “Iwini esiyitholile ivele ngaye uMothiba, ngakho-ke abacabanga ukuthi kukhona okuzoshintsha ngenxa yephenathi kabakhohlwe ngoba lokho ngeke kwenzeke."

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: U-ITUMELENG Khune noBrandon Petersen ngesikhathi besasebenza ndawonye kwiKaizer Chiefs UNOZINTI wodumo kwiKaizer Chiefs nakwiBafana Bafana, u-Itumeleng Khune, ubona uBrandon Petersen kunguyena okufanele abange ijezi noRonwen Williams eqenjini lesizwe kwiNdebe yoMhlaba, athole nomklomelo kanozinti ovelele, iBetway Premiership Goalkeeper of the Season. UKhune owayidla cishe yonke imiklomela yonozinti ebholeni laseMzansi ngaphambi kokuwagaxa emgibeni amagilavu, ubekhuluma nabezindaba emuva komdlalo wabakhaya osekungumlando ukuthi iChiefs idlale ngokulingana ngo 1-1 ne-Orlando Pirates. IChiefs kufanele ibonge uPetersen ngephuzu elithole kulo mdlalo kwazise lo nozinti waseKapa oneminyaka engu-31 ubudala, uvimbe amabhola amaningi amabi, wagcina eqokwe njengomdlali ovelele kulo mdlalo. UPetersen ungomunye wonozinti abagqamile kule sizini okufakazelwa ukuthi ubalwa nabazihola phambili ngokunqaba namagoli kwiligi. Njengoba sekusele izinsuku ukuthi umqeqeshi weBafana, uHugo Broos, amemezele isikwati azoya ngaso kwiNdebe yoMhlaba, uKhune ujoyine abalandeli ababona lo nozinti weChiefs kumfanele ukungena endizeni ebheke eMexico, Canada nase-United States of America (USA). “Umehluko phakathi kokuthi iChiefs ihlale endaweni yesithathu kwi-log nokuthi ingabi ngaphandle kwe-Top 8 yindlela uPetersen ayilwela ngayo kusukela kuqale isizini. “Uqokwe kufanele njengovelele emdlalweni wabakhaya kodwa okwangijabulisa nakakhulu ukuthi akayena unozinti okhuphula izinga uma kuyimidlalo emikhulu kuphela. “Uhlale eyihola njengesibani iChiefs. Okumnandi kakhulu uPetersen akwenze emdlalweni wabakhaya ukuthi uBroos uzibonele ngawakhe," kusho uKhune. “Ofuna ukwazi ukuthi kungani iChiefs yashaywa yiPirates ngo 3-0 kowabakhaya wangoFebhuwari, yingoba uPetersen wayengekho ngenxa yokugula. “Ngokwami kufanele ngabe kayisakhulunywa indaba yokuthi uPetersen uyaya kwiNdebe yoMhlaba noma cha kepha kufanele ngabe kukhulunywa ukuthi ngubani ozoqala imidlalo kwiBafana kweyoMhlaba phakathi kwakhe noRonza (Williams). “Ngiyaziqhenya ngoBrandon (Petersen) ngoba ngiyazazi izingqinamba ake abhekana nazo kwazise kunezingxenye zabalandeli ebezimqhathanisa nonozinti beChiefs baphambilini. “Ungumholi kwiChiefs futhi kufanele kuqokwe yena kowe-Goalkeeper of the Season ngoba ubuqhawe bakhe bufana ncamashi nobalaba abalishayela amagoli amqoka leli qembu."

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UNOZINTI weKaizer Chiefs, uBrandon Petersen, usethubeni lokuthola indawo esikwatini seBafana Bafana esizodlala kwiNdebe yoMhlaba ngoJuni Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX SEKUFIKE isikhathi sokuthi umqeqeshi weBafana Bafana, uHugo Broos, ashintshe umqondo ngabadlali beKaizer Chiefs ngoba sebebaningi okunzima ukuziba ukuthi bafanelwe yindawo eqenjini eliya kwiNdebe yoMhlaba ezoba seCanada, Mexico nase-United States of America (USA) ngoJuni. Lona wumbono welinye lamabamba abaqeqeshi kwiChiefs, uKhalil Ben Youssef, awutshele abezindaba emuva kokubambana ngo 1-1 ne-Orlando Pirates emdlalweni wabakhaya ngempelasonto edlule. Ukuzitshwa nguBroos kwabadlali beChiefs kuba sematheni ngaso sonke isikhathi uma ezomemezela isikwati. Kuyaqapheleka nokho ukuthi ezikwatini ezimbili zalo mqeqeshi waseBelgium ezidlale kwi-Africa Cup of Nations (Afcon) bebengabonwa nangokhalo abadlali baMakhosi. Kwi-Afcon yaseMorocco uMduduzi Shabalala weChiefs wayekubadlali okwakucushwe ngabo. Yize ukushiya ngaphandle abadlali baMakhosi kumakhela inzondo kubalandeli baleli qembu laseNaturena kodwa uBroos ubengakufihli ukuthi isizathu sakhe wukuthi akamboni oseqophelweni lomhlaba kuleli qembu laseNaturena. Ngokusho kukaBroos ngesikhathi ememezela iBafana ngaphambi kwemidlalo yobungani nePanama ngenyanga edlule, unozinti weChiefs uBrandon Petersen ubesethubeni lokuthola indawo kulesi sikwati kodwa wasala ngaphandle ngenxa yokugula okuphoqe ukuthi ayohlizwa esibhedlela. Lo nozinti osekungumlando ukuthi usebuyele esikimini seChiefs, ugile izimanga kowabakhaya waze waqokwa njengomdlali ovelele. Okuhle ngalokhu wukuthi uPetersen ukwenze phambi kwakhe uBroos obesenkundleni. Emuva komdlalo uBen Youssef uthumele umyalezo kuBroos ethi akuyena uPetersen yedwa okufanele abheke ngakuyena kwiChiefs uma eseqoka isikwati seNdebe yoMhlaba ngoba bayangqongqoza oBradley Cross, Lebohang Maboe noThabiso Monyane. “Ngokwami bacela kwabahlanu abadlali beChiefs engibona kubafanele ukuthi bangene endizeni ebheke kwiNdebe yoMhlaba neBafana,” kusho uBen Youssef. “Kufanele ukuthi kuzoba yisinqumo okunzima ukusithatha kuBroos ngoba kwiChiefs iyodwa bane kumbe bahlanu okufanele bangasali kwiNdebe yoMhlaba. “Kasinawo amandla okuphikisa uBroos ngezizathu zakhe kodwa uPetersen ngokwami wayevele ekulungele ukuba yingxenye yeBafana engakaxinwa nawukugula. “Ngicabanga ukuthi yinto efanayo nakuCross, Maboe noMonyane kodwa siyamethemba umqeqeshi." IFifa inqume ukuthi izikwati zeNdebe yoMhlaba ezisazophundlwa zithunyelwe kuyona ngoMeyi 13. UBroos uzomemezela isikwati sabadlali abangu-55 emasontweni azayo. IFifa inqume ukuthi wonke amaqembu adedele abadlali ngoMeyi 26. NgoJuni 1 iFifa ilindele ukuthi wonke amaqembu ayinike uhla lwabadlali abangu-23 kuya ku-26 azodlala ngabo kwiNdebe yoMhlaba.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: ISITOBHA seKaizer Chiefs, u-Aden McCarthy, esibheke iwini kwiSiwelele FC UMPHUMELA weSiwelele FC wakamuva ibhekene ne-Orlando Pirates kwiBetway Premiership kufanele usebenze njengesixwayiso kwiKaizer Chiefs ngobunzima ezobhekana nabo emdlalweni weBetway Premiership namuhla ngo-7.30 ebusuku, eFree State Stadium, eBloemfontein. Lesi yisexwayiso sesitobha seChiefs, u-Aden McCarthy, ebesikhuluma ngobumqoka bokuqoqa amaphuzu kwiSiwelele ngesikhathi silumana indlebe nethimba lezindaba leChiefs. Amakhosi azobhekana neSiwelele eshayela phezulu kulandela ukuphazamisa kwawo iPirates embangweni wesicoco seligi oshubile neMamelodi Sundowns. IChiefs ayisazi isibhaxu emidlalweni eyisikhombisa yakamuva. Iwine eyisihlanu, yadlala ngokulingana kwemibili. NgokukaMcCarthy, iSiwelele izoba yingozi kubona uma bezoyiyela ngobuso njengoba isanda kuphazamisa iPirates. Leli qembu eliphekwa nguLehlohonolo Seema, lafika e-Orlando Amstel Arena, eSoweto lenza okungajwayelekile ngesikhathi libuya nephuzu ngegoli elashaywa ngumdlali wakudala wePirates, uVincent Pule. “Ubufakazi bokuthi unzima kangakanani umdlalo esiya kuwona bulele kumphumela otholwe yiSiwelele ngesikhathi ibhekene nePirates muva nje,” kusho uMcCarthy. “Ngiwumqemane njengoba ngidlalile kowabakhaya kodwa ngaphambi kwawo kukhona ebengingakuzwa kahle okusondelene nokudonseka komsipha. “Engingakusho wukuthi bengingalimele kepha bengiphunyuzwa ukugwema ukuthi kuze konakale kuye phambili. “Ngizijabulela mina kakhulu ngoba ukudlala eBloemfontein kimina kusho lukhulu kwazise kulapho ubaba wami (uFabian McCarthy) aqala khona. Siya kulo mdlalo ngokuzethemba kodwa lokhu akusho ukuthi kufanele siyiyele ngobuso (iSiwelele). “Banenqwaba yabadlali beqophelo eliphezulu nokufanele sibaqaphe ngeso lokhozi. Akusekuningi esikuyela emidlalweni ngaphandle kwamaphuzu agcwele kwazise nesizini isiyela emaphethelweni." IChiefs ehlulwe wukungena kwi-MTN8 amasizini amabili elandelana, ibukeka isendleleni ebheke kwiCaf Confederation Cup amasizini amabili elandelana. Isendaweni yesithathu ngamaphuzu angu-47 emidlalweni engu-25. Imiswe kabi ngaMaZulu asendaweni yesine ngamaphuzu angu-42 emidlalweni engu-26. Amakhosi adinga ukuqeda endaweni yesithathu ukuze ezobuyela kwiConfederation Cup. Emabhukwini eSiwelele kukhona abadlali ababolekiswe yiChiefs okunguSamkelo Zwane noHappy Mashiane abalizwa ngendaba ijezi kuleli qembu.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UKAMOGELO Sebelebele obe yiqhawe le-Orlando Pirates ngokuyilamulela emdlalweni wabakhaya neKaizer Chiefs kwiBetway Premiership UMDLALI we-Orlando Pirates osephenduke isithenjwa, uKamogelo Sebelebele, uveze ukuthi nakuba kubaphoxile ukuphazanyiswa yiKaizer Chiefs embangweni wesicoco seligi yeBetway Premiership kodwa lokhu akusho ukuthi sekufanele baphonse ithawula. IPirates isaqhwakele kwi-log yize ilahle amaphuzu amqoka ngokubambana neChiefs emdlalweni weBetway Premiership ngempelasonto edlule, e-FNB Stadium, eNasrec. Okusemqoka ukukuqaphela ngalo mphumela wukuthi iPirates ihleli ngesinqe esisodwa esicongweni ngoba iMamelodi Sundowns eyimise kabi, isele ngomdlalo. USebelebele owasayiniswa iPirates njengomdlali wasezimpondweni esuka kwi-TS Galaxy, usengomunye wababizwa kuqala uma kuboshelwa ukhonkolo wodonga lwasemuva esikimini sePirates. Nakuba ehlalisa ebhentshini abadlali abanamava kule ndawo okunguDeano van Rooyen noBandile Shandu kodwa kunzima ukuphikisa isinqumo somqeqeshi, u-Abdeslam Ouaddou, ngoSebelebele kwazise nguyena olamule kukubi emdlalweni weChiefs. USebelebele osebonakale emidlalweni engu-27 kuyona yonke imiqhudelwano ubengaqali ukulamulela iPirates kunzima kwazise nakwiMTN 8 wenza okufanayo bebhekene neSundowns kowandulela owamanqamu. Kule midlalo engu-27, uSebelebele useshaye amagoli amahlanu okungamathathu eligi namabili kwi-MTN8. Ngesikhathi lo mdlali ekhuluma nethimba labezindaba lePirates emuva komdlalo wabakhaya, akafihlanga ukuthi baphoxekile kodwa wafunga ukuthi akekho kubona ozogobisa ikhanda kule midlalo esele. “Ukudlala ngokulingana neChiefs kuyafana nokulahla amaphuzu kwazise sisembangweni wesicoco onzima neqembu elisijwayele,” kusho uSebelebele kwi-Orlando Pirates TV. “Kusobala ukuthi iChiefs ibikuhlelile ukuthi izosidlalisa kabi. Kubukeka sengathi kuyisizile lokhu ngoba nakhu yona ithole umphumela okubukeka sengathi ibiwufuna. “Ngiyavuma kuyasiphazamisa lokhu embangweni kodwa ngiyafunga ukuthi ngeke kusenze siphelelwe wukuzethemba kumbe kusifakele umqondo wokuphonsa ithawula ngawo. “Kuningi okusengenzeka kule sizini ngakho-ke okwethu wukuqinisa ekutheni kasisaqhuzuki kungafanele njengoba senzile kwiChiefs."

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UMQEQESHI we-Orlando Pirates, u-Abdeslam Ouaddou, ekhuluma nabadlali bakhe ngesikhathi bebhekene neKaizer Chiefs KASISEKHO isidingo nesikhathi sokuthi abadlali be-Orlando Pirates banake okushiwo ngabo ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ngoba ukuqhuzuka kwabo kwiKaizer Chiefs kuncane kakhulu uma kuqhathaniswa nethuba lokuphothula umsebenzi omuhle abawuqale ngo-Agasti, nyakenye, abami phambi kwalo. Lawa ngamazwi enkuthazo ashiwo ngumqeqeshi wePirates, u-Abdeslam Ouaddou, ewabhekise kubadlali bakhe ngesikhathi ekhuluma nabezindaba abenesithangami nabo kulandela ukubambana neChiefs ngo 1-1 emdlalweni weBetway Premiership ngeSonto e-FNB Stadium, eNasrec. Lo mphumela uyiphazamisile iPirates esemjahweni wesicoco seligi oshubile neMamelodi Sundowns. Nakuba iPirates isaqhwakele kodwa ihleli ngesinqe esisodwa esicongweni njengoba inamaphuzu angu-59 okuyenza ibe ngcono ngelilodwa kwiSundowns esele ngomdlalo nelele isibili (58). Emuva komdlalo wabakhaya, umuzwa obuqhamuka ekhempini yePirates ubukhomba ukuphoxeka kwazise leli qembu lifike lithwelwe ngeqoma njengoba lisanda kuxebula iChiefs ngo 3-0. “Isikhathi esiphila kusona siyaphoqa ukuthi ngivikele abadlali bami kukona konke okuzoshiwo ngabo ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ngenxa yomphumela esiwuthole kwiChiefs,” kusho u-Ouaddou. “Ngiyazi ukuthi ngeke ngibavimbe abasho konke abakuthandayo ngePirates ezinkundleni zokuxhumana kodwa okufanele kwaziwe ngabadlali bami ngukuthi ngiyaziqhenya ngabo. “Ngeke ngivume ukuthi umsebenzi wabo ongaka abawenze kusukela kuqala isizini ukuthi ushatshalaliswe yimibhalo engasho lutho ezinkundleni zokuxhumana. “Ukube nginamandla ngabe ngithi abadlali bami ake baphume ezinkundleni zokuxhumana kuze kube siyawuqeda umsebenzi osihlalele. “Ngeke siliphonse ithawula kuze kube sekugcineni ngisho singaqhuzuka kaningi kangakanani. “Konke okwenzeka kithina yingoba kufanele ngakho-ke ngeke kubasize abadlali ukunaka okushiwo ngabo ngenxa yokuqhuzuka,” kusho u-Ouaddou. Ngesikhathi iPirates ibuyela enkundleni ngokubhekana neStellenbosch FC ngoMeyi 5 - iSundowns ematasa nangamalungiselelo omdlalo wamanqamu weCaf Champions League - iyobe isidlale ekhaya nasekuhambeni nePolokwane City.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UMQEQESHI weMamelodi Sundowns, uMiguel Cardoso NAKUBA okuningi kubukeka sengathi kuvuna iMamelodi Sundowns embangweni wesicoco seBetway Premiership kodwa ikhombisa izimpawu zokuba nameva indlela yayo ebheke esicocweni sayo sesishiyagalolunye kulandelana uma uyiqhathanisa neyezimbangi zayo i-Orlando Pirates. Inhloko yabaqeqeshi kwiSundowns, uMiguel Cardoso, kayizange ikuphike lokhu ngesikhathi ikhuluma nabezindaba ebisesithangamini nabo kulandela ukulahla amaphuzu ngokubambana ngo 0-0 neRichards Bay FC ngeSonto, eMhlathuze Sports Complex. Umdlalo weSundowns olandelayo ibhekene kuwona neqembu elilwela i-Top 8, iPolokwane City kusasa ngo-7.30 ebusuku eSeshego Stadium, eLimpopo. Kubukeka kuzoba wumthwalo kwiSundowns ukuthi izodlalela eSeshego ekubeni kucacele ngisho ingane ukuthi ithwale kanzima kangakanani eMhlathuze okuyinkundla ethi kayifane. ISundowns izosuka kulowo mdlalo iphinde yamukele iPolokwane kodwa ekhaya ngoMeyi 3, bese kuba yiKaizer Chiefs esefomini kulezi zinsuku. Ngaphambi kokusonga isizini ekuhambeni nge-TS Galaxy ehlale iyithwalisa ubunzima iSundowns, izodlalela ekhaya kuqala neSiwelele FC. Yonke le midlalo iza kwiSundowns nezivivinyo ezinzima kulandela ukukhombisa kwayo izimpawu zokuba buthaka kwazise idlale ngokulingana kwemibili edlule yeligi. Maphakathi nale midlalo yeligi, kukhona owomlenze wokuqala weChampions League ne-AS Far yaseMorocco, ngoMeyi 15. Nakuba ingacentiwe indlela yePirates kodwa eyayo ikhombisa izimpawu zokuthamba yize kungelula ukuqagela umphumela kungakadlalwa. Imidlalo esalele iPirates ngeyeStellenbosch FC, Magesi FC, Durban City ne-Orbit College. UCardoso ukwamukele eMhlathuze ukuthi iBay ibuveze obala ubuthaka beSundowns ikakhulukazi uma behlasela. “IBay ibuveze obala ubuthaka bethu uma sihlasela ngakho-ke siyabonga ukuthi kukhona esikufundile kuwona,” kusho uCardoso sakubhuqa. “Siyasamukela isimo esikusona namaphutha esiwenzile siyawazi ngakho-ke akukho okuzoshintsha ngaphandle kokulungela ukubhekana nesivivinyo esilandelayo,” kushaya uCardoso ngamafuphi. Omunye umdlalo weBetway Premiership onamuhla iSiwelele FC izobhekana neKaizer Chiefs ngo-7.30 ebusuku, eFree State Stadium, eBloemfontein.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: USIPHESIHLE Ndlovu weKaizer Chiefs emaka uRelebohile Mofokeng we-Orlando Pirates ABAQEQESHI be-Orlando Pirates neKaizer Chiefs bajikijelane ngezimbokodo zamazwi alumelayo kulandela umdlalo wabakhaya weBetway Premiership obekugqame kuwona okubi kunengcwenga yebhola ngeSonto ntambama, e-FNB Stadium, eNasrec. IPirates neChiefs babambane ngo 1-1 okungumphumela obukeke sengathi uphazamisa ezika-Ouaddou embangweni wesicoco seligi neMamelodi Sundowns. Ngaphambi kokuthi uqale lo mdlalo ohlehliswe ngemizuzu engu-35 ngenxa yokungafiki ngesikhathi kwabalandeli, kusuke isidumo phakathi kwabaqaphi bePirates nethimba elenza okufanayo kwiChiefs. Ngokusho kukaKhalil Ben Youssef kwabezindaba, iPirates ngeke iyiwine iligi uma izoqhubeka nokuziphatha ngendlela ayichaze njengengamukelekile. “Lo mdlalo ububukwa wumhlaba wonke kodwa okwenziwe yizitha kithina ngaphambi kokuqala komdlalo kuyaphoxa,” kusho uBen Youssef. “Kungani bengasivumeli ukuthi sikhululeke senze esithanda ukukwenza enkundleni esivumelekile ukuba kuyona? Uma abantu becabanga ukuthi la maqhinga abawasebenzisayo azobawinisa iligi kabakhohlwe,” kusho lo mqeqeshi sakubhuqa iPirates. U-Abdeslam Ouaddou wePirates akazange aliyeke ithuba lokugxeka iChiefs ngamaqhinga awachaze njengamabi okulimaza abadlali bakhe baphambili u-Oswin Appollis, Relebohile Mofokeng noTsepang Moremi othinteke esiwombeni sokuqala. “Kufanele ukuba kubaphoxile abalandeli beChiefs ukuthi iqembu labo lijabulela ukucazelana amaphuzu ngendlela engiyibone enkundleni,” kusho u-Ouaddou. “Kusobala ukuthi bebengazizele bona enkundleni kepha bebezophazamisa. Okunye okungishiye ngishaqekile yindlela abebedlalisa kabi ngayo abadlali bami. “Besizele ukuzodlala ibhola kodwa sizithole sesidlala i-karate,” kusho u-Ouaddou ngokuqinisa unyawo ngokweqile kweChiefs. Yize iChiefs iphazamise iPirates ngokuyibamba, kusengaba yilona futhi leli qembu laseNaturena, eliyiwezayo kwazise lisenomdlalo neSundowns ngaphambi kokusonga isizini.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UMLANDELI weDurban City uNompumelelo Nene nenkakha yebhola yakuleli eyinxusa leBetway Premiership, uLehlohonolo Majoro. Yini ebanga ukuthi inkomishi yeBetway ilandele i-Orlando iPirates emidlalweni yeligi ekubeni kungeyona ompetha? Ngabe kukhona iPremier Soccer League (PSL) efuna ukusitshela khona esingakwazi? Yonke le mibuzo nokubabaza kusabalele ezinkundleni zokuxhumana lapho abalandeli bezibuza khona beziphendula ngembangela yokubonakala kwenkomishi yeligi emidlalweni yePirates kodwa hhayi kweyompetha iMamelodi Sundowns. Iningi likhale ngokuthi laqala ukuyibona emdlalweni wePirates neRichards Bay FC owaphela ngo 2-2 eMhlathuze Sports Complex ngo-Ephreli 10, njengoba iphinde yavela nasemdlalweni wabakhaya neKaizer Chiefs ngeSonto eFNB Stadium, eNasrec. Eqinisweni le ndebe yayikhona eChatsworth Stadium ngesikhathi iqembu eliyivikelayo, iSundowns, libhekene neDurban City emdlalweni elawunqoba ngo 1-0 ngo-Ephreli 7. Njengoba le ndebe isithe ukwehluka phezulu uma iqhathaniswa nale eyaqukulwa amaBrazilians ekupheleni kwesizini, kungenzeka ukuthi abaxhasi basebenzise umdlalo omkhulu njengowabakhaya baseSoweto ukuthi baphinde bakhangise ngayo. INDEBE yeBetway Premiership eyaqukulwa yiMamelodi Sundowns ekupheleni kwesizini ka-2024/25 (kwesokunxele) nendebe yeBetway Premiership ethe ukwehluka ezophakanyiswa yiqembu elizoba ngompetha besizini ka-2025/26 (kwesokudla).

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: ABADLALI beKaizer Chiefs nabe-Orlando Pirates bephakanyelwa yimimoya ngesikhathi kuqhubeka umdlalo wabakhaya ngeSonto e-FNB Stadium, eNasrec Orlando Pirates (0) 1 KUFANE nokuthi iKaizer Chiefs ifaka usawoti esilondeni se-Orlando Pirates kulandela ukuyiphazamisa ngomphumela ka 1-1 weBetway Premiership ovune iMamelodi Sundowns embangweni wesicoco seligi. IChiefs ivule inkundla ngegoli likaPule Mmodi esiwombeni sesibili kodwa walinganisa eduze uKamogelo Sebelebele emdlalweni obungeSonto ntambama, e-FNB Stadium, eNasrec. Ngaphandle kokulimala kukaTshepang Moremi akukho okutheni okwenzeke esiwombeni sokuqala salo mdlalo oqale ulindelwe ngabomvu. IPirates iyona ebifika kaningi kuvalwe amehlo ezintini zeChiefs kodwa kunqabe uBrandon Petersen obala ukhasha esiwombeni sokuqala nakwesesibili. UMoremi, okungangatshazwa ukuthi uzohamba noHugo Broos (obekhona enkundleni) kwiNdebe yoMhlaba, akazange asiqede isiwombe sokuqala ngenxa yokulimala indawo yakhe yathathwa nguPatrick Maswanganyi. Ngaphandle kokubona uMoremi ethinteka kufanele ukuba uBroos ubuqaphelile ubuqhawe bukaPetersen, owakhinyabezwa wukugula ngaphambi komdlalo wabakhaya wangasekupheleni kukaFebhuwari, endleleni yakhe eyayibheke kwiBafana. Emuva komdlalo uPetersen utshele abakwaSuperSport ukuthi yize eyicabanga indaba yeBafana neNdebe yoMhlaba kodwa okusemqoka kuyena wukusiza iChiefs. “Ngifikelwa ngumunyu ukuthi ngiqokwe njengomdlali ovelele namuhla ngoba ngiphuma ebunzimeni kulezi zinyanga ezedlule,” kusho uPetersen. “Ngijabule ngendlela engidlale ngayo kodwa okumnandi nakakhulu wukusiza iChiefs. OkweBafana kuzozenzekela uma ngiqhubeka nokwenza kahle kwiChiefs.” Igoli leChiefs likaMmodi lakhiwe nguWandile Duba kwathi elePirates likaSebelebele lakhiwa nguDeon Hotto. Ukudlala ngokulingana kwePirates kukhulula iSundowns esele ngomdlalo owodwa kuleli qembu laseSoweto.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: URELEBOHILE Mofokeng no-Oswin Appollis be-Orlando Pirates okulindeleke ukuthi bawuqale umdlalo wabakhaya neKaizer Chiefs kwiBetway Premiership KASIKHO isimo esingaphoqa ukuthi i-Orlando Pirates ishintshe isikimu kumbe indlela edlala ngayo ngoba ithuba lokuqeda indlala yeminyaka yesicoco seligi elimi phambi kwayo lidaleke ngoba leli qembu laseSoweto belizibophezele ukudlala ibhola elihehayo kusukela isizini iqala. Lokhu kushiwo yinhloko yabaqeqeshi kwiBucs, u-Abdeslam Ouaddou, ngesikhathi ekhuluma nabezindaba eGoli ngoLwesine esithangamini somdlalo wabakhaya baseSoweto ngaphansi kweBetway Premiership kusasa ngo-3 ntambama, e-FNB Stadium, eNasrec. I-Pirates izokwamukela iChiefs ngenhloso yokuyiphinda ngenduku njengoba yenza ngoFebhuwari ukuze izigcine ihleli esicongweni kwi-log kwazise iMamelodi Sundowns eyimise kabi, nayo inomdlalo weligi neRichards Bay FC khona kusasa ngo-5.30 ntambama eMhlathuze Sports Complex. Umbango ushubile phakathi kwePirates eqhwakele ngamaphuzu angu-58 neSundowns esele ngomdlalo kodwa elele isibili ngawu-57. U-Ouaddou uphendule abezindaba ngokuthi lokho akakucabangi ngisho elele ngesikhathi bembuza ukuthi kungenzeka yini kubonakale izinguquko esikimini kwazise sekumqoka kakhulu kunakuqala ukungawalahli amaphuzu. “Isikimu sethu sizisho sona ngakho-ke kangisiboni isidingo sokuhlakaza umshini ekubeni ugaya ngendlela esivele sifuna ugaye ngayo. IPirates imelwe wukudlala ibhola elihehayo ngaso sonke isikhathi. Siyaziqhenya ngendlela abadlali bethu abazinikele ngayo ekusebenzeni nakakhulu kwazise esikufuna kubona kungaphezulu kokujwayekile. “Ngeke sisishintshe isikimu kumbe indlela esidlala ngayo ngoba sinomgomo wokuthi wonke amawini ePirates kufanele aphelezelwe yibhola elenza abalandeli baziqhenye ngeqembu labo. Siyakuqonda ukuthi umdlalo esiya kuwona unzima kodwa kithina akukho okuzoshintsha okuhlanganisa nale eminye ezosisalela uma sesiqede neChiefs." Imidlalo yeBetway Premiership kule mpelasonto NgoMgqibelo: AmaZulu FC v Chippa United (Moses Mabhida Stadium, 3pm), Sekhukhune United v Marumo Gallants (Peter Mokaba Stadium, 5.30pm) NgeSonto: Orlando Pirates v Kaizer Chiefs (FNB Stadium, 3pm); Polokwane City v Stellenbosch FC (Old Peter Mokaba Stadium, 3pm); TS Galaxy v Magesi FC (Mbombela Stadium, 3pm); Richards Bay FC v Mamelodi Sundowns (Umhlathuze Sports Complex, 5.30pm)

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UBERNARDO Silva odlala isizini yakhe yokugcina kwiMan City Image: MAN CITY/FACEBOOK KUNGASE kuphenduleke imibuzo eminingi kule mpelasonto ngokungase kugcine kwenzekile kule sizini ebholeni lase-England kusuka eqenjini elizogoduka nesicoco sePremier League (PL) phakathi kwe-Arsenal neManchester City, kuya ekutheni iChelsea ingavuka yini emaqandeni kulandela ukuxosha kwayo uLiam Rosenior. IManchester City isiqhwakele kwi-log kulandela iwini yayo eshovele ngayo iBurnley ehlathini, kwiChampionship, maphakathi nesonto. Lo mphumela ugudluze i-Arsenal esicongweni yize amaphuzu elingana (70). Izinto kwiChelsea zimapeketwane kulandela ukuxosha kwayo uRosenior emqashe ngoJanuwari. Kule mpelasonto iChelsea inethuba lokukhohlwa ngeligi njengoba inomdlalo weFA Cup neLeeds United. Imidlalo yeFA Cup kayikuvimbi nokho ukuqhubeka kweyeligi njengoba i-Arsenal izokwamukela iNewcastle emdlalweni oyinika ithuba lokubuyela esicongweni yize izobe iphambili ngomdlalo kwiCity. Manchester City v Southampton (Wembley Stadium, FC Cup semifinal, namuhla ngo-6.15pm) Njengoba iManchester City isihleli esicongweni kwi-log yePL kufanele ukuba izofika ihamba ize iqholoshe kulo mdlalo ebhekene kuwona neqembu elihluleke wukuqoqa amaphuzu agcwele ekhaya emdlalweni weChampionship neBristol City maphakathi nesonto. Yize iSouthampton ikhiphe amaqembu athathwa njenganzima e-England kwiFA Cup kule sizini, okuhlanganisa ne-Arsenal, kodwa ezikaPep Guardiola zibukeka zingeke zidinge ngisho igiya lesithathu ukuzibekisela indawo emdlalweni wamanqamu. Okufanele ukuba sekuyaqala ukubusa umqondo wabaxhumene neCity ngukuthi leli qembu lisethubeni lokuqeda isizini nezinkomishi ezintathu ezimqoka njengoba iCarabao Cup isisemgodleni. ISITOBHA se-Arsenal uGabriel (kwesokunxele) nomdlali wasesiswini uDeclan Rice Image: FCAEBOOK / ARSENAL Arsenal v Newcastle (Emirates Stadium, PL, namuhla ngo-6.30pm) UMikel Arteta nezakhe baphoqelekile ukunqoba umdlalo weligi neNewcastle kulandela ukuguqa kwabo esibayeni seCity ngempelasonto edlule. Akuzibeki ukuthi i-Arsenal yadlala ibhola elingcono ngesikhathi ishaywa yiCity kodwa lokhu kufanele iqhubeke nakho ukuze iphinde iqinise amathuba ayo embangweni wesicoco. Ngaphandle kobumqoka bamaphuzu, iwini ye-Arsenal izobuyisela ingcindezi kwiCity ngoba ukusala ngomdlalo akusho ukuthi amaphuzu uwaphethe ngesandla. Chelsea v Leeds (Wembley Stadium, FA Cup semifinal, kusasa ngo-4pm) Izinto ziyinhlakanhlaka kwiChelsea kulandela ukuxosha kwayo uRosenior emuva kokutalajwa yiBrighton Albion ngo 3-0 ngoLwesibili. Bekungokwesihlanu kulandelana leli qembu laseLondon linqotshwa kwiligi. Kuyona yonke le midlalo yeligi iChelsea eshaywe kuyona ilandelana kayizange ilishaye igoli, okuyinto eyagcina ukwenzeka ngo-1912. Lo mdlalo weFA Cup uzonika uCalum McFarlane, obanjiswe kuze kuphele isizini, ithuba lokuhlala phansi nabadlali bazisholo bona ukuthi bafunani kwazise nemibiko yokuthi bebengamuzwa uRosenior kayizibekile phansi ezinkundleni zokuxhumana. Imidlalo yePremier League kule mpelasonto NgoMgqibelo: 1.30pm - Fulham v Aston Villa; 4pm - West Ham v Everton, Wolves v Tottenham, Liverpool v Palace; 6.30pm - Arsenal v Newcastle.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UMQEQESHI we-Orlando Pirates, u-Abdeslam Ouaddou, nomuye wamabamba kwiKaizer Chiefs, uKhalil Ben Youssef, bekhuluma ngomdlalo wabakhaya izolo, eHouhgton, eGoli UKUZIXAKA ngokwenziwa yiMamelodi Sundowns ekubeni isamelwe wumqansa weKaizer Chiefs emdlalweni wabakhaya ngeke kuyisize ngalutho i-Orlando Pirates embangweni wesicoco seBetway Premiership. Lena yimpendulo yomqeqeshi wePirates, u-Ouaddou, ayinike abezindaba ngesikhathi bembuza ngokusizwa yiSundowns ukuba bahlale esicongweni kulandela ukulahla kwayo amaphuzu ngokubambana neStellenbosch FC ngoLwesithathu ekhaya. U-Ouaddou ubekhuluma esithangamini nabezindaba izolo, eHoughton, eGoli ngomdlalo weligi wePirates neChiefs obhekwe ngabomvu ngeSonto ngo-3 ntambama, e-FNB Stadium, eNasrec. IPirates inethuba lokulinweba kuqala igebe esicongweni ngeSonto, kwazise neSundowns inomdlalo omqoka ekuhambeni neRichards Bay FC ngosuku olufanayo kodwa ngo-5.30 ntambama. Esikhundleni sokukhombisa injabulo ngabakwenzelwe yiStellenbosch, u-Ouaddou ugxile ekutheni iqembu lakhe linake iChiefs okuyiyona elandelayo. “Okuseqhulwini ukuthi silindele iChiefs eyehlukile kunale esisanda kubhekana nayo ngoba imiphumela yayo yakamuva iyakufakazela lokhu,” kusho u-Ouaddou. “Ukuzixaka ngokwenziwa yiSundowns ekubeni sinomldlalo onzima njengoweChiefs kungafana nokuzibulala thina sibhekile. “Siyakwazi esikufunayo ekupheleni kwesizini futhi siyaqonda ukuthi ukuze sifike kukona kufanele siqale sidlule ezihibeni ezifana nokubhekana neChiefs esefomini. “Kuyasiphoqa ukuthi sizibambe ziqine kulo mdlalo ngoba iChiefs ihamba ngomgqigqo omuhle ekubeni liselisha igqubu lokuthi sisanda kuyishaya. “Okusemqoka ukukukhumbula ngaso sonke isikhathi ukuthi esingakulawula yilokhu okusezandleni zethu kuphela, bese konke okunye sikubeka kwizidalwa zikanobhutshuzwayo,” kusho u-Ouaddou. Umbango wesicoco phakathi kwePirates eqhwakele ngamaphuzu angu-58 neSundowns elele isibili ngawu-57 kodwa esele ngomdlalo, uya ngokushuba njengoba nemidlalo esele isimbalwa ukuthi kusongwe isizini. Isiyonke imidlalo yeBetway Premiership kule mpelasonto imi kanje: Durban City v Orbit College (Chatsworth Stadium, 7.30pm); Golden Arrows v Siwelele FC (King Zwelithini Stadium, 7.30pm). AmaZulu FC v Chippa United (Moses Mabhida Stadium, 3pm); Sekhukhune United v Marumo Gallants (Peter Mokaba Stadium, 5.30pm). Orlando Pirates v Kaizer Chiefs (FNB Stadium, 3pm); Polokwane City v Stellenbosch FC (Old Peter Mokaba Stadium, 3pm); TS Galaxy v Magesi FC (Mbombela Stadium, 3pm); Richards Bay FC v Mamelodi Sundowns (Mhlathuze Sports Complex, 5.30pm).

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: ABADLALI beMamelodi Sundowns, u-Arthur Sales noKhuliso Mudau, emuva kokuyeka elinye lamathuba ngesikhathi bebhekene neStellenbosch FC UMQEQESHI weMamelodi Sundowns, uMiguel Cardoso, uyaqonda ukuthi kufanele banyathele ngokucophelela kule midlalo esele ngoba bacushelwe imigoga ngapha nangapha. Lo mqeqeshi uthe abadlali bakhe akufanele babe budedengu njengoba kwenzekile belahla amaphuzu abezobabuyisela esicongweni se-log yeBetway Premiership. ISundowns, ebinethuba lokweqa i-Orlando Pirates esicongweni kwi-log, ibambane  ngo 1-1 neStellenbosch FC ngoLwesithathu ebusuku, eLoftus Versveld Stadium, ePitoli. Lo mphumela ugcine iPirates iqhwakele yize iphambili ngomdlalo owodwa kwiSundowns, esalelwe imidlalo yeligi eyisithupha. I-Orlando Pirates izobhekana neKaizer Chiefs eFNB Stadium, ngeSonto ngo-3 ntambama. IMamelodi Sundowns izovakashela iRichards Bay FC eMhlathuze Sports Complex, ngosuku olufanayo ngo-5.30 ntambama. Nakuba uCardoso ebeshumayela ivangeli lokugwema ubudedengu eqenjini lakhe kodwa kugcine kuzwakala sengathi inkulumo yakhe iqonde kuKhulumani Ndamane odale iphenathi ngemizuzu yokugcina. “Kasisekho isikhathi sokufundisana ngoba yonke imiphumela esiyitholayo isinomthelela omuhle uma uvune thina noma omubi njengoba kwenzekile koweStellenbosch,” kusho uCardoso. “Ngiyavuna kusenamabhawodi okusafanele aqiniswe kuyena ngoba usemncane (uNdamane) kodwa besingekho isidingo sokwenza ngale ndlela enze ngayo. Ngeledlule, kwiCaf Champions League ushaye into ecokeme kodwa kulokhu ube budedengu. Ziningi izindlela abengagwema ngazo isimo esizithole sikusona kungafanele. “Akuyena yedwa kepha namathuba esiwathole umdlalo wonke kasizange siwasebenzise ngendlela,” kusho uCardoso. Lo mqeqeshi wasePortugal ukhuluma kanjena nje, uNdamane ungomunye wabadlali ababukeka bezothola indawo esikwatini seBafana Bafana esiya kwiNdebe yoMhlaba. Kulesi sikwati uNdamane ubanga kusona indawo noMbekezeli Mbokazi, Nkosinathi Sibisi, Ime Okon, Grant Kekana noSiyabonga Ngezana. Muva nje, umqeqeshi weLamontville Golden Arrows, uManqoba Mngqithi, uphumele obala wakhomba amabala esikwatini sikaHugo Broos, ikakhulukazi kubadlali basemuva bamaphakathi nendawo. “Uma ngicabanga amava abagadli esiyobhekana nabo kwiNdebe yoMhlaba bese ngibuka izitobha zethu okufanele zibavimbe, ngisala nemibuzo esikhundleni sezipendulo,” kusho uMngqithi ngesikwati uNdamane ayingxenye yaso.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UMENGAMELI weSkebhe, uMnuz Sibangani Manyathi, wethule inkampani yonogada iSkebhe National  Protection Services eZero Lounge eNquthu SELIZOGAYA ngomunye umhlathi enhlanganweni iSkebhe njengoba sekunophiko lonogada. Lokhu kuvele emcimbini wokwethulwa kwenkampani yonogada, Iskebhe National Protection Services, eZero Lounge eNquthu, ngoLwesihlanu. ISkebhe inhlangano eyayisungulelwe ukuqapha ukwebiwa kwezinkomo ezindaweni zaKwaZulu-Natal, njengoba seyilwa nayo yonke inhlobo yobugebengu nakwezinye izifundazwe zakuleli. Ekhuluma kulo mcimbi uMengameli weSkebhe, uMnuz Sibangani Manyathi, uthe inhlosongqangi ngokuqhamuka nale nkampani akukhona ukukhanda imali kodwa ukuqinisa izindlela zokulwa nobugebengu. Uthe abahlosile ukuzophazamisa ukusebenza kwezinye izinkampani zonogada kodwa ukusebenzisana nazo ukunqanda ubugebengu obubhokile kuleli. UManyathi uthe banxuswe ngamalungu eSkebhe ukuba kusungulwe inkampani yonogada. Uthe ngeke onogada babo basebenze eNquthu kuphela kodwa bazosabalala wonke amadolobha nezifundazwe zakuleli. "Uma onogada bethu befuneka eThekwini, bazokuya kuleyo nkampani abadingeka kuyo." Uthe izandla bazivule kunoma wubani ofuna ukusebenzisana nabo, okungaba abanikazi bamapulazi nabamabhizinisi anhlobonhlobo. IPhini likaMengameli weSkebhe, uMnuz Zakhele Mncube, lithe nakuba bezobabhekelela nabantu abangamalungu eSkebhe njengoba besasebenza ngokuvolontiya kodwa bazobe beqasha onogada abaqeqeshelwe lo msebenzi ngoba bazobe belandela imithetho, imigomo nemibandela ebekwe uhulumeni.
